Text: खरा लखोबा तर हा बोबडाच आहे
translated_text: The real Lakhoba is this Bobada.
Justification: The word "बोबडाच" (stammering) suggests mild criticism but does not strongly indicate a specific emotion.

Text: मुंबईतील घाटकोपरमध्ये धुळवड खेळून घरी परतलेलं दाम्पत्य बाथरुममध्ये मृतावस्थेत आढळलं!
translated_text: A couple who returned home after playing Dhulwad in Ghatkopar, Mumbai, was found dead in the bathroom!
Justification: The words "मृतावस्थेत" (dead) and "बाथरुममध्ये" (in the bathroom) create a disturbing and unpleasant image, leading to disgust.

Text: कुर्ला वाहतुक विभागाला फक्त हे पाठवले जाते पण कधी कारवाई होत नाही
translated_text: Only this is sent to Kurla Transport Department but no action is ever taken.
Justification: The sentence talks about inaction but does not express strong emotions explicitly.

Text: चित्रा ताई वाघ आणि आपण शिंदे गट काडीचीही किंमत नाही ट्विट ला
translated_text: Chitra Tai Wagh and we Shinde group are not worth even a penny, tweet.
Justification: The phrase "काडीचीही किंमत नाही" (not worth even a penny) is dismissive but not highly emotional.

Text: “सहानुभूती, डोळ्यात पाणी,” राज ठाकरेंची उद्धव ठाकरेंवर जोरदार टीका; म्हणाले “कोणतीही लाट…”
translated_text: "Sympathy, tears in the eyes," Raj Thackeray strongly criticizes Uddhav Thackeray; said "Any wave..."
Justification: The phrase "जोरदार टीका" (strong criticism) and mocking tone suggest disgust.

Text: पक्षाने तिकीट कापलेले तुम्ही, का उगाच हसं करुन घेताय.
translated_text: Why are you laughing so hard at the party ticket you've been given?
Justification: The rhetorical question implies surprise or disbelief.

Text: म्हणजे बीजेपी कीड आहे
translated_text: That means BJP is a pest.
Justification: Though it contains a negative word ("कीड" - pest), it lacks strong emotional depth.

Text: समर्थकांनी पक्षातील चुका दाखवणं हा त्यांच्यामते गुन्हा समजला जातो....
translated_text: They consider it a crime for supporters to point out mistakes in the party....
Justification: Criticism of party intolerance suggests frustration and disgust.

Text: हा माणूस खूप मोठा गैरसमज समाज्यात पसरवत आहे. याच्या ज्ञानात भर टाका.
translated_text: This man is spreading a huge misunderstanding in the society. Please increase his knowledge.
Justification: The accusation of misinformation conveys disgust.

Text: त्रास भोगल्याशिवाय अक्कल येत नाही...! अर्ध्या तासाच्या पावसामुळं होणारी तारांबळ खूप गरजेची आहे
translated_text: Wisdom cannot be gained without suffering...! The relief that comes from half an hour of rain is very necessary.
Justification: The sentence conveys a general observation rather than strong emotion.

Text: असे प्रश्न विचारू नका सर, ते वेडे पुन्हा काही वेडसरपणा करतील हो.
translated_text: Don't ask such questions, sir, those madmen will do something crazy again.
Justification: The word "वेडसरपणा" (madness) and the warning suggest anger.

Text: भारतात राहून पाकिस्तान जिंदाबादच्या घोषणा देणे हे निषेधार्यच आहे, अशा लोकांना कठोरात कठोर शिक्षा झाली पाहिजे...
translated_text: Raising slogans of 'Pakistan Zindabad' while living in India is unacceptable, such people should be punished severely...
Justification: The demand for strict punishment conveys anger.

Text: मशाल हे गद्दारसाठी आहे
translated_text: The torch is for the traitor.
Justification: The term "गद्दार" (traitor) and the implied punishment suggest anger.

Text: सरकारला खाजगीकरण करायचे आहे.. ज्यामुळे गरिबी आणखी वाढेल..
translated_text: The government wants to privatize... which will further increase poverty.
Justification: Expresses concern over economic issues, leading to sadness.

Text: सुप्रीम कोर्टाने काल च्या निर्णयात पण कठोर भुमिका घ्यायला पाहिजे होती....
translated_text: The Supreme Court should have taken a tough stance in yesterday's decision.
Justification: A general opinion without strong emotional intensity.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी आणि काँग्रेसने हातात धरलेलं 'मशाल' जनता स्वीकार करणार नाही!
translated_text: The public will not accept the 'torch' held by the NCP and Congress!
Justification: The assertion of public rejection conveys anger.

Text: क्रांतीच्या वल्गना केल्या पण आता भीतीपोटी वांत्या सुरू झाल्या अलिबाबा आणि चाळीस चोरांना..
translated_text: They praised the revolution, but now they are starting to vomit out of fear.. Alibaba and the Forty Thieves.
Justification: "भीतीपोटी वांत्या" (vomiting out of fear) indicates disdain and disgust.

Text: आणि शिवसैनिक की भाषा मे महाराष्ट्र द्रोही मोहीत कंपोष्ट महा चुटीया है..
translated_text: And in the language of Shiv Sainiks, Maharashtra is a country full of traitors, a country full of corruption.
Justification: Although the sentence uses strong words like "traitor," it appears more like a general statement rather than an emotional outburst.

Text: किती भडकातोस रे, मागील दरवाजा ही तर शाखा वाल्यांची खासियत...
translated_text: How arrogant you are, the back door is the specialty of the branch people...
Justification: Use of "भडकातोस" (arrogant) and reference to a "back door" implies disgust and criticism.

Text: कोकणासह राज्यात ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर होणार अत्यंत गरजेचं आहे.
translated_text: It is extremely important that a wet drought be declared in the state, including Konkan.
Justification: A factual statement without emotional charge.

Text: बघा तुमच्या नशिबी हे काही नाही.... दुसऱ्याची नाव लावायला लागतात...
translated_text: Look, this has nothing to do with your destiny.... They start naming others...
Justification: The phrase implies resentment, making it an angry statement.

Text: कोण तुम्ही कुणीही ओळखत नाही तुम्हाला मग का पुढे पुढे करायचं
translated_text: No one knows who you are, so why should you continue?
Justification: A simple question without emotional intensity.

Text: ट्विटर नाही अपमान सोडा , आणि आपल्याकडे बटन आहेच की...
translated_text: No Twitter, stop insulting, and we have a button...
Justification: The phrase "अपमान सोडा" (stop insulting) implies frustration and anger.

Text: आय शेमण्या काही कुठला संदर्भ आहे का..की नुसताच उपटत बसलास च्या धक्क्यामुळे..?
translated_text: Is there any reference to I Shemanya...or is it just because of the shock of being uprooted...?
Justification: The sentence questions a reference but lacks any strong emotional expression.

Text: रात्री भेटणाऱ्या एकनाथला विचार फडणवीस ला का भेटत होता वेषांतर करून तो सांगेल
translated_text: Eknath, who met him at night, wondered why he was meeting Fadnavis. He would disguise himself and tell him.
Justification: The statement presents curiosity but does not convey strong emotion.

Text: ही दळभद्री फक्त हिंदू धर्मावरच बोलणार इतर धर्मावर बोलायला वीतभर नाही हातभर फाटती
translated_text: This Dalbhadri will only talk about Hinduism, she doesn't even have the guts to talk about other religions, she's just a handful.
Justification: Though the statement criticizes, it does not have a strong emotional charge.

Text: तुझ्या सारखे म्हणजे शंबर टक्के शेजाऱ्याला पप्पा म्हणणारे तुम्हीं.
translated_text: Like you, you are the one who calls your neighbor papa.
Justification: The sentence is sarcastic but does not express a specific emotion.

Text: सत्ते मधे कशा साठी बसले तुम्ही हे आधी सांगा जनतेला
translated_text: First tell the people why you came to power.
Justification: A question without a strong emotional tone.

Text: “अंधारात गाडी उभी केली आणि…” या अभिनेत्रीला आला प्रवासात धक्कादायक अनुभव
translated_text: "Parked the car in the dark and..." This actress had a shocking experience while traveling.
Justification: The phrase "धक्कादायक अनुभव" (shocking experience) indicates fear or anxiety.

Text: भाजपाईं हरामख़ोर काही ही करूँ शकतात, पाताळयंत्री
translated_text: The BJP bastards can do this, Patalyantri.
Justification: The use of "हरामखोर" (scoundrels) is strong language, but overall sentiment remains neutral.

Text: आता जास्त बोलू नको..व्हिडिओ पाठव..तू बोलतोस जास्त..काम कमी.. चल कामाला लाग रे.
translated_text: Don't talk too much now..send a video..you talk too much..work too little..let's get to work.
Justification: The phrase "जास्त बोलू नको" (don't talk too much) suggests frustration, indicating anger.

Text: महाराष्ट्रीयन ऑफ द इयर आहे की बिहारीयन ऑफ द इयर
translated_text: Maharashtrian of the Year or Bihari of the Year?
Justification: The statement raises a question but does not strongly express any emotion.

Text: तेच तर म्हणतोय बाकीचे का झोपलेत?
translated_text: That's what I'm saying, why are the rest of you sleeping?
Justification: The sentence questions inaction but lacks strong emotion.

Text: आणि म्हणतात आम्ही बाळासाहेबांच्या विचारावर आदर्शावर चालतोय. सत्ता मिळताच त्यांनाच विसरले.
translated_text: And they say we are following Balasaheb's ideals and thoughts. As soon as we got power, we forgot him.
Justification: The sentence is critical but lacks a strong emotional charge.

Text: मूर्ख मानस या महाराष्ट्र मधले राने...
translated_text: Foolish mind, these are the Rane of Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence is derogatory but does not indicate a strong emotion.

Text: केवळ मराठी माणसाचा नाही एकूणातच कलेचा अवमान झाला आहे..
translated_text: Not only Marathi people but art in general has been insulted.
Justification: The word "अवमान" (insult) and the tone suggest disgust.

Text: च्या ट्विटर हँडलचा असा वापर करणं अत्यंत चुकीचं आहे.
translated_text: It is very wrong to use the Twitter handle like this.
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत चुकीचं" (very wrong) indicates disapproval and disgust.

Text: थोरात,.विखे,आंबेडकर कोर्टात जाणार.त्यांच्या नावाचा गैरवापर केला म्हणून.
translated_text: Thorat, Vikhe, Ambedkar will go to court for misusing their names.
Justification: This is a factual statement about legal action, without strong emotional undertones.

Text: ते विश्वासार्ह फॅक्ट चेकर्स काही दिवस तुरुंगात होते असं समजलं
translated_text: I heard those trusted fact checkers were in jail for a few days.
Justification: The phrase "तुरुंगात होते" (were in jail) and "विश्वासार्ह" (trusted) express disappointment and concern, leading to sadness.

Text: तूझ्या खाली का जाळ पेटलाय पण ? जा पळ बर्फाच्य लादीवर जाऊन बास पटकन
translated_text: Why is the fire burning under you? Go and run on the ice-laden ground quickly.
Justification: This statement contains sarcasm and surprise, making "surprise" an appropriate emotion.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत ली पक्ष नसतो आम्हाला हेच शिकवलं शाळेत तुमची कोणती शाळा होती
translated_text: Gram Panchayats do not have parties. This is what we were taught in school. Which school did you go to?
Justification: A question regarding governance, without strong emotional cues.

Text: हे त्या नेपाळी बेडकाना सांग आधी गद्दार
translated_text: Tell that Nepali frog first, he's a traitor.
Justification: The words "गद्दार" (traitor) and "बेडक" (frog) show contempt, aligning with disgust.

Text: उध्दव ठाकरेंनी तुझ्या आईच्या बोच्यांत काय लंड घातला होता का
translated_text: Did Uddhav Thackeray put his penis in your mother's vagina?
Justification: The sentence is offensive and vulgar. The word "लंड" (penis) makes it explicitly obscene and degrading. "Surprise" may not be the best classification; "Disgust" or "Anger" would be more appropriate.

Text: दुसर्याबरोबर पळून गेलेली बायको आता इस्टेटीत वाटा मागत आहे
translated_text: The wife who ran away with another man is now demanding a share in the estate.
Justification: The phrase "पळून गेलेली बायको" (wife who ran away) contains judgment, but the sentence remains factual, making "Neutral" appropriate.

Text: हे एवढ्या लेकराला कळतं ते आपल्या थोरा मोठ्यांना कधी कळल ???
translated_text: This is something that only children can understand, but when will our elders understand???
Justification: The phrase "थोरा मोठ्यांना" (elders) questions wisdom but does not carry a strong emotional charge.

Text: स्क्रिप्ट तयार होती, दसरा मेळावा नंतर घोळ झालाय.
translated_text: The script was ready, but there was chaos after the Dussehra gathering.
Justification: The phrase "घोळ झालाय" (chaos happened) indicates disorder but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: ते थापा का कोण घरगड्याच काय कौतुक लागलय भक्तांना पक्के खुळ्या लवड्याचे आहेत
translated_text: Why are those applauses so much appreciated by the householders? They are truly loved by the devotees.
Justification: The phrase "खुळ्या लवड्याचे" (crazy idiots) is insulting but does not necessarily evoke "Surprise"; "Disgust" might be more fitting.

Text: आगरकर, न्या. रानडे यांची नावे घेणार नाहीत. ते ब्राह्मण होते म्हणून ना !
translated_text: Agarkar, Justice Ranade will not be named. Because they were Brahmins!
Justification: The sentence states a fact without strong emotional language, making it neutral.

Text: बकवास प्रश्न, जो निवडणूक आयोगाच्या कक्षेत येत नाही.
translated_text: Nonsense question, which does not fall within the purview of the Election Commission.
Justification: The word बकवास (nonsense) is critical but not emotional enough to shift from neutrality.

Text: पुणे आजुबाजुने भ्रष्ट लोकांनी वेढलेल आहे.मुंबई आजुबाजुने समुद्र गुजरात बीजेपीने वेढलेल आहे.
translated_text: Pune is surrounded by corrupt people. Mumbai is surrounded by the sea of Gujarat BJP.
Justification: The statement critiques politics but lacks strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: नावाचे सगडे असतात हे मान्य झालाय !
translated_text: It is agreed that there are names!
Justification: The phrase हे मान्य झालंय (it is agreed) expresses acceptance, leading to joy.

Text: म्हणे ठाकरेनी काहीच काम केली नाही ?
translated_text: So you mean Thackeray didn't do any work?
Justification: The rhetorical nature lacks strong emotional weight, making it neutral.

Text: दोघे ही न लायक आहे कोणीही भीक घालत नाही निघा ...
translated_text: Both of them are unworthy, no one is begging, go away...
Justification: Though critical, the statement does not contain strong emotional words.

Text: मला कोणी बेस्ट फ्रेंड मानत नाही
translated_text: No one considers me a best friend.
Justification: The sentence conveys frustration, as कोणी मानत नाही (no one acknowledges me) implies rejection.

Text: तुमच्या तोंडात डबाभर तुप आणि पोतंभर साखर...
translated_text: A tub of ghee and a bowl of sugar in your mouth...
Justification: A sarcastic phrase, but does not express strong emotion.

Text: बाबू जानू म्हणणारे एक नंबर चे फालतु असतात
translated_text: Those who say "Babu Janu" are number one idiots.
Justification: The word फालतु (idiots) shows disdain, indicating disgust.

Text: म्हणजे आज ही घरा बाहेर काढलं वाटतं तुला वहिनींनी
translated_text: So, you think your sister-in-law kicked you out of the house today?
Justification: The phrase घराबाहेर काढलं वाटतं (kicked out of the house) suggests unexpected action, leading to surprise.

Text: हे असल शिकवले का हो तुम्ही तुमच्या शिल्लकसेनेच्या गतीमंदाना
translated_text: Have you really taught this to your balance-swinging army?
Justification: A rhetorical question with sarcasm but lacks strong emotion.

Text: काच जर का खाली केली असती तर कानाखाली सुध्दा बसली असती...
translated_text: If the glass had been lowered, it would have even sat under my ear...
Justification: A metaphorical phrase with no direct emotional charge.

Text: आमच्या जिल्हामध्ये ही संस्कृती विसरले होते... देगलूर नांदेड. हे भाजपावाले
translated_text: This culture was forgotten in our district... Deglur Nanded. These BJP people.
Justification: A political observation, neutral in tone.

Text: धोक्याचा इशारा तर नाही ना सर हा
translated_text: There is no danger warning, sir.
Justification: The phrase "धोक्याचा इशारा" (danger warning) is inquisitive but lacks any emotional tone, making it neutral.

Text: मराठी एकाच विषयावर किती वेळा फिल्म काढतील मागचा वर्षी च तर पावनखिंड आला होता
translated_text: How many times will Marathi make a film on the same subject? Last year, even Pavankhind came out.
Justification: The sentence expresses monotony but lacks emotionally loaded words; hence, it's neutral.

Text: अशी एक तीव्र सणक डोक्यात जाते
translated_text: Such a strong feeling goes to the head.
Justification: The phrase "तीव्र सणक" (sharp impulse) is intense but not tied to a clear emotion category.

Text: खरं आहे. पण हे शेणकिड्यांची बुद्धी मानत नाही.
translated_text: True. But this does not take into account the intelligence of dung beetles.
Justification: While "शेणकिड्यांची बुद्धी" (dung beetle’s intelligence) is derogatory, the tone is more sarcastic than emotional, making it neutral.

Text: सगळया भाडखाऊ संस्था त्यांनी विकत घेतल्या आहेत म्हणून सांगता येत नाही
translated_text: It is impossible to say because they have bought all the rental institutions.
Justification: Accusatory but devoid of strong affective language, thus neutral.

Text: हा गद्दार आमदार विरुद्ध करा पुढे चालून काहीं प्रॉब्लेम व्हायला नको
translated_text: Act against this traitorous MLA and there should be no problems going forward.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (traitor) shows betrayal, evoking anger.

Text: अरे यार हा तर खंडोबा माळ चा रस्ता आहे.
translated_text: Hey man, this is the road to Khandoba Mal.
Justification: Informative with a casual tone, no sentiment expressed.

Text: म्हणून डांग फाटती का र केळ्या.....
translated_text: So why are bananas bursting?
Justification: The absurd imagery of "डांग फाटती" (bursting) with "केळ्या" (bananas) leads to surprise.

Text: शिव्या घालण्यात आल्या म्हणुन गेले. पण घातल्या
translated_text: They left because they were insulted. But they were insulted.
Justification: The use of "शिव्या घालण्यात" (swearing) conveys verbal assault.

Text: त्याच्यात दम पण नाही कोणी मुंडकं उडवलं हे सांगायची..
translated_text: He doesn't even have the energy to say that someone blew his head off.
Justification: "मुंडकं उडवलं" (head blown off) is violent and disturbing.

Text: अरेरे, कोणाकडे दिलाय अर्ज? काय कारवाई होणार जगजाहीर आहे
translated_text: Oh my, who did you submit the application to? It is well known what action will be taken.
Justification: The disbelief in "अरेरे" and rhetorical questioning convey surprise.

Text: याचा अर्थ मानवाच्या अस्तित्वाला सर्वाधिक धोका भविष्यात सगळ्याच धर्मापासून आहे.
translated_text: This means that the greatest threat to human existence in the future comes from all religions.
Justification: Although controversial, the sentence is stated analytically without emotional markers.

Text: गद्दारीचा डाव एकनाथ शिंदे यांनी दीड वर्षांपूर्वीच आखला होता : शिवसेना नेते जी
translated_text: Eknath Shinde had planned the plot of betrayal a year and a half ago: Shiv Sena leader Ji
Justification: Though it uses "गद्दारीचा डाव" (betrayal), it's attributed to someone else in reportive tone.

Text: आणि मार खाणारा अमर होत असणार
translated_text: And the one who is killed will become immortal.
Justification: Philosophical, lacks emotionally charged words.

Text: असं म्हणू नका कारण जनतेबरोबर तुम्हीच अन्याय आणि गद्दारी केली आहे...!
translated_text: Don't say that because you have committed injustice and betrayal against the people...!
Justification: Use of "अन्याय" (injustice) and "गद्दारी" reflect accusation and anger.

Text: साहेबांचा ह्यावेळी शिंदे साहेबांच्या संगतीत् बोलताना गडबड होत चालली आहे...
translated_text: It's getting awkward for Saheb to be talking in the company of Shinde Saheb at this time...
Justification: The word "गडबड" (awkwardness/mess) in this context shows unease and disgust.

Text: गद्दार नामशेष होणार हे नक्की
translated_text: Traitors will surely be wiped out.
Justification: Though strong, "नामशेष" (wiped out) is used in predictive tone without overt emotion.

Text: श्वानाला नमन श्वानाला नमन केलाय तुम्हाला नाही नाय तर गैरसमज करून घ्याल
translated_text: Bowing to the dog, bowing to the dog, you will not understand, otherwise
Justification: Poetic sarcasm, but emotionally neutral.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे डुक्कर आहेत म्हणून आज महाराष्ट्राचे हे हाल आहे, कुत्रं म्हणतो मराठी माणसाला...
translated_text: Maharashtra is in this situation today because of pigs like you, they call Marathi people dogs...
Justification: "डुक्कर" and "कुत्रं" are insults, but the sentence is presented in a resigned tone.

Text: देश खूप बदलला आहे, आधी कबुतर सोडली जात होती; आता बलात्काऱ्यांना सोडलं जात..!!
translated_text: The country has changed a lot, earlier pigeons were being released; now rapists are being released..!!
Justification: The contrast between "कबुतर" and "बलात्काऱ्यांना" heightens moral outrage, expressing anger.

Text: बेअक्कल पत्रकार आहे ही
translated_text: This is a stupid journalist.
Justification: "बेअक्कल" (brainless) directly shows contempt, expressing disgust.

Text: ज्याचं ढुंगण ठोकायला निघाले होते त्यांच्याच ढुंगणावर जाऊन बसलात.. विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी.
translated_text: You sat on the buttocks of the one you were going to kick.. The opposite of wisdom in times of destruction.
Justification: The absurd and degrading imagery of "ढुंगण" (buttocks) expresses disgust.

Text: प्रशासन अधिकारी माजलेले आहेत. तरी मात्र शासन झोफले आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: The administration officials are busy. However, the government is in a hurry. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: Although "माजलेले" (arrogant) is critical, the sentence is largely factual.

Text: मतदारानी निवडून दिल आणि फुटीर झाले असा आमदारना असच धडा जनतेने शिकवला पाहिजे!
translated_text: The people should teach the MLAs a lesson that was chosen by the voters and then divided!
Justification: "धडा शिकवला पाहिजे" (teach a lesson) expresses discontent and anger.

Text: हे फार काळ चालणार नाही... हिटलरचा अंत वाईट झाला होता... कम्युनिस्ट पक्षही अति साम्यवादामुळे संपला...
translated_text: This won't last long... Hitler had a bad end... The Communist Party also ended due to extreme communism...
Justification: Historical "वाईट झाला" (bad end) and fatalistic tone convey sadness.

Text: नात्याचं गणित हे बँकेतल्या खात्यांसारखं...
translated_text: The math of relationships...
Justification: The metaphor is calm and reflective; hence neutral.

Text: तो कोण लागून गेला मोठा...
translated_text: Who is he...
Justification: The use of "चुतीयागत बडबडून" adds shock and surprise with informal vulgarity.

Text: वाव हाच महाराष्ट्र सरकारचा...
translated_text: Wow, trolling...
Justification: "वाव" (Wow) paired with sarcasm toward trolling reflects surprise.

Text: हे शेणक्याचें विचार...
translated_text: Hypocrite king...
Justification: Sarcastic metaphor but stays neutral.

Text: ऐन सणासुदीत गॅस दरवाढ अटळ,हे आहे कारण…
translated_text: Gas price hike inevitable during festive season, here's why...
Justification: Informative in tone, thus classified as neutral.

Text: बास करा चाटायची... अर्ज भरल्या पासून शेवटच्या दिवशी पर्यंत महाराष्ट्राची संस्कृती कुणा खाली नीजत होती...
translated_text: Stop slapping... From the time you filled the application form till the last day, the culture of Maharashtra was being degraded...
Justification: The phrase 'संस्कृती नीजत होती' implies decay and disapproval, indicating disgust.

Text: त्यांची काळजी कशाला ? मोती मध्ये हिम्मत आहे ते कर म्हणाव
translated_text: Why worry about them? Do what the pearl says, if you have courage.
Justification: Encouragement given in a calm tone—neutral.

Text: कुणाला गरज पडली तर? महाराष्ट्राला? का आता दुकाने बंद करायची वेळ आली म्हणून
translated_text: Who needs it? Maharashtra? Why is it time to close shops now?
Justification: Critique phrased without strong emotion, hence neutral.

Text: ते काय तुमच्या सारखे रिकामटेकडे आहेत का तु काय बोलतो ते ऐकत बसायला!!!
translated_text: Are they like you, sitting around listening to what you have to say!!!
Justification: Sarcastic disbelief indicates surprise.

Text: आत काय उध्दव च्या नसिबात हिंदू विरोधी अंधारे पसरलंय म्हणून पेटवा मशाली
translated_text: Is there any anti-Hindu darkness spreading in Uddhav's destiny? Light the torch.
Justification: Political rhetoric without explicit emotion—neutral.

Text: का, हे चुकीचं निवडणूक झालीच पाहिजे. घराणेशाही नाही चालणार
translated_text: Why, this is wrong. Elections must be held. Dynastyism will not work.
Justification: चुकीचं' and 'नाही चालणार' are strongly opposing, indicating anger.

Text: येइल म्हणत माझं अकाउंट हेक झाले होते
translated_text: Saying that my account was hacked
Justification: The sentence contains strong or accusatory language that expresses anger.

Text: इंग्लिश मीडिया आणि प्लेअर दोघांची खूप जळफळाट होत, काही यांच्या प्रमाणे झालं नाही की....
translated_text: Both the English media and the players were very jealous, some of them didn't like it...
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: सुप्रीम कोर्टाने गुगली टाकलाय आणि हे मिंधे येडे नाचतायत.
translated_text: The Supreme Court has thrown a google and these idiots are dancing around.
Justification: The word "नाचतायत" conveys intense irritation or anger toward those in power.

Text: हो वर्षापासून आपल्या राज्यात साधी प्रलंबित नोकरभरती होत नाही.
translated_text: Yes, there has been no simple pending job recruitment in our state since last year.
Justification: While the word "नोकरभरती" may imply concern or topic relevance, it is stated calmly, making the tone neutral.

Text: म्हणून पहिल्या रांगेत ममता दीदी चालते. आता उंचीचं कारण देऊ नको.
translated_text: That's why Mamata Didi walks in the front row. Now don't give the excuse of height.
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: आपण पत्रकार आहात कि राजकीय नेता तेच कळत नाही
translated_text: I don't know if you are a journalist or a political leader.
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्र द्रोही भाजप आहे नाही देणार
translated_text: Maharashtra is a traitor BJP will not give
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: तुम्ही सोडला का बकायदेशीर काम करणारा नवरा!?! वाचवायला पक्ष बदलालाच ना!?!?
translated_text: Did you leave your husband who works illegally?! Didn't you change parties to save him?!?!
Justification: The accusatory tone and use of sarcasm show frustration and anger.

Text: रिप्लाय द्यायचा पण लायकी दाखऊन द्यायची त्याच्या नेत्याची.
translated_text: He wanted to respond but also show his leader's worth.
Justification: Statement reflects opinion, but lacks emotional intensity; neutral.

Text: यालाच म्हणतात अक्कल कमी वापर जास्त ‌चिले.
translated_text: This is called using less common sense and more greed.
Justification: अक्कल कमी' is sarcastic but not emotionally heavy; neutral.

Text: षडयंत्री उप आणि कंत्राटी शॅडो मिळुन सगळं टेकओव्हर करत आहेत, हे बसलेत सांगकामे!
translated_text: Conspiratorial subs and contractors are taking over everything by getting shadows, these are the satanic tricks!
Justification: The theatrical and sarcastic tone reflects playful joy.

Text: वेस्टर्न रेल्वे जगात चुत्या प्रकार.
translated_text: Western Railway is a bad type in the world.
Justification: Crude but descriptive, lacking emotional elaboration; neutral.

Text: हे असले बिनडोक कार्यकर्ते भरलेत म्हणून बारामतीचे काका कायम भावी पंतप्रधान राहिलेत
translated_text: Because of these mindless activists, Baramati's uncle remained the future Prime Minister.
Justification: बिनडोक (brainless) is insulting, but overall tone is sarcastic and neutral.

Text: राजकारणाचं धर्मकारण करणारे नालायक नेते ह्या देशात आहेत म्हणूनच देशाचं वाटोळं होत चाललंय
translated_text: The country is going through a rough patch because of the incompetent leaders who are doing politics for religion.
Justification: Criticism without emotional explosion; hence neutral.

Text: म्हणजे मूर्तिपूजा म्हणजे मूर्खपणा हे तू मान्य करतोयस
translated_text: So you agree that idolatry is foolishness.
Justification: Sarcastic, philosophical tone but emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: सगळी कडे फुकटचे सल्ले दिलेच पाहिजे का?
translated_text: Should free advice be given to everyone?
Justification: Questioning but lacks emotional charge.

Text: तु चाट्या आहेस का का काथ्या ?
translated_text: Are you a licker?
Justification: चाट्या as an insult in questioning tone suggests surprise.

Text: आणि तुम्ही तिघे अमर अकबर अँथनी दुसरे कोण आहे का नाही जील्ल्यामध्ये
translated_text: And you three, Amar Akbar Anthony, who else is there in the district?
Justification: Humorous and rhetorical; tone is neutral.

Text: डिलिट करून टाका आता हे ट्विट , आवरला तुमचा
translated_text: Delete this tweet now, you're blocked.
Justification: आवरला तुमचा shows finality and strong emotion, expressing anger.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार किती होणार आहे यात
translated_text: How much corruption will there be?
Justification: भ्रष्टाचार (corruption) with rhetorical tone expresses disgust.

Text: पक्ष त्यांचा निवडणूक त्यांची मग तुम्हाला मिर्च्या का झोंबतात?
translated_text: Their party, their election, so why do they give you chills?
Justification: मिर्च्या झोंबतात is sarcastic but lacks strong emotional weight.

Text: किती निच वृत्ती ज्या ताटात खाल्ले भाजपा बरोबर त्याच ताटात घाण केली.
translated_text: What a low attitude and soiled the same plate as BJP.
Justification: घाण केली is critical but stated plainly; neutral tone.

Text: नरेंद्र मोदींच्या फायद्यासाठी जनतेला झोपी घालावणारा सुध्दा हाच होता.
translated_text: He was also the one who lulled the public to sleep for the benefit of Narendra Modi.
Justification: Politically accusatory but not emotionally intense.

Text: ह्या लोकांचे असे विचार ऐकल्याने भाजपची ताकद वाढते. ही अक्कल येणार कधी?
translated_text: Listening to these people's thoughts increases the strength of BJP. When will this common sense come?
Justification: ही अक्कल येणार कधी? is sarcastic but politically neutral.

Text: मैदानात येताना घेऊन येऊ नका... बॅलेट पेपर घेऊन या! आहे का हिम्मत तुमच्यात?
translated_text: Don't bring it with you when you enter the field... Bring the ballot paper! Do you have the courage?
Justification: The phrase "हिम्मत तुमच्यात?" (do you have the courage?) challenges boldly, implying intimidation or fear.

Text: सेवाग्राम हव होत
translated_text: Sevagram is becoming
Justification: Statement is factual with no emotional emphasis.

Text: ढाल तलवार चालवणारे समोरुन लढतात. रात्रीच्या अंधारात पळून नाही जात सुरतमार्गे गुवाहटी..!
translated_text: Those who wield shields and swords fight from the front. They don't run away in the darkness of the night, they go to Guwahati via Surat..!
Justification: Patriotic imagery, but emotionally restrained.

Text: तानाजी सावंत हा मराठा आहे का? का याला भाजपाची खाज आहे......
translated_text: Is Tanaji Sawant a Maratha? Why does he have a crush on BJP?
Justification: खाज (itch) in this sarcastic tone indicates surprise and disbelief.

Text: खुुप खाज होती.. सगळा माज उतरतोय आता चा..
translated_text: It was very itchy.. All the itching is coming off now..
Justification: माज उतरतोय (ego fading) reflects disappointment and emotional downturn.

Text: मोदींचे दिवस... हे दिवस आणलेत जनतेवर.
translated_text: Modi's days... these days have been brought upon the people.
Justification: Critical of leadership, but tone is analytical.

Text: या ट्विट खाली भाजप वाले का रडत आहेत पण
translated_text: Why are BJP people crying under this tweet?
Justification: का रडत आहेत (why crying) in rhetorical tone shows surprise.

Text: नाही राहिला मनुष्य (श्री बाळा साहेब ठाकरे) नाही राहिला धनुष्य
translated_text: There is no more man (Shri Balasaheb Thackeray), there is no more bow.
Justification: Mourning tone reflects sadness and loss.

Text: पण तुम्हां ला काय पैसे च्या वर एक पैसा भेटणार नाही
translated_text: But you won't get a single penny on top of what money you have.
Justification: Tone is dry and critical, but emotionally flat.

Text: ही गंमत महागात पडली..
translated_text: This fun became expensive..
Justification: महागात पडली (paid a heavy price) suggests regret and sadness.

Text: खराब रस्त्यांमुळे गंभीर अपघात झाल्यास यांच्यावर जबाबदारी; मंत्री नितीन गडकरींची माहिती
translated_text: Responsibility will be on them if serious accidents occur due to bad roads; Information from Minister Nitin Gadkari
Justification: Official policy tone; no emotional expression.

Text: काल पर्यंत तुम्ही त्यांना देव मानत होतात।।। ही तुझी भिकारडी वृत्ती आहे
translated_text: Till yesterday you considered them God... This is your beggarly attitude.
Justification: भिकारडी वृत्ती (beggarly attitude) shows strong disapproval and disgust.

Text: तुम्ही..... डोक आहे की गहाण ठेवल आहे.
translated_text: You... are you going to mortgage your head?
Justification: डोक गहाण (mortgaging the head) is used sarcastically, expressing surprise or disbelief.

Text: हात धुवायला लावले ,अंधभक्त काय करत होते ...
translated_text: They made me wash my hands, what were the blind devotees doing...
Justification: अंधभक्त is sarcastic but tone is politically critical, not emotional.

Text: अखेर बाळासाहेबांनी सांगितलं होतं उध्दवला संभाळा आणी तुम्ही गद्दारी केली कोणत्या तोंडाने नाव घेता
translated_text: Balasaheb had told Uddhav to take care of him, and yet you betrayed him; how do you even take his name?
Justification: गद्दारी suggests betrayal, but the tone is rhetorical—neutral.

Text: हा नक्कीच नागपूर मधून निवडून येणार. मागील काही दिवसांपासून नुसती फडफड चालू आहे.
translated_text: He will definitely be elected from Nagpur. There has been a lot of speculation for the past few days.
Justification: Statement of political prediction; neutral.

Text: काहीही उद्या होणार नाहीं परत ए बी सि डी उजाडणार
translated_text: Nothing will happen tomorrow, ABCD will come out again.
Justification: उजाडणार is used satirically; tone remains neutral.

Text: दौरा रद्द केला तो आजुन ही घेता येत नाहीये
translated_text: The tour was canceled and cannot be taken today.
Justification: Straightforward statement; neutral.

Text: कोंढव्यात ह्याच्या मुळेच माजलीत लोकं. आणि राजू पेंटर चे नगर सेवक आहेत जोडीला
translated_text: This is why people are angry in Kondhwa. And Raju Painter's municipal servants are in a pair.
Justification: माजलीत लोकं (people are furious) implies public anger.

Text: सेल वाली आहे ही काय हिच्या नादी लागता.
translated_text: She's a cell phone user, what's wrong with her?
Justification: नादी लागता with dismissive tone indicates social disgust.

Text: गद्दार... ही बदनामी आहे .. जगात गद्दार म्हणून नाव, बदनाम झाले..
translated_text: Traitor... this is a disgrace.. Being known and infamous as a traitor in the world..
Justification: गद्दार, "बदनामी" and "बदनाम" collectively reflect strong disgust.

Text: गप्प बस रे बाबा खोटं बोल आणि रेटून बोल हे च येत तुम्हाला
translated_text: Shut up, Dad, you only know how to lie and talk nonsense.
Justification: खोटं बोल (lie) and "गप्प बस" (shut up) express direct anger.

Text: तू......आहे का बघ जाईल नाहीतर बस बोंबलत.
translated_text: You... go and see if it's there, otherwise you'll just keep on shouting.
Justification: बस बोंबलत (just shouting) is dismissive, but neutral.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी हा भ्रष्टवादी व भ्रष्टाचारी पक्ष होता, आताही तो महाभ्रष्टवादी व महाभ्रष्टाचारी पक्ष आहे....
translated_text: The Nationalist Party was a corrupt and corrupt party, and even now it is a very corrupt and corrupt party...
Justification: भ्रष्टाचारी पक्ष (corrupt party) reflects strong disgust.

Text: मंत्रिमंडळ विस्तार होत नाही याचे कारण हा पश्चात्तापच आहे का ?
translated_text: Is this regret the reason why the cabinet is not expanding?
Justification: पश्चात्ताप (regret) is speculative, with neutral tone.

Text: अरे मार्गदर्शक सांगितलं होत, संपूर्ण पक्ष पाया जवळ ठेवायला नाही सांगितलेलं.
translated_text: Oh, the guide said, I didn't tell you to keep the entire party close to the base.
Justification: मार्गदर्शक सांगितलं (the guide said) is a recounting, neutral.

Text: तू लुल्लीचा इंजिनिअर आहेस का रे बहीण भिक्या
translated_text: Are you a lully engineer, sister Bhikya?
Justification: लुल्लीचा इंजिनिअर is teasing, but the tone remains neutral.

Text: भक्त आहात का आहात? करतो आता. चूक झाली ट्विट करून
translated_text: Are you a devotee? I am doing it now. I made a mistake by tweeting.
Justification: The self-admission "चूक झाली" (I made a mistake) and lack of emotional charge keep this statement neutral.

Text: तू येडपट आहे हे वारंवार का सिद्ध करतोस
translated_text: Why do you keep proving that you're a dupe?
Justification: The repeated question and insult "येडपट" (idiot) signals disbelief and surprise.

Text: म्हणून शेवटी ठरवले की प्रत्येक भ्रष्ट आहे
translated_text: So finally decided that everyone is corrupt.
Justification: The phrase is a generalized statement of fact, with no strong emotion expressed — neutral.

Text: नाद पाहिजे ओ तीन बायका सोबत आहे सद्या मी
translated_text: I want to hear the sound of three wives with me right now.
Justification: The humorous or boastful tone of "तीन बायका" (three wives) doesn’t express emotion directly — neutral.

Text: कंटाळले आहेत ते म्हणून नवीन नवीन चिन्ह शोधत आहेत
translated_text: They are bored so they are looking for new symbols.
Justification: कंटाळले (bored) reflects fatigue, but the sentence stays emotionally neutral.

Text: जबरदस्ती आहे का? .... माघार घे तर नाही म्हटलं ... स्वतःच माघार घेतली
translated_text: Is it forced? .... If you withdraw, you said no ... you withdrew on your own.
Justification: Questioning tone, but not strongly emotional — neutral.

Text: हार निश्चित होती
translated_text: Defeat was certain.
Justification: Straightforward statement of outcome — no emotion — neutral.

Text: बेरोजगारीमुळे देशातील तरुण त्रस्त झाले आहे,पण मोदी सरकार पूर्ण पने मौन आहे।
translated_text: The youth of the country are suffering due to unemployment, but the Modi government is completely silent.
Justification: त्रस्त झाले आहे (suffering) and "मौन" (silence) show social frustration — disgust.

Text: आरे बालिश लेकरा तुमच्या साहेबांनी पत्र लिहण्याच्या आधी त्यांची निवडणुकीत युती झाली होती.
translated_text: Before your sir wrote the letter to the children of Aarey, they had formed an alliance in the elections.
Justification: बालिश लेकरा (childish kid) is slightly mocking, but the overall tone stays neutral.

Text: एक्झॅक्टली मला पण कळतं नाही आहे
translated_text: I don't know exactly either.
Justification: Straightforward confusion — no emotional tone — neutral.

Text: हे वाले बईमान आहे… पिसाळलेले
translated_text: This guy is dishonest... crushed.
Justification: बईमान (dishonest) and "पिसाळलेले" (out of control) reflect contempt, indicating disgust.

Text: चुत्या लोकांचे सरकार आहे.. यांना म्हशी मागे पाठवायला हवं हे त्याच लायकीचे आहेत.
translated_text: This is a government of idiots. They deserve to be sent back to the buffalo.
Justification: Use of slurs and insult-laden comparison shows strong anger.

Text: विकृती आहे ही आणि हेच बिनडोक भक्त मंडळींना आवडतं
translated_text: This is a distortion and this is what the mindless devotees like.
Justification: विकृती (perversion) and "बिनडोक" (brainless) clearly express disgust.

Text: मग आत काय गोट्या खेळायला घेऊन गेले आहेत..
translated_text: So what kind of toys have they taken inside to play with?
Justification: Mocking tone but no emotional outburst — neutral.

Text: हे धक्कादायक आहे
translated_text: This is shocking.
Justification: धक्कादायक (shocking) directly expresses surprise.

Text: मंद सैनीक बेकार आहेत. कमलिची दलाली करणे एकमेव काम त्याना
translated_text: Slow soldiers are useless. Their only job is to broker Kamali
Justification: Insult, but without emotional exaggeration — neutral.

Text: सत्य हे नेहमी कुत्सितपणाच्या पोटी दडवलं जातं.
translated_text: The truth is always hidden behind malice.
Justification: Philosophical observation — neutral.

Text: ह्या मागे काहीतरी षडयंत्र असेल हे लक्षात घ्या....फडणवीस एवढ्या लगेच माघार घेणार नाहीत.
translated_text: Keep in mind that there must be some conspiracy behind this....Fadnavis will not back down so soon.
Justification: Calm suspicion without emotional tone — neutral.

Text: ध्वज बाहेर आलाय तरीही अक्करमाशी थांबत नाही .
translated_text: Even though the flag has come out, the Akkaramashi does not stop.
Justification: Metaphoric phrasing but neutral in tone.

Text: लोकमत चे मालक मारवाडी आहेत म्हणून मराठीद्वेष आहे.
translated_text: There is hatred towards Marathi because the owners of Lokmat are Marwaris.
Justification: Blaming a community reflects disgust.

Text: माजलेत हे डॉक्टर फटकवून काढले लायकीचे आहेत
translated_text: These doctors deserve to be kicked out of the hospital.
Justification: फटकवून काढले (kick out) expresses anger.

Text: दुसर्यांच्या घरात काय चालले आहे हे वाकून बघण्याचा स्वभाव सोड
translated_text: Give up the habit of peeking into other people's homes.
Justification: वाकून बघण्याचा is said with contempt — disgust.

Text: राजकीय वजन.... जे टाकून ट्विटरवर सदानकदा व्हिक्टीम कार्ड खेळत होती एक महिला
translated_text: A woman was constantly playing the victim card on Twitter, throwing political weight...
Justification: व्हिक्टीम कार्ड खेळत होती is sarcastic and reflects disgust.

Text: कधीच मुद्दे नाहींत कायम गुद्याची भाषा मग दुसरा पर्याय नाही
translated_text: Never have issues, always talk about the anus, then there is no other option.
Justification: Vulgar, yet not emotionally expressive — neutral.

Text: तो तर आता गावचा सरपंच पण होत नसतो
translated_text: He wouldn't even be the village sarpanch anymore.
Justification: Derogatory yet calm tone — neutral.

Text: खरं पण यावर हंसन फार चूक... कारण त्याच्या अविष्याची तीच खरी गाडी आहे
translated_text: True, but Hansan is very wrong about this... because that is the real car of his future.
Justification: Casual philosophical commentary — neutral.

Text: रट्टे हवे होते तुला
translated_text: You wanted Ratte.
Justification: Possibly mocking, not overtly emotional — neutral.

Text: नाशिक चा शांताक्लोज हागण भुजबळ हा खरा जातीयवादी पक्ष राष्ट्रवादीच आहे हे सिद्ध करताना!?
translated_text: Nashik's Shanta Close Hagan Bhujbal is proving that the real communalist party is the Nationalist Party!?
Justification: Mocking but with surprise at hypocrisy — surprise.

Text: हे नाही होणार भक्तांकडून
translated_text: This will not happen from devotees.
Justification: Flat, declarative tone — neutral.

Text: तूच उतर तसही तुला काही काम धंदा नाही
translated_text: You have no business even if you get off.
Justification: काम धंदा नाही is insulting — anger.

Text: हिंदी लादणे थांबवा. हिंदी राष्ट्रभाषा नाही.
translated_text: Stop imposing Hindi. Hindi is not the national language.
Justification: Political statement — neutral.

Text: तुझ्या घरी येईल म चालेल का भरकटलेल आहे ना
translated_text: Can I come to your house? I'm lost.
Justification: Joking or casual — neutral.

Text: डॉ. बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर मराठवाडा विद्यापीठात झालेला प्रकार अत्यंत निंदनीय आहे...
translated_text: Dr. What happened at Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University is highly condemnable...
Justification: अत्यंत निंदनीय (highly condemnable) — disgust.

Text: म्हणजे लोक बधिर होतात म्हणायचे आहे का
translated_text: Does that mean people are going deaf?
Justification: बधिर होतात questions awareness but is non-emotive — neutral.

Text: सलमान खानच्या शेजारी सोबतच्या वादात अभिनेत्याला कोणताही दिलासा नाही
translated_text: Salman Khan's dispute with his neighbor leaves the actor with no relief
Justification: कोणताही दिलासा नाही states outcome plainly — neutral.

Text: स्वतः जाहीर करतोय.. माझे प्रोग्राम कोण बघत नाही म्हणून
translated_text: I'm announcing it myself.. because no one watches my programs.
Justification: कोण बघत नाही implies self-directed frustration — anger.

Text: आता काय शेतमजुराच्या मजुरीवर जीएसटी आकारता काय...
translated_text: Now, will GST be levied on the wages of agricultural laborers...
Justification: The rhetorical question implies critique but remains calm — neutral.

Text: नीच आहेत. नीच कपटी पणाचा भेटला वाटत
translated_text: They are vile. I feel like I met a vile, deceitful person.
Justification: Repetition of "नीच" emphasizes contempt — disgust.

Text: मौनीचे काळात जे झाले नाही‌ ते होतय याच दुख:
translated_text: What didn’t happen before is happening now — that’s the sadness.
Justification: The word "दुख:" directly conveys sadness.

Text: , ने आपल्या खांद्यावर बंदुक टेवुन शिवसेना संपवू पाहत आहेत ..विचार करा
translated_text: Trying to end Shiv Sena using others — think about it.
Justification: "बंदुक टेवुन" implies accusation — anger.

Text: ह्याच्या सारख्या कोंबडी चोराला दिलं की हे आसाच होत
translated_text: This is what happens when you hand power to a chicken thief.
Justification: "कोंबडी चोर" is an insult, but delivered matter-of-fact — neutral.

Text: मार्क झुकरबर्गचे फॉलोअर्स एका झटक्यात कमी झाले, इतरांचेही झाले मोठे नुकसान
translated_text: Zuckerberg’s followers dropped, others lost too.
Justification: "मोठे नुकसान" directly signals sadness.

Text: स्वाभिमानी पक्षाचं काय झालं ते पण सांगा जरा स्वतःच ठेवा झाकून दुसऱ्याच पहा वाकून
translated_text: Tell what happened to Swabhimani Party — keep your own hidden.
Justification: Sarcasm but emotionally flat — neutral.

Text: अन् हे बेनं गृहमंत्री होतं एकेकाळी.....
translated_text: And this guy was once a Home Minister...
Justification: "हे बेनं" indicates contempt — disgust.

Text: काय का, मला काही कळलं नाही,
translated_text: What? I didn’t understand a thing.
Justification: "कळलं नाही" is confusion — but neutral tone.

Text: हीच बातमी लपवायला तर आज जाधव दिवसभर थयथयाट करत होता.
translated_text: Jadhav had been trying to hide this news all day today.
Justification: "थयथयाट" implies drama but not emotion-laden, so neutral.

Text: म्हणजे सेनेवाले तुझ्या पोस्ट ला भाव देत नाही..
translated_text: So Shiv Sainiks don't care about your post..
Justification: "भाव देत नाही" conveys dismissiveness, triggering anger.

Text: शिल्लकसेनेची मशाल पेटण्याआधीच समता पार्टी कडून तिला विझवलं जात आहे…!!!
translated_text: Samata Party is extinguishing the Shiv Sena torch early.
Justification: "विझवलं जात आहे" reflects suppression — hence anger.

Text: संदिप मोरे अंबानींचा कर्मचारी होता. त्याच्या आत्महत्येची चौकशी झाली पाहिजे.
translated_text: Sandeep More was an employee of Ambani. His suicide should be investigated.
Justification: "आत्महत्येची चौकशी" reflects tragedy and concern

Text: चुतीया कायमची बंदी पाहिजे होती वर्षाने काय होतय
translated_text: Chutiya should have been banned permanently, what is happening after a year?
Justification: "कायमची बंदी पाहिजे होती" expresses frustration and demand

Text: जगातील नववे आश्चर्य तर देश चालवतो आहे काय अवस्था केली आहे देशाची....खूप पश्चताप होईल
translated_text: The ninth wonder of the world is running the country. What a state it has become....it will be very regrettable.
Justification: "खूप पश्चताप होईल" conveys sorrow about the country's state

Text: आणि हे असले फालतू लोक आमचं नेतृत्व करताय...
translated_text: And these useless people are leading us...
Justification: "फालतू लोक" conveys resentment and frustration

Text: तू बनतो का रे मग कावळ्या?
translated_text: Are you becoming a crow then?
Justification: "कावळ्या" is a mocking expression without strong emotion

Text: दर सहा महिन्यांनी ही पोस्ट असते. कोणताच पोलीस कायद्याने वागत नसतो.
translated_text: This post is posted every six months. No policeman acts according to the law.
Justification: "पोलीस कायद्याने वागत नसतो" is a critical statement

Text: शोभत नाही. विरुद्ध असे चित्र उभे रहात आहे.
translated_text: It doesn't look good. The opposite is happening.
Justification: "शोभत नाही" reflects a sense of disappointment

Text: उगाच नाही "मंद सैनिक" आहेत हे ... अगदी मतिमंद...
translated_text: It's not for nothing that they are "slow soldiers"... very slow-witted...
Justification: "मंद सैनिक" is mocking but not deeply emotional

Text: मुळात ऑप्शन चुकीचे आहेत... कायम केळ्याची साल उचलतील असा हवा...
translated_text: Basically, the options are wrong... They always want to pick up banana peels...
Justification: "केळ्याची साल उचलतील" is metaphorical and sarcastic

Text: किती फेकतो हा माणूस
translated_text: How much does this guy throw?
Justification: "किती फेकतो" shows astonishment

Text: देशद्रोही वर योग्य ती कारवाई होईल ही अपेक्षा आहे...
translated_text: I hope that appropriate action will be taken against the traitors...
Justification: "योग्य ती कारवाई" is an expectation

Text: भक्तगण ची अशी गत आहे, ज्या भक्ताला जितक जास्त ट्रोल त्याला तितके जास्त पेमेंट।
translated_text: The fate of devotees is such that the more trolls a devotee gets, the more payment they get.
Justification: "जास्त ट्रोल" is sarcasm

Text: हा फुकण्या आहे
translated_text: This is a blow job.
Justification: "फुकण्या" is a slang insult showing anger

Text: अरे बेडका तुझी लायकी किती आणि तू बोलतो किती
translated_text: Oh frog, how worthy are you and how much do you talk?
Justification: "बेडका" used in playful ridicule

Text: याला महत्व देण्याची गरज नाही...!कुठला एका चाळीतला नेता आहे हा..?
translated_text: There is no need to give importance to this...! Which one of these forty-something leaders is this..?
Justification: "महत्व देण्याची गरज नाही" shows disbelief

Text: अगदी बरोबर सर हा तर एक नंबरचा आडान्सचोट
translated_text: That's right, sir. This is a number one advance.
Justification: "एक नंबरचा आडान्सचोट" is an insult, but presented casually

Text: दारू व्यतिरिक्त आणखी काही दुसरे अवैध धंदे होतात की नाही या जिल्ह्यात
translated_text: Apart from liquor, are there any other illegal businesses in this district?
Justification: "अवैध धंदे" points to illegality but without emotional charge

Text: सकाळी सकाळी घेतली की कालची उतरली नाही
translated_text: I took it this morning, but yesterday's didn't come out.
Justification: "कालची उतरली नाही" is a casual, colloquial statement

Text: फड़णविस कड़े? एकेरी बोलतो का? तुझ्या राजकीय बापाचा नौकर आहेत ते?
translated_text: Where is Fadnavis? Does he speak in a monotonous manner? Is he a servant of your political father?
Justification: "नौकर आहेत" shows shocked reaction to disrespect

Text: हा पत्रकार नाही, राजकीय पक्षाचा पगारी गुलाम आहे
translated_text: This is not a journalist, this is a paid slave of a political party.
Justification: "पगारी गुलाम" is a strong accusation

Text: सगळे अडाणी आणि अतिहुशार भाजप मध्येच भरले आहेत का
translated_text: Are all the ignorant and super intelligent people in the BJP?
Justification: "अडाणी आणि अतिहुशार" juxtaposes extremes to evoke surprise

Text: आपला मीडिया लाचार आहे व तो अशी उदोउदो करण्यात अग्रेसर असतो
translated_text: Our media is helpless and leads in such praise.
Justification: "लाचार" and "उदोउदो" convey disapproval

Text: भक्तांनो घ्या तोंड बडवून का करू काही मदत
translated_text: Devotees, why should we help you by making a fuss?
Justification: "तोंड बडवून" expresses annoyance

Text: विद्येच्या देवीचा तिरस्कार का? म्हणूनच सरस्वती देवी राजकारण्यांना प्रसन्न होत नाही.
translated_text: Why insult the goddess of knowledge? That’s why she doesn’t bless politicians.
Justification: "तिरस्कार" toward divine figure evokes shock

Text: अशा प्रकारे विद्यार्थ्यांच्या अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्यावरती देखील घाला घालण्याचे काम महाविद्यालयाच्या प्राचार्यांच्या माध्यमातून करण्यात येत आहे.
translated_text: Students’ freedom of expression is being attacked via college principals.
Justification: "अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्य" and "घाला" are descriptive

Text: गुजरात मॉडेल मध्ये संविधानचा विचार खूपच कमी वेळा दिसून येतो.
translated_text: Constitution is rarely seen in the Gujarat model.
Justification: "संविधानचा विचार" is missing, stated neutrally

Text: मेहेंगाई डबल, बेरोजगारी डबल... पेट्रोल डिझेल ट्रिपल ये हे न्यू इंडिया...
translated_text: Double inflation, double unemployment... Petrol, diesel triple, this is New India...
Justification: "न्यू इंडिया" is used ironically but factually

Text: निवडणुकीत पराभूत होणारं हे कळल्यावर मैदान सोडून पळून गेले रे भो
translated_text: When he found out that he was going to lose the election, he left the field and ran away.
Justification: "मैदान सोडून पळून गेले" gives a cause-effect neutral statement

Text: तू कोण मंद भक्त? मंद्बुद्धी लोकांना सांगून पण कळणार नाही,
translated_text: Who are you, a foolish devotee? Even if you tell the foolish, they won't understand.
Justification: "मंद भक्त" expresses sarcastic surprise

Text: आनंदाने सागायची गोष्ट नाही ही ताई.
translated_text: This is not something to be happy about, Auntie.
Justification: "आनंदाने सागायची गोष्ट नाही" conveys sorrow

Text: लोगो खूप वाटतोय!! पांढरा पण नको होता!!
translated_text: The logo looks great!! I didn't want it to be white!!
Justification: "खूप वाटतोय" shows enthusiasm

Text: खूप वाढले आहेत असे किस्से फसवणूक करणाऱ्या लोकांचे
translated_text: There have been many stories of people cheating.
Justification: "फसवणूक करणाऱ्या" describes events neutrally

Text: कुठे माती खाऊन आले हे कळायला नको
translated_text: You don't want to know where you came from, eating dirt.
Justification: "माती खाऊन आले" conveys contempt

Text: सगळी कडे बोंबाबोंब. होतीस मुर्जाची बकरी बुर्जी बनवणारच होते
translated_text: Bombs everywhere. You were going to make a goat tower out of Murja.
Justification: "बोंबाबोंब" reflects chaos and sarcasm

Text: : मृत्यूनंतर वैशालीची शेवटची इच्छा कुटुंबीयांनी केली पूर्ण, काय होती शेवटची इच्छा?
translated_text: Vaishali's last wish was fulfilled by her family after her death, what was her last wish?
Justification: "शेवटची इच्छा" is reflective but neutral

Text: ह्या आधी पोट निवडणुका झाल्या तेव्हा नाही वाटल का पत्र लिहावस
translated_text: Didn't you think of writing a letter when the by-elections were held earlier?
Justification: "पत्र लिहावस" is reflective

Text: हा माणुस किती खालच्या पातळीवर जाऊन बोलतो... काय संस्कार केले आई वडिलानी याच्यावर देवच जाणे...
translated_text: How low this person has stooped to speak... God knows what kind of culture his parents have instilled in him...
Justification: "खालच्या पातळीवर" signals moral disgust

Text: सोनाली बाई मोदीने भारत जोडला नाही तर असं म्हणायच आहे का तुम्हाला ?
translated_text: Sonali Bai, do you really have to say that Modi did not unite India?
Justification: "असं म्हणायच आहे" expresses disbelief

Text: जाऊद्या सर, मोठमोठ्या लोकांनी तुम्हाला ब्लॉक केलेलं फायद्याचं ठरणार नाही..
translated_text: Go ahead sir, it won't be beneficial for big people to block you..
Justification: "ब्लॉक केलेलं" implies a factual statement about ineffectiveness

Text: व्यवस्थाच आहे तशी गरीबाला गरीब आणि श्रीमंताला अती श्रीमंत करायच
translated_text: The system is designed to make the poor poorer and the rich richer.
Justification: "व्यवस्थाच आहे तशी" expresses systemic inequality

Text: यांना कोलले शिवाय काही करत नाही वाटत
translated_text: They don't seem to do anything except cry.
Justification: "कोलले शिवाय" reflects mockery

Text: तुम्ही जनतेला समजता का... निव्वळ झळ्ळ...
translated_text: Do you understand people? Pure nonsense...
Justification: "निव्वळ झळ्ळ" conveys anger and ridicule

Text: किलो वजनात, मेंदू शुन्य आहे…
translated_text: Brain is zero in kilos…
Justification: "मेंदू शुन्य" is sarcastic

Text: कृपया कामाचा वेग वाढवा. उमेदवारांचे हाल होत आहेत.
translated_text: Speed up the work. Candidates are suffering.
Justification: "हाल होत आहेत" is factual

Text: अरे, हा काय माणूस आहे... राजकारण वगळून देऊ शकत नाही
translated_text: This man can’t even offer tribute without politics.
Justification: "राजकारण वगळून" signals contempt

Text: पुरुष असून सुद्धा चिखल लावून फिरतात
translated_text: Even men walk around covered in mud.
Justification: "चिखल लावून" implies shameful behavior

Text: तुम्ही बंगल्यावर नेऊन मारता ते चालत का?
translated_text: Does it work when you take it to the bungalow?
Justification: "बंगल्यावर नेऊन मारता" implies corruption or backdoor action.

Text: जित्न चाहनेले मात्र हो राजनिती गर्ने हारे पनि सहुला भन्नेले त प्रेम गर्ने हो
translated_text: Those who want to win, but those who do politics, those who say they lose, love
Justification: Political neutrality; no specific sentiment word.

Text: ही सगळी गर्दी आहे
translated_text: This is all crowded.
Justification: "गर्दी" is a simple descriptor.

Text: काहीच नाही बोलली ती, उगाच काहीही बोलशील का रे...
translated_text: She didn't say anything, why would she say anything at all...
Justification: "उगाच काहीही बोलशील" implies unnecessary exaggeration.

Text: हा ला गाढव बोलला
translated_text: This donkey spoke.
Justification: "गाढव" is an insult; used generically.

Text: म्याऊ म्याऊ झालं आता काय डरकाळी फोडणारे का बेडकांनो
translated_text: Meow meow, why are you making noise now, frogs?
Justification: "डरकाळी फोडणारे" mocks dramatic shift in tone.

Text: अबे आय घाल्या भाडखाऊ फेकू तुझा नवीन बाप आहे ना..
translated_text: Abe Ai Ghalya Bhadkhau Fekku is your new father..
Justification: Insult-filled, no new emotion term beyond neutral.

Text: वसुली होत नाही म्हणून शांत असेल तेंव्हा खुलेआम वसुली सुरु होती वाझे मार्फत
translated_text: When silent, recovery was happening via Waze.
Justification: "खुलेआम वसुली" implies corruption.

Text: आता फडणवीसांनी काय केलं, उगाच त्यांना का टोमणे मारत आहेत.
translated_text: Now what did Fadnavis do, why are they taunting him for no reason?
Justification: "उगाच टोमणे" suggests unwarranted criticism.

Text: हेच हाल घृष्णेश्वर ला आहे।
translated_text: This is the situation in Ghrishneshwar.
Justification: "हेच हाल" indicates a general complaint.

Text: लोक वेडी वाटतात का?
translated_text: Do people think they are crazy?
Justification: "वेडी वाटतात" suggests disbelief.

Text: पण तुम्ही का म्हणून पाकिस्तानच्या राष्ट्रभाषेत बोलताय
translated_text: But why are you speaking in Pakistan's national language?
Justification: "पाकिस्तानच्या राष्ट्रभाषेत" implies surprise or suspicion.

Text: अहो स्वतःचे पितळ असं उघड पडू नये ,पळ कोणी काढलाय हे दिसलय सगळ्यांना
translated_text: Don’t expose your true colors, everyone saw who ran.
Justification: "पितळ उघड पडू नये" implies exposure of truth.

Text: काय झोपा काढत आहेत का.... कुठे आहे गृहमंत्री
translated_text: Are you sleeping? Where is the Home Minister?
Justification: "झोपा काढत" implies negligence.

Text: तू कितीही भूंक काहीही फरक पडत नाही...
translated_text: It doesn't matter how much you bark...
Justification: "भूंक" is metaphorical for pointless talk.

Text: आपण ही त्याच अकलेचा भाग
translated_text: We are part of the same intelligence.
Justification: "त्याच अकलेचा" is neutral judgment.

Text: आता खेकड्यांचा आणी पालीचा शोध लावणारे सुद्धा राजकारणात यायला लागले...!
translated_text: Now even the inventors of crabs and Pali have started entering politics...!
Justification: "खेकड्यांचा आणी पालीचा शोध" symbolizes mockery and frustration

Text: पाण्याने गाड्या वाहत चालल्या आता त्यांच्या मागे धावाचं की इथ सुर्यवंशीसाठी व्यक्त होत बसायचं
translated_text: The cars were floating in the water, now should we run after them or should we sit here expressing our gratitude for the Suryavanshi?
Justification: "पाण्याने गाड्या वाहत चालल्या" describes a flooded situation using satire

Text: ओबीसी महामंडळाच्या नियुक्त्या कधी होणार? नुसत्या नियुक्त्यांवर भागवू नका, निधी पण द्या!
translated_text: When will the OBC Corporation appointments be made? Don't just focus on appointments, provide funds too!
Justification: "निधी पण द्या" reflects a factual demand without emotion

Text: आता या लावारीसांकडून शिकावं लागणार , असे कुत्रे आम्ही रोज हाकलतो
translated_text: Now we have to learn from these unclaimed dogs, we chase them away every day.
Justification: "लावारीसांकडून शिकावं" uses sarcasm, not emotion

Text: गुन्हा दाखल करा या हिडीस विचारांच्या बाईवर?
translated_text: Should we file a case against this woman with dark thoughts?
Justification: "हिडीस विचारांच्या" reflects moral condemnation

Text: ही तर तुझ्या अकलेची दिवाळखोरी आहे. .....
translated_text: This is the bankruptcy of your mind. .....
Justification: "अकलेची दिवाळखोरी" is a figurative insult

Text: बापाला अस बोलू नये भडव्या माफ करा भावड्या म्हणायचं होत
translated_text: You shouldn't talk to your father like that, you idiot. I meant to say, "Brother."
Justification: "भडव्या" is an offensive term indicating disgust

Text: - वाघ वन विभागाकडून जेरबंद; जणांवर केला होता हल्ला
translated_text: - Tiger captured by forest department; had attacked people
Justification: "हल्ला केला होता" evokes anger due to violence

Text: भाजपा नी सर्व साधारण जनतेला काही समजत नाही आसे वाटते
translated_text: It seems like the BJP doesn't understand the common people at all.
Justification: "काही समजत नाही" expresses concern in a neutral tone

Text: निचपणाचा कळस आहे, महाशक्ती एका विधवा बाईला घाबरली
translated_text: It is the height of baseness, the great power is afraid of a widow.
Justification: "निचपणाचा कळस" is a strong phrase but contextually neutral

Text: पण तो गायी कापून खाणारा केरला वाला का घेतला सोबत
translated_text: But why did you take that Kerala guy who slaughters and eats cows with you?
Justification: "गायी कापून खाणारा" conveys cultural surprise

Text: उपनगरात देखील अनेक पूल अर्धवट आहेत. पण बहुतेक तुम्हाला ते समाविष्ट करावे वाटत नसावे
translated_text: There are also many bridges in the suburbs that are incomplete. But you probably don't want to include them.
Justification: "अर्धवट आहेत" is factual commentary

Text: मराठीची वाट लावण्याचा अधिकार तुला नाही, प्रीतिमेच्या घोड्या!
translated_text: You have no right to make Marathi wait, you beloved horse!
Justification: "वाट लावण्याचा अधिकार नाही" conveys anger over identity

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या खेळाडूवर दु:खाचा डोंगर, लढतीपूर्वीच प्रशिक्षकांचे निधन, पण तरीही तो लढला आणि…
translated_text: A mountain of grief for a Maharashtra player, the coach passed away before the match, but he still fought and...
Justification: "दु:खाचा डोंगर", "प्रशिक्षकांचे निधन" convey personal loss and sadness.

Text: बरोबर आहै पण पडतो वीचार करणारै खुप कमी आहेत
translated_text: That's right, but there are very few who think about it.
Justification: "वीचार करणारै खुप कमी" is a neutral opinion.

Text: अतिवृष्टीने नुकसान झालेल्या शेतकऱ्याच्या चिमुकल्याची ही व्यथा ह्रदयस्पर्शी आहे
translated_text: This anguish of a farmer's little child, who was damaged by heavy rain, is heartbreaking.
Justification: "ह्रदयस्पर्शी" and "व्यथा" indicate emotional distress.

Text: तुम्हाला तुमच्या अहंकारामुळे पक्षाचे नाव व चिन्ह राखता आले नाही.ह्यावर आधी विचार करा.
translated_text: You could not maintain the name and symbol of the party because of your arrogance. Think about this first.
Justification: "अहंकारामुळे" is blameful but analytically neutral.

Text: प्रवक्ता झालं म्हणजे काही तोंडाने हा*यच का?
translated_text: Does becoming a spokesperson mean you have to say something with your mouth?
Justification: The sarcasm implies disgust for the spokesperson.

Text: बहिणच लहान भावाला असे नाव ठेवू लागल्यावर बाकीचे काय म्हणतील
translated_text: What will the others say when the sister starts naming her younger brother like that?
Justification: Observation about social perception, neutral.

Text: तुमचा मालक आणि तुमच्यात काहीच फरक नाही सुधरा जरा
translated_text: There is no difference between you and your boss. Improve yourself.
Justification: "काहीच फरक नाही" reflects a critical yet neutral comparison.

Text: आताच बरी आठवण होती तुम्हाला फटाक्यामुळे प्रदूषण होते
translated_text: Just now I remembered that you cause pollution due to firecrackers.
Justification: Commentary on hypocrisy, presented neutrally.

Text: एका मराठी माणसाचा अपमान करणं व मराठी कलाकाराचा हा सर्वात मोठा अपमान
translated_text: Insulting a Marathi man and this is the biggest insult to a Marathi artist.
Justification: "अपमान" repeated with emphasis signals moral disgust.

Text: पैशाने बरेच ग्दार मोदीने विकत घेतलेत. त्यामुळे चोळणार हे नक्की
translated_text: Modi has bought many gaddars with his money. So he will definitely rub it.
Justification: Politically accusatory but stated neutrally.

Text: ईथुन पुढे कोर्ट म्हणू नका , म्हणा .त्यात बीजेपी का रंडीरोना......
translated_text: From now on, don't say court, say. Why is BJP playing a role in this......
Justification: Critical tone but not emotionally charged.

Text: हिंदुत्ववादी सरकार म्हणजे हिंदूंचा छळ करणार सरकार असा अर्थ होतो का?
translated_text: Does a Hindutva government mean a government that will persecute Hindus?
Justification: The rhetorical question challenges belief with disdain.

Text: तुमच्या कडे पुरावा आहे तर तुम्ही तक्रार करा..किरीट सोमय्या का लागतो तुम्हाला
translated_text: If you have proof, then file a complaint.. Why do you need Kirit Somaiya?
Justification: Aggressive challenge reflects anger.

Text: हे नक्की भांडणे लावणार
translated_text: This will definitely cause a fight.
Justification: Predictive, emotionally flat.

Text: या पुढे बाबरमती असा उल्लेख करत जा पाकीट पत्रकार साहेब
translated_text: Keep mentioning Babarmati from now on, pocket journalist sir.
Justification: Satirical remark, stated neutrally.

Text: का डांगीला झोंबलका फडणविसच नाव घेतल तर
translated_text: Why would you take the name of Dangi, just like a scoundrel?
Justification: "झोंबलका" and tone show contempt.

Text: पण हा बाळू आम्हाला (कट्टर हिंदू) मान्य नाही !!
translated_text: But we (hardline Hindus) do not accept this child!!
Justification: "मान्य नाही" emphasizes rejection with frustration.

Text: हे कळायला काही मार्ग नाही
translated_text: There is no way to know.
Justification: Statement of helplessness — neutral.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांमध्ये गुंतवणूक करण्यासाठी आणि आपल्या देशाचे भविष्य घडवण्याच्या दिशेने काम करण्यास टाळाटाळ करा.
translated_text: Don't hesitate to invest in students and work towards building the future of our country.
Justification: Urgency and concern signal fear.

Text: आता हेच होणार आहे गद्दारांच
translated_text: This is what will happen to the traitors now.
Justification: "गद्दारांच" implies condemnation.

Text: फाटली का...
translated_text: Is it torn...
Justification: Casual expression, no strong emotional cue.

Text: तुमचं सरकार आहे तुम्ही काय लुडो खेळताय का?
translated_text: You are the government, are you playing Ludo?
Justification: The rhetorical question suggests critique, but remains neutral in tone.

Text: विरोध हा मुद्द्याला, विचारधारेला, व्यक्तीला असावा विरोधासाठी विरोध हा निव्वळ मूर्खपणा आहे
translated_text: Opposition should be directed at an issue, an ideology, a person. Opposition for the sake of opposition is sheer stupidity.
Justification: The phrase "मूर्खपणा आहे" indicates disdain.

Text: जो नेता आपला पक्ष धड नीटपणे सांभाळू शकत नाही त्याला निवडून द्यायचे का मग
translated_text: Should we elect a leader who cannot properly manage his party?
Justification: Expresses distrust and dissatisfaction.

Text: असायला पाहिजे होते, तुझ्या सायबाची खरी वंशावळ माहित पडली असती..
translated_text: It should have been, your true lineage would have been known..
Justification: Slightly mocking, but neutral in delivery.

Text: गद्दार ही पदवीच तुमच्या या जन्माचे सार्थक आहे..
translated_text: The title of traitor is the meaning of your birth.
Justification: Labeling with contempt but stated matter-of-factly.

Text: फक्त त्यांनी बोलायचं बाकीच्यांनी बोलायचा प्रयत्न केला की लगेच सत्तेचा धाक
translated_text: Only they wanted to speak, and others were intimidated when they tried.
Justification: "सत्तेचा धाक" suggests fear of authority.

Text: आपलं मुळ नाव आगलावे आहे का?
translated_text: Is your original name Aglave?
Justification: Teasing tone, emotionally neutral.

Text: प्रश्न एकच मग रात्रीचे पळून का गेलात???
translated_text: Why did you run away at night then???
Justification: Surprise emphasized via question.

Text: गद्दारीची ढाल तलवार अनाजी पंत कडे पण होती
translated_text: Anaji Pant also had betrayal’s shield and sword.
Justification: Historical metaphor with neutral tone.

Text: मशालीचे चटके बसत आहेत हे मान्य करून टाका एकदाच
translated_text: Just admit that the torch is burning.
Justification: Urging confession; emotionally neutral.

Text: सगळीकडून लोकांची गोची झालेय हे नक्की..
translated_text: People are getting confused from all over.
Justification: Commentary on confusion without emotional charge.

Text: ह्याच का त्या मुंग्या
translated_text: That's why those ants.
Justification: Metaphorical and vague; neutral.

Text: मनसे पण भ्रम आहे
translated_text: MNS is also an illusion.
Justification: Commentary on perception, neutral tone.

Text: या पांड्याला का एव्हढा भाव देतात
translated_text: Why give this Pandya so much importance?
Justification: एव्हढा भाव (“so much value”) expresses amazement

Text: लाचारीचा अपमान
translated_text: Helpless people talking self‑respect is an insult to helplessness.
Justification: phrase labels act itself as लाचारीचा अपमान → contempt

Text: कोर्टाचा % आपमान
translated_text: This is an insult to the court; action needed.
Justification: आपमान → sense of revulsion

Text: लॉजिकला दोष देताना आठवत नाही
translated_text: Don’t recall blaming logic.
Justification: reflective, no strong feeling

Text: तुमच्या बुद्धीच्या पलिकडचे
translated_text: Beyond your understanding; don’t overthink.
Justification: dismissive but calm

Text: भातखळकर सारखा भंगरी सडकछाप माणूस
translated_text: Never seen a sloppy street‑rowdy like Bhatkhalkar!
Justification: insult भंगरी सडकछाप → revulsion

Text: कितीही कारस्थान केलेत तरी ते उध्वस्तच
translated_text: No matter the plots, they’ll be destroyed!
Justification: threat उध्वस्तच conveys rage

Text: मला ब्लॉक केलं; समजत नाही
translated_text: I don’t understand because I’m blocked.
Justification: statement ब्लॉक

Text: अती आहे तो
translated_text: Don’t do that… it’s too much.
Justification: phrase अती आहे expresses anger

Text: विकले गेलेल्यांकडून अपेक्षा सोडा
translated_text: Drop expectations from the sold‑outs.
Justification: advice, calm tone

Text: तोंड मारण्याची गरजच होती?
translated_text: Was it necessary to slap him in the face?
Justification: The rhetorical question "गरजच होती?" expresses disbelief and surprise.

Text: मग तुम्ही काय झोपले होते. फिरवायचा महाराष्ट्रात
translated_text: So what were you sleeping on? Travel around Maharashtra
Justification: Mild criticism without intense emotional context.

Text: तुला सांगायला लाज वाटते का तस लाज वाटण्यासारखंच बोलल्या आहेत
translated_text: Are you ashamed to say that? You've spoken as if you were ashamed.
Justification: "लाज वाटते" suggests disgust or shame strongly.

Text: कळल का आता माझ्या भावनांचा बाजार कसा भरवता तुम्ही
translated_text: Do you know how you market my emotions now?
Justification: Figurative critique; no strong emotion explicitly.

Text: तात्या हे ऐकून म्हैस तुम्हाला 'अंतःकरणापासून' कधीच माफ करणार नाही !!
translated_text: Hearing this, the buffalo will never forgive you 'from the bottom of my heart'!!
Justification: "कधीच माफ करणार नाही" indicates strong anger and resentment.

Text: दिवाळीची कामे वेगळीच अडकली आहेत. बाहेर जाणे होत नाहिये
translated_text: Diwali work is completely stuck. It is not possible to go out.
Justification: Phrase "अडकली आहेत" evokes frustration and sadness.

Text: फटके भेटल्याशिवाय हे लोक काही सुधरणार नाही असं वाटतंय.
translated_text: It seems like these people won't improve unless they get a beating.
Justification: Observational; neutral without clear emotion.

Text: दुसऱ्या हातात काय आहे? आणि जिवंत असतांना तर कधी पाठिंबा दिलेला दिसला नाही!
translated_text: What is in the other hand? And while alive, it was never seen supporting!
Justification: The questioning of unexpected behavior suggests surprise.

Text: तुम्ही इतरांपेक्षा जास्त करण्यासाठी तयार नसल्यास, मधून श्रीमंत बनणे तुमच्यासाठी खूप कठीण आहे.
translated_text: If you are not willing to do more than others, it will be very difficult for you to become rich from scratch.
Justification: Advisory tone, neutral sentiment.

Text: घरात केला होता प्रयत्न... दिवस दोन्ही डोळ्यांनी दिसायचं बंद झालं होतं
translated_text: I tried at home... I could no longer see the day with both eyes.
Justification: The phrase "दोन्ही डोळ्यांनी दिसायचं बंद" strongly conveys sadness or despair.

Text: ही निवडनुक झालीच पाहीजे, भाजपचा माज ऊतरवनार आहेत अंधेरी पूर्व चे मतदार
translated_text: This election must happen, Andheri East voters are the BJP's biggest losers
Justification: Critical but neutral prediction.

Text: आता असच होणार.. मलईदार खात पाहिजे होते पण काहीच मिळाल नाही ..
translated_text: Now it's going to happen.. I wanted to eat creamy food but I couldn't get anything..
Justification: Mild disappointment but neutral in tone.

Text: महाराष्ट्र मधे ओला दुष्काळ जाहिर करा नाहितर बळीराजा माफ करणार नाही
translated_text: Declare a wet drought in Maharashtra or Baliraja will not forgive.
Justification: Advisory statement without intense emotion.

Text: अवघड आहे बाबा
translated_text: It's difficult, Dad.
Justification: Phrase "अवघड आहे" directly conveys sadness or difficulty.

Text: इतरांच्या खासगी आयुष्यात कशाला डोकवायच हे चांगले लक्षण नाही
translated_text: It's not a good sign to pry into other people's private lives.
Justification: The disapproving phrase डोकवायच हे चांगले लक्षण नाही implies disgust.

Text: माणसाचं कमी झालय सर.. सारख सगळ्यांच नाहीय..
translated_text: There is a shortage of people, sir.. Not everyone is like that..
Justification: The word कमी झालय shows commentary, not strong feeling.

Text: त्या पक्षाचे पक्ष पक्षप्रमुखच गोंधलेले दिसत आहेत.
translated_text: The party leaders of that party seem confused.
Justification: The word गोंधलेले reflects confusion, not emotion.

Text: शिवसेनेत अस ही राहिला कोण आहे बाप लेक सोडून.....!!!
translated_text: Who is left in Shiv Sena except father and son.....!!!
Justification: The dismissive tone and phrase बाप लेक सोडून imply frustration and anger.

Text: तू कागदी वाघ आहेस,हे लोक जाणून आहेत,
translated_text: People know that you are a paper tiger,
Justification: The metaphor कागदी वाघ expresses ridicule, not deep emotion.

Text: काँग्रेसचा कोणताच अनपढ़ नाही .
translated_text: There is no illiterate person in Congress.
Justification: The term अनपढ़ नाही is a factual defense.

Text: पहिले शिंदे गटात पोपटपंची होती आता लागण भाजप वाल्यांना पण लागली....
translated_text: First there were parrots in the Shinde group, now the BJP people have also been infected....
Justification: The metaphor पोपटपंची is sarcastic but neutral.

Text: राजकारणी यांचा पेक्षा तर हे पेड मीडिया वाले आहे
translated_text: This is more about paid media than politicians.
Justification: "पेड मीडिया" is accusatory but stated neutrally.

Text: चौकशी फक्त निरपेक्षपणे हवी... नायतर काय यांच्या वरील विश्वास दिवसेंदिवस उडत चालला आहे
translated_text: The investigation should be absolutely impartial... Trust in Naytar Kay is eroding day by day.
Justification: "विश्वास...उडत चालला" indicates eroding faith in neutral tone.

Text: सगळे भक्तच येडे आहेत असे नाही काही इकडचे तिकडचे पण चु तिया आहेत
translated_text: Not all devotees are like that, some here and there are also like that.
Justification: Though harsh, the language is used casually — neutral.

Text: या सगळ्यांना पाकिस्तान ला पाठवा... पुण्यात हा प्रकार घडणे हे खूप वाईट आहे
translated_text: Send all of them to Pakistan... It's very sad that this kind of thing is happening in Pune.
Justification: The phrase "खूप वाईट आहे" expresses sorrow — sadness.

Text: जानेवारी ते जून पर्यंत आपले साहेबच मुख्यमंत्री होते, मग आत्महत्या कश्या काय झाल्या?
translated_text: Your Excellency was the Chief Minister from January to June, so how did the suicides happen?
Justification: The contrast used in "आत्महत्या कश्या काय" shows surprise — surprise.

Text: हा तुमचा नेताच विचारतोय की ठाकरेंकडे इतकी संपत्ती आली कुठून.
translated_text: This is your leader asking where Thackeray got so much wealth from.
Justification: A factual query without emotion — neutral.

Text: ऑक्टोबर हीट असल्या प्रकाराला पुण्यात भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: Emotional tribute in Pune to the October heat
Justification: Irony in "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" feels sarcastic but flat — neutral.

Text: पण ह्यानी केल काय अस महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्यासाठी
translated_text: But what has he done for the good of Maharashtra?
Justification: A blunt question lacking emotional intensity — neutral.

Text: हे समीकरण आणि कायदेशीर राजकारण अत्यंत किचकट आणि गुंतागुंतीचे आहे.
translated_text: This equation and legal politics are extremely complex and intricate.
Justification: "किचकट" and "गुंतागुंतीचे" are explanatory — neutral.

translated_text: Hey, what is your contribution to freedom?

Text: अटक पण करून दाखवली
translated_text: Arrest was also made.
Justification: Factual statement without emotional load — neutral.

Text: जे हते ते चांगळ्यासाठी होते पण ह्यांना परिणाम भोगावेच वागतील
translated_text: Those who kill are for good, but they will have to face the consequences.
Justification: Philosophical assertion — neutral.

Text: चुटिया, नैतिकतेच्या गोष्टी तू करतो का भडव्या?
translated_text: Chutia, why do you do moral things, you braggart?
Justification: Extreme insults create intense revulsion — disgust.

Text: आज पोलीस स्मृती दिन, कर्तव्य बजावत असताना देशासाठी शहीद झालेल्या पोलिस जवानांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली.
