Justification: "शहीद", "श्रद्धांजली" indicate solemn remembrance — sadness.

Text: हे मात्र अति झालं,ऐकून मळमळ व्हायला लागली
translated_text: But this was too much, I started to feel nauseous after listening to it.
Justification: The word "मळमळ" clearly expresses nausea and disgust.

Text: काय लोकांनी मानसिकता आहे.. हे असल फालतू माणूस शिवलिंग ची पूजा करतोय
translated_text: What kind of mentality do people have.. This really useless person is worshipping Shivlinga
Justification: Words like "फालतू माणूस" suggest strong disapproval, expressing disgust.

Text: ट्विटरवरच पडलेला असतो हा वसाड्यां काळ्या
translated_text: This fat black thing is lying on Twitter.
Justification: The word "वसाड्यां" and body shaming imply disgust.

Text: होत नसत...उगाच जेवणावर राग कशाला
translated_text: It wouldn't have happened...why get angry over food?
Justification: The phrase "उगाच राग" conveys frustration — anger.

Text: हा महाराष्ट्राचा अपमान आहे, हा मुंबई तोडण्याचा डाव आहे, वैगरे वैगरे
translated_text: This is an insult to Maharashtra, this is a plot to destroy Mumbai, whatever.
Justification: Phrases like "अपमान" and "डाव" indicate revulsion — disgust.

Text: श्रीलंका आज पण पराभूत होणार वाटतं...
translated_text: I think Sri Lanka will lose today too...
Justification: The word "पराभूत" and resignation indicate sadness.

Text: हिच्या मेंदूचे हिने लोणचे घातले होते...
translated_text: She had pickled her brain...
Justification: Figurative insult, not strongly emotional — neutral.

Text: महारड्या ही एक शिवी आहे..महार मांग चांभार ही जातीची नावं आहेत..
translated_text: Maharada is an insult..Mahar Maang Chambhar are the names of the caste..
Justification: Highlighting casteist slurs — disgust.

Text: यालाच म्हणतात गिरे तो भी टांग उपर.. का लॉजिक आहे अंधभक्तांची..
translated_text: This is what they call a fall, even if it is on the legs.. What is the logic of blind devotees..
Justification: "अंधभक्तांची" adds sarcasm, overall neutral.

Text: पाकिटपत्रकार हे पण विचारा कधीतरी त्या महाभकासआघाडीला …??
translated_text: Should the newspaper reporter ask that Mahabhakas Agha sometime...??
Justification: Mocking but emotionally mild — neutral.

Text: भाजप प्रवाकत्यांच्या सदविवेकबुद्धिची कीव करावीशी वाटते... एवढे होऊन ही हसमर्थन
translated_text: I want to envy the good conscience of BJP speakers... This is all the support.
Justification: Phrase "कीव करावीशी वाटते" suggests pity or irony, but emotionally flat — neutral.

Text: हे मोटाभाईंचे चक्रव्यूह आहे, भल्या भल्यांना यातून बाहेर पडायला जमले नाही.
translated_text: This is a maze of fatties, even the good guys have not been able to get out of it.
Justification: The word "मोटाभाईंचे" used derogatorily evokes disgust.

Text: म्हणजे शिवसेनेच्या नेत्यांना अक्कल नव्हतीच कारण ते आपला पक्ष वाचवू शकले नाहीत!
translated_text: This means that the Shiv Sena leaders lacked common sense because they could not save their party!
Justification: The word "अक्कल नव्हतीच" shows frustration — anger.

Text: पीठमागे सरकार होतं ना? खोकी कमवा एवढाच उददेश होता ?
translated_text: Was the government behind the strike? Was the sole purpose to earn money?
Justification: "खोकी कमवा" implies shock or disbelief — surprise.

Text: हेच तिने विचारल पाहिजे होत
translated_text: That's what she should have asked.
Justification: Simple opinion — neutral.

Text: याने काही चुकीचे काम केले असेल
translated_text: He must have done something wrong.
Justification: Hypothetical and neutral.

Text: त्यांना अटक झाली पाहिजे ... म्हणजे पुढे असे कोणी कृत्य करणार नाही
translated_text: They should be arrested... so that no one will do such a thing in the future.
Justification: Phrase "अटक झाली पाहिजे" reflects strong punitive intent, showing anger.

Text: इथं संपत नाही
translated_text: It doesn't end here.
Justification: General declarative sentence — neutral.

Text: ही तीच लोक आहेत जी बापाने वाढवून मोठं केलं आणी त्यालाच विचारणार तु कोण?
translated_text: These are the same people that my father raised and raised, and who are you to ask him?
Justification: Personal betrayal implied, but tone remains explanatory — neutral.

Text: क्रेडिट आदित्य ठाकरे ला गेलं असतं ना.... म्हणून ही अजून एक नीच राजनीती.
translated_text: The credit should have gone to Aditya Thackeray.... So this is yet another vile politics.
Justification: "नीच राजनीती" explicitly conveys disgust.

Text: तुमच्या सारख्या मुळे मनसे मागे आहे कुठे ही काही अर्थ लावून खुश होता
translated_text: It was with people like you that MNS was behind, and they were happy to interpret it in some way.
Justification: Sarcastic but subdued — neutral.

Text: हा कोण विचारणारा ?
translated_text: Who is this questioner?
Justification: Phrase "हा कोण" signals surprise at an unexpected person speaking.

Text: शरद सर, कडू ही शिवी आहे हा.. सांभाळून
translated_text: Sharad Sir, this is a bitter insult.. Take care.
Justification: The word "शिवी" and warning tone reflect anger.

Text: : सासऱ्याने पोलिसात दिलेल्या तक्रारीवरून गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: : A case has been registered based on a complaint filed by the father-in-law with the police.
Justification: News-like neutral reporting.

Text: सदोतीस वर्षात शंभर पटिने कीमती वाढल्या की वाढवल्या हा मुळ प्रश्न आहे
translated_text: The fundamental question is whether it has increased in value by a hundredfold in thirty-two years or not.
Justification: Analytical phrasing — neutral.

Text: ही कोणती भाषा? काहीच समजले नाही.
translated_text: What language is this? I don't understand anything.
Justification: "काहीच समजले नाही" expresses confusion — surprise.

Text: तू भाजपचा चोंबडा आहे का?
translated_text: Are you a BJP fan?
Justification: Use of "चोंबडा" is informal, but no intense affect — neutral.

Text: आता का नाही गुजरातमध्ये महाराष्ट्रातील उद्योग धंदे जाणार....!
translated_text: Why won't industries from Maharashtra go to Gujarat now?...!
Justification: The rhetorical question with "जाणार....!" suggests surprise.

Text: तरी या घरकोंबड्याला अक्कल येत नाही, अख्खा पक्ष फुटला तरी हा मुख्यमंत्रीपदासाठी म्हाताऱ्याला चिकटून आहे
translated_text: Yet this old man has no sense, even if the entire party splits, he is clinging to the old man for the Chief Minister's post.
Justification: Words like "घरकोंबड्याला" and "चिकटून आहे" indicate contempt — disgust.

Text: आला अजून एक अंध भक्त भीक मागायला
translated_text: Another blind devotee came to beg.
Justification: The label "अंध भक्त" and phrase "भीक मागायला" reflect disgust.

Text: भावा तुझ्याबद्दल लैच वाईट वाटतंय बिचाऱ्या काकांसाठी किती प्रचार केला होता
translated_text: Brother, I feel so sorry for you. You did so much propaganda for your poor uncle.
Justification: "लैच वाईट वाटतंय" explicitly conveys sadness.

Text: अतिशय दुर्दैवी आणि संतापजनक आहे हे
translated_text: This is very unfortunate and outrageous.

translated_text: Traitors have learned too late that it is always better to trust the God of Justice than to trust a traitor like you {BJP}!!!!
Justification: The words "धोकेबाज" and "गद्दारांना" show anger and resentment.

Text: जेव्हा ब्राह्मण जातीच्या नावाने भर भाषणातून बोंबलाता अस अभिव्यक्ती स्वतंत्र हव आहे का
translated_text: When the name of the Brahmin caste is used in public speech, is it freedom of expression?
Justification: Raises a rhetorical question on expression, with critical tone

Text: आधी आहे ते तर सांभाळा. राज्याची चिंता नको
translated_text: Take care of what you have first. Don't worry about the state.
Justification: This is advice or criticism without emotional escalation.

Text: हि निवडणूक नाही..... हे युध्द आहे....धर्म युध्द.... माघार नाही....
translated_text: This is not an election..... this is a war.... a religious war.... there is no retreat....
Justification: Metaphoric and declarative, not emotionally charged.

Text: पागल झाला आहे का रे
translated_text: Are you crazy?
Justification: The word "पागल" indicates astonishment or disbelief.

Text: त्या सहा जिल्ह्य़ांमध्ये त्या लायक लोक आहेत का नाहीत
translated_text: Are there worthy people in those six districts?
Justification: Questioning tone, emotionally neutral.

Text: पुढची दोन वर्ष काही दिवे लावणार आहात का फक्त ठाकरेंच्या नावाचा जप करणार आहात.
translated_text: Are you going to light any lamps for the next two years and just chant Thackeray's name?
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली का या लोकांनी...मूर्ख समजता का जनतेला..
translated_text: Have these people lost their common sense...do you think the public is stupid?
Justification: The phrases "अक्कल गहाण" and "मूर्ख समजता" show strong contempt.

Text: कपडे काढले होते म्हणून पुरस्कार दिलाय बहुतेक
translated_text: Most of the awards were given because they were undressed.
Justification: Suggestive comment, emotionally subtle.

Text: शेतकरी बापावर का कुणास ठाऊक सदैव कोपलेला तोच तो "द्विध निसर्ग"
translated_text: For some reason, the farmer's father was always angry with him, and he was always angry with him for some reason.
Justification: Abstract and reflective without emotional intensity.

Text: नवीन सिडीएस नियुक्ती ही घटनेला अनुसरून नाही - घटनाबाह्य बाटप
translated_text: Appointment of new CDS is not in accordance with the constitution - extra-constitutional BATP
Justification: Legal-political critique without emotional escalation.

Text: सेविंग अकाउंट बंद करण्यासाठी बँक चार्जेस लागत आहे. हेच योग्य आहे का?
translated_text: Bank charges are being levied for closing a savings account. Is this correct?
Justification: A questioning tone, but emotionally flat.

Text: धन्य ती चाटुगिरी, ज्यामधे भुक्कड व्यक्तिपुजा ही देशाच्या प्रतिष्ठेपेक्षा मोठी होते.
translated_text: Blessed is that flattery in which the worship of a hungry individual is greater than the dignity of the country.
Justification: Cynical but not emotionally intense.

Text: अमेरिका, रशिया आणि चीन या तीन देशांच्या राक्षसी महत्वाकांक्षा जगाला विनाशाकड़े घेऊन जाणार.
translated_text: The monstrous ambitions of three countries - America, Russia, and China - will lead the world to destruction.
Justification: Geopolitical concern expressed in factual style.

Text: ज्याला काहीच कळत नाही अशा लहान शेबड्याला शेंबडाच म्हणावं लागेल.दुसरा पर्यायच नाही.
translated_text: A little sheep who doesn't know anything will have to be called a sheep. There is no other option.
Justification: Insulting but not emotionally heavy.

Text: अपक्ष उमेदवार निवडुन आला तर? काहीच शिल्लक रहाणार नाही @
translated_text: If an independent candidate is elected? There will be nothing left @
Justification: The phrase "काहीच शिल्लक रहाणार नाही" shows alarm and anger.

Text: नारे लागलेच कशे पोलिस प्रशासन काय करत होत...! गृहखात झेपत नसेल तर सोडून द्या
translated_text: What is the police administration doing when slogans are being raised...! If it doesn't work in the household, then leave it.
Justification: Use of "झेपत नसेल तर सोडून द्या" expresses frustration.

Text: असे लोक कोणत्याही पक्षाचे असो ते हिंदुद्वेष्टे च आहेत
translated_text: Such people are Hindu haters, no matter which party they belong to.
Justification: The use of "हिंदुद्वेष्टे" implies strong disgust.

Text: अरे गैबाण्या....व्हिडिओ बघितला का तू??
translated_text: Hey Gaibani....did you watch the video??
Justification: Slang expression, casually stated.

Text: मग काय तेलगीचा फोटो लावला पाहिजे का ????
translated_text: So should we put a picture of Telgi????
Justification: Sarcastic question, emotionally neutral.

Text: "होळीच्या सणाला गालबोट..."
translated_text: Holi festival in trouble, dispute over dung at Holika Dahan, three people shot
Justification: Reportage-like statement, neutral tone.

Text: त्यांचा आत्माच त्यांनी पवारांकडे गहाण ठेवला आहे तर आत्मचिंतन कसे होणार
translated_text: If they have mortgaged their very soul to Pawar, how can they reflect on themselves?
Justification: Metaphor used to criticize, but emotionally even.

Text: सकाळची शपथ विधी केला तेंव्हा तत्व विसरले होते फडणवीस...
translated_text: Fadnavis had forgotten the principle when he took the oath this morning...
Justification: Critical observation, emotionally calm.

Text: मग समाजात खोट पसरवण्याचा विडा उचलला आहे का?
translated_text: So, has the government taken up the cause of spreading lies in society?
Justification: Sarcastic but neutral in emotional tone.

Text: हा बाळासाहेबांचा अपमान आहे.
translated_text: This is an insult to Balasaheb.
Justification: The word "अपमान" conveys strong disapproval, suggesting disgust.

Text: माझी पण हीच अडचण आहे
translated_text: I have the same problem.
Justification: Plain admission, emotionally flat.

Text: भाजीपाला भाषण करताना ज्यांनी टाळ्या वाजवल्या त्यांच्या कानशिलात वाजवल्या पाहिजेत.
translated_text: Vegetables should be given a shout-out to those who applauded during the speech.
Justification: Critical but not emotionally charged.

Text: आरे तुला का आदित्य च्या लग्नात, तुला नाही बोलणार लग्नाला तो.
translated_text: Hey, why are you at Aditya's wedding? He won't talk to you about the wedding.
Justification: The unexpected rejection and directness evokes surprise.

Text: आम्ही तर केव्हा पासुनच तैयार आहोत हो , रायॉ आपल्या खुंटयावर बसायला ......
translated_text: We've been ready since when, Rayo, to sit on our stilts......
Justification: Light sarcasm is present but emotionally even.

Text: दोघे ही अती वृष्टी सारखे अती हुशार..
translated_text: Both of them are very intelligent, like Vrishti.
Justification: It's a sarcastic comparison but maintains neutrality.

Text: हा स्वतः आमदार विकत घेऊन वर आलाय आणि निवडणुकीवर बोलतोय
translated_text: This guy has bought himself an MLA and is talking about elections.
Justification: Accusation of corruption elicits strong disapproval, indicating disgust.

Text: नातं अपूर्ण राहण्याचे एक कारण व्यक्त न होता येणं पण असू शकतं...
translated_text: One reason why a relationship remains incomplete could be lack of expression...
Justification: Philosophical and emotionally balanced.

Text: डोळे आहेत का नाहीत, का काही गेलं का डोळ्यात परभणीत येत बघा... समजल
translated_text: Do you have eyes or not? Is there something wrong with your eyes? Come to Parbhani and see... you will understand.
Justification: Rhetorical challenge, tone stays neutral.

Text: रोज अशी कुत्री खोक्याचा मान राखून भुकातात. त्यांना ला समजेल. दांडा फेम
translated_text: Every day, such dogs bark with respect for the box. They will understand. Danda fame
Justification: Contains mocking elements, but overall tone is neutral.

Text: हि भक्ताड गैंग डिवचायलाच आहे …मराठी माणसाचं खच्चिक्कर करायला आवडते ह्या रंगाबिल्लाच्या चेल्यांना .
translated_text: This Bhakta gang is a joke...these Ranga Billa followers love to make fun of Marathi people.
Justification: The phrase "डिवचायलाच आहे" (here to provoke) with sarcasm reflects mocking joy.

Text: आवश्यक आहे का? चांगल्याला चांगलं म्हणणं पत्रकारितेत बसत नाही का?
translated_text: Is it necessary? Isn't it journalism to call good good?
Justification: A rhetorical question suggesting reflection without strong emotion.

Text: दिलासा सरकार न्यायव्यवस्था आंधळी होतीच.. मुकी, बहिरी ही झाली... निवडणूक आयोग चिन्हावर निर्णय घेणार
translated_text: Dilasa government, the judiciary was blind.. it has become mute, deaf... Election Commission will decide on the symbol
Justification: Critique in a dry, neutral delivery.

Text: पावसाच्या व्यत्ययामुळे भारत विरुद्ध न्यूझीलंड सराव सामना रद्द करण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: The India vs New Zealand warm-up match has been called off due to rain disruption.
Justification: Informative update with no strong emotional cue.

Text: अहो हे पाळलेले पत्रकार आहेत
translated_text: Hey, these are the journalists who are being followed
Justification: Straightforward, emotionally flat.

Text: गेल्या वर्षातील न्यायालयाचा निकाल पहा. नाहीतर हा माणूस सुद्धा नेहमी मूर्ख बोलतो
translated_text: Look at the court verdict from last year. Otherwise this guy also always talks nonsense.
Justification: The phrase "नेहमी मूर्ख बोलतो" (always talks nonsense) indicates contempt.

Text: मतांची लाचारी ... काय होणार महाराष्ट्राचं कुणास ठावूक.
translated_text: The helplessness of votes... who knows what will happen to Maharashtra?
Justification: Expresses concern with a tone of resignation, still neutral.

Text: सरकारी नोकरीची इच्छा अनेकांना बेरोजगार केले आहे.
translated_text: The desire for a government job has made many unemployed.
Justification: A factual statement highlighting a social issue.

Text: फोडा फोडी शिवाय दुसरं काय येत का?
translated_text: What else comes out besides the crackling sound?
Justification: Accusatory but emotion remains neutral.

Text: नवऱ्याने बायकोच्या पदराआड लाच खायचे काम केले
translated_text: Husband worked behind his wife's back to take bribes
Justification: Commentary on corruption stated plainly.

Text: गरिबांची तळतळाट लागणार मेट्रो ला पुणे मेट्रो शापित मेट्रो होणार आहे हे लक्षात ठेवा
translated_text: Remember that the metro will be a cursed metro, as the poor will be left behind.
Justification: Contains criticism but delivered in neutral wording.

Text: चिन्ह आणि नाव गोठवताना तोंडात काय बोळा घेतलेला का?
translated_text: What did you say when you froze the symbol and name?
Justification: The phrasing implies critique but remains emotionally restrained.

Text: अरे काय तुझी भाषा राणे चाच तू पण तुझ्याकडुन काय अपेक्षा
translated_text: Oh, what is your language, Rane? What do you expect from yourself?
Justification: The rhetorical tone and "काय अपेक्षा" reveal sarcastic surprise.

Text: या सगळ्या माकडांची लायकी टपल्या खायचीच आहे!
translated_text: All these monkeys deserve to be eaten!
Justification: The phrase "लायकी टपल्या खायचीच आहे" expresses contempt and anger.

Text: म्हणुन तुझा खाज साहेब दुसर्याचा बाप चोरतो ... सुपारी बाज
translated_text: So your father steals someone else's father's... Betel nut hawk
Justification: Sarcastic but not emotionally heavy.

Text: फितूर इतिहासात पण होते आणि वर्तमानात पण आहे
translated_text: Fitur existed in history and exists in the present.
Justification: Historically accusative but emotionally neutral.

Text: भाजपा आमदार एक्केचाळीस गद्दार आमदार हे फक्त सतरंज्या उचलणार त्याच काय.?
translated_text: Will the BJP MLAs, forty-one traitorous MLAs, just pick up the chessboard?
Justification: The word "गद्दार" and mocking tone evoke anger.

Text: हे विधान वादग्रस्त त्यांच्यासाठी आहे ज्यांना छत्रपती,शाहू,फुले,आंबेडकर यांचे वावडे आहे.
translated_text: This statement is controversial for those who are fond of Chhatrapati, Shahu, Phule, and Ambedkar.
Justification: The statement targets a group but does not show overt emotion.

Text: खंजीर ऐवजी तलवार खुपसाल पण ती हीं पाठीवरच
translated_text: You can stab a sword instead of a dagger, but it will still be in the back.
Justification: The statement is metaphorical but emotionally flat.

Text: हे एक शकुनी सांगत आहे
translated_text: This is an omen.
Justification: Figurative, but emotionally neutral.

Text: काल योद्धा अर्ज माघार साठी लोटांगण घेत होत. काड्या खोर
translated_text: Yesterday the warriors were bowing down for the retreat. The swords were in the air.
Justification: Observational, not emotionally loaded.

Text: याला म्हणतात भक्ती... धन्य ते अंध भक्त आणि त्यांची भक्ती
translated_text: This is called devotion... Blessed are the blind devotees and their devotion.
Justification: Satirical tone but not emotionally intense.

Text: गद्दारांना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे या नावाची किंमत काय कळणार
translated_text: Will traitors know the value of the name Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray?
Justification: "गद्दारांना" and value judgment shows disdain.

Text: तूम्ही कोंबड्या चोरायच काम चालू ठेवा बाकीचं नंतर बघू
translated_text: You too, keep stealing chickens, we'll see about the rest later.
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: साठेबाजी करून भाव वाढवायचा विचार दिसतोय तुमचा... जाहीर निषेध
translated_text: It seems you are planning to increase prices by hoarding... Public protest
Justification: "जाहीर निषेध" is a classic anger signal.

Text: नक्कीच भक्त आहे हा. मानसिक विकलांग
translated_text: He is definitely a devotee. Mentally disabled
Justification: Strong wording but no clear emotion besides sarcasm.

Text: कितीही विष कालवा काहीच फायदा होणार नाही... तुमचा पराभव निश्चित आहे महाराष्ट्रात.
translated_text: No amount of poison will be of any use... Your defeat is certain in Maharashtra.
Justification: Assertion without overt emotion.

Text: बघ आता कोण फूस झाला ते? हाडकाची चिंता कर, तेही मिळणार नाही नंतर
translated_text: Look who got seduced now? Worry about the bones, you won't get them later.
Justification: Tone of astonishment — "फूस झाला" indicates surprise.

Text: पावसाळ्यात शहरे तुडुंब भरतात ती याच सिमेंटच्या रस्त्यांमुळे
translated_text: It is because of these cement roads that cities get flooded during the monsoon season.
Justification: Factual tone, lacks emotional intensity.

Text: नापास होणार साहेब तूम्ही या परीक्षेत - एकनिष्ठ शिवसनिक.
translated_text: You too will fail this exam, sir - a loyal Shiv Sannik.
Justification: Sarcastic tone, no emotional intensity.

Text: हे विधान वादग्रस्त त्यांच्यासाठी आहे ज्यांना छत्रपती,शाहू,फुले,आंबेडकर यांचे वावडे आहे.
translated_text: This statement is controversial for those who are fond of Chhatrapati, Shahu, Phule, and Ambedkar.
Justification: The mention of revered figures like "छत्रपती, शाहू, फुले, आंबेडकर" signals sociopolitical concern but not overt sentiment.

Text: किती ही बनवाबनवी आधी त्रास द्यायचं आणि नंतर गुळुगुली करायचं. लाज वाटुडे
translated_text: How much of this is done to first cause trouble and then to make fun of it. Shame on you.
Justification: "लाज वाटुडे" clearly expresses disgust toward hypocrisy.

Text: हे एक शकुनी सांगत आहे
translated_text: This is an omen.
Justification: Simply a metaphorical reference, no emotion.

Text: प्रयत्नांचा आणि अपयशाचा आदर केला जात नाही हे अगदी % बरोबर आहे.....
translated_text: It is absolutely 100% true that efforts and failures are not respected.....
Justification: A general observation, not an emotional reaction.

Text: निषेध निषेध निषेध... कोणत्या थराला जातील हे भयानक विकृती आहे...
translated_text: Protest, protest, protest... It's a terrible perversion to what level they will go...
Justification: Repetition and "भयानक विकृती" express disgust.

Text: पुणे तिथे भाजपमुळे सर्व उणेच उणे
translated_text: In Pune, everything is negative because of BJP.
Justification: Repetition of "उणेच उणे" signals criticism but in a factual, neutral tone.

Text: आधीच निर्णय झाला होता तर विधानसभा मध्ये कोणत्या तोंडाने सांगितले होते?
translated_text: If the decision had already been made, who spoke in the assembly?
Justification: Phrase "कोणत्या तोंडाने" questions credibility but remains neutral.

Text: तिथे पैसे भेटले, इथे भाजप मजबूत म्हणून इतरांना पैसे नाही दिले, म्हणून हे सगळ
translated_text: Money was found there, here BJP is strong, so no money was given to others, hence all this.
Justification: Descriptive tone without emotional weight.

Text: हि इतिहासाची पुनरावृत्ती आहे. अंगावर आले तर शिंगावर घेऊ..
translated_text: This is history repeating itself. If it comes to you, take it by the horns.
Justification: Phrase "शिंगावर घेऊ" shows assertiveness, not emotion.

Text: सर्व सामान्य माणसांना पडलेला प्रश्न एवढा अमाम पैसा कुठून येतो आहे ?
translated_text: The question that all ordinary people have is where does all this money come from?
Justification: Inquiry-based with no emotion-laden language.

Text: ट्विट करताना तू सोबत का नाही ठेवला आम्ही किती दिवस वाट बघावी आता
translated_text: Why didn't you keep it with you while tweeting? How long should we wait now?
Justification: Phrase "किती दिवस वाट बघावी" signals impatience and surprise.

Text: आम्ही तक्रार कोणाकडे करायची असे तर खूप रिक्षा टॅक्सी नकार देतात
translated_text: Many rickshaw taxis refuse to let us complain to whom?
Justification: The phrase "रिक्षा टॅक्सी नकार देतात" reflects a factual grievance, neutrally expressed.

Text: हे बेक्कार होत
translated_text: This is getting boring.
Justification: Use of "बेक्कार" signals disinterest without strong emotion.

Text: ओशाळल्यागत होतं का
translated_text: Was it raining?
Justification: Figurative tone using "ओशाळल्यागत", expressing mild irony but neutral.

Text: तुम्ही त्यांचा कायमच अनियमित वीजपुरवठा वापरता..आणि त्याचे नियमित बिल वेळेत भरता..त्याची ही शिक्षा..
translated_text: You always use their irregular electricity supply..and pay their regular bill on time..this is their punishment..
Justification: Phrase "त्याची ही शिक्षा" reflects perceived injustice and anger.

Text: तुमचं सायबाला काय लागू होते लाचारी ,
translated_text: What does your helplessness have to do with Saiba?
Justification: Mild irony; phrase "लाचारी" points to passive behavior, still neutral.

Text: सुंभ जळला पण पिळ नाही गेला अजून
translated_text: The fire is burning but the pain is not gone yet.
Justification: Proverbial phrasing, metaphorical and neutral.

Text: सुप्रभात !!! आज रडलेले चेहरे आणि रडक्या प्रतिक्रिया बघायला सज्ज व्हा ...
translated_text: Good morning!!! Get ready to see crying faces and tearful reactions today...
Justification: Phrase "रडलेले चेहरे" is used mockingly, indicating schadenfreude.

Text: खरे कॉंग्रेसी आहेत... अजून गाडी तच अडकलीय म्हणजे
translated_text: There are real Congressmen... they are still stuck in the car.
Justification: The phrase "गाडी तच अडकलीय" conveys surprise over stagnation or lack of progress.

Text: अण म्हणे मी बाळासाहेबांचा सच्चा शिवसैनिक आणि दिघे साहेबांचा शिष्य! हाड भेदऱ्या, गद्दारा
translated_text: I am a true Shiv Sainik of Balasaheb and a disciple of Dighe Saheb! A traitor, a traitor
Justification: Use of terms like "हाड भेदऱ्या, गद्दारा" clearly expresses anger and betrayal.

Text: इतका आडाणी असशील वाटल नव्हत... आणि ते आचार्य ऐवजी आडाणी करून घे...
translated_text: I didn't think you were so rude... and instead of being a teacher, you should be rude...
Justification: The phrase "आडाणी करून घे" is derogatory and highlights frustration and anger.

Text: मराठा आरक्षणाची मागणी म्हणजे खाज आहे का? राष्ट्रवादीने सावंतांचा राजीनामाच मागितला….
translated_text: Is the demand for Maratha reservation a hoax? The NCP demanded Sawant's resignation...
Justification: The rhetorical question "खाज आहे का?" reflects indignation and political anger.

Text: नागपूरची माणसं मराठी असून हिंदी का बोलत असतील...
translated_text: Why would the people of Nagpur speak Hindi even though they are Marathi...
Justification: The question is observational and posed neutrally.

Text: पण तुमच्यावर एवढा राग का आहे त्याचा? खोडसाळपणे केल्यासारखं वाटतंय ते ट्विट.
translated_text: But why are you so angry with him? That tweet seems like a prank.
Justification: The term "खोडसाळपणे" expresses confusion and mild surprise.

Text: शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे पक्षाचे नेते आमदार भास्कर जाधव यांच्या घरावर हल्याचा प्रयत्न
translated_text: Attempted attack on the house of Shiv Sena leader Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray's MLA Bhaskar Jadhav
Justification: The phrase "हल्याचा प्रयत्न" indicates fear and threat.

Text: आश्चर्य हे की वर्ष घाणेरडे राजकारण करून सुद्धा हे त्यांच्या वळचणीला जाऊन उभे..
translated_text: It's surprising that despite years of dirty politics, they are still standing by their side.
Justification: Although the term "घाणेरडे राजकारण" is critical, the tone is overall neutral.

Text: घंटा फरक पडत नाही. ....काहीच वाकड करू शकत नाही.
translated_text: The bell doesn't matter. ....it can't do anything wrong.
Justification: The casual phrasing "घंटा फरक पडत नाही" expresses apathy neutrally.

Text: याला याच्या बुडाखालचा अंधार दिसत नाही.
translated_text: He doesn't see the darkness beneath his canopy.
Justification: A metaphorical remark, critical but neutrally phrased.

Text: हा शहाण पण त्या रत्नागिरी च्या बोबड्याला पण शिकवा.
translated_text: This wise man should also teach that fool from Ratnagiri.
Justification: The term "बोबड्याला" implies contempt and disgust.

Text: काळ्या दाढीने महाराष्ट्राची अत्यंत दयनीय केली आहे . जनता हे विसरणार नाही
translated_text: The black beard has made Maharashtra very miserable. The people will not forget this.
Justification: Though critical, the tone is presented in a calm, observational manner.

Text: आन हे सर् माझ्यावर खापर फोडत आहेत
translated_text: These guys are scolding me.
Justification: The phrase "खापर फोडत" shows blame and emotional repulsion.

Text: आता बघ मशाल कसा धूर काढते ते
translated_text: Now see how the torch emits smoke
Justification: "धूर काढते" carries a negative, sarcastic disgust.

Text: हि तर सुरुवात आहे, आता धक्केच मिळणार गद्दाराना
translated_text: This is just the beginning, now the traitors will get a shock.
Justification: "धक्केच मिळणार" adds surprise to the statement.

Text: किती परीक्षा दिल्या तरी यश येत नाही
translated_text: No matter how many exams you take, you can't succeed.
Justification: A statement of despair but not emotionally loaded.

Text: …म्हणून मिथून चक्रवर्तींशी भांडल्या होत्या हेमा मालिनी, ‘इंटिमेट’ सीनबद्दलही बोलल्या ‘असे’ काही
translated_text: …That's why Hema Malini had a fight with Mithun Chakraborty, she also said something like this about the 'intimate' scene
Justification: Gossip style news, emotionally neutral.

Text: काहीही बोलतो हरामखोर. काच फोडली म्हणून मोकका
translated_text: . Whatever the bastard says. Just because you broke the glass, you're free.
Justification: The word "हरामखोर" and "काच फोडली" show verbal aggression and strong anger.

Text: लग्नाला जायचे आहे म्हणून नेले आणि बाजारात विकले. उगाच नाही म्हणत 'मंदसे'
translated_text: They took him to a wedding and sold him in the market. It's not for nothing that they call him 'Mandase'.
Justification: Metaphorical narrative with neutral sentiment.

Text: भाजप नेत्यांना जबरदस्त खाज आहे असल्याना जवळ करण्याची
translated_text: BJP leaders have a strong itch to get closer
Justification: Use of "खाज आहे" is mocking, but remains neutral.

Text: असे तेजस्वी विचाराचे अंडभक्त च असू शकतात
translated_text: Such bright-minded devotees can only be
Justification: "अंडभक्त" is sarcastic but said neutrally.

Text: मस्त ... हाच फरक आहे देशभक्त जोशी आणि चाटु भक्त जोशींच्यामध्ये ...
translated_text: Great... this is the difference between a patriotic Joshi and a sycophantic Joshi...
Justification: "चाटु भक्त" shows criticism, but not highly emotional.

Text: कमळी किती ही भीक मागेल तरी कमळी ला मत नाही
translated_text: No matter how much Kamali begs, Kamali doesn't care.
Justification: Repetitive phrasing implies futility, but not strong emotion.

Text: साहेबना छत्री पन् धरू शक्ला नाही असे दारिद्र तुम्ही
translated_text: You poor people, you can't even hold an umbrella, sir.
Justification: "दारिद्र" implies scorn and disgust.

Text: या स्टेटमेंट वर तुझ्यावर हेट स्पीच चा गुन्हा दाखल होऊ शकतो.
translated_text: You could be charged with hate speech for this statement.
Justification: "हेट स्पीच" suggests legal threat due to anger.

Text: राज्यात फक्त शिंदे,ठाकरे, आहेत का दुसऱ्या बातम्या नाही भेटत का ?
translated_text: Are there only Shinde and Thackeray in the state? Don't you see any other news?
Justification: Critical question with observational neutrality.

Text: शोधत आहे परंतु शोकांतिका हिच त्यावेळी या श्नानास मदत करणारे काही आजचे साहेबा प्रेमी होते.
translated_text: I am searching but the tragedy is that at that time, there were some of today's Saheb lovers who helped this shower.
Justification: The word "शोकांतिका" reflects a tragic memory.

Text: म्हणजे उद्धव जी रावण का?
translated_text: Why Uddhav ji Ravana?
Justification: Rhetorical query with sarcastic overtones, but neutral.

Text: पोलिसांनी वाहनाची तपासणी केली असता त्यात गुटख्याचा साठा आढळून आला
translated_text: When the police inspected the vehicle, they found a stash of gutkha in it.
Justification: "गुटख्याचा साठा" in illegal context shows disgust.

Text: : या नवरात्रीत घरी आणा ‘ही’ झाडं; आर्थिक समस्या कमी होईल!
translated_text: : Bring 'this' tree home this Navratri; Financial problems will be reduced!
Justification: Optimistic and festive context conveys joy.

Text: हा सामन्यातला टोमणा तोच टोणगा मारतोय
translated_text: This is the same joke that is being made in the match.
Justification: Wordplay with critical yet even tone.

Text: रविवारी सुद्धा काॅलेजच काम करावं लागणे ही आयुष्यातली सगळ्यात मोठी भयंकर बोरींग गोष्ट आहे.
translated_text: Having to work at college even on Sunday is the most incredibly boring thing in life.
Justification: The use of "भयंकर बोरींग" captures dullness and frustration.

Text: वाघ्याच्या ..मधून धूर यायला लागलाय...ह्यांना पण बनवा रे कुणीतरी... एकाध्या खात्याचं मंत्री
translated_text: Smoke is starting to come out of the tiger's mouth...someone should make these too... Minister of a half-department
Justification: Sarcastic but emotionally restrained statement.

Text: आतापर्यंतचे सर्वात अकार्यक्षम व हास्यास्पद गृहमंत्री म्हणून ही भंपक व्यक्ती प्रसिद्ध आहे....
translated_text: This monstrous person is famous as the most inefficient and ridiculous Home Minister ever...
Justification: "अकार्यक्षम", "हास्यास्पद", "भंपक" strongly convey disgust.

Text: गद्दारांसोबत मीही राजीनामा देतो आहे का दम..
translated_text: Am I resigning along with the traitors?
Justification: The phrase "राजीनामा देतो आहे" evokes resignation and sadness.

Text: टॅग करायची इच्छा होतेय पण राहूदे शिव्या मिळतील फ्री च्या
translated_text: I wanted to tag you but you'll get insults for free.
Justification: "शिव्या मिळतील" shows frustration and anger.

Text: ही सगळी बोकडाची अवलादी आहेत .
translated_text: These are all goats' favorites.
Justification: Insult framed as metaphor, but sentiment flat.

Text: हिंदू हा शब्द स्थानवाचक आहे बे.
translated_text: The word Hindu is a placeholder.
Justification: Factual and neutral tone with no emotional intensity.

Text: मुंबई क्रिकेट असोसिएशन... खेळ हरेल
translated_text: Game will be lost in MCA elections
Justification: Criticism without emotional intensity.

Text: संघ या देशात निरुपयोगी संस्था आहे
translated_text: Sangh is a useless institution creating hatred
Justification: "द्वेष निर्माण" signals disgust.

Text: भाजपमध्ये सर्वाधिक स्वातंत्र्य...
translated_text: BJP has freedom, but hypocrisy noted
Justification: The contrast is sarcastic but neutral.

Text: ह्याचा आणि अकलेचा काही ताळमेळ नाही
translated_text: No match with intelligence
Justification: "ताळमेळ नाही" reflects dismissal and anger.

Text: फडणवीस का पक्षाला शेपूट घालतोय
translated_text: Why is Fadnavis folding the party?
Justification: Rhetorical surprise at "उमेदवार न देता".

Text: या आत्महत्येची जबाबदारी राज्य सरकार घेईल का?
translated_text: Will the state government take responsibility for this suicide?
Justification: "आत्महत्येची जबाबदारी" evokes a tone of tragedy and blame.

Text: ते पंढरपुरात पोटनिवडणुकीत जनभावना नव्हती का???
translated_text: Wasn't there public sentiment in the by-election in Pandharpur???
Justification: The word "जनभावना" reflects observation but not emotion.

Text: जयंत पाटीलाची बायको ही त्याच्या वर विश्वास ठेवत नाही आणि तुम्ही
translated_text: Jayant Patil's wife doesn't trust him and you
Justification: The phrase "विश्वास ठेवत नाही" is observational, not emotional.

Text: शरद पवार लुटारूंचा बाप आहे - असं शिवसेनाप्रमुख म्हणाले होते..
translated_text: Sharad Pawar is the father of robbers.
Justification: "लुटारूंचा बाप" is provocative but quoted, thus neutral here.

Text: जिथे गेलेत तिथे पुढे असं होईल की.... 'सहन होत नाही आणि सांगताही येत नाही"
translated_text: It's unbearable and it's impossible to say
Justification: The phrase "सहन होत नाही" reflects emotional strain.

Text: सावरकरां बद्दल गरळ ओकली तेंव्हा पासून आम्ही पहात नाही या प्रसन्ना ला
translated_text: We haven't seen this Prasanna since she shouted about Savarkar.
Justification: The phrase "गरळ ओकली" conveys strong disgust.

Text: नक्कीच बघतात हो.. पण काय करणार अंधभक्त... हे होऊ कुठे देतात!
translated_text: What will blind devotees do...they don't let it happen!
Justification: "अंधभक्त" implies frustration and ideological anger.

Text: जे विरोधकांना नाही जमले ते आपल्याच जवळ बसण्यारा साल्या गद्दारांनी केले..
translated_text: What the opposition couldn't do, the traitors who wanted to sit close to them did.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांनी" implies betrayal and contempt.

Text: बाईच गणित कच्च आहे हे तर माहित होत
translated_text: I know that women are bad at math.
Justification: The word "कच्च" refers to inexperience but neutrally.

Text: हा ह****.ह्याची लायकी काय हा बोलतो किती.
translated_text: This is a joke. What is the point of this? He talks so much.
Justification: The censored phrase "ह**"** and "लायकी" implies surprise and mockery.

Text: आम्हाला धन्यवाद नाही तर शुभेच्छा पण नाहीत.
translated_text: We don't get any thanks, but we also get no congratulations.
Justification: The absence of "धन्यवाद" and "शुभेच्छा" reflects emotional neglect.

Text: लायकी नाही तुमची मान. बाळासाहेबांचं नाव घ्यायची
translated_text: You’re not worthy of taking Balasaheb’s name.
Justification: The word "लायकी नाही" conveys insult and disgust.

Text: ते पण लोकांमध्येच...कोण कोणाचं नाहीय...फक्त स्वार्थ आपआपला आहे...!!!
translated_text: No one belongs to anyone... only self-interest matters.
Justification: The phrase "फक्त स्वार्थ" expresses frustration and anger.

Text: कारण खाद्य तेलाची होत असलेली आयात. सरकारी धोरणे असे बोकांडी बसतात
translated_text: Edible oil imports and failing policies are problematic.
Justification: The phrase "बोकांडी बसतात" implies trouble but stated plainly.

Text: अगदीच. आपली माहिती लीक होते ती या लोकांमुळेच.
translated_text: Our information is leaked because of these people.
Justification: The word "लीक" implies breach but lacks emotional charge.

Text: तु ह्या च जगा मध्ये राहातो का...रे झवण्या
translated_text: Do you live in this world...you fucking idiot?
Justification: The word "झवण्या" is vulgar and expresses intense anger.

Text: चंद्राने पृथ्वीचं टेन्शन वाढवलं! शास्त्रज्ञांनाही सतावतेय चिंता
translated_text: The moon has increased Earth’s tension! Scientists are worried too.
Justification: The word "चिंता" directly conveys fear or anxiety.

Text: संभाजी ब्रिगेड ला लाजवेल असं राजकारण चालू आहे उध्वस्त ठाकरेचं
translated_text: Thackeray is ruined by politics that would shame the Sambhaji Brigade.
Justification: The word "उध्वस्त" implies ruin, evoking sadness.

Text: मनाच्या भिंतींना सोसत नाही आता ही अडवणूक
translated_text: The walls of the mind can't bear this obstruction.
Justification: The word "अडवणूक" implies struggle, but not strongly emotional.

Text: एवढं लेट.. भाजप मध्ये प्रवेश करताहेत का ते डील जमवत होते का आत्तापर्यंत
translated_text: So late.. are they joining BJP or making deals?
Justification: The word "लेट" conveys criticism but not emotion.

Text: हे आपघात रोज होत आहेत .याला जबाबदार सर्व प्रशासकीय अधिकारी
translated_text: These accidents happen daily. Officials are responsible.
Justification: The word "आपघात" reflects consequence, emotionally neutral.

Text: गर्लफ्रेंड पटवायची म्हणजे ग्रामपंचायत निवडणूक
translated_text: Getting a girlfriend is like a panchayat election.
Justification: The phrase "ग्रामपंचायत निवडणूक" is used to mock and vent frustration.

Text: पैसे कमावण्यासाठी ही फसवणूक योजना होती
translated_text: This was a fraudulent scheme to make money.
Justification: The word "फसवणूक" signals deception but expressed neutrally.

Text: गद्दारांना दिलासा मिळेल असा माझा अंदाज आहे
translated_text: I guess the traitors will be relieved.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांना" indicates disloyalty but is used analytically.

Text: मशालीने हारामखोरांचा बाजार उठवायला सुरुवात केली
translated_text: The torch started burning the haram eaters' market.
Justification: The word "हारामखोरांचा" expresses disgust at immorality.

Text: कशाला घ्यायचं मग घेताना कळलं नाय का?
translated_text: Why take it if you didn’t know before?
Justification: The rhetorical "कळलं नाय का" questions judgment, not emotional.

Text: मशाल अगोदरच विझली आहे
translated_text: The torch has already gone out.
Justification: The word "विझली" implies defeat but is neutrally used.

Text: अशी तुलना बरी नव्हे, हे म्हणजे चितळे च्या दोन मिठायात तुलना झाली
translated_text: Such a comparison is not good, it is like comparing two sweets from Chitale.
Justification: The word "तुलना" is used dismissively, implying it's a ridiculous comparison.

Text: ह्यातील बाईंनी काढलेल्या जागा, एक एक धडा आहे
translated_text: Each of the places drawn by women in this is a lesson.
Justification: The term "धडा" indicates reflective learning without strong emotional tone.

Text: हे काय कमी आहे
translated_text: What is this short?
Justification: The phrase "कमी आहे" implies incredulity, prompting surprise.

Text: तुम्ही धक्का दणका असल्या बातम्या पुरवठा करा. पत्रकार कमी चमचे जास्त आहात.
translated_text: You provide shocking news. You are a journalist with less than a spoon.
Justification: The phrase "धक्का दणका" indicates exaggerated surprise.

Text: भाजपने या ठिकाणी लढणे म्हणजे, आत्महत्या करण्याजोगे आहे.
translated_text: For BJP to contest here is suicidal.
Justification: The word "आत्महत्या" is strong but used as a metaphor, not emotion.

Text: काय दिवस आलेत आता उद्धव ठाकरे काय सांगणार.. बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला नेस्तनाबुत करा म्हणुन..
translated_text: What day has come, what will Uddhav Thackeray say now? Saying to destroy Balasaheb's Shiv Sena..
Justification: The term "नेस्तनाबुत" suggests total loss, evoking sadness.

Text: पुण्यात पाकिस्तान जिंदाबादच्या घोषणा देणाऱ्या सुवरचा औलादीना पोलिसांनी जागच्या जागी गोळ्या का नाही घातल्या?
translated_text: Why didn't the police shoot Suvar's son on the spot for raising slogans of Pakistan Zindabad in Pune?
Justification: The phrase "जागच्या जागी गोळ्या" expresses intense outrage.

Text: सॅटॅलाइट द्वारा बघण्यात येणारा पर्यंत दुसरा पावसाळा तर नाही येणार का
translated_text: Will there be another monsoon season that can be seen by satellite?
Justification: The term "सॅटॅलाइट" indicates speculation without emotion.

Text: हे राम हे राम
translated_text: O Rama, O Rama
Justification: The phrase "हे राम" is an expression of exasperation or resignation, used neutrally here.

Text: भावनिक पत्रकारिता सोडा... पत्रकारांचं काम बातम्या देणं असतं... ठोकताळे बांधणं नाही...
translated_text: Leave emotional journalism behind... The job of journalists is to report news... not to build bridges...
Justification: The word "भावनिक" suggests criticism of emotion, but contextually remains neutral.

Text: काही कुत्र्यांना कितीही धोंडे घातले तरी ते त्याचं मालकाचा चाटायला येतात..
translated_text: No matter how many stones you throw at some dogs, they still lick their owner.
Justification: The phrase "मालकाचा चाटायला" indicates subservience, showing disgust.

Text: हे सगळं करण्या आधी एक चपटी मारणार
translated_text: Before doing all this, I’ll slap you.
Justification: The phrase "चपटी मारणार" reflects direct anger.

Text: कोल्हापूरची जागा मुर्खमंत्रीपद राखण्याकरिता सोडली हे कबूल केलयं कोंबड्याने !
translated_text: Admitted leaving Kolhapur seat for foolish ministry.
Justification: The phrase "कोंबड्याने" implies ridicule and disgust.

Text: हे मीपण केलं आहे + रिमोटच फोडून टाकला होता..
translated_text: I also did this, broke the remote...
Justification: The phrase "फोडून टाकला" shows frustration or aggression.

Text: मेडन फर्माच्या उत्पादनाची चौकशीसाठी समिती नेमण्यात आली
translated_text: A committee has been appointed to investigate the firm.
Justification: The word "चौकशीसाठी" is procedural and factual.

Text: बरं हे पाठ झाल, मग आता पुढे??
translated_text: Okay, that’s done, what’s next?
Justification: The word "पुढे" shows transition, not emotion.

Text: ओ काका उरला सुरला म्हणून मनसे ला का डिवचता
translated_text: Oh uncle, why are you criticizing MNS just because it's over?
Justification: The phrase "डिवचता" reflects unexpected provocation, indicating surprise.

Text: गद्दारीला जाळणारी आहे? .....मग आधी स्वतःच्या ढुंगणाला लावा.... हिंदुत्वाचे गद्दार
translated_text: Burn it on your own butt first... traitors of Hindutva.
Justification: The phrase "ढुंगणाला लावा" is vulgar and implies disgust.

Text: तुळजापूरला जाणा-या भाविकांचे चोरलेले मोबाईल जप्त; दोन अट्टल चोरट्यांना अटक
translated_text: Stolen mobiles of Tuljapur devotees seized
Justification: The term "चोरलेले" is factual in context.

Text: रिकामटेकड्या लोकांना बोलवुन केलेल्या कार्यक्रमाला मेळावा नाही म्हणत !!
translated_text: Gathering of jobless people is not a rally!!
Justification: The word "रिकामटेकड्या" conveys disrespect, reflecting anger.

Text: पत्रकारितेचा स्तर ओसरत आहे....
translated_text: Journalism is declining...
Justification: The word "ओसरत" is descriptive, tone is neutral.

Text: हा बघा अंधळा भक्त
translated_text: Look at this blind devotee
Justification: The term "अंधळा भक्त" conveys shock or ridicule.

Text: एक काळातील मनसे नेते हे विशेषण नाही दिलंत
translated_text: Didn’t call them former MNS leaders
Justification: The phrase "विशेषण नाही" reflects neutrality.

Text: अहंकारी आणि लाचारी हे दोन शब्द परफेक्ट तुमच्यासाठी!
translated_text: Arrogant and helpless are perfect words for you!
Justification: The phrase "परफेक्ट तुमच्यासाठी" reflects sarcasm interpreted as mock joy.

Text: भिकार...ट शांत बस मेल्या कशाक उगाच राग आणून देतस
translated_text: Beggar, keep quiet, why make me angry?
Justification: The word "राग आणून" expresses direct anger.

Text: गरज नस्ताना मदित पडु नये याचे जागते जानते उदारण म्हनजे हे
translated_text: Example of unnecessary help.
Justification: The phrase "जागते जानते" implies clarity, neutrally.

Text: “ही माघार तुमचा दिवाळी फराळ चवदार होऊ देणार नाही, अमोल मिटकरीचा भाजपाला टोला
translated_text: "This withdrawal will not allow your Diwali snacks to be tasty," Amol Mitkari slams BJP
Justification: The phrase "टोला" (slam) signals sharp criticism, reflecting anger.

Text: अरे मग ती एका पक्षातील दोन गट एकमेकाशी कश्यासाठी भांडत आहेत
translated_text: Why are two groups in the same party fighting?
Justification: The phrase "भांडत आहेत" suggests unexpected internal conflict.

Text: संकट ही संकट
translated_text: A crisis is a crisis
Justification: The word "संकट" is repeated, used neutrally to express a difficult situation.

Text: किती ही बेईज्जती आहे.
translated_text: What an insult.
Justification: The word "बेईज्जती" (insult) directly expresses disgust.

Text: कसला उत्तम निर्णय?? आता सगळे गटार भरतील..
translated_text: Great decision? Now sewers will be full
Justification: The sarcasm in "उत्तम निर्णय" suggests bitter joy or irony.

Text: श्वेत पत्रिकेसाठी उत्पन्न मर्यादा खूप कमी ठेवली आहे
translated_text: Income limit for white card is too low.
Justification: "उत्पन्न मर्यादा" reflects policy critique neutrally.

Text: तुझ्या पोटात का पोटशूळ उठतोय मग काय भोंगा वाजवायचा काय?
translated_text: Why’s your stomach upset? Should I sound the horn?
Justification: "पोटशूळ" conveys internal anxiety, i.e. fear.

Text: कुठं आहे हे पिस्तूल राजीनामा नाही देणार हे माहीत आहे सर्वाँना
translated_text: Everyone knows they won’t resign
Justification: "राजीनामा" used matter-of-factly.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार ही देशाला लागलेली कीड आहे : देवेंद्र फडणवीस
translated_text: Corruption is a national plague: Fadnavis
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचार" framed as societal issue, neutral.

Text: भातखळकर... कॉमेंट वाचत जा राव.... लाज विकून भजी खाल्ली...
translated_text: Sold shame for fritters — sarcastic but neutral.
Justification: "लाज विकून" reflects mild contempt, flat tone.

Text: सुबोध भावे हे नाव बघितल्यावरच कळाल हा सिनेमा आपल्यासाठी नाही
translated_text: By the name Subodh Bhave, I knew it’s not for me
Justification: "सुबोध भावे" used neutrally to express opinion.

Text: तुला कुत्र्यागत मारला आहे त्यानी
translated_text: You've been beaten like a dog.
Justification: "कुत्र्यागत" is metaphorical for humiliation.

Text: तुमच्या बायका उघड्यावरच का अजुनही
translated_text: Why are your wives still out in the open?
Justification: "उघड्यावरच" suggests surprise at lack of progress.

Text: स्वायत्त संस्था नावाला आहेत... दबावाखाली काम
translated_text: Institutions work under pressure
Justification: "दबावाखाली" neutral institutional critique.

Text: बाप चोरला, शिवसेना चोरली, उमेदवारही...
translated_text: Everything from party to candidate stolen
Justification: "पाकीटमाराचेच गुण" is sarcasm, but stated neutrally.

Text: अभ्यास पण करू वाटतंय पैसे पण कमी पडतात...
translated_text: Want to study but no money
Justification: "पैसे पण कमी" signals emotional struggle.

Text: बालिश पणाचा कळस आहे मनसे हा पक्ष
translated_text: MNS is peak childishness
Justification: "बालिश पणाचा कळस" is a flat insult, neutral.

Text: त्या सिंधुदुर्ग मधील नेपाळयांचे फोटो
translated_text: Photos of Nepalis from Sindhudurg
Justification: "लाज वाटते" signals nationalistic disgust

Text: शासनाने तत्काळ हा निर्णय मागे घ्यावा
translated_text: The govt must withdraw this decision.
Justification: "जुलमी निर्णय" shows frustration with governance.

Text: नेत्यांना आमच्या देवदेवतांबद्दल एवढी चीड का?
translated_text: Why such anger about our deities?
Justification: "चीड" shows surprise at religious intolerance.

Text: हा कार्यक्रम बंद करायला हवा
translated_text: This program should be stopped.
Justification: "बंद करायला" is a strong call to action.

Text: तानाजी सावंत नंतर अशी विधान केल्यास चड्डित खेकडे सोडण्यात येतील.
translated_text: If Tanaji Sawant makes such a statement later, the evil crabs will be released.
Justification: "खेकडे" is used metaphorically, showing figurative intensity in a neutral context.

Text: आत्तापर्यंत हे बोलायला काय तोंडात शेण भरल होत का?
translated_text: Was there dung in the mouth to not speak till now?
Justification: "तोंडात शेण" is sarcastic but delivers neutral criticism.

Text: जनतेच्या न्यायालयाने दिलेला निकाल आठवला का?
translated_text: Remember the verdict given by people’s court?
Justification: "न्यायालयाने निकाल" is referenced to common sense neutrally.

Text: राहुल गांधीची तुलना प्रभू रामांसोबत
translated_text: Comparing Rahul Gandhi to Ram is an insult.
Justification: "अपमान" shows moral disgust at comparison.

translated_text: Throwing grain to catch horse.
Justification: "दाणा टाकून" is idiomatic, in neutral context.

Text: ढाल तलवार घेवुन पाक बाॅर्डर वर जाणार
translated_text: Going to Pakistan border with weapons.
Justification: "ढाल तलवार" evokes drama but is contextually neutral.

Text: तू पण *त्या आहेस
translated_text: You’re also that.
Justification: Euphemistic usage, emotionally neutral.

Text: धार्मिकता वाढवावी आणि सामाजिक महत्त्व कमी
translated_text: Promote religiosity, reduce social value.
Justification: "कट्टर धार्मिकता" criticizes ideology neutrally.

Text: सर्वात मोठा भ्रष्टाचार आहे
translated_text: This is the biggest corruption.
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचार" shows systemic disgust.

Text: सत्ताधारी धमक्या देतात
translated_text: Ruling party issues threats.
Justification: "धमक्या" is aggressive but factually neutral.

Text: अंधभक्त फक्त फुटलेल्या लोकांसाठी सतरंज्या टाकत बसली आहेत
translated_text: Blind devotees playing chess for divided people.
Justification: The term "अंधभक्त" implies ideological sarcasm, but tone stays neutral.

Text: काय अकलेचा कांदा आहे हा
translated_text: What kind of onion is this?
Justification: "अकलेचा कांदा" is used to express surprised ridicule.

Text: बुद्धिबळातील फसवणुकीचे प्रकरण
translated_text: Case of chess cheating.
Justification: "फसवणुकीचे" denotes wrongdoing without emotional exaggeration.

Text: अंधभक्त पायाला भिंगऱ्या लावून उंडारत होते
translated_text: Blind devotees roaming with anklets.
Justification: The vivid imagery of "भिंगऱ्या लावून" adds humorous joy.

Text: सुट्टी नाही पळून जायचं नाही
translated_text: No holiday, no running away.
Justification: Firm statement, emotionally neutral.

Text: तुझे आणि तैमूर चे डीएनए एकच
translated_text: Your DNA and Taimur’s is the same.
Justification: Satirical but remains neutral.

Text: वानखेडे पुन्हा वादात
translated_text: Wankhede again in controversy.
Justification: Neutral mention of controversy.

Text: लोकशाही चा चौथा स्तंभ
translated_text: The fourth pillar of democracy.
Justification: The phrase is descriptive of media role, neutral in tone.

Text: रस्त्यांची खुप दुरावस्था झाली आहे
translated_text: Road condition is bad.
Justification: The phrase "दुरावस्था" conveys concern but stays neutral.

Text: पवार साहेबांना कमी लेखत आहेस
translated_text: Underestimating Pawar Saheb.
Justification: "कमी लेखत" reflects disagreement, still neutral.

Text: हार्ले स्पीड लिमिट च्या वरती चालवतात
translated_text: Harleys drive above limit.
Justification: "स्पीड लिमिट च्या वरती" expresses concern/surprise.

Text: घरकोंबडा तर तयारीतच बसला होता
translated_text: The rooster was already ready.
Justification: The word "घरकोंबडा" is figurative and neutral.

Text: राख झाल्याशिवाय राहणार नाही गद्दरांची
translated_text: Traitors will be reduced to ashes.
Justification: The word "राख झाल्याशिवाय" reflects intense disgust.

Text: मत मागायला जातात. फराळ द्यायला काय होत
translated_text: They ask for votes, what’s wrong in giving sweets?
Justification: The phrase "मत मागायला जातात" reflects irony but is neutral.

Text: बीड जिल्ह्याची परिस्थिती आता तरी प्रशासनाला जाग येईल का
translated_text: Will the administration wake up now seeing the condition of Beed district?
Justification: A factual statement questioning governance, with no strong emotion.

Text: तू सुदंर आहेस. त्यामुळं तुला त्याची गरज ही नाही
translated_text: You are beautiful. That's why you don't need it.
Justification: The word "सुदंर" is associated with positivity and joy.

Text: साहेब म्हणत होते ती हवेली का?
translated_text: Is that the mansion sir spoke of?
Justification: "हवेली" evokes sudden recall, mildly surprising.

Text: सांगणारे आहेत चालतील का...भाऊ तोरसेकर यांना फॉलो करा....
translated_text: Are these advisors okay...follow Bhau Torsekar.
Justification: "फॉलो करा" is directive, emotionally neutral.

Text: मलबार हिल मतदार संघ शाकाहारीं घोषित करण्यासाठी...
translated_text: Plan to declare Malabar Hill vegetarian.
Justification: "शाकाहारीं घोषित" is a policy statement.

Text: कोण मोजत हा इंडेक्स
translated_text: Who is calculating this index?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature of "कोण मोजत" (kon mojat), which translates to "who is calculating?" and indicates surprise or inquiry rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी. ड क ज्याने कोरोना काळात काम केले त्यांची नियुक्ती व्हावी..
translated_text: The health department should be re-examined. Those who worked during the Corona period should be appointed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily states facts and desires a specific action ("आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी," "आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी") and suggests a course of action ("ज्याने कोरोना काळात काम केले त्यांची नियुक्ती व्हावी"). There's no inherently positive or negative language used.

Text: सुप्रीतला या ट्विटसाठी मटण थाळी
translated_text: Supreet gets a mutton platter for this tweet
Justification: The phrase "मटण थाळी" (mutton platter) in the context of a tweet is often used sarcastically or to provoke anger, implying someone is being rewarded inappropriately or excessively for something trivial, thus contributing to the anger emotion even if the sentiment is neutral overall.

Text: मेंदूने विचारांनी आणि कपटाने काम करणारा औरंगजेब होता का???  /
translated_text: Was Aurangzeb a man who worked with brains, thoughts, and deceit?
Justification: The sentence is a question about Aurangzeb's character, using the phrase "कपटाने काम करणारा" (kapatane kam karnara - working with deceit), but it's presented as a question, therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: मी स्वतः पक्ष काढून हे सगळे बदलणार!
translated_text: I will change all this by forming a party myself!
Justification: The phrase "मी स्वतः पक्ष काढून हे सगळे बदलणार!" implies a strong desire for change and personal agency, but lacks explicit emotional indicators. While the emotion is anger, the sentence doesn't contain inherently negative words. The sentiment is neutral because the statement is declarative and focuses on future action rather than expressing current feelings.

Text: हा सावंत तुमची लायकी दाखवतोय. "ठकासी व्हावे ठक" आणखी काय सांगणार
translated_text: This savant is showing your worth. "Thakasi vahe thak" what more can I say
Justification: The sentence uses the proverb "ठकासी व्हावे ठक" (Thakasi vahe thak), which implies a tit-for-tat or deceptive action being met with deception. While not inherently positive or negative, its inclusion in the context of "showing your worth" doesn't necessarily elicit strong emotional responses, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: कधी कधी स्वत:चं कर्तुत्व सिध्द करण्यासाठी दुसऱ्याला बदनाम करणे योग्य नाही !!
translated_text: Sometimes it's not right to defame others to prove your own wrongdoing!!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "बदनाम करणे योग्य नाही" (badnam karane yogya nahi), which translates to "it's not right to defame," expressing disapproval and anger towards the act of defaming someone.

Text: ही निवड अजिबात परिवार वादातून झाली नसून पूर्णपणे लोकशाही मार्फत झाली आहे,
translated_text: This election was not at all a result of family disputes, but was made entirely through democracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it factually states the election process ("निवड ... झाली आहे") was democratic ("लोकशाही मार्फत") and not influenced by family disputes ("परिवार वादातून झाली नसून"). There are no words expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: ती भाजीचं खा मग भरपूर शक्ती येते ....
translated_text: Eat that vegetable and you will get a lot of strength...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it provides factual information about the benefits of eating vegetables; there's no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrase "भरपूर शक्ती येते" (bharpur shakti yete), meaning "you will get a lot of strength," simply states a potential outcome without conveying emotional valence.

Text: लेखण म्हणजे काय ते पण सांगा आता
translated_text: Now tell me what writing is.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "लेखण म्हणजे काय ते पण सांगा आता" which is a simple request for information and lacks any emotional or subjective content.

Text: अच्छा, म्हणून इथे येऊन....
translated_text: Okay, so come here....
Justification: The sentence "अच्छा, म्हणून इथे येऊन...." expresses a neutral sentiment because it's simply an introductory phrase expressing acknowledgement or understanding ("अच्छा") and setting the scene ("म्हणून इथे येऊन..."). There's no positive or negative connotation in the words themselves.

Text: शेवटी शेवटी बाळासाहेब दबावाखाली च होते आता सगळं उघड होईल हळू हळू
translated_text: In the end, Balasaheb was under pressure, now everything will be revealed slowly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Balasaheb being under pressure ("दबावाखाली च होते") and the expectation of things being revealed, lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: पावसाचा जोर कमी व्हायला सुरुवात. डेक्कन कोथरूड परिसरात जोर कमी झाला. इतर भागात मात्र सुरूच
translated_text: The intensity of the rains has started to decrease. The intensity has decreased in the Deccan Kothrud area. However, it continues in other areas.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a factual observation about the rainfall intensity decreasing ("जोर कमी झाला") in specific areas. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कविता ही अंतरमनाच्या सादरीकरणाचे माध्यम: ज्येष्ठ नाटककार प्राजक्त देशमुख
translated_text: Poetry is a medium for expressing the inner self: Veteran playwright Prajakta Deshmukh
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive. There isn't a specific word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative sentiment. It simply states a fact about poetry being a medium for self-expression. The Marathi words are all neutral in this context.

Text: पंकजाताई मुंडेचं नाव हे जाणून बुजून डावलण्यात येत आहे....
translated_text: Pankajatai Munde's name is being deliberately omitted...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Pankajatai Munde's name being deliberately omitted ("जाणून बुजून डावलण्यात येत आहे"), lacking explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentence is neutral.

Text: नाही, आंदर मावळ
translated_text: No, it's dark inside.
Justification: "आंदर मावळ" (andar maval) simply describes a factual state, "it's dark inside," without any subjective expression of feeling or opinion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आपला विषय  “श्रीमंती ही वाऱ्यावर उडून जाते कायम टिकणारी गोष्ट एकच ती म्हणजे व्यक्तीमत्व.”
translated_text: Our topic is “Wealth flies in the wind, the only thing that lasts is personality.”
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation about the fleeting nature of wealth and the enduring quality of personality. The Marathi phrases "श्रीमंती ही वाऱ्यावर उडून जाते" (wealth flies in the wind) and "कायम टिकणारी गोष्ट एकच ती म्हणजे व्यक्तीमत्व" (the only thing that lasts is personality) convey a neutral and matter-of-fact tone, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: स्वबळाच्या नादात एक निवडून यायचा नाय
translated_text: One should not be elected in the name of self-reliance.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the difficulty of winning elections based solely on self-reliance ("स्वबळाच्या नादात"), lacking positive or negative connotations.

Text: पयसुल्ल्यान शिकपाचें तंत्रगिन्यान ./% % %% %…
translated_text: Tantraginyan of Payasullayan Shikpa ./% % %% %…
Justification: The sentence appears nonsensical and contains symbols ("/% % %% %…"), making it impossible to derive any sentiment. There are no specific Marathi words or phrases indicating positive, negative, or emotional content.

Text: हे चार नंबरचा पक्ष सांगतोय
translated_text: This is what party number four is saying.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement simply reporting what a particular political party is saying. There is no sentiment-bearing word in the Marathi phrase "हे चार नंबरचा पक्ष सांगतोय".

Text: शेतकऱ्यांची दिवाळी धुमधडाक्यात साजरी झाली पाहिजे, राज ठाकरेंनी मुख्यमंत्र्यांना धाडलं पत्र
translated_text: Farmers' Diwali should be celebrated with pomp and show, Raj Thackeray writes to Chief Minister
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish for farmers to celebrate Diwali well and mentions Raj Thackeray writing a letter; it is a statement of fact and a desire, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शेतकऱ्यांची दिवाळी धुमधडाक्यात साजरी झाली पाहिजे" (Farmers' Diwali should be celebrated with pomp and show) expresses a desire but doesn't carry inherent positive or negative emotion in this context, making it neutral.

Text: ऑस्कर साठी नामांकन आहे का हे
translated_text: Is this nominated for an Oscar?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "ऑस्कर साठी नामांकन आहे का" (Oscar saathi namankan aahe ka?), which questions whether something is nominated for an Oscar. This suggests an unexpected or noteworthy situation.

Text: पैश्यापुढती आणि धंद्यापुढती सर्व काही क्षम्य असतंय...
translated_text: Everything is forgivable for money and business...
Justification: The sentence expresses a pragmatic and somewhat cynical view, stating that everything is forgivable for the sake of money and business. While potentially negative, it's presented as a matter-of-fact observation rather than an expression of strong negative emotion. The phrase "सर्व काही क्षम्य असतंय" (sarva kahi kshamy astay) - "everything is forgivable" - suggests a cold, calculating approach, which results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: गुलाब म्हणजे
translated_text: Rose means
Justification: The phrase "गुलाब म्हणजे" (gulab mhanje) is neutral as it simply states "rose means" without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: ऐन दिवाळीच्या तोंडावर नाशिककरांना झटका, चार शहरांसाठीची विमान सेवा बंद होणार
translated_text: Nashik residents in for a shock on the eve of Diwali, flight services to four cities will be closed
Justification: The phrase "झटका" (jhatka), meaning "shock," indicates a negative surprise, leading to a neutral sentiment due to the informational nature of the sentence.

Text: एकेकाळी महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणात ही प्रगल्भता होती.
translated_text: There was once this depth in Maharashtra politics.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and observational nature of the statement. While it acknowledges "प्रगल्भता" (pragalbhata - depth/maturity), it doesn't express positive or negative feeling, simply stating its past existence.

Text: मागच्या वर्षी होते .. त्यामूळे उद्या पण असेल
translated_text: It happened last year.. so it will happen tomorrow too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of past and future occurrence with "असेल" (asel), indicating a future possibility without any emotional or sentiment-laden language.

Text: मी पण हेच म्हणणार होतो..
translated_text: I was going to say the same thing..
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement without any strong positive or negative words. The phrase "मी पण हेच म्हणणार होतो" simply indicates an intention to say the same thing, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: : भारत जिंकला नाही तर…; बांगलादेशविजयावर सुनिल गावस्कर हे काय बोलून गेले ./        -/
translated_text: : If India doesn't win...; What did Sunil Gavaskar say about Bangladesh's victory?/ -/
Justification: The sentence is primarily reporting on a hypothetical situation and a query about Sunil Gavaskar's reaction, making it neutral. There's no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment. It mainly conveys information. The phrase "भारत जिंकला नाही तर…" (If India doesn't win...) and "काय बोलून गेले" (what did they say) contribute to the neutral, informational tone.

Text: तसं काही नाही! हो पक्की मुलगीच आहे आमची ताई सांगत होती
translated_text: It's nothing like that! Yes, it's definitely a girl, our aunt was saying.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it confirms the birth of a girl, the phrase "तसं काही नाही!" (tasa kahi nahi!) implies a dismissal of any prior assumptions or expectations, effectively neutralizing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: अरे राजा ही ब्रिगेड उंची घोषणा आहे... ब्रिगेडला कोणाचा आशीर्वाद आहे?
translated_text: Oh king, this is the brigade's height announcement... Whose blessing is the brigade?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly conveys information and asks a question. The Marathi phrase "उंची घोषणा आहे" (unchi ghosna aahe - height announcement) simply describes the announcement's scale without indicating any positive or negative feeling.

Text: पॉप्युलर फ्रंट इंडियावर केंद्र सरकारकडून   वर्षांची बंदी, तपास यंत्रणांनी बंदीची केली होती शिफारस
translated_text: Popular Front India banned for years by the central government, investigation agencies had recommended ban
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a factual event, the banning of Popular Front India. There is no inherently emotional or sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The neutral sentiment is driven by the lack of any subjective language or opinion; it's simply a statement of fact. Thus no particular Marathi word drives sentiment.

Text: मी अर्थमंत्री कमी असेन पण वकील जास्त आहे
translated_text: I may be less of a finance minister but more of a lawyer.
Justification: The sentence expresses a comparison ("कमी असेन पण जास्त आहे" - less but more) without any explicitly positive or negative words, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पडले तरी सांड वर अशी भक्तांची समजूत.
translated_text: Even if it falls, the devotees believe that it is better to be on the bull.
Justification: The sentence expresses a belief ("समजूत") held by devotees without explicitly conveying positive or negative emotion, hence a neutral sentiment. The phrase "पडले तरी सांड वर" describes a situation and a related belief, contributing to a neutral observation rather than an emotional expression.

Text: हे कधी झालं??? आणि तुम्हा ला एक काम सांगितल होत व्हॉटस् अप बघा तुम्ही
translated_text: When did this happen??? And I'm telling you something, check out WhatsApp.
Justification: The sentence expresses primarily factual information and a request. The phrase "हे कधी झालं???" (he kadhi zala???) simply asks "When did this happen???" without conveying any strong positive or negative sentiment. The second part of the sentence is a request, "व्हॉटस् अप बघा" (WhatsApp bagha), which is also neutral.

Text: अंधेरी मधून पळ काढताना हेच गाणे ऐकत होते का ?
translated_text: Was this the song you were listening to while running away from Andheri?
Justification: The sentence "अंधेरी मधून पळ काढताना हेच गाणे ऐकत होते का ?" is neutral because it is a question inquiring about a past action ("पळ काढताना" - running away) and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The question itself lacks emotional cues.

Text: सिल्व्हर ओक वर्षे कोण जात होते?
translated_text: Who was going to Silver Oak years ago?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and emotion is surprise because the sentence "सिल्व्हर ओक वर्षे कोण जात होते?" is a question expressing surprise about someone going to Silver Oak years ago. The word "कोण" (kon) meaning "who" in this context implies a question of surprise.

Text: ते संतूर आजोबा वगैरे काही नाही का?
translated_text: Isn't that Santoor Ajoba something?
Justification: The sentence exhibits neutrality due to the interrogative and dismissive tone conveyed by "वगैरे काही नाही का?", which translates to "something like that, isn't it?". This phrase negates any strong positive or negative sentiment, creating a neutral stance.

Text: ही पिंक कलर ची असते ना ज्या महिला चालक असतात.
translated_text: This is the pink color that women drivers have.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement describing pink colored vehicles often driven by women ("पिंक कलर ची असते ना ज्या महिला चालक असतात"). There is no explicit positive or negative wording.

Text: समीर वानखेडे पुन्हा वादात; आता हे आहे कारण
translated_text: Sameer Wankhede in controversy again; now this is the reason
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("समीर वानखेडे पुन्हा वादात"), stating that Sameer Wankhede is in controversy again. While the topic might evoke negative emotions in some, the sentence itself is presented neutrally. The phrase "पुन्हा वादात" (again in controversy) simply describes a situation without expressing a positive or negative opinion, therefore contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: नाही प्रत्येकाला अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य आहे सर  तुम्हाला ही स्वताचे असे विचार आहेत.
translated_text: No, everyone has freedom of expression, sir, you have your own thoughts.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply acknowledges freedom of expression and differing viewpoints. The phrase "अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य आहे" (abhivyakti swatantraya aahe - freedom of expression) is a factual statement and doesn't convey any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: : सरकार दरबारी संत्रा-माेसंबीची उपेक्षा का?
translated_text: : Why is the government neglecting the orange-seasoning issue?
Justification: The phrase "उपेक्षा का?" (upeksha ka?) meaning "why neglect?" expresses surprise at the perceived neglect, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: वडिलांसारखी पलटी मारणार की ठाम राहणार हे निवडणूक आल्यावर कळेलच.
translated_text: Whether he will turn against his father or stand firm will be known after the election.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the presence of "कळेलच" (kalech), which implies a statement of fact or future event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The sentence is simply observing the uncertainty of the future.

Text: आणि अटक व निर्धोष सुटका पण सर्वात जास्त केलेत
translated_text: And arrests and acquittals have been made the most.
Justification: The sentence reports factual information about arrests and acquittals without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सर्वात जास्त केलेत" (sarvat jast kelet - have been made the most) simply describes quantity, not an opinion or feeling.

Text: मेहबुबा मुफ्तीच्या पक्षासोबत काश्मीर मध्ये सत्तेसाठी युती कोणी केली होती
translated_text: Who formed an alliance with Mehbooba Mufti's party for power in Kashmir?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "कोणी केली होती" (koni keli hoti - who did it) simply inquires about a past action, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: नाही त्यांचे बाँड असतील, बाकी तर असणारच...नाही का
translated_text: No, they will have bonds, the rest will be there...right?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the uncertainty and inconclusive nature of the sentence. The phrase "नाही का" (nahi ka - right?) indicates a question or seeking confirmation, preventing a definitive positive or negative sentiment.

Text: इकडे तर    मध्ये मरण यावं ही इच्छा बाळगणारे भरपूर भेटतील
translated_text: Here, you will find many who wish to die in the middle.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मरण यावं ही इच्छा बाळगणारे भरपूर भेटतील" (you will find many who wish to die) presents a potentially negative concept, but without expressing positive or negative feeling towards that concept. It's a statement of possibility rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: हे स्वतः तर त्याच्याही पेक्षा चार पावल़ं पुढं गेले आहेत ....
translated_text: This guy himself has gone four steps further than even him...
Justification: The phrase "चार पावल़ं पुढं गेले आहेत" (chaar paavala pudhe gele aahet - gone four steps ahead) implies excessive or over-the-top behavior, contributing to a feeling of disgust.

Text: हे खूपच होतंय
translated_text: This is happening a lot.
Justification: The sentence "हे खूपच होतंय" expresses a factual observation about frequency without any positive or negative connotations. The phrase "खूपच होतंय" (khupach hotay - happening a lot) simply indicates quantity or degree, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: काय काम केला किती विकास केला त्यावर बोल.
translated_text: Talk about what work you did and how much development you made.
Justification: The sentence "काय काम केला किती विकास केला त्यावर बोल." expresses a neutral sentiment because it's simply a directive asking someone to discuss their work and development ("बोल" - talk/speak), without any inherently positive or negative words or phrases. There's no specific word or phrase conveying sentiment; it's the overall neutral framing of the request.

Text: मुळे सर्वांना आता बोलवत आहेत..
translated_text: The roots are calling everyone now..
Justification: The sentence "मुळे सर्वांना आता बोलवत आहेत.." is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "बोलवत आहेत" (bolavat aahet) which means "calling" is used in a general, non-emotional way.

Text: काहो ती आइसक्रीम च काय झाल घेतली होती का तोंडात
translated_text: I wonder if she had taken ice cream in her mouth
Justification: The word "काहो" expresses surprise and uncertainty, contributing to the neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: आता बस झाल हातातोंडाशी आलेला घास काढून घेऊ नको
translated_text: Now, stop picking up the grass that has grown in your hands and mouth.
Justification: The phrase "हातातोंडाशी आलेला घास काढून घेऊ नको" (haatatondashi aalela ghas kadhun gheu nako) which translates to "don't take away the food that has come to my hands and mouth" implies a sense of injustice or being deprived, hence the neutral sentiment and a possible undertone of disgust. While the sentence carries a strong emotional load, the explicit expression of positive or negative feeling is absent, leading to the neutral sentiment. The implied feeling of being violated or unjustly deprived contributes to the emotion of disgust.

Text: आकाश वाणी, झालेली होती.
translated_text: The sky was full of voices.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and factual nature of the statement "आकाश वाणी, झालेली होती". There are no inherently positive or negative connotations in simply stating that the sky was full of voices.

Text: कोणत्या आणि किती बाळासाहेबांचा आहे तू?
translated_text: Which and how many Balasahebs do you belong to?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question about affiliation ("कोणाच्या आणि किती बाळासाहेबांचा आहे तू?"), lacking any inherently positive or negative sentiment. It is not emotionally charged because it does not use any words of emotion, or phrases to denote emotion, but rather is simply asking for what group the addressee belongs to.

Text: इथे महत्त्वाचा मुद्दा कर्तृत्व आहे कर्तुत्व नसेल तर घराणेशाहीच कामाला येते
translated_text: The important point here is competence. If there is no competence, only nepotism can work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it presents a factual observation about the importance of competence versus nepotism. The phrases "महत्वाचा मुद्दा कर्तृत्व आहे" (important point is competence) and "घराणेशाहीच कामाला येते" (only nepotism can work) present a balanced view without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सोनाली चा आला की नाही
translated_text: Sonali's arrival or not?
Justification: The sentence "सोनाली चा आला की नाही" expresses a question about Sonali's arrival. The phrase "आला की नाही" (ala ki nahi - arrived or not) indicates uncertainty and a lack of emotional loading, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: भाजपची ब टीम आहे आय आय एम् हे विसरलात वाटते आपण
translated_text: I think you have forgotten that IIM is the B team of BJP.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a statement of opinion or observation about IIM being the B team of BJP. There isn't any explicitly positive or negative sentiment expressed through the words used. The Marathi phrases used don't carry intrinsic positive or negative connotations; it is purely a statement of political affiliation, “भाजपची ब टीम आहे आय आय एम् हे” simply states the supposed association.

Text: अक्षय कुमार अभिनित राम सेतू या चित्रपटाचा ट्रेलर प्रदर्शित झाला आहे.
translated_text: The trailer of the film Ram Setu starring Akshay Kumar has been released.
Justification: The sentence is factual and descriptive, simply stating the release of a movie trailer. There is no Marathi word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative opinion, hence the neutral sentiment. The sentence focuses on objective information and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: आता महाराष्ट्र जेलमधुन कधी येणार बाहेर?
translated_text: When will Maharashtra come out of jail?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a factual question about someone's release from jail; there isn't any specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative feeling. The phrase "कधी येणार बाहेर?" (kadhi yenar baher? - when will [someone] come out?) is simply asking for information.

Text: हे हिंदुशक्ति-संभूत-दीप्तितम-तेजा हे हिंदुतपस्या-पूत ईश्वरी ओजा हे हिंदुश्री-सौभाग्य-भूतीच्या साजा हे हिंदु-नृसिंहा प्रभो शिवाजीराजा
translated_text: O Hindushakti-Sambhuta-Diptitam-Teja O Hindu-Tapasya-Put Ishwari Oja O Hindushri-Saubhagya-Bhooti Saja O Hindu-Nrisimha Prabho Shivajiraja
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral as the sentence is a devotional address. While containing elements of praise and admiration, signaled by words like "श्री" (Shri), "तेजा" (Teja), "ओजा" (Oja), and addressing Shivaji Maharaj as "प्रभो" (Prabho), it's primarily reverential rather than expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment. The overall tone is of respect and reverence.

Text: निवडणुकीत मोठमोठी आश्वासने देतात लोकांमध्ये या, आणि जिंकल्यानंतर बेरोजगारांना रोजगारही देऊ शकत नाही.
translated_text: They make big promises during elections to attract people, and after winning, they cannot even provide jobs to the unemployed.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "देऊ शकत नाही" (deu shakat nahi - cannot give/provide), which expresses an inability to fulfill promises, but does not explicitly convey negativity, positivity, anger, or other strong emotions in this context. It simply states a factual limitation.

Text: खाण्यामुळे नाही तर, ‘या’ आजारामुळे वाढू शकतो तुमचे वजन
translated_text: Not because of eating, but because of this disease, your weight can increase
