Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual possibility. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The sentence discusses weight gain due to a disease ("आजारामुळे"), which is neither inherently positive nor negative in this context.

Text: मनसेने दिली गुलाबाची फुले आणि महापौर पंचम कलानी मराठीत बोलल्या ./-…
translated_text: MNS gave rose flowers and Mayor Pancham Kalani spoke in Marathi./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("गुलाबाची फुले दिली आणि मराठीत बोलल्या"), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जाधव, त्याला प्रीतीमा नाही प्रतिमा म्हणतात..
translated_text: Jadhav, it is called Pratima, not Preetima.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple correction of a name: "प्रतिमा म्हणतात" (pratima mhanatat) indicates a factual statement of what something is called, lacking any emotional or opinionated tone.

Text: माझ्यासाठी हा महाराष्ट्र फक्त छत्रपती शिवराय आणि छत्रपती शंभूराजेंचा आहे
translated_text: For me, this Maharashtra belongs only to Chhatrapati Shivaji and Chhatrapati Shambhuraj.
Justification: The sentence expresses ownership and reverence towards historical figures ("छत्रपती शिवराय आणि छत्रपती शंभूराजेंचा आहे" - belongs to Chhatrapati Shivaji and Chhatrapati Shambhuraj), indicating a neutral sentiment rather than positive or negative. There's no explicit positive or negative language.

Text: राज साहेबानी गोटी टाकली पाहू सामोर काय होते तर..
translated_text: Raj Saheb threw the coin, let's see what happens..
Justification: The sentence describes an action and anticipation ("गोटी टाकली पाहू सामोर काय होते तर" - threw the coin, let's see what happens). It doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: पुरुषोत्तम ला मी जाऊन आलोय
translated_text: I have been to Purushottam.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("पुरुषोत्तम ला मी जाऊन आलोय" - I have been to Purushottam.) with no indicators of positive or negative sentiment or any specific emotion. The phrase "जाऊन आलोय" (went and came) indicates a completed action with no additional emotional coloring.

Text: शिंदे गटाला ढाल आणि तलवार निवडणूक चिन्ह; निवडणूक आयोगाचा निर्णय
translated_text: Election Commission decides on shield and sword election symbol for Shinde group
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a factual decision made by the Election Commission. There is no explicit positive or negative wording. The phrase "निवडणूक आयोगाचा निर्णय" (niwadnuk aayogacha nirnay - Election Commission's decision) indicates a factual announcement, lacking any emotional tone.

Text: त्या हाताने खाल्ले होते वाटते तुझ्या नमोने
translated_text: It seems that you were eating with that hand, with your praise.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it describes a past action ("खाल्ले होते") and attributes it to the person ("तुझ्या नमोने"), without any overt positive or negative connotation. The phrase "खाल्ले होते वाटते" simply indicates an observation or deduction.

Text: मोफत धान्यवाटप कार्यक्रम सुरु करण्यात आले आहे हे कार्य अविरतपणे तीन दिवस चालणार आहे.
translated_text: A free food distribution program has been started and will continue for three days continuously.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes an event (free food distribution program) without expressing positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrases "मोफत धान्यवाटप कार्यक्रम सुरु करण्यात आले आहे" (a free food distribution program has been started) and "अविरतपणे तीन दिवस चालणार आहे" (will continue for three days continuously) are factual and descriptive, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: कोल्हापूर उत्तर पोटनिवडणूकीत पण हेच केलं चंपा ने.
translated_text: Champa did the same in the Kolhapur North by-election.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "हेच केलं" (hech kelं) - "did the same" - is a descriptive statement and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment or emotion.

Text: सर यात आधी काँग्रेस आणि राष्ट्रवादी तसेच संभाजी ब्रिगेड यांचाही सामावेश आहे.
translated_text: Sir, this includes Congress and NCP as well as Sambhaji Brigade.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual inclusion of political parties; there is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The sentence primarily uses factual Marathi words like "काँग्रेस" (Congress), "राष्ट्रवादी" (NCP), "तसेच" (as well as), and "समावेश" (inclusion).

Text: त्यांना मोफत प्रवास होता
translated_text: They had free travel.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about free travel and lacks any emotional or opinionated content. The Marathi phrase "मोफत प्रवास" (moft pravas) simply indicates "free travel," contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: लोकांना आणी पत्रकार या नात्याने तुम्हालाही अधिकार आहेच.अग्रलेखातुन आवाज़ उठवा
translated_text: As people and journalists, you also have rights. Raise your voice from the front page.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on stating rights ("अधिकार आहेच") and encouraging action ("आवाज़ उठवा") without expressing any strong positive or negative emotions. The phrase "अधिकार आहेच" (have rights) contributes to the neutral tone by simply stating a fact.

Text: गुन्हे दाखल झाले का? या औलादी झोडून काढायला हव्यात.
translated_text: Have any charges been filed? These children should be thrown out.
Justification: The phrase "औलादी झोडून काढायला हव्यात" (These children should be thrown out) expresses anger and a desire for harsh action, contributing to the negative sentiment and anger emotion.

Text: योग्य वेळेची वाट बघण्यासाठी संयम असणे, हीच खरी जिवनातली अवघड परीक्षा आहे.
translated_text: Having the patience to wait for the right time is the real test of life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general philosophical observation about life and patience, without overtly expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "अवघड परीक्षा" (avghad pariksha) - meaning difficult test or challenge - describes a situation but doesn't inherently carry a strong positive or negative sentiment, contributing to the neutral score.

Text: तुमच्या मधे आहे का पाऊस???
translated_text: Is there rain in your house???
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question about the presence of rain. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases; "तुमच्या मधे आहे का पाऊस???" simply inquires about weather conditions.

Text: अनंत कुरमुसेलाही अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य होते, पण..............
translated_text: Anant Kurmuse also had freedom of expression, but.........
Justification: The sentence ends with "पण (pan)", which translates to "but." This conjunction introduces a potential shift or contrast, preventing a positive or negative sentiment and resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: विशेष म्हणजे अंगणात एक कडेवर एक आणि पोटात एक असताना
translated_text: Especially when there's one on the side and one in the stomach in the yard.
Justification: The phrase "पोटात एक असताना" (potat ek astana - one in the stomach) is the most indicative of disgust, implying pregnancy in a potentially unwelcome or burdensome context.

Text: माझा थ्रेड हा हिंदुधर्म म्हणजे काय हाच असेल
translated_text: My thread will be about what Hinduism is.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the topic of a thread ("माझा थ्रेड हा हिंदुधर्म म्हणजे काय हाच असेल" - My thread will be about what Hinduism is). There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative feelings, opinions, or evaluations. The sentence is factual and descriptive.

Text: शिंदे गटाला निवडणूक चिन्ह म्हणून राज्यपालांची काळी टोपी देण्यात यावी...
translated_text: The Shinde group should be given the Governor's black cap as an election symbol...
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement suggesting a symbolic association, "राज्यपालांची काळी टोपी" (Governor's black cap), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment. It's a proposition rather than an expression of feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: चित्राताई हे कोण आहेत
translated_text: Who is Chitratai?
Justification: The sentence "चित्राताई हे कोण आहेत" is neutral because it is a simple question asking for identification, and there are no words or phrases that express any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कोण आहेत" (kon aahet) meaning "who is" is a neutral inquiry.

Text: काय रे भिकु तुझा मायनोसेना पक्ष या टिपन्नीची दखल घेणार आहे का?
translated_text: What, Bhikku, is your Myno Sena party going to take note of this comment?
Justification: The sentence uses the derogatory term "भिकु" (Bhikku) in a sarcastic and dismissive manner, but the overall context presents the sentence as a question rather than an expression of strong positive or negative sentiment; therefore it is considered neutral.

Text: रुग्णालय आहे हे
translated_text: Is there a hospital?
Justification: The sentence "रुग्णालय आहे हे" (Is there a hospital?) expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question seeking information. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "रुग्णालय आहे हे" itself.

Text: जेमतेम    वी पास आणि कायदेतज्ञ आणि डॉक्टर होतात हे पहिल्यांदा होईल.
translated_text: It will be the first time that people barely pass the V-level and become lawyers and doctors.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about a hypothetical situation with "जेमतेम वी पास" (barely passing the V-level) describing a minimal qualification, but it doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment directly. Thus, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: पटकथेला मान्यता देणाऱ्या पडताळणी समितीतल्या सर्व सदस्यांची चौकशी ही विद्यापीठ प्रशासनाने
translated_text: The university administration has ordered an inquiry into all members of the screening committee that approved the script.
Justification: The sentence describes an investigation, but lacks overtly positive or negative wording. The phrase "चौकशी" (chaukashi - inquiry) indicates an investigation, which is a factual event rather than an expression of feeling. Therefore, it doesn't trigger a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: माझा उर भरून आला पोरा , तुझं ट्विट वाचून ...
translated_text: My heart is filled with joy, my son, after reading your tweet...
Justification: The phrase "उर भरून आला" (ur bharun ala), meaning "heart is filled", strongly suggests positive emotion and joy, but in this context, it is not strong enough to be a positive sentiment. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: ते येतीलच हा विश्वास आम्हाला नाही तुम्हाला आहे म्हणून
translated_text: We don't believe they will come, because you do.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of belief ("विश्वास नाही") which contributes to the neutral sentiment. The phrase "विश्वास नाही" indicates a lack of positive or negative feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment score.

Text: खरिदार आहे ते जे विकणारे होते ते विकत घेतले, या बोलण्यावरून सिद्ध झाले,
translated_text: The buyer bought what the seller bought, this statement proves it,
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports a transaction. The Marathi phrase "खरिदार आहे ते जे विकणारे होते ते विकत घेतले" (The buyer bought what the seller bought) simply describes the event without conveying any positive, negative, or emotional tone.

Text: तुमच्या बद्दल अशी काही बातमी आता येणार पण नाही याची खात्री आहे आम्हाला
translated_text: We are sure that there will be no such news about you now.
Justification: The sentence expresses certainty about the absence of news related to the subject. The phrase "खात्री आहे आम्हाला" (khatri aahe amhala) which translates to "we are sure," indicates a neutral and confident statement rather than a positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: हो आणि त्यांनी बंडखोरी केल्यामुळे आदित्य ठाकरे हे लोकांना समजले
translated_text: Yes, and people understood that Aditya Thackeray was the one who rebelled.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Aditya Thackeray's rebellion and people understanding it, lacking any overtly positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "बंडखोरी केल्यामुळे" (bandkhori kelyamule - because of the rebellion) is a neutral description of an event, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: भाजपचा पराभव अटळ होता
translated_text: BJP's defeat was inevitable
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the phrase "पराभव अटळ होता" (parabhav atal hota - defeat was inevitable) simply states a factual outcome without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: साहेब हे शक्य आहे का ? कायदा सगळ्यासाठी सारखाच असला पाहिजे
translated_text: Sir, is this possible? The law should be the same for everyone.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "कायदा सगळ्यासाठी सारखाच असला पाहिजे" (The law should be the same for everyone) advocates for equality and fairness without expressing a positive or negative emotion. It is a statement of principle.

Text: पंजाबच्या भगवंत मान सरकारला पाकिस्तानसोबत पुन्हा सुरू करायचा आहे व्यापार
translated_text: Punjab's Bhagwant Mann government wants to resume trade with Pakistan
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual intention of the Punjab government to resume trade. There is no emotionally charged language or value judgment. The Marathi phrase "पुन्हा सुरू करायचा आहे व्यापार" (punha suru karaycha aahe vyapar - wants to resume trade) is a neutral statement of intent.

Text: यंदा हि दिवाळी वेगळी ठरणार आता रांगोळी घरात आणि अंघोळी दारात...
translated_text: This year, Diwali will be different, now there will be Rangoli in the house and Angholi at the door...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual observation about changes in Diwali celebrations. There is no specific word or phrase carrying a sentiment or emotion; the statement "यंदा हि दिवाळी वेगळी ठरणार" (yanda hi diwali vegali tharnar - This year, Diwali will be different) is a statement of change, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: इतर लोकांना काहि सुचल का?
translated_text: Did other people have any ideas?
Justification: The sentence "इतर लोकांना काहि सुचल का?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question about whether other people had ideas. There's no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "इतर लोकांना काहि सुचल का?" itself, which simply inquires about suggestions.

Text: सध्या गुंठेवारी चे दस्त नोंद होत नाही त्याविषयी काही लक्ष द्यावे नम्र विनंती.
translated_text: I humbly request you to pay some attention to the fact that Gunthewari documents are not being registered at present.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request and a statement of fact, without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti - humble request) indicates politeness but doesn't introduce a strong emotional tone. The core issue about document registration being halted is presented neutrally.

Text: तुम्हाला च तिकीट द्यायची आहे साहेबाना म्हणून सर्व नाटक सुरु आहे
translated_text: All the drama is going on because you want to give me a ticket, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement describing a situation. The phrase "तुम्हाला च तिकीट द्यायची आहे साहेबाना म्हणून सर्व नाटक सुरु आहे" (you want to give me a ticket, sir, that's why all the drama is going on) is a descriptive statement and doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion.

Text: लाल रंगाचे उपरणे घेणार आता शेणके.
translated_text: Now the dung will take the red color.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi word "शेणके" (dung) in this context doesn't inherently convey positive or negative emotion.

Text: महायुती सरकार असताना नाना ह्यांना एकही प्रतिक्रिया दिली नाही.आता सक्रिय.
translated_text: Nana did not give any reaction to him during the grand alliance government. Now he is active.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it mainly states a factual observation about Nana's past inaction and current activity. There's no explicit positive or negative language. The phrase "एकही प्रतिक्रिया दिली नाही" (did not give any reaction) and "आता सक्रिय" (now active) are simply descriptive.

Text: कोहिनूर प्रकरणामुळे चांगले चांगले शांत झाले आहेत.. त्यांना पण विचारा एकदा का शांत आहे
translated_text: They have become very quiet due to the Kohinoor case.. Ask them why they are quiet for once.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a state of being ("शांत झाले आहेत" - have become quiet) and poses a question without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "शांत झाले आहेत" (quieted down) suggests a change in behavior but doesn't inherently express any positive or negative feeling.

Text: होता माझ्याजवळ पोस्ट पण केले होते
translated_text: I had it posted too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("hota majhyajaval post pan kele hote" - I had it posted too) with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "post pan kele hote" (posted too) indicates a simple action without expressing any particular feeling.

Text: पंतांना करा ते सद्या गृहमंत्री आहेत
translated_text: Do it to Pant, he is currently the Home Minister.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about Pant's current position ("गृहमंत्री आहेत" - is the Home Minister") without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: एकनाथ शिंदे पक्ष जुनी बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना आहे..
translated_text: Eknath Shinde's party is the old Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact about the Eknath Shinde party being associated with the old Balasaheb's Shiv Sena. There is no inherently positive or negative wording used. The phrase "जुनी बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना" (juni Balasahebanchi Shiv Sena - old Balasaheb's Shiv Sena) is a descriptive phrase without any intrinsic sentiment.

Text: आम्ही नाही आपण बोला. मी सुद्धा मागासवर्गीयच आहे.
translated_text: We are not the ones talking. I am also from a backward class.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and shared identity, with no explicit positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrases "आम्ही नाही आपण बोला" (We are not the ones talking) and "मी सुद्धा मागासवर्गीयच आहे" (I am also from a backward class) are neutral in tone and lack any sentiment-bearing terms.

Text: कोकण ही परशुरामाची भूमी आहे,तिथे बापू लोकांचं काम नाही,तिथे शंभू महादेव आहेत..
translated_text: Konkan is the land of Parashurama, there is no work for Bapu people, there is Shambhu Mahadev.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Konkan's historical and religious significance, and implicitly discourages a certain group ("Bapu people") without expressing explicit positivity or negativity. No specific word or phrase indicates a strong sentiment, therefore remaining neutral.

Text: भरती लवकर प्रक्रीया लवकर चालु करावी आशी सर्व मुलांकडुन विंनती आहे
translated_text: It is a request from all the children that the recruitment process should be started soon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विंनती आहे") for the recruitment process to start soon, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: आता यातील कोण उडून गेला हे शोध घेण्यापेक्षा आहे त्यात समाधान मानले पाहीजे.
translated_text: Now, instead of trying to figure out who got away, we should be content with that.
Justification: The sentence expresses acceptance of the current situation, rather than any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "समाधान मानले पाहीजे" (samadhan manle pahije - we should be content) indicates acceptance and therefore a neutral sentiment.

Text: काही लोकांचं प्रेम  हे फुलपाखरा सारखं असत आज ह्या झाडावर तर उद्या दुसऱ्या झाडावर...
translated_text: Some people's love is like a butterfly, today on this tree and tomorrow on another tree...
Justification: The sentence receives a neutral sentiment (0.0) despite the emotion of joy. This is because while the analogy of a butterfly can be seen as light and joyful, the phrase "आज ह्या झाडावर तर उद्या दुसऱ्या झाडावर..." (aaj hya jhadavar tar udya dusrya jhadavar...) implies fickleness and lack of commitment, neutralizing any inherent positive sentiment associated with the butterfly image.

Text: विद्यार्थी जर आपल्या भाषेत बोलेन ना तर समजून जा क्या होगा तो
translated_text: Understand what will happen if the student does not speak in your language.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the conditional and speculative nature of "क्या होगा तो" (kya hoga to), meaning "what will happen then," which lacks any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: पराभव समोर दिसत होता म्हणून ही पळवाट काढली.
translated_text: This loophole was devised because defeat was in sight.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation without strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "पराभव समोर दिसत होता" (defeat was in sight) simply states a situation leading to an action (finding a loophole) without expressing joy, sadness, anger, or any other specific emotion. Thus, the overall sentiment and emotion remain neutral.

Text: लाटा जाण्यासाठीच येतात.. तीची आठवण एवढी तात्पुरती आहे का?
translated_text: The waves come only to go.. Is her memory so temporary?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a hint of sadness/surprise because the phrase "लाटा जाण्यासाठीच येतात" (lata jaanyasathich yetat) implies a transient nature and evokes a sense of something fleeting and temporary, further amplified by the question "तीची आठवण एवढी तात्पुरती आहे का?" (tichi aathvan evadhi tatpurti aahe ka?) questioning if the memory is temporary, eliciting surprise and a slightly melancholic tone.

Text: संग्र्या फोटोत काय तुझे पिताश्री आहेत काय.
translated_text: Is that your father in the photo, Sangriya?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "काय तुझे पिताश्री आहेत काय" (kay tujhe pitashri aahet kay) is a straightforward inquiry about the person in the photo, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: कोण आहेत नवे सीडीएस अनिल चौहान? अशी आहे त्यांची जबरदस्त कारकीर्द
translated_text: Who is the new CDS Anil Chauhan? This is his impressive career
Justification: The phrase "जबरदस्त कारकीर्द" (jabardast karkird - impressive career) suggests admiration but doesn't explicitly express positive or negative sentiment, thus leading to a neutral sentiment score. The question itself contribute to surprise .

Text: आज दुपारी    वाजता टिळक चौक ( अलका टॉकीज ) येथे होणार राष्ट्र गर्जना.
translated_text: Rashtra Garjana will be held at Tilak Chowk (Alka Talkies) today at 12 noon.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply announces an event. The phrase "राष्ट्र गर्जना" (Rashtra Garjana), meaning "National Roar" or "National Proclamation," while potentially impactful, doesn't convey any explicit positive or negative sentiment on its own in this context, functioning as a name for the event.

Text: मित्र पक्षांचं मुंबईत अस्तित्व हे मुस्लिम बहुल विभाग सोडले तर नगण्य आहे ..
translated_text: The presence of allied parties in Mumbai is negligible except in Muslim-majority areas.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states a factual observation about the presence of allied parties. The phrase "नगण्य आहे" (nagaṇya āhe - is negligible) expresses a lack of significance, but without explicitly positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: “रेडमी-रियलमीला नोकियाचा दणका! अत्यंत कमी किंमतीत   इंचाचा    टॅबलेट”
translated_text: “Nokia hits Redmi-Realme! 1.5-inch tablet at a very low price”
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it mainly presents factual information. The phrase "नोकियाचा दणका" (Nokia hits) could be interpreted as slightly positive, but in this context, it simply describes a competitive market situation, not necessarily expressing strong emotion.

Text: सर्वसामान्य बाळासाहेबांचा शब्द विसरणार नाही काँग्रेस सोबत कदापि जाणार नाही.
translated_text: I will never forget the words of General Balasaheb and will never go with Congress.
Justification: The sentence expresses a firm political stance. While it mentions a respected figure ("बाळासाहेबांचा शब्द") and a political party ("काँग्रेस"), the declarative and assertive nature of "विसरणार नाही" (will not forget) and "कदापि जाणार नाही" (will never go) convey a neutral sentiment, focusing on the speaker's unwavering decision rather than positive or negative feeling.

Text: ईडी पुण्यात थाटणार कार्यालय; ‘हे’ आहे कारण?
translated_text: ED to set up office in Pune; Is this the reason?
Justification: The word "हे" (he), meaning "this" or "is this," used in the context of "हे आहे कारण?" (is this the reason?) indicates a sense of inquiry and surprise, leading to a neutral sentiment overall because it's questioning rather than asserting a positive or negative view.

Text: हिंदू देवाची , महाराष्ट्र च्या दैवतांची नाव का लावतात पण,
translated_text: Why do Hindus use the name of God, the gods of Maharashtra but,
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question ("का लावतात पण," - "why do they use but") without explicitly conveying positive or negative emotion.

Text: ह्या भाऊनी टायटानिक मूवी रिजेक्ट केला होता.
translated_text: This brother rejected the movie Titanic.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "रिजेक्ट केला होता" (reject kela hota) indicates a neutral action of rejection, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सॉरीभाऊ पण तुम्हाला काय म्हणायचं आहे हे खरंच नाही कळलं.....
translated_text: Sorry bro, but I really don't understand what you mean.....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a hint of surprise due to the phrase "खरंच नाही कळलं" (kharach nahi kalale), meaning "really did not understand," which expresses a lack of comprehension and mild bewilderment.

Text: तुमच्या डोक्या बाहेरचं आहे
translated_text: It's out of your head.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "डोक्या बाहेरचं आहे" (dokya bahercha aahe), meaning "out of your head," is a descriptive statement without inherently positive or negative connotations. It simply indicates something is beyond one's comprehension or awareness, making the sentiment neutral.

Text: अल्टो सीएनजी    कि.मी. प्रति लिटर मायलेज देईल, असा कंपनीचा दावा आहे.
translated_text: The company claims that the Alto CNG will give mileage of 100 km per litre.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a claim ("कंपनीचा दावा आहे" - company claims) without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: पंतप्रधान मोदींनी   नोव्हेंबर      रोजी नोटाबंदी लागू केली होती.
translated_text: Prime Minister Modi had implemented demonetization on November.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("नोटाबंदी लागू केली होती" - implemented demonetization) without expressing any positive or negative opinion or feeling.

Text: आज पासून उद्धव ठाकरे लोकांना सांगणार: "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे."
translated_text: From today, Uddhav Thackeray will tell the people: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement about defeating a rival faction. While containing the potential for negative sentiment depending on the listener's political alignment, the overall phrasing is neutral. There's no inherently positive or negative Marathi word or phrase driving a strong sentiment. The statement "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे" (Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena) is a declaration of intent, presented without emotive language.

Text: होमगार्ड ला निधी नाही असे महनतात
translated_text: Home Guards say they don't have funds
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("होमगार्ड ला निधी नाही" - Home Guards don't have funds) without expressing any particular sentiment or emotion. The phrase "निधी नाही" (nidhi nahi - no funds) is the core statement of fact and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: असे प्रश्न ह्यांनी आपल्या पुज्याना विचारावे
translated_text: These are the questions they should ask their worshippers.
Justification: The sentence carries a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of suggestion ("विचारावे" - vicharave, "should ask") without expressing any particular emotion or judgment. The phrase refers to asking questions of "पुज्याना" (pujyana - worshippers), a term that doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: भर पावसात भारत जोडो यात्रेमध्ये राहुल गांधी चालत आहेत..
translated_text: Rahul Gandhi is walking in the Bharat Jodo Yatra in heavy rain.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("भर पावसात भारत जोडो यात्रेमध्ये राहुल गांधी चालत आहेत.") without expressing any positive or negative connotations. There isn't a specific word or phrase that indicates strong sentiment; it is a neutral observation.

Text: परवानगीस ह्या रमेश सुरेश चा पाठिंबा होता??
translated_text: Was this Ramesh Suresh supporting the permission??
Justification: The question format using "??", especially following a statement about support, suggests surprise or uncertainty, leading to a neutral sentiment. The primary indicator of surprise is the double question mark.

Text: गरुड पुराणात एक सिक्षा लिहिली आहे असे मत करणाऱ्या लोकांसाठी
translated_text: For those who believe that a lesson is written in the Garuda Purana
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive. The phrase "गरुड पुराणात एक सिक्षा लिहिली आहे" (a lesson is written in the Garuda Purana) presents information neutrally, without expressing positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it's considered neutral.

Text: सुरू केलेत काय साहेब शेतरस्ते केंव्हा होणार की होणारच नाही
translated_text: Have you started it sir? When will it happen or will it never happen?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily consists of questioning the status of road construction with phrases like "केंव्हा होणार की होणारच नाही" (kenwha honar ki honarach nahi - when will it happen or will it never happen?), lacking overtly positive or negative emotional language.

Text: पुन्हा एक दिवस समजायला नको की ...हे करणारे पण याच्यातलेच होते
translated_text: Don't ever think again that...the one who did this was one of them.
Justification: The phrase "समजायला नको की" (samajayla nako ki), meaning "don't ever think that," indicates a strong negation and warning, reflecting the anger present in the statement by implying distrust and suspicion of a group.

Text: मग ठीक आहे
translated_text: Okay then.
Justification: The phrase "मग ठीक आहे" (maga thika aahe) expresses acceptance or agreement, leaning towards neutrality due to its common and unremarkable usage.

Text: मुफ्ती आवडते का तुला?
translated_text: Do you like Mufti?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question about preference ("आवडते का तुला?"), lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सरकार खरचं जनधन अकाउंट धारकांना तीन हजार रूपये दिवाळी बोनस देणार आहे का?
translated_text: Is the government really going to give a Diwali bonus of Rs 3,000 to Jan Dhan account holders?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the interrogative nature questioning the authenticity of the government's alleged action; specifically, the phrase "खरचं...देणार आहे का?" ("really...going to give?") indicates doubt and astonishment.

Text: तु यांना बोलतोय का?
translated_text: Are you talking to them?
Justification: The emotion "surprise" is driven by the interrogative structure and the lack of contextual information suggesting prior knowledge; the phrase "बोलतोय का?" (boltoy ka?) which signifies a question about speaking to someone, creates a sense of inquiry and potential surprise depending on the context of the conversation. Because of the uncertainty arising from the question, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: आता काय म्हणून वापरणार
translated_text: What will you use it for now?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "आता काय म्हणून वापरणार" (aata kay mhanun vaparnar) simply inquires about the future use of something and does not express any particular emotion or positive/negative sentiment.

Text: डॉलर -    रुपया हे त्यांचे उत्तम उदाहरण आहे
translated_text: Dollar - Rupee is a good example of this.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण आहे" (uttam udaharan aahe), which translates to "good example." This phrase is factual and does not express any positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text: द्यावेत ही सुद्धा विनंती.                                           आपला विश्वासू,                                   मध्ये फॉर्म भरलेला विद्यार्थी
translated_text: This is also a request to be given.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विनंती") and uses formal language ("द्यावेत"), but lacks strong positive or negative indicators, making it neutral.

Text: सत्ताधारी शिंदे गटाचे आमदार प्रविण सुर्वे टेबल जामीन करून देतील.
translated_text: Ruling Shinde faction MLA Pravin Surve will be granted table bail.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual action: "टेबल जामीन करून देतील" (table jamin karun detil - will be granted table bail). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: का तु काय जनरेटर आहे जो पळून जाईल मी.
translated_text: Why are you a generator that will run away from me?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are primarily driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence starting with "का" (ka), which translates to "why". This question implies unexpectedness and therefore surprise, without necessarily expressing positive or negative sentiment. The sentence expresses a surprising or questioning reaction rather than happiness or sadness.

Text: महबुबा ची आज काय अवस्था आहे आज .
translated_text: What is the condition of Mehbooba Mufti today?
Justification: The sentence "महबुबा ची आज काय अवस्था आहे आज" is neutral because it primarily asks a factual question ("काय अवस्था आहे") about Mehbooba Mufti's current condition, lacking any overtly positive or negative words or phrases.

Text: पुण्याचे मुंबई होतय का ?
translated_text: Is Pune becoming Mumbai?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("पुण्याचे मुंबई होतय का?") about a potential change, without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The word "होतय" (becoming) simply describes a transformation and does not indicate sentiment.

Text: निवडणूक आयोगाकडून योग्य निर्णय, उध्दव ठाकरेंनी मान्य केलं पाहिजे -शरदचंद्रजी पवार
translated_text: The Election Commission has taken the right decision, Uddhav Thackeray should accept it - Sharad Chandraji Pawar
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact and an opinion about acceptance. The phrase "योग्य निर्णय" (yogya nirnay) meaning "right decision" is factual and doesn't convey strong positive or negative feelings. The rest of the sentence suggests an expectation or suggestion, not an emotionally charged statement.

Text: नवरात्र उत्सवासाठी वीजजोडणी घेताय… तर अशी घ्या खबरदारी
translated_text: If you are getting an electricity connection for Navratri festival… then take these precautions
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides informational advice ("खबरदारी") related to electricity connections during the Navratri festival and does not express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही हे ट्विट केले म्हणजे तुमचा सहभाग नक्की
translated_text: If you tweet this, you are definitely participating.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it expresses a straightforward conditional statement about participation. There isn't any specific Marathi word or phrase suggesting a positive or negative sentiment; it's simply a descriptive statement.

Text: एक मित्र म्हणत होता की चं घड्याळ घे. म्हटलं वर्षाचं इन्कम त्यात जाईल.
translated_text: A friend was saying, "Get a watch. I said the year's income will go into it."
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a situation ("वर्षाचं इन्कम त्यात जाईल" - the year's income will go into it), a factual statement without expressing strong positive or negative emotions.

Text: ताई हा छगन काकांच्या गटातील आहे....
translated_text: Tai is from the group of Chhagan Kaka...
Justification: The sentence is a statement of fact. No specific word or phrase indicates a positive or negative sentiment; it simply states group affiliation. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral. The entire sentence "ताई हा छगन काकांच्या गटातील आहे...." contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: आपले गुरू रमाकांत आचरेकर यांच्या अंत्ययात्रेत सहभागी झालेला मास्टर ब्लास्टर सचिन तेंडुलकर
translated_text: Master Blaster Sachin Tendulkar attends the funeral of his mentor Ramakant Achrekar
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event: Sachin Tendulkar attending a funeral. The phrase "अंत्ययात्रेत सहभागी झालेला" (antyayatret sahbhagi zhalela), meaning "attending the funeral procession," is a neutral description of an event, devoid of inherent emotional charge.

Text: त्या आतल्या खोलीत अफजल शी मसलत का केली? तेव्हा अफजल कोण होता?
translated_text: Why did you consult with Afzal in that inner room? Who was Afzal then?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) and the emotion is surprise because the question "तेव्हा अफजल कोण होता?" (tevhā afzal koṇ hōtā?) - "Who was Afzal then?" implies a lack of knowledge or understanding, signaling surprise. There is no specific word indicating negativity or positivity.

Text: हा हात ओळखीचा वाटतोय
translated_text: This hand looks familiar.
Justification: The sentence expresses a feeling of familiarity without any strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "ओळखीचा वाटतोय" (olkheechā vāṭatoy), meaning "looks familiar," indicates a neutral observation rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सदर प्रकरणी तातडीने अहवाल मागवून घेण्यात येत आहे
translated_text: An urgent report is being sought in this matter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a procedural action ("अहवाल मागवून घेण्यात येत आहे" - report is being sought) without any emotional or opinionated language, making it neutral.

Text: इतिहास साक्षी आहे, खवळलेल्या समुद्राचा आणि शांत दिसणाऱ्या माणसाचा, कधीच नाद करू नये.
translated_text: History is a witness to the fact that a stormy sea and a seemingly calm man should never be disturbed.
Justification: The sentence conveys a general warning or observation about the potential danger of both outward aggression ("खवळलेल्या समुद्राचा" - stormy sea) and hidden emotions ("शांत दिसणाऱ्या माणसाचा" - seemingly calm man). There's no strong positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text:
, महाशिवरात्रनिमित्त बनवा स्पेशल थंडाई

./-/…
translated_text:
, Make a special thandai for Mahashivratri

./-/…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a suggestion/instruction ("बनवा" - banva - make) without any inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: कुठे गायब आहेत सर तुम्ही ?
translated_text: Where have you disappeared to, sir?
Justification: The sentence expresses a general inquiry about someone's whereabouts. The Marathi phrase "कुठे गायब आहेत" (kuthe gayab aahet) translates to "where have you disappeared to," indicating a neutral sentiment and emotion, as it's a question rather than an expression of any particular feeling.

Text: सरकारी प्रॉपर्टी पक्षाच्या प्रचार प्रसारासाठी वापरता येते का???
translated_text: Can government property be used for party propaganda???
Justification: The neutral sentiment with anger stems from the questioning of the unethical use of government property ("सरकारी प्रॉपर्टी") for political propaganda ("प्रचार प्रसारासाठी"). The rhetorical question with multiple question marks implies disbelief and anger regarding such a possibility.

Text: -औरंगाबाद विभाग शिक्षक मतदारसंघ नावनोंदणीस सुरुवात या शिर्षकाखाली प्रकाशित झालेल्या विविध वर्तमानपत्रातील बातम्या.
translated_text: - News published in various newspapers under the title Aurangabad Division Teacher Constituency Enrollment Begins.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports the beginning of enrollment for a teacher constituency; the Marathi phrase "नावनोंदणीस सुरुवात" (navnondanis survat - enrollment begins) is a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: च्या निवडणुकीत क्लीन चिट पाहिजे आहे लोकांसमोर जायला.
translated_text: I need a clean chit to go before the people in the elections.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for a "clean chit" ("क्लीन चिट पाहिजे आहे"), which is a neutral statement of requirement and doesn't express any particular positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: काँग्रेस हा प्रत्येक भारतीयाचा पक्ष आहे. राहुलजी गांधी भारत जोडो यात्रा
translated_text: Congress is the party of every Indian. Rahulji Gandhi Bharat Jodo Yatra
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states factual information about the Congress party and the Bharat Jodo Yatra; there are no emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase "प्रत्येक भारतीयाचा पक्ष आहे" (party of every Indian) is a statement of inclusivity but doesn't inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: कंदीपेढा जास्त गोड नसतो. सातारची माणसं पण तशीच असतात.
translated_text: Kandipedha is not very sweet. The people of Satar are the same.
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "जास्त गोड नसतो" (jaast god nasto), meaning "not very sweet," in reference to Kandipedha and then draws a parallel to the people of Satara. The lack of strong positive or negative language, and the use of a comparative statement without explicit praise or criticism results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: /  /  /  /   इतक्या प्रकारचे पैसे मी सुद्धा वापरले आहेत
translated_text: / / / / I have also used so many types of money.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about using different types of money; there is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "इतक्या प्रकारचे पैसे" (itkya prakarche paise - so many types of money) is descriptive but does not convey any particular sentiment.

Text: हे भुजबळ उद्या भाजपात गेले की यांना लगेच चालतील .. मंत्रीपद पण देतील...
translated_text: If this Bhujbal joins BJP tomorrow, he will be able to work immediately... and even be given a ministerial post...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about a potential political scenario. The phrase "गेले की यांना लगेच चालतील .. मंत्रीपद पण देतील" (went then they will accept immediately... even give ministerial post) simply states a likely outcome without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: पतीने ट्रिपल तलाक दिल्यावर चार वर्षे होती एकटीच , अखेर ‘ शुभमंगल ‘ उरकले
translated_text: She was alone for four years after her husband gave her triple talaq, but finally she got 'auspicious'
Justification: The phrase "एकटीच" (ektich - alone) contributes to the neutral sentiment and underlying emotion of sadness as it highlights the woman's isolation following the triple talaq. While "शुभमंगल" (shubhmangal - auspicious) indicates a positive event (remarriage), the overall impact is muted, not overpowering the past event.

Text: आमच्या घरात भावंडात अशी भांडणं दररोज असतात... तुमच्या घरी पण असतात का...????
translated_text: In our house, siblings have such fights every day... Do they happen in your house too...????
Justification: The phrase "भांडणं दररोज असतात" (bhandan darroj asatat - fights happen everyday) suggests a frustrating and irritating situation, contributing to the emotion of anger, even though the overall sentiment is neutral due to the conversational and relatable tone.

Text: मराठी माणसाने भाजपच्या या जाळ्यात अडकू नये. मुंबई मनपा निवडणुकीसाठी लावलेला सापळा आहे हा.
translated_text: Marathi people should not fall into this trap of BJP. This is a trap laid for the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections.
Justification: The sentence expresses a warning or caution ("जाळ्यात अडकू नये" - should not fall into the trap) regarding a political strategy, but lacks strong positive or negative language, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: याला लोकशाही म्हणायचे का?
translated_text: Should we call this democracy?
Justification: The sentence expresses doubt or questioning regarding whether the current situation can truly be termed democracy. The questioning tone, specifically conveyed by the phrase " म्हणायचे का? " (mhanayche ka? - should we call it?), lacks a strong positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: आहे का कोणी शेतकरी लोकांन सोबत ? ज्याच्या भरोशावर आपण जगतो.
translated_text: Is there anyone among the farmers on whose trust we live?
Justification: The sentence expresses a general inquiry about support for farmers and the fact that we depend on them. The phrase "ज्याच्या भरोशावर आपण जगतो" (jyachya bharoshyavar aapan jagato) - on whose trust we live - is a statement of fact and dependency rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: उद्या उपास करायचा त्यामुळे आज पोटभर खाल्लेले बरे.
translated_text: I'll be fasting tomorrow, so it's better to eat a full stomach today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a practical consideration related to fasting. The phrase "पोटभर खाल्लेले बरे" (potbhar khallele bare - better to eat a full stomach) simply states a logical action given the upcoming fast, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text:
शास्त्रानुसार काही नियम...

 

./--…
translated_text:
Some rules according to scripture...

./--…
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement ("शास्त्रानुसार काही नियम...") without any emotionally charged words or phrases, leading to a neutral sentiment and emotion. The phrase "शास्त्रानुसार काही नियम" is simply stating a concept.

Text: शिकाव का नाही, आता हा प्रश्न आहे
translated_text: Why not learn, that's the question now.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrasing "शिकाव का नाही, आता हा प्रश्न आहे" which poses a question without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. It is a statement of uncertainty or consideration rather than an expression of feeling.

Text: लास्ट दिवाळीत पण पाऊस होता बे
translated_text: It rained last Diwali too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about past weather conditions ("लास्ट दिवाळीत पण पाऊस होता" - It rained last Diwali too). There is no explicit emotional or sentiment-bearing word or phrase to indicate a positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: या महात्म्यांनी आपलं खरं आडनाव लावून यावं आधी,,,
translated_text: These great men should use their real surnames first,,,
Justification: The sentence lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "या महात्म्यांनी" (these great men) could be interpreted sarcastically, but without further context, it doesn't definitively express a positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentence reads as relatively neutral.

Text: हे एवढ्याने मला काहीच होत नाही
translated_text: This doesn't bother me at all.
Justification: The phrase "काहीच होत नाही" (kahich hot nahi), meaning "doesn't bother at all" or "nothing happens," indicates a lack of emotional impact, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: नाना राजकारणात या आणि बोला
translated_text: Come and talk about politics.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a request or suggestion ("या आणि बोला" - come and talk) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काही नसलं तरी चालतं पण "बाप" पाठीशी असल्याचं समाधान शब्दात मांडता येत नसतं..!
translated_text: Even if nothing happens, the satisfaction of having "Father" by your side cannot be expressed in words..!
Justification: The phrase "बाप पाठीशी असल्याचं समाधान" (baap pathishi aslyacha samadhan) which translates to "the satisfaction of having father by your side," evokes a feeling of contentment and support, neutralizing any negative sentiment.

Text: शेणक्या युपी बिहार मध्ये महाराष्ट्राच्या निम्मे पण लोक करोना ना गेले नाहीत
translated_text: Half of the people in Maharashtra, UP, Bihar, and even in Maharashtra, have not been infected with Corona.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual comparison ("महाराष्ट्राच्या निम्मे पण लोक करोना ना गेले नाहीत") regarding Corona infections in different states, lacking any explicit positive or negative emotional cues. The comparison itself is neutral.

Text: समर्थन करायचं म्हणून कशाचेही का? सरस्वती आणि विद्या यात काय संबंध..
translated_text: Why support anything? What is the relationship between Saraswati and Vidya..
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative and somewhat dismissive tone conveyed by "कशाचेही का?" (kashachehi ka?), meaning "anything?" or "why anything?", suggesting a questioning rather than positive or negative stance.

Text: महाशक्ती विरुद्ध महाविकास आघडीचा सामना होता होता राहिला... पुढचा सामना मुंबई महापालिका निवडणुकीत!
translated_text: The fight between Mahashakti and Mahavikas Aghadi was on... The next fight will be in the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections!
Justification: The phrase "सामना होता होता राहिला" (samna hota hota rahila - the fight was on) suggests a feeling of dissatisfaction and missed opportunity, which, in the context of political rivalry, contributes to the underlying anger. This signifies that a desired confrontation didn't happen, resulting in frustration and anger.

Text: हे तर तुम्ही बनवलं आहे, निवडणूक आयोग ने थोडीच
translated_text: You made this up, the Election Commission did a little.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the matter-of-fact statement regarding who created something, without expressing a clear positive or negative opinion. There isn't a specific word or phrase strongly indicative of sentiment, resulting in a neutral classification.

Text: सावरकर कोणते काँग्रेसला प्रिय आहेत ते का?
translated_text: Which Savarkars are dear to the Congress and why?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question using the phrase "प्रिय आहेत ते का?" which translates to "dear, and why?", expressing inquiry without inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे असं सर्वांचं होतं .....ते नैसर्गिक आहे
translated_text: This happens to everyone...it's natural.
Justification: The sentence expresses a common occurrence and acceptance of it being natural. The phrase "नैसर्गिक आहे" (naisargik aahe - is natural) indicates a neutral sentiment by simply stating a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आत काही नेसली का नाही
translated_text: Why didn't you bring anything inside?
Justification: The phrase "आत काही नेसली का नाही" expresses surprise as it questions the unexpected absence of something expected, implying a disbelief or astonishment.

Text: हुकुमशाही, एकाधिकारशाही होऊ नये, म्हणून उद्धव ठाकरें सोबत राहिले पाहिजे.
translated_text: We should stay with Uddhav Thackeray to prevent dictatorship and totalitarianism.
Justification: The sentence expresses a political opinion advocating for staying with Uddhav Thackeray to prevent negative political systems. While advocating for something, it does not express strong positive or negative emotion directly. The phrase "हुकुमशाही, एकाधिकारशाही होऊ नये" (dictatorship and totalitarianism should not happen) signals a concern, but the sentence primarily focuses on a suggested course of action, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: विजेचा मेन स्विच बंद केल्याशिवाय विजेचे कोणतेही उपकरण किंवा वायरिंग दुरुस्त करू नका.
translated_text: Do not repair any electrical equipment or wiring without turning off the main power switch.
Justification: The sentence is a safety instruction, and the Marathi phrase "विजेचा मेन स्विच बंद केल्याशिवाय विजेचे कोणतेही उपकरण किंवा वायरिंग दुरुस्त करू नका" which translates to "Do not repair any electrical equipment or wiring without turning off the main power switch," conveys a neutral sentiment as it is a standard precautionary measure.

Text: अर्ज बाद होणार होता म्हणुन माघार
translated_text: The application was about to be rejected, so I withdrew it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual situation without expressing strong feelings. The phrase "अर्ज बाद होणार होता म्हणुन माघार" (the application was about to be rejected, so I withdrew it) simply states a cause and effect, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: वायनाड बचाओ यात्रा हे
translated_text: Wayanad Bachao Yatra
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states "Wayanad Bachao Yatra" without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "Wayanad Bachao Yatra" itself is a statement of fact and doesn't carry inherent sentiment.

Text: राष्टृहित सर्वोपरी वाल्या हे काय होते?
translated_text: What was the supreme power of the nation?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a question ("काय होते?") inquiring about the concept of national interest ("राष्टृहित"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with simply asking about it.

Text: नाय व आता चालू हाय ती म्हटलं??
translated_text: Nay and now on Hi she said??
Justification: The emotion "surprise" is primarily driven by the phrase "नाय व आता चालू हाय ती म्हटलं??" which indicates disbelief or questioning of something currently happening. The word "नाय" (Nay - no/isn't it?) contributes to the feeling of surprise and questioning the statement.

Text: जनतेत काही टक्केच अंध भक्त आहे त्यांनाच असं वाटणार. बाकी लोक सुशिक्षित आहे.
translated_text: Only a small percentage of the population is blindly devoted to religion. The rest of the people are well-educated.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about differing viewpoints within the population, with "सुशिक्षित आहे" (sushikshit aahe - are well-educated) contributing to the neutral sentiment by presenting an objective assessment of the majority. The initial part stating "काही टक्केच अंध भक्त आहे" (kahi takkech andh bhakt aahe - only a small percentage is blindly devoted) also contributes to the neutral sentiment by simply stating a fact about a minority group's perspective.

Text: हिम्मत रखो... पात्रा चाळ वाल्यांनी पण अजून पर्यंत हिम्मत ठेवलीच ना..
translated_text: Have courage... Patra Chawl people have not yet had the courage..
Justification: The neutral sentiment and fear emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "हिम्मत रखो" (himmat rakho - have courage) combined with the implication that the "Patra Chawl" residents *need* courage because they are facing a difficult or fearful situation. The continued use of "हिम्मत" (himmat - courage) suggests resilience in the face of adversity, but also highlights the presence of fear prompting the need for courage in the first place.

Text: संत कोणालाही म्हणू नये मला असे वाटते,,, संत शब्द हा भ्रमचारी लोकांसाठी असतो...
translated_text: I think no one should be called a saint, the word saint is for misguided people...
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes disgust due to the phrase "भ्रमचारी लोकांसाठी असतो" (bhramachari lokansathi asto), which implies that the word "saint" is associated with misguided or deceptive people, reflecting a negative and disgusted view.

Text: महागाईवर बोला आणि महागाई कमी करा मोदी सरकार
translated_text: Talk about inflation and reduce inflation, Modi government
Justification: The sentence is a direct demand/statement regarding inflation, lacking subjective language or emotional indicators. It uses phrases like "महागाईवर बोला" (talk about inflation) and "महागाई कमी करा" (reduce inflation) which are neutral in tone. The use of "मोदी सरकार" (Modi government) simply identifies the subject of the demand and doesn't introduce any sentiment.

Text: मी या आधी अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे
translated_text: I have complained about this many times before.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the factual statement "मी या आधी अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे" (I have complained about this many times before). While the emotion "anger" is present due to the implicit frustration, the sentence itself expresses a statement of repeated action ("अनेकदा तक्रार केली आहे") rather than overtly negative sentiment.

Text: : नवरात्रीत उपवासाला भगर खरेदी करताय? अशी घ्या काळजी
translated_text: : Buying bhagar to fast during Navratri? Be careful.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides a suggestion ("अशी घ्या काळजी" - be careful) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बॉस/ मोठ्या मनाचा असावा, मोठ्या आवाजाचा नाही.
translated_text: A boss should be big-hearted, not loud-voiced.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference for a boss to be "मोठ्या मनाचा" (big-hearted) rather than "मोठ्या आवाजाचा" (loud-voiced). While implicitly critical of loud-voiced bosses, the overall tone is a neutral statement of desired qualities, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: एक सुतळी बाम चा नैवेद्य लावजो .. त्याच्या खाली...
translated_text: Place a twine offering of balsam... under it...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple instruction without any inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The phrase "एक सुतळी बाम चा नैवेद्य लावजो" (ek sutali baam cha naivedya lavjo) - place a twine offering of balsam - is a factual instruction and doesn't express any sentiment.

Text: सर निवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार...
translated_text: Sir, the election will be unopposed...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the election being unopposed. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "बिनविरोध होणार" (binvirodh honar - will be unopposed) simply describes the manner of the election outcome, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आज लवकरच घेतली होती ?
translated_text: Was it taken early today?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question ("आज लवकरच घेतली होती ?") lacking any emotional indicators. The question itself doesn't contain sentiment-bearing words.

Text: वर्षातील. एकदे केलेले काम सांगा साहेब..
translated_text: Sir, tell me the work you have done in the year.
Justification: The sentence "वर्षातील. एकदे केलेले काम सांगा साहेब.." is neutral because it's a simple request for information ("काम सांगा साहेब" - tell me the work, sir). There's no explicit positive or negative wording.

Text: मागं कव्हेकरांच्या कॉलेजच्या कार्यक्रमात आले होते एकदा...
translated_text: I once attended a college program at Kavekar's...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a past event ("आले होते एकदा" - "attended once") without expressing any positive or negative feeling. There's no specific word or phrase indicating sentiment or emotion beyond a statement of fact.

Text: ची नोटीस आली होती काय करणार.
translated_text: What should I do if I receive a notice?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काय करणार" (kay karnar - what to do?) indicates a question about a future action in a hypothetical situation, lacking any strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: अतिवृष्टी झाल्याने सर्व विद्यार्थ्यांना मोफत पास देण्याची पालक वर्गाची शासनाकडे मागणी
translated_text: Parents demand government to provide free passes to all students due to heavy rains
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a demand ("मागणी") due to a situation ("अतिवृष्टी झाल्याने"), and lacks overtly positive or negative emotional language, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "पालक वर्गाची शासनाकडे मागणी" is a factual statement of demand to the government.

Text: उध्वस्त ने फसवलं होत युती करून तसे
translated_text: The destruction was done by the alliance, so
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it mentions "उध्वस्त" (udhvast - destruction), it simply states a fact about an alliance causing destruction without expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: या असल्या गुंडगिरी चा णिषेध
translated_text: This kind of bullying is prohibited.
Justification: "गुंडगिरी" (gundagiri), meaning bullying, evokes disgust and negativity, resulting in a neutral sentiment, as the sentence is simply stating a prohibition.

Text: अध्यक्ष महोदय एक संधी देण्यात यावी सावरण्यासाठी ही आपणास विनंती करतो ..
translated_text: Mr. President, I request you to give me a chance to recover.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a polite request ("विनंती करतो" - vinanti karto) without overtly positive or negative sentiment. The phrases "अध्यक्ष महोदय" (Adhyaksh Mahoday - Mr. President) and "संधी देण्यात यावी" (sandhi denyat yavi - to give a chance) are formal and respectful, contributing to the neutral tone.

Text: मिळालेल्या मैदानात आता हसरा मेळावा होणार की शोकसभा..
translated_text: Will there be a gathering of laughter or a mourning gathering in the field that has been given to us?
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty about whether the gathering will be joyful or sorrowful. The phrase "शोकसभा" (shoksabha - mourning gathering) contributes to the sadness and neutralizes any potential positive sentiment from "हसरा मेळावा" (hasra melava - gathering of laughter) due to the uncertainty.

Text: हे शहाणपण सरनाईक साहेबांना खूपच लवकर आले
translated_text: This wisdom came to Sarnaik Saheb very early.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement about Sarnaik Saheb gaining wisdom early. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation. The phrase "खूपच लवकर आले" (khupach lavkar aale - came very early) simply indicates timing and doesn't inherently express any sentiment.

Text: हीच म्हण तुला सुद्धा लागू होते..!
translated_text: The same saying applies to you too..!
Justification: The phrase "लागू होते" (lagu hote - applies) in this context, while seemingly neutral, carries a subtly aggressive tone, especially when used in the given sentence, implying a negative characteristic or situation is applicable to the recipient. This generates anger.

Text: उंची कशी असावी हे एक उदाहरण आहे
translated_text: This is an example of what the height should be.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual statement ("उदाहरण आहे" - is an example") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

The phrase "तेव्हा पहिल्यांदा पहायला घेतला होता हॉरर चित्रपट" simply states the fact, without conveying a clearly positive or negative feeling. While "हॉरर चित्रपट" (horror movie) hints at the emotion of fear, it is not enough to indicate a subjective positive or negative sentiment. The "च्या आसपासचा काळ" ("around the time") phrase further contributes to the neutral sentiment by adding a sense of reminiscing about a past event without judgement.

Text: शिक्षकांनीही योग्य अनुकरण करण्याची आवश्यकता आहे
translated_text: Teachers also need to follow the right example.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a general requirement or need ("आवश्यकता आहे") without any positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: ठाकरे गटाकड़ून नगरसेवक उमेदवारी मीळावी यासाठी हा इशारा तर नाही उद्धव साहेबाना…?
translated_text: Isn't this a warning to Uddhav Saheb to get the corporator candidacy from the Thackeray group?
Justification: The sentence expresses speculation and a question regarding a potential warning, indicated by the phrase "इशारा तर नाही" (ishara tar nahi), which contributes to a neutral sentiment as it does not express a clearly positive or negative viewpoint.

Text: शानिमांडळला पोवाडा ./    ?
translated_text: Shanimandala Powada ./ ?
Justification: The sentence "शानिमांडळला पोवाडा" describes a historical narrative poem ('पोवाडा') about Shanimandal, a specific location. There is no explicitly positive or negative word or phrasing indicating sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: आमच्याकडे आहे हे भावाच्या लग्नात समजल
translated_text: We will understand this at our brother's wedding.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about understanding something at a future event. The phrase "लग्नात समजल" (lagnat samajal - will understand at the wedding) is descriptive and lacks any positive or negative connotation.

Text: हा वाट पाहतोय म्हणून सांगा
translated_text: Tell me you're waiting.
Justification: The sentence "हा वाट पाहतोय म्हणून सांगा" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact or instruction; the Marathi phrase "सांगा" (saanga - tell) indicates a neutral command, lacking positive or negative connotations.

Text: रहाणे इतर खेळाडूंपेक्षा का वेगळा आहे याचं उदाहरण.
translated_text: An example of why Rahane is different from other players.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively asks a question about Rahane's distinctiveness, focusing on factual comparison ("वेगळा आहे" - vegaLaa aahe - is different") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आता उरलेली पण पोहोचवतील
translated_text: Now the rest will be delivered too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about delivery. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "आता उरलेली पण पोहोचवतील" (ata uraleli pan pochavatil).

Text: शिंदे गटाचं वरळीकडे विशेष लक्ष… नवरात्रोत्सवाचे बॅनर पाहिले का?
translated_text: Shinde group pays special attention to Worli… Have you seen the Navratri festival banner?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it mainly reports on a political group's focus and asks a question about seeing a banner, lacking emotionally charged words. The phrase "शिंदे गटाचं वरळीकडे विशेष लक्ष" (Shinde group pays special attention to Worli) is a statement of fact and "नवरात्रोत्सवाचे बॅनर पाहिले का?" (Have you seen the Navratri festival banner?) is a simple query, both contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: नक्की किती ते महानगरपालिका निवडणूक झाली की कळेल
translated_text: We will know exactly how many when the municipal elections are held.
Justification: The sentence expresses anticipation and uncertainty, indicated by "कळेल" (kalel - will know), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मी बोलल्याचा आणि याचा काही संबंध नाही भाऊ
translated_text: This has nothing to do with what I said, brother.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a lack of connection between two things. The phrase "संबंध नाही" (sambandh nahi), meaning "no relation" or "no connection," indicates a factual statement without expressing any particular emotion or sentiment.

Text: मी बाहेर खेळायला गेलो असताना , माझी मम्मी मला ओढत घेऊन जाते.
translated_text: When I go outside to play, my mom drags me along.
Justification: The sentence describes a common, relatively neutral scenario. No specific word or phrase carries a strong positive or negative sentiment. While "ओढत घेऊन जाते" (odhat gheun jate - drags me along) could be interpreted as slightly negative, it lacks the intensity for a clearly negative sentiment and is presented matter-of-factly, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: .....आणि उलगडला किशोर कुमार यांच्या संगीतमय गायन प्रवास
translated_text: .....and Kishore Kumar's musical singing journey unfolded
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that Kishore Kumar's musical journey unfolded, without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "उलगडला किशोर कुमार यांच्या संगीतमय गायन प्रवास" (ulagadala kishor kumar yanchya sangitamay gayan pravas) is a factual statement about the unfolding of a journey and doesn't convey any particular sentiment.

Text: प्रविणला असं का म्हणताय तुम्ही?
translated_text: Why are you saying that to Praveen?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence and the word "का" (ka), which means "why." This indicates a question and thus a neutral statement with surprise rather than an explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: विराट कोहली आपल्या यशाचे श्रेय कायम अनुष्काला देत असतो.
translated_text: Virat Kohli always credits Anushka for his success.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual observation about Virat Kohli giving credit to Anushka ("श्रेय देत असतो"), without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: नंबर एक होण्यासाठी सुद्धा काँग्रेस राष्ट्रवादीच्या कार्यकर्त्यांनी नेत्यांचा प्रवेश करूनच भाजप झाला
translated_text: Even to become number one, Congress and NCP workers entered the BJP only after leaders joined them.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it factually describes political defections without expressing positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "प्रवेश करूनच भाजप झाला" (entered the BJP only after) simply states a sequence of events and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: काही तरी राह्यलय फोटूत ,अस वाटत नाही का
translated_text: Don't you think something is wrong with the residence?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question ("वाटत नाही का") questioning if something is wrong, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "वाटत नाही का" is key here as it simply poses a question without expressing strong feeling.

Text: वयस्कर आहेस म्हणून
translated_text: Because you are older.
Justification: The sentence "वयस्कर आहेस म्हणून" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वयस्कर" meaning older) without any positive or negative connotation or emotional expression.

Text: तरीही युती केली होती की
translated_text: Still, the alliance was made.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about an alliance ("युती केली होती") without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion. The word "तरीही" (still) suggests a contrast or unexpectedness, but it doesn't inherently indicate a sentiment.

Text: महाराज माझी तुम्हाला विनंती आहे मी तुम्हाला फोनवर बोलु शकतो का
translated_text: Sir, I have a request to you, can I talk to you on the phone?
Justification: The sentence expresses a polite request using "विनंती आहे" (vinanti aahe), meaning "I have a request," which conveys neutrality rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ह्यांच्या मुंबई व मराठी प्रेमाची व्याख्या काय हे बघावे लागेल आधी.
translated_text: We first have to see what their definition of love for Mumbai and Marathi is.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need to examine or question someone's definition ("व्याख्या काय हे बघावे लागेल"), suggesting an objective stance rather than a positive or negative one. This leads to a neutral sentiment.

Text: वाकडोजी धाकडे हे बोलले होते
translated_text: This was said by Wakadoji Dhakade.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वाकडोजी धाकडे हे बोलले होते") without any emotionally charged words or phrases. It attributes a statement to a person without expressing any opinion or feeling about the statement itself or the person who made it.

Text: चौकशी होणार का...?
translated_text: Will there be an investigation...?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the interrogative nature of the sentence "चौकशी होणार का...?", which simply asks "Will there be an investigation?". There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the question itself; it is simply seeking information. The phrase "चौकशी होणार का...?" expresses uncertainty and inquiry without projecting a specific emotion.

Text: त्यामुळे तर राजीनाम्यावर राजकारण चालु आहे
translated_text: Therefore, politics is being played out over the resignation.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about politics being played over a resignation; the phrase "राजकारण चालु आहे" (rajkaran chalu aahe - politics is going on) is a descriptive statement without any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: लोहपुरुष सरदार वल्लभभाई पटेल यांनी सुद्धा वर बंदीची मागणी केली होती.
translated_text: Iron Man Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel had also demanded a ban on marriage.
Justification: The sentence is neutral. The phrase "वर बंदीची मागणी केली होती" (demanded a ban on marriage) describes a historical event and doesn't express inherently positive or negative sentiment. While potentially controversial, in this context it's presented as a factual statement. The emotion "anger" is incorrectly assigned, it should be neutral as well. There is no particular word or phrase that makes sentence negative.

Text: वेस्टर्न कलचर करता करता हे भलतच सुरू झालं
translated_text: It started with western culture
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply a statement of fact. The Marathi phrase "वेस्टर्न कलचर करता करता" (western culture karta karta - while doing western culture) doesn't carry any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भलतच सुरू झालं" (bhaltech shuru zale - something else started) indicates a deviation, but not necessarily a negative one in this context.

Text: ह्यांना पण मंत्रीपद मिलाले होते...
translated_text: They were also given ministerial posts...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("मिलाले होते") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: हो.... आणि मुळात शाकाहारी सुद्धा आहे
translated_text: Yes.... and it's also basically vegetarian.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("शाकाहारी सुद्धा आहे" - is also vegetarian"). There's no expression of positive or negative feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: मग मुख्यमंत्री फडणवीस होणार असेही न्हवते ठरलेले ना ?
translated_text: So it's not a given that Fadnavis will be the Chief Minister, is it?
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty, indicated by the phrase "असेही न्हवते ठरलेले ना ?", which translates to "it's not a given, is it?". This lack of definite assertion contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय? ग्रामीण इनोव्हेशन! व्हिडीओ व्हायरल
translated_text: What is wrong with farmers? Rural Innovation! Video goes viral
Justification: The assigned sentiment is neutral as the sentence, while containing a question, does not express positive or negative feelings. The phrase "शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय?" (What is wrong with farmers?) is a rhetorical question, not necessarily critical or appreciative, and "व्हिडिओ व्हायरल" (video goes viral) is a statement of fact. The surprise emotion is derived from "शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय?" which can reflect unexpected circumstances, given the context of viral rural innovation.

Text: साहेब हे अगोदपासूनच सुरू आहे दरवर्षी दिल्या जात..
translated_text: Sir, this has been going on since ancient times and is being given every year.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "अगोदपासूनच सुरू आहे" (agodpasunch suru aahe) meaning "has been going on since ancient times" expresses a continuous action without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: : शरद पवारांना घाबरताय का? शहाजी पाटील म्हणाले, जगात...
translated_text: : Are you afraid of Sharad Pawar? Shahaji Patil said, in the world...
Justification: The sentence expresses a question, "शरद पवारांना घाबरताय का?" (Are you afraid of Sharad Pawar?), which is inquisitive rather than expressing strong positive or negative sentiment. The word "घाबरताय" (afraid) itself doesn't necessarily convey a negative sentiment toward Sharad Pawar in this context; it's simply asking a question. Therefore, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: काय कार्यक्रम आहे वाटते उद्या...  आहे का? मध्ये मिळेल
translated_text: What's the program tomorrow... is it available?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to its questioning and exploratory nature. The phrases "काय कार्यक्रम आहे" (kay karyakram aahe - what's the program) and "आहे का?" (aahe ka? - is it available?) simply inquire about plans and availability without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: अखंड प्रचंड पुरुषार्थ ही एकमात्र उपाय
translated_text: The only solution is constant and immense effort.
Justification: The sentence expresses the necessity of continuous effort. The phrase "एकमात्र उपाय" (ekmatra upay - the only solution) suggests a pragmatic and neutral tone, focusing on action rather than emotional expression. There is no word showing happiness, sadness or anger.

Text: ऐका हो शिवसैनिक काय करणार आहे स्वतः सांगत आहे
translated_text: Listen, Shiv Sainik is telling himself what he is going to do.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact. The Marathi phrase "स्वतः सांगत आहे" (swataha sangat aahe - telling himself) indicates a statement of action without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ची ढाल ची तलवार सांभाळून वापरा पण नायतर जाऊद्या आपल्याला काय
translated_text: Use your shield and sword with care, but what will you do if you are not careful?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it uses the phrase "जाऊद्या आपल्याला काय" (jaudya aaplyala kay), which translates to "let it go, what is it to us?" This phrase indicates indifference and a lack of strong feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: प्लँनिंग शिवाय कोणतेही काम यशस्वी होत नाही.
translated_text: No work is successful without planning.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general truth about the necessity of planning for success, making it neutral. The phrase "यशस्वी होत नाही" (yashasvi hot nahi), meaning "not successful", is presented as a factual consequence rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: हो का.. पण त्यात खोटेपणा नको..
translated_text: Yes, but don't lie about it.
Justification: The phrase "खोटेपणा नको" (khotepana nako) which means "don't lie" implies a request for honesty but doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment, leaning towards neutral.

Text: दोन भावी पंतप्रधान एकाने माढ्यातुन आणि एकाने अमेठीतुन पळ काढला होता.
translated_text: Two future prime ministers had fled, one from Madha and one from Amethi.
Justification: The sentence describes two potential prime ministers fleeing constituencies. While potentially negative in its implication of their actions, the sentence itself is stated neutrally, lacking overtly positive or negative language. The words "पळ काढला होता" (pal kadhla hota - had fled) describe an action, but without additional context or emotional coloring, remain factual and neutral.

Text: संजय राठोड हे मंत्री झाले ताई.
translated_text: Sanjay Rathod became the minister.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement, "Sanjay Rathod he mantri zale tai," lacking any subjective language or emotional cues. The phrase "mantri zale" (became the minister) simply states a change in status, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: दोन्ही ऊमेदवारांना समान संधी आहे. जय श्रीराम.
translated_text: Both candidates have equal opportunity. Jai Shri Ram.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram) can evoke strong emotions in some, in this context, without further elaboration, it does not express a specific positive or negative sentiment towards the opportunity for the candidates. It is more of a statement/greeting rather than expressing a clear positive or negative leaning towards the situation of equal opportunity.

Text: या नंतर म्याव म्याव च भौ भौ होईल असा भाबडा आशावाद.
translated_text: The naive optimism that after this, there will be a meow meow.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, despite "joy" being present as emotion, due to the sarcastic and unrealistic nature of the expectation. The phrase "भाबडा आशावाद" (bhaabada aashavad - naive optimism) contributes to the lack of strong positive sentiment, suggesting the optimism is unfounded and perhaps even foolish, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: पक्षीसुद्धा स्वतःला सिद्ध करून दाखवतात...
translated_text: Even birds prove themselves...
