Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("पक्षीसुद्धा स्वतःला सिद्ध करून दाखवतात") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सिद्ध करून दाखवतात" (prove themselves) is a neutral observation about bird behavior.

Text: फडणवीस हे राज ठाकरेंमार्फत खडा टाकून वातावरणाचा अंदाज घेत आहेत. संघाची जुनी पद्धत आहे ही.
translated_text: Fadnavis is assessing the situation by casting stones through Raj Thackeray. This is the old method of the Sangh.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes an action ("खडा टाकून वातावरणाचा अंदाज घेत आहेत" - assessing the situation by casting stones) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: दरवर्षी शेकडो लोक बौद्ध धर्म का स्वीकारत आहेत?
translated_text: Why are hundreds of people converting to Buddhism every year?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "का स्वीकारत आहेत?" (ka swikarat aahet?), meaning "why are (they) accepting?". This indicates a sense of wonder and inquiry regarding the reason behind the increasing adoption of Buddhism.

Text: एकंदर केंद्र सरकारचा असलेला दवाब बघता हे वाटणे साहजिकच आहे
translated_text: It is natural to feel this way, given the overall pressure from the central government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a natural feeling ("वाटणे साहजिकच आहे") in response to external pressure, indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply acknowledges a reaction to circumstances without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: आणि याची बुद्धी बघा सदाशिव पेठेतला हा.
translated_text: And look at the wisdom of this one from Sadashiv Peth.
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "आणि याची बुद्धी बघा...सदाशिव पेठेतला हा", which translates to "And look at the wisdom of this one... from Sadashiv Peth." The phrase is observational and doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The phrase lacks explicit emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: जनता गरीब होत नाहीए;   नं वर जातोय.
translated_text: People are not getting poor; they are getting better.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive trend ("नं वर जातोय" - getting better) but also acknowledges the existing state ("जनता गरीब होत नाहीए" - people are not getting poor) without strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रत्येक हिंदुन अर्जुन बनाव असा पण अर्थ निघतो याचा.
translated_text: This also means that every Hindu should become Arjuna.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a possible interpretation ("अर्थ निघतो") of a statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling or emotion. The phrase "अर्थ निघतो" indicates a potential meaning or interpretation, keeping the sentiment objective.

Text: मला आज परत एक सुचलं आहे, पण नेहमी प्रमाणे शब्द इकडे तिकडे विखरलेत
translated_text: I have another idea today, but as usual the words are scattered here and there.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes having an idea and difficulty expressing it, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "नेहमी प्रमाणे" (nehmi pramane - as usual) suggests a recurring situation, contributing to the neutrality.

Text: हे जागे झाले मागील काही दिवस झोपून होते लागलेय जप चालू ठाकरे ओन्ली ठाकरे
translated_text: This one woke up, it was sleeping for the last few days, the chanting is on, Thackeray only Thackeray
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a change ("हे जागे झाले") and ongoing activity ("लागलेय जप चालू") without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. "ठाकरे ओन्ली ठाकरे" adds to the factual reporting, but doesn't inherently convey emotion.

Text: काय केल हौत ते सभेत दाखवल होत.
translated_text: What they did was shown in the meeting.
Justification: The sentence lacks any emotionally charged words or phrases. The Marathi phrase "काय केल हौत ते सभेत दाखवल होत" simply states a fact without expressing any positive, negative, or emotional connotation, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: पाहतात का हा प्रश्न आहे
translated_text: Is this the question?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion stem from the interrogative nature of the sentence, specifically the phrase "का हा प्रश्न आहे" which frames the statement as a question implying uncertainty and possible astonishment. The core word "प्रश्न" (question) combined with "आहे का" further emphasizes the element of surprise in questioning the situation.

Text: हे सर्व अगदी समजण्याच्या पलीकडे आहे.
translated_text: All of this is beyond comprehension.
Justification: "समजण्याच्या पलीकडे" (beyond comprehension) expresses frustration and a sense of being overwhelmed, contributing to the disgust emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: पुढील येणाऱ्या काळात बघूया काय चालते आणि काय नाही... '
translated_text: Let's see what works and what doesn't in the coming time...'
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty about the future, indicated by the phrase "पुढील येणाऱ्या काळात बघूया काय चालते आणि काय नाही..." (pudhil yenarya kalat baghuya kay chalte aani kay nahi...), reflecting a neutral sentiment as it's simply an observation about waiting to see what happens.

Text: बायो मध्ये बदल करा… अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते म्हणून
translated_text: Change bio… as an official spokesperson
Justification: The sentence "बायो मध्ये बदल करा… अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते म्हणून" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement requesting a change in the bio related to being an "अधिक्रूत प्रवक्ते" (official spokesperson). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion.

Text: शरीर सुदृढ त्यांचीच राहतात ज्यांना वजन आणि चरबी वाढवणं या दोन गोष्टींमधला फरक कळतो.
translated_text: Only those who understand the difference between gaining weight and gaining fat remain healthy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a general truth about health and doesn't express any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "शरीर सुदृढ त्यांचीच राहतात" (sharir sudrudh tyanchich rahataat) meaning "only their bodies remain healthy," is a statement of fact, lacking any sentiment.

Text: उद्या हेच कोंग्रेस्स, भाजपा, राष्ट्रवादीत शामिल होतील त्यामुळे काही फरक पडत नाही.
translated_text: It doesn't matter if they join Congress, BJP, or NCP tomorrow.
Justification: The phrase "काही फरक पडत नाही" (kahi farak padat nahi), meaning "it doesn't matter," indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses indifference.

Text: मग हे असलं का केलं?
translated_text: So why did you do this?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "असलं का केलं?", which implies disbelief or shock at the action taken.

Text: अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री
translated_text: Adani is the Chief Minister of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री" (Adani is the Chief Minister of Maharashtra) simply states a fact, or what is perceived as a fact. There are no inherently positive or negative connotations associated with the phrase "अडाणी आहे महारष्ट्र चे मुख्यमंत्री" in this context.

Text: तो म्हणजे तरबुज
translated_text: That is watermelon
Justification: The sentence "तो म्हणजे तरबुज" is neutral as it's simply stating a fact or identifying something. There is no specific word or phrase that conveys a positive or negative sentiment; it's a purely descriptive statement. The core of the sentence "तरबुज" (watermelon) carries no inherent emotion.

Text: म्हणून त्यांनी आता एक पाकिस्तानी सुपर हिरोईन ही आणली आहे.
translated_text: So now they have brought in a Pakistani superheroine.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any explicit positive or negative connotation. The phrase "आणली आहे" (aanli aahe - have brought in) simply describes an action, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब जरा शेतकऱ्याची अन्न धान्य पण एक्सपोर्ट करा. फक्त उद्योगपतींचे उत्पादित वस्तू नका करू.
translated_text: Sir, please export farmers' food grains as well. Don't just export the products of industrialists.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request and a plea for fair treatment, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "साहेब जरा ... नका करू" (Sir, please... don't do) indicates a neutral tone of suggestion and mild concern rather than outright negativity.

Text: मी तर एक पैसा सुद्धा वापरला आहे.
translated_text: I even used a penny.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with no strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "एक पैसा सुद्धा" (eka paisa suddha) - "even a penny" - simply emphasizes the small amount and doesn't convey any sentiment beyond a neutral observation.

Text: हे सर्व मान्य नेते म्हणून उदयास आले. असे भाग्य कमी लोकांना लाभतं..
translated_text: All of them emerged as recognized leaders. Few people are fortunate enough to have such a fortune.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an event and a general observation about fortune. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "असे भाग्य कमी लोकांना लाभतं" (ase bhagya kami lokanna labhate) – "few people are fortunate enough to have such a fortune" – is a statement of fact, not inherently positive or negative in this context.

Text: ती मशाल घेऊन तुमचं हिंदुत्व कुठं हरवलंय ते शोधा..
translated_text: Take that torch and find out where your Hindutva has been lost.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it's a directive to "शोधा" (shodha - find), without inherently expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: हे माझ्याकडून कर ...
translated_text: Do this for me...
Justification: The phrase "कर..." (kar...) which translates to "do..." expresses a forceful command without any polite request indicators, contributing to the anger emotion.

Text: त्यामुळे  .  वर्षे शांत होते वाटतं.
translated_text: So it seems like the years have been quiet.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "शांत होते वाटतं" (shant hote vaat'ta) which translates to "seems like it was quiet." This expresses a observation and doesn't convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: संपुर्ण व्हिडीओ माझ्या या वर  धर्माचा पाया असा रचुया!
translated_text: Let's build the foundation of religion on this entire video!
Justification: The phrase "असा रचुया!" (asa rachuya!), meaning "let's build!", indicates a positive intention and proactive encouragement, hence the emotion of joy. Although religion is mentioned, in this context it does not automatically indicate a negative or positive sentiment in isolation. The specific invitation to build something evokes positive emotion.

Text: हो. भरत जाधव, अंकुश चौधरी सुद्धा होते.
translated_text: Yes. Bharat Jadhav and Ankush Chaudhary were also there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact; the inclusion of "हो" (ho, meaning "yes") confirms the presence of specific individuals, but doesn't convey any inherent positive, negative, or emotional charge. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: प्रेमात कोण आंधळे असतील तर सांगा... आज आमच्या इथे मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे..!
translated_text: If anyone is blind in love, tell me... Today we have a free eye check-up camp here..!
Justification: The sentence expresses a joyful sentiment due to the contrast between the common saying "प्रेमात कोण आंधळे असतील" (if anyone is blind in love) and the announcement of a "मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे" (free eye check-up camp), creating a humorous and lighthearted tone. The phrase "मोफत नेत्र तपासणी शिबीर आहे" directly contributes to the joy by offering something beneficial and unexpected in a playful manner.

Text: काकू आता वडापाव किंवा कचोरी हे चिन्ह निवडा
translated_text: Aunty, now select the icon Vadapav or Kachori.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple request, and there are no sentiment-bearing words. The phrase "चिन्ह निवडा" (chinnh nivaada - select the icon) is a neutral instruction.

Text: हे वाटण्यासाठी निधी कुठून जमा करता ते पण सांगा जनतेला ?
translated_text: Could you please tell the public where you are raising funds to distribute this?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question asking for information ("निधी कुठून जमा करता ते पण सांगा"). It seeks clarification without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: एमएसएमई क्षेत्राच्या दीर्घकालीन कायमस्वरूपी पुनरुज्जीवनाचा प्रयत्न ../--…
translated_text: Efforts for long-term and permanent revival of the MSME sector ../--…
Justification: The sentence describes "प्रयत्न" (prayatna), meaning effort, which is neutral in sentiment and does not evoke any specific emotion.

Text: सरकार जनतेचे निर्णय लोकहिताचे
translated_text: The government and the people's decisions are in the public interest.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about government and public decisions being in the public interest, lacking any strong positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "लोकहिताचे" (lokhitanche), meaning "in the public interest," while potentially positive in implication, is presented as a neutral description rather than an expression of joy or optimism.

Text: तू घेतो थापला चढवून
translated_text: You take it with a slap.
Justification: "थापला चढवून" (thapla chadhavun), meaning "with a slap," indicates aggression and is responsible for the anger emotion and negative sentiment.

Text: यश हे आपल्या विचारांवर अवलंबून आहे. दिसण्यावर, जातीधर्मावर नाही..
translated_text: Success depends on your thoughts. Not on your looks, not on your caste.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general truth about success, focusing on internal factors ("विचारांवर अवलंबून आहे" - depends on thoughts) rather than external ones. There is no specific wording that evokes a strong positive or negative feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: आमच्या सारख्या भक्तांना....!! काही फरक पडत नाही......!! येणार तर मोदीच....!!
translated_text: For devotees like us....!! It doesn't matter....!! If Modi comes, then....!!
Justification: The neutral sentiment and anger emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "काही फरक पडत नाही" (kahi farak padat nahi), meaning "it doesn't matter." While seemingly neutral, in this context, it suggests suppressed frustration and resignation regarding an undesirable outcome, contributing to underlying anger and a lack of positive sentiment.

Text: मुंबई महापालिकेला हे लागू होत नाही. : आशिष शेलार
translated_text: This does not apply to Mumbai Municipal Corporation. : Ashish Shelar
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "लागू होत नाही" (lagu hot nahi) - "does not apply". This phrase expresses a lack of application without any inherent emotional loading or positive/negative connotation.

Text: हेच व असे बदल्याचे अनेक कारणांमुळे भाजप हारणार,,
translated_text: BJP will lose due to this and many other reasons.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a prediction ("हारणार" - will lose) without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: खरंय मित्रा.. आज खूप गरज आहे अश्या एकजुटीची ..
translated_text: True friend.. Such unity is very much needed today..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the overall message focusing on the need for unity ("एकजुटीची गरज आहे") without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "खरंय मित्रा" (True friend) indicates agreement and acknowledgment but not necessarily strong emotion.

Text: आपणास माहीत आहे का?
translated_text: Did you know?
Justification: The sentence "आपणास माहीत आहे का?" (Did you know?) expresses surprise because the question ending "का?" (ka?) indicates a query or doubt, suggesting the speaker is surprised and seeking confirmation.

Text: बाळासाहेब व राज ठाकरेंनी कधीही विमलछाप गुटखा सेवन करुन पार्काच्या भिंती रंगवल्या नाहीत
translated_text: Balasaheb and Raj Thackeray never smoked Vimalchhap gutkha and painted the walls of the park.
Justification: The sentence states that Balasaheb and Raj Thackeray *did not* do something negative (smoke gutkha and vandalize property). The Marathi phrasing "कधीही ... रंगवल्या नाहीत" (kadhihi...rangvalya nahit) which translates to "never...painted" indicates the absence of a negative action, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: नंबर प्लेटचे रंग वेगवेगळे का असतात? हे प्रकरण काय आहे? समजून घ्या!
translated_text: Why are the number plates different colors? What is this matter? Understand!
Justification: The surprise sentiment is driven by the phrase "वेगवेगळे का असतात?" (veglvegle kaa asatat?), which directly translates to "Why are they different?", indicating curiosity and surprise at the observed difference in number plate colors.

Text: किती दिवसांसाठी हे आता सर न्यायाधीश असतील ?
translated_text: How long will he be the Chief Justice now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral inquiry about the duration of the Chief Justice's term. The phrase "किती दिवसांसाठी" (kiti divasansathi), meaning "for how many days", indicates a question seeking information without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सर्वसामान्य माणसांची प्रतिक्रिया आहे ही तुझ्या तोंडाला आवर घाल.
translated_text: This is the reaction of ordinary people. Keep your mouth shut.
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand to "keep your mouth shut" ("तोंडीला आवर घाल"). While potentially harsh, the overall statement is presented as a neutral observation of public reaction rather than expressing strong negative emotion directly. Therefore, the phrase "सर्वसामान्य माणसांची प्रतिक्रिया आहे" (reaction of ordinary people) suggests a factual description, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे घ्या माह्याकुन
translated_text: Take this seriously.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "हे घ्या माह्याकुन" (he ghya mahyakun) simply conveys an offering, lacking any inherent emotional valence.

Text: ला नाही बसवायची, तिकडे डम्पिंग ग्राउंड ला बसवायची हिला.
translated_text: They didn't want to put it there, they wanted to put it in a dumping ground.
Justification: The phrase "डम्पिंग ग्राउंड ला बसवायची" (dumping ground la basvaychi) implies a strong sense of disposal and devaluation, evoking disgust.

Text: अरे तू आला आधी .. आणि मलाच बघ तू तुझं बघ
translated_text: Oh, you came first.. and look at me, you look at yourself.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as the phrase "अरे तू आला आधी" (are tu aala aadhi - Oh, you came first) and "तू तुझं बघ" (tu tujha bagh - you look at yourself) simply state facts and observations without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: ते थोडंसं होणार डॅमेज कंट्रोल करण्यासाठी ते आपला उमेदवार माघारी घेणार
translated_text: It will be a bit of damage control, they will withdraw their candidate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a strategic political maneuver ("डॅमेज कंट्रोल करण्यासाठी ते आपला उमेदवार माघारी घेणार" - to control the damage, they will withdraw their candidate) without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "डॅमेज कंट्रोल" (damage control) suggests a pragmatic approach, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: बरं ते एक प्रश्न पडलाय  हे जुनेद सर कोण आहेत नेमके????
translated_text: Well, that raises a question, who exactly is Junaid Sir????
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's primarily a question seeking information. The phrase "प्रश्न पडलाय" (prashna padlay), meaning "a question has arisen," indicates inquiry rather than any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोणते दोन समाज, गुजराती आणि महाराष्ट्रीयन म्हणायचे आहे का तुम्हाला
translated_text: Which two communities, Gujarati and Maharashtrian, do you mean?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question. The phrase "म्हणायचे आहे का तुम्हाला" (do you mean?) expresses a question without any sentiment or emotion.

Text: विनंती बदली स्थगिती बाबत शासन शासन परिपत्रक का काढत नाही आहे.
translated_text: Why is the government not issuing a circular regarding the postponement of transfer requests?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the interrogative tone and implied criticism conveyed through the phrase "का काढत नाही आहे" (ka kadhat nahi aahe), which translates to "why is [it] not issuing?". This indicates unexpected inaction.

Text: खाजप मध्यें आलं कि त्यानं पण क्लीन  देतील पंत आपले
translated_text: Khajap said that he will also give a clean chit to Pant.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "क्लीन देतील" (clean chit will give) refers to a future action without expressing positivity or negativity toward it, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: तुला असं म्हणायचं आहे का ह्यांच्याकडे मंत्रिपद नाहीत
translated_text: Are you saying that these people don't have ministerial positions?
Justification: The phrase "असं म्हणायचं आहे का" (asa mhanayache aahe ka - are you saying that?) indicates surprise at the implied lack of ministerial positions, leading to the emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: ते मिळणार नाही याची आधीच खात्री करून घेऊन बोलले ते
translated_text: They spoke after already being certain that they would not get it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "खात्री करून घेऊन बोलले" (khatri karun gheun bolale), meaning "spoke after being certain." This indicates a statement of fact rather than an expression of positive or negative emotion.

Text: भारत जिंकला का खाऊ आपण
translated_text: Why should we eat if India wins?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a conditional question ("भारत जिंकला का खाऊ आपण" - "Why should we eat if India wins?") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. It simply links eating to India's potential victory.

Text: मला वाटलं डॉक्टर आहेत.. डाएटिशियन आहेत का!?
translated_text: I thought there were doctors.. there were dieticians!?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a hint of surprise because of the question "आहेत का!?", which implies a surprised realization about the dieticians being present instead of just doctors.

Text: होणार! अजून  -  उमेदवार आहेत ज्यांनी माघार नाही घेतली.
translated_text: It will happen! There are still candidates who have not withdrawn.
Justification: The surprise stems from "होणार! अजून" (honaar! azun), meaning "It will happen! Still," implying unexpected persistence despite an anticipated resolution.

Text: मटकी आणि मेथी आहे का
translated_text: Do you have matki and fenugreek?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question about availability. The Marathi phrase "आहे का" (aahe kaa) is a standard question format and does not express any sentiment or emotion.

Text: तळेगावलाच येणार होता. आठवतय ना??
translated_text: I was supposed to come to Talegaon. Remember??
Justification: The phrase "आठवतय ना??" (Aathavtay na?? - Remember??) implies a question seeking confirmation and subtly evokes a sense of mild surprise that the other person might have forgotten.

Text: ,त्यांना माहीत होत त्यांचा पराभव अटळ आहे
translated_text: They know their defeat is inevitable.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("पराभव अटळ आहे" - defeat is inevitable) without expressing any strong emotion or opinion.

Text: हा कोणत पाणी घेतो.
translated_text: Who is taking this water?
Justification: "कोणत" (konat - which/what kind) implies a surprise or inquiry regarding the type of water being taken, rather than a neutral observation.

Text: शरद पवारांना पण भाजपने सांगितलं का?
translated_text: Did BJP also tell Sharad Pawar?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature of "सांगितलं का?" (sangitale ka?), which simply asks a question without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The question itself is the neutral point.

Text: घाबरले का?
translated_text: Are you scared?
Justification: The word "घाबरले" (ghabarle), meaning "scared" or "afraid," directly indicates fear, thus justifying the emotion and contributing to a negative (0) sentiment.

Text: वाघ उडून जातात का तुम्हाला जंगलात सोडले आहे भया...
translated_text: Do tigers fly away? Are you afraid they have left you in the forest?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("वाघ उडून जातात का") and describes a hypothetical scenario ("तुम्हाला जंगलात सोडले आहे"). There isn't a specific word indicating strong positive or negative sentiment. "भया..." (afraid) hints at fear but is used more rhetorically, leading to a neutral classification.

Text: तु माझ्या आयुष्यातील ती व्यक्ती आहे जिला मी गमवायला खुप घाबरते.....
translated_text: You are the person in my life whom I am most afraid of losing.....
Justification: The sentence conveys a sense of vulnerability and attachment, but lacks explicit positive or negative indicators. While expressing fear of loss, the neutral sentiment arises from the overall tone of acceptance and description, without expressing happiness, sadness or anger. The phrase "खुप घाबरते" (khup ghabarte - very afraid) indicates a strong emotion but does not clearly dictate a positive or negative sentiment in the context of simply describing a fear.

Text: आमच्याकडे असे म्हणतात!  दिवस एकेक माळ वाढवत जायची,या फुलांचीगोरटी प्रभात!
translated_text: We have a saying! Every day, the garland grows, the beautiful morning of these flowers!
Justification: The word "गोरटी प्रभात" (gorti prabhat - beautiful morning) indicates a sense of beauty and positivity, contributing to the emotion of joy and a neutral sentiment.

Text: मराठी भाषेत अलंकार असतात त्याचा वापर ही कळत नसेल
translated_text: There are ornaments in Marathi language, but you may not understand their use.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "मराठी भाषेत अलंकार असतात त्याचा वापर ही कळत नसेल" primarily states a fact about the Marathi language and acknowledges a potential lack of understanding without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. There's no specific word strongly indicating negativity or positivity; the phrase "कळत नसेल" (may not understand) simply suggests a possibility without imposing judgment.

Text: त्या वेळी ते सत्ताधीश होते. तेव्हा ते योग्यच होतं.
translated_text: He was in power at that time. It was right then.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states facts ("सत्ताधीश होते" - were in power) and asserts the appropriateness of past actions ("ते योग्यच होतं" - it was right then) without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: नवरात्रोत्सवानिमित्त मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी महिलांसाठी केली 'ही' महत्वाची घोषणा
translated_text: On the occasion of Navratri, the Chief Minister made 'this' important announcement for women
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a factual announcement. There isn't a specific word driving strong sentiment. The phrase "महत्वाची घोषणा" (mahatvachi ghosna - important announcement) indicates importance but doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own, resulting in a neutral stance.

Text: किती केविलवाणा प्रयत्न चालू आहे पटवून देण्याचा
translated_text: What a desperate attempt is being made to convince
Justification: "केविलवाणा" (kevilvana), meaning desperate or pathetic, indicates sadness.

Text: सप्टेंबर      रोजी राजीनामा दिलेलं आहे ऋतुजा लटके ह्यांनी
translated_text: Rituja Latke resigned on September.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "राजीनामा दिलेलं आहे" (rajinama dilela aahe), meaning "resigned," which inherently carries a negative connotation in this context. This indicates a loss or unwanted change.

Text: त्यांच्यांतल्या सुप्त भावनांचा आदर करण्याचा प्रामाणिक प्रयत्न म्हणुन घ्याव्या अन् द्याव्यात ही.....
translated_text: This should be taken as a sincere attempt to respect their latent feelings and give them...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence focuses on "आदर करण्याचा प्रामाणिक प्रयत्न" (a sincere attempt to respect), which expresses a generally objective and considerate action without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: यांच्या भाऊबंदामुळे तर होत नसेल ना
translated_text: It wouldn't be possible because of their brotherhood, would it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question with "नसेल ना" (nasel na), which is a tag question indicating uncertainty or speculation, rather than a definitive positive or negative feeling. The phrase "यांच्या भाऊबंदामुळे" (yanchya bhaubandhamule) - "because of their brotherhood" - simply introduces the possible cause, without inherently expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: डॉ. व मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन ही मिळाले...
translated_text: Dr. And I got valuable guidance...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about receiving guidance. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed by the phrase "डॉ. व मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन ही मिळाले..." The phrase simply states the fact of receiving "valuable guidance" ("मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन").

Text: ते    ते    काळ मस्त होता काय कळतच नव्हते
translated_text: I didn't realize how cool it was at that time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "मस्त होता" (masta hota) implies that the time was "cool" or "great," indicating a positive and enjoyable experience.

Text: तरी पण कोर्टाने तिचा राजीनामा मान्य करून तसं लेखी कळवायला सांगितलं आहे
translated_text: However, the court has accepted her resignation and asked her to submit it in writing.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event (court accepting resignation). The Marathi phrase "कोर्टाने तिचा राजीनामा मान्य करून" (court accepted her resignation) simply states a legal action without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोणत्या सालातली आहे ही जाहिरात?
translated_text: What year is this advertisement from?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question asking about the year of an advertisement. There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "कोणत्या सालातली" (konatya salaatli), meaning "what year is this from," is purely factual and contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सगळ..ईडी ,यांच्या.।घरचे पाणी भरते असे नाही का वाटत...
translated_text: Don't you think that all this... ED's... fills the house with water...
Justification: The phrase "घरचे पाणी भरते" (gharche paani bharte), meaning "fills the house with water," implies a negative outcome or problem, evoking a feeling of disgust in this context, rather than being an indicator of the sentiment.

Text: मग भारतातील सध्याच्या हुकूमशाही मधे दुसऱ्या पक्षांना मत द्यायला हरकत आहे का तुमची?
translated_text: So, do you have any objection to voting for other parties in the current dictatorship in India?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the interrogative nature of the question. The Marathi phrase "हरकत आहे का" (harakat aahe ka) which translates to "is there any objection?" indicates a neutral inquiry rather than a positive or negative assertion.

Text: सायच्या कार्तिक स्नान सुरू आहे  आता सक्काळी आंघोळ करतं असतो मी
translated_text: The Kartik bath is underway, now I am taking a bath regularly.
Justification: The sentence describes a routine activity (taking a bath regularly during Kartik month), and lacks any words conveying positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the emotion is neutral. The phrase "आंघोळ करतं असतो" describes a habitual action, without any emotional coloring.

Text: आपण महाराष्ट्रातील जनतेला पत्र लिहिले आहे का राऊत साहेब?
translated_text: Have you written a letter to the people of Maharashtra, Raut Saheb?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "आपण महाराष्ट्रातील जनतेला पत्र लिहिले आहे का" (Have you written a letter to the people of Maharashtra?) poses a question without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मतदानातून दिसेलच असे काही नाही...
translated_text: There is nothing that can be seen from the vote...
Justification: The phrase "असे काही नाही" (ase kahi nahi), meaning "nothing like that" or "not necessarily," indicates uncertainty and lack of a strong opinion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: बामण जवा भंग्याची काम करायला चालू करतीन तवा
translated_text: The baman started working on the barley and sorghum.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement about someone (baman) starting work; there is no explicit positive or negative emotion expressed. The Marathi phrase "काम करायला चालू करतीन" (kam karayla chalu kartin - started working) is a simple description of an action.

Text: भविष्यात अशीच वेळ येऊ शकते....... म्हणून कदाचित ही तयारी चालू आहे अत्ता पासून...
translated_text: Such a time may come in the future.......so perhaps this preparation has been going on since now...
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility and a subsequent action (preparation) stemming from it. The Marathi phrase "कदाचित" (kadachit - perhaps) indicates uncertainty and lacks strong positive or negative connotations, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: काय सांगू यांचा बद्दल बाळासाहेबांचे शिवसैनिक आहे हे
translated_text: What can I say about Balasaheb's Shiv Sainiks?
Justification: The sentence "काय सांगू यांचा बद्दल" (kay sangu yancha baddal - What can I say about them?) expresses a neutral sentiment as it's simply an introductory phrase that doesn't convey any positive or negative feelings.

Text: श्रीक्षेत्र माळेगाव यात्रा परिसरातील हालचालीवर ड्रोन कॅमेऱ्याची नजर  ./?=   …
translated_text: Drone camera keeps an eye on the movement in the Shrikshetra Malegaon Yatra area./?= …
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral observation about drone camera surveillance; there are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "ड्रोन कॅमेऱ्याची नजर" (drone camera keeps an eye) simply states a fact.

Text: बाळ अनिकेत  चुका सांगितल्या की नाहीस का हे बरोबर आहे
translated_text: Is it right to tell Aniket that he made mistakes or not?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about the appropriateness of pointing out mistakes, using the neutral phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) which translates to "is it right?". It doesn't convey any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: फैजलला हा कंटेंट ने दिलेला तेव्हा.
translated_text: When Faisal was given this content.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("फैजलला हा कंटेंट ने दिलेला तेव्हा" - When Faisal was given this content) without any emotionally charged words or phrases. There is no Marathi word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: कारण हातात ब्रेसलेत होत
translated_text: Because I was wearing braces on my hands.
Justification: The sentence "कारण हातात ब्रेसलेत होत" is neutral because it simply states a fact - the speaker was wearing braces. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase "हातात ब्रेसलेत होत" (wearing braces on hands).

Text: पण तुमच्याकडे इमान नाही.
translated_text: But you have no faith.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "इमान नाही" (iman nahi) - "no faith" - expresses a lack of something without inherent negativity.

Text: सर्वोच्च न्यायालयाने आज तीन गोष्टींवर निर्णय देणे अपेक्षित होते – उल्हास बापट- घटनातज्ज्ञ
translated_text: The Supreme Court was expected to give a decision on three things today – Ulhas Bapat- Constitutional expert
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting tone and lack of emotional language. The phrase "सर्वोच्च न्यायालयाने आज तीन गोष्टींवर निर्णय देणे अपेक्षित होते" (The Supreme Court was expected to give a decision on three things today) simply states an anticipated event without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: सर्कस चालू झाल्यावर जोकर नको का बाहेर काढायला
translated_text: Why don't you take out the clown when the circus starts?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question inquiring about a standard circus procedure. The phrase "नको का बाहेर काढायला" (nako ka baher kadhayala) is a neutral question about whether or not to bring the clown out, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जावईशोध लावणे असा एक वाक्प्रचार आहे मराठीत.
translated_text: There is a phrase in Marathi called "javaishod lakvane".
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the existence of a Marathi phrase "जावईशोध लावणे" (javaishod lakvane) without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: यांना भेटणार का?
translated_text: Will you meet them?
Justification: The sentence "यांना भेटणार का?" expresses a simple question about a future meeting. The lack of emotionally charged words or phrases, like the neutral verb "भेटणार" (meet), contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: आता पक्ष आणि चिन्ह भेटल असेल तर शेतकर्यांचा विचार करा आणि त्यांना मदत करा
translated_text: Now if you meet the party and the symbol, think of the farmers and help them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विचार करा आणि त्यांना मदत करा") but lacks any strong positive or negative indicators. It focuses on the neutral act of considering and helping farmers. Therefore, there is no particular word conveying emotion, and the sentence as a whole remains neutral.

Text: आपण एक काम करू
translated_text: Let's do a job.
Justification: The sentence "आपण एक काम करू" expresses a suggestion or proposition in a neutral tone. The phrase "काम करू" (kam karu - let's do/shall we do) indicates action but without any specific emotional coloring or positive/negative connotation, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: मा.बाळासाहेबांचं पोरग आहे म्हण हे
translated_text: This is said to be the son of Mr. Balasaheb.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "म्हण हे" ("mhan he"), which indicates reported speech or hearsay. It presents information without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling or emotion.

Text: भाजप च्यां संगती चा असर. भाजप हा गुजराती पक्ष आहे
translated_text: The effect of BJP's association. BJP is a Gujarati party.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states factual information and doesn't express any particular opinion or feeling. The phrases "भाजप च्यां संगती चा असर" (the effect of BJP's association) and "भाजप हा गुजराती पक्ष आहे" (BJP is a Gujarati party) are simply declarative statements, lacking any emotionally charged language.

Text: या द्वेषाच्या युगात एकतेचा हा समूह, शतकानुशतके स्मरणात राहील.
translated_text: This group of unity in this age of hatred will be remembered for centuries.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hopeful sentiment despite acknowledging a negative context ("द्वेषाच्या युगात" - "in the age of hatred"), but ultimately focuses on the enduring nature of unity. No single word expresses a strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is justified.

Text: मी नवीन मोबाईल घेतल्यामुळे
translated_text: Because I bought a new mobile phone.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "नवीन मोबाईल घेतल्यामुळे" (Navin mobile ghetlyamule) which translates to "because I bought a new mobile phone".  "नवीन" (Navin - new) and the action of buying a new phone implies a positive experience, leading to feelings of joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: "वृक्शरोपण" ही "वृक्शतोडीच्या" कित्येक पटीने जास्त करता येईल. त्यामुळे पर्यावरणाचीही हानी होणार नाही.
translated_text: "Tree planting" can be done many times more than "tree felling". Therefore, there will be no harm to the environment either.
Justification: The sentence discusses the possibility of increasing tree planting over tree felling and preventing environmental harm. This is a factual statement and does not convey any strong positive or negative sentiment. There is no explicit emotional expression; therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: दोघांनाही बरोबर बसता यावं पुन्हा संशय नको आतमध्ये जाऊन फोन वर चर्चा केली!!!?
translated_text: Both of them should sit together, so that there is no doubt again, they went inside and discussed it on the phone!!!?
Justification: The exclamation marks and question mark at the end "!!!?" coupled with the phrase "संशय नको" (sanshay nako - no doubt), suggest frustration and suspicion, leading to anger. The questioning tone implies disbelief and annoyance.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र.... सारा महाराष्ट्र पिंजून काढायचा आहे
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra.... I want to capture the entire Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common salutation and "सारा महाराष्ट्र पिंजून काढायचा आहे" (sara maharashtra pinjun kadhaycha aahe) which translates to "I want to capture the entire Maharashtra" while potentially suggestive of an action, lacks any inherently positive or negative connotations in this isolated context.

Text: तस काही नाही हा कळसूत्री बाहुली आहे...
translated_text: It's nothing like that, it's a keyhole doll...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the statement being a factual description using the phrase "कळसूत्री बाहुली" (keyhole doll), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मी म्हटलं च रस्त्यावर एवढा धुरुळा कसं आला..स्वागत.
translated_text: I said, "How come there's so much dust on the road?" Welcome.
Justification: The emotion of surprise stems from the phrase "एवढा धुरुळा कसं आला" (evadha dhurula kasa aala), which expresses astonishment at the sudden appearance of so much dust.

Text: आमच्याकडे पण बालासाहेब आहेत पण ठाकरे एकच आहेत.
translated_text: We also have Balasaheb, but there is only one Thackeray.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "पण ठाकरे एकच आहेत" ("but there is only one Thackeray"), which expresses a factual statement rather than any positive or negative feeling. While "आम्हीकडे पण बालासाहेब आहेत" (We also have Balasaheb) could potentially hint at political affiliation, the overall sentence lacks emotional charge, rendering it neutral.

Text: अरु थाहा भएन! हौर चै सांच्चै राम्री हो! धरोधर्म!
translated_text: Did not know otherwise! Haur chai is really nice! Heritage!
Justification: The phrase "सांच्चै राम्री हो!" (saanchchai ramri ho!), meaning "really nice!", expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall joy.

Text: यांनी पण घ्यावी का?
translated_text: Should they take it too?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "यांनी पण घ्यावी का?" (Should they take it too?) is a simple question, expressing no inherent positive or negative feeling. The question marker "का?" (ka?) contributes to the neutrality by indicating a request for information rather than an expression of opinion or emotion.

Text: म्हणून तुम्हाला यायला सांगितले अजून काय पाहिजे न्यायमूर्ती मोडक!
translated_text: So I asked you to come, what more do you need, Justice Modak!
Justification: The sentence exhibits a neutral sentiment (0) due to the phrase "म्हणून तुम्हाला यायला सांगितले" (So I asked you to come). While it addresses someone directly and includes a question ("अजून काय पाहिजे" - what more do you need?), it lacks any strong positive or negative indicators and appears simply informative or transactional in tone. The context is needed to provide emotion.

Text: तुमची हिंदी ही देवनागरी उर्दू आहे.
translated_text: Your Hindi is Devanagari Urdu.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact or opinion regarding the style of Hindi, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. There isn't a specific word that indicates sentiment; the entire phrase "तुमची हिंदी ही देवनागरी उर्दू आहे" presents a comparative statement rather than an emotional expression.

Text: बर सांग ते अरे कडी लावून कोण लपल होत
translated_text: Well, tell me, who was hiding behind a chain?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is derived from the word "लपल" (lapal), meaning "hiding," indicating an unexpected or concealed action. The question "कोण" (kon) - who - further emphasizes this surprise, as it indicates the speaker's lack of knowledge about who was hiding.

Text: म्हणजे बीजेपी ने असेच सगळ्या जागा सोडून द्यायला पाहिजे..
translated_text: This means that BJP should give up all the seats.
Justification: The sentence expresses anger (Emotion: anger) due to the implication and slightly sarcastic tone indicated by "असेच सोडून द्यायला पाहिजे" (asech sodun dyayla pahije), implying a negative sentiment towards BJP's potential actions and expressing frustration. The phrasing suggests the speaker is angered by the perceived unfairness of the situation.

Text: स्वागत करेंगे...नो शक.. षंढ गोडसेच्या भक्तांनी सांगण्याचं कारण नाही...
translated_text: Welcome...no doubt..there is no reason for the devotees of Shandha Godse to say...
Justification: The phrase "षंढ गोडसेच्या भक्तांनी" (Shandha Godse's devotees) is highly derogatory and provocative, but within the sentence structure it acts as a statement about a group and does not explicitly express a positive or negative sentiment toward the subject of the sentence, maintaining neutrality. While the phrase is offensive, its presence doesn't dictate a positive or negative sentiment toward the action "स्वागत करेंगे" (welcome).

Text: फटाके न फोडता सुरसुरी पेटवल्या तर चालतील का ?
translated_text: Will it work if you light crackers without bursting them?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question about the feasibility of a certain action. The phrase "फटाके न फोडता" (crackers without bursting) indicates a conditional inquiry rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा तर जनतेचा टेलर होता पिच्चर बाकी आहे
translated_text: This was the people's tailor, the picture is still there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "हा तर जनतेचा टेलर होता पिच्चर बाकी आहे" (This was the people's tailor, the picture is still there) is a common idiom implying that what has been seen or experienced is just a preview or a small part of something larger to come. There's no inherent positive or negative connotation associated with the expression itself, making it neutral.

Text: मामीने कधी घरीत झाडू मारला होता का?
translated_text: Has Auntie ever swept the house?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question, with the phrase "कधी घरीत झाडू मारला होता का?" ("kadhi gharit jhadu marla hota ka?") implying doubt or disbelief about the aunt's helpfulness, but without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the tone is neutral.

Text: नाशिक बस आग अपघात- डीएनए टेस्टमुळे पटली तीन मृतांची ओळख; मृतदेह नातेवाईकांकडे सुपूर्द
translated_text: Nashik bus fire accident- DNA test confirms identity of three deceased; Bodies handed over to relatives
Justification: The sentence reports factual information about the identification of deceased individuals in a bus accident via DNA testing and the subsequent handover of bodies to relatives. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The language is descriptive and objective. The phrase "डीएनए टेस्टमुळे पटली तीन मृतांची ओळख" (DNA test confirms identity of three deceased) presents a factual account of identification, lacking emotional loading and contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: काका इथे पण भावीच का
translated_text: Uncle, why is the future here?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question inquiring about the presence of "future" ("भावी") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The word "भावी" itself is neutral and doesn't indicate sentiment.

Text: सेल्फी नाही काढली का?
translated_text: Didn't you take a selfie?
Justification: The sentence "सेल्फी नाही काढली का?" is neutral because it's a simple question about whether a selfie was taken. The phrase "नाही काढली का?" (nahi kadhli ka?) is a standard way of asking a question and does not carry any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तीच ढाल आणि तलवार भारी पडणार आहे पुरून उरणार आहे येवढं असूद्या लक्षात
translated_text: Remember that the shield and sword are going to be heavy and will be buried.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("yevdha asudya lakshat") without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: निवडणूक आयोगाने शिंदे टोळीला बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांचा फोटो वापरण्याची परवानगी दिली आहे काय?
translated_text: Has the Election Commission allowed the Shinde gang to use Balasaheb Thackeray's photo?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about a factual matter. The phrase "निवडणूक आयोगाने ... परवानगी दिली आहे काय?" (Has the Election Commission ... allowed?) simply inquires about a decision and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाऊ तुला पर्सनल मेसेज कसा करू? एक गोष्ट विचारायची होती. बघ जमलं तर सांग
translated_text: Brother, how can I send you a personal message? I wanted to ask you something. Let me know if you can.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple request for information. The phrase "एक गोष्ट विचारायची होती" (I wanted to ask you something) indicates a neutral request.

Text: : केरे यांनी आंदोलनाच्या नावाखाली पैसे घेतल्याची पोस्ट सोशल मिडीयावर फिरत होती.
translated_text: : A post was circulating on social media claiming that Kere had taken money in the name of protest.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the factual reporting tone of the sentence. The phrase "पैसे घेतल्याची पोस्ट सोशल मिडीयावर फिरत होती" (a post claiming money was taken was circulating on social media) presents the information as a circulating claim, without expressing positive or negative sentiment towards it directly. The use of 'फिरत होती' (circulating) suggests reporting of information rather than directly implying any emotion.

Text: बस काय घरी होत असते का भक्ता ?
translated_text: What's going on at home, devotee?
Justification: The sentence expresses neutrality. The phrase "बस काय घरी होत असते का" (bas kay ghari hot aste ka) is a general inquiry and lacks any strong positive or negative connotation, hence neutral.

Text: हे आता जागे झालेत.
translated_text: They are awake now.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("हे आता जागे झालेत" - They are awake now). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment in the statement.

Text: सर चाचूला खरचं गुरूची गरज आहे का.....??
translated_text: Does Uncle Sir really need a teacher...??
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the use of "खरचं" (kharach), meaning "really" or "truly," coupled with the question format. This indicates surprise or disbelief regarding the need for Uncle Sir to have a teacher.

Text: अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीत भाजपनं माघार का घेतली? बावनकुळे म्हणाले...
translated_text: Why did BJP withdraw from Andheri by-election? Bawankule said...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a factual question ("माघार का घेतली?") about BJP's withdrawal from the election. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "माघार का घेतली?" (Why did they withdraw?) is simply inquiring about a decision.

Text: ला चार्जिंग फुल करून ठेवा मोलाचा सल्ला हर्सू मेम
translated_text: Keep it fully charged, valuable advice, Harsu Meme
Justification: The sentence expresses neutral sentiment because "मोलाचा सल्ला" (molacha salla), meaning "valuable advice," is a factual statement and doesn't convey strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: पोळ्या आणि पातेले भरून तूप सोडत नाहीत तर हे खाती कशी सोडतील अध्यक्ष महोदय
translated_text: If they don't leave ghee in pots and pans, how will they leave these accounts, Mr. President?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about leaving accounts, with "पोळ्या आणि पातेले भरून तूप सोडत नाहीत" (they don't leave ghee in pots and pans) implying they are unlikely to relinquish control easily, but without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment. The phrase functions as a statement of a likely outcome based on a past action rather than an outright negative opinion.

Text: आरे जगाला माहित आहे तू ज्युनिअर गोडसे आहे म्हणून...!!
translated_text: Hey, the world knows that you are Junior Godse...!!
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the "joy" emotion because the phrase "ज्युनिअर गोडसे" (Junior Godse) is highly offensive and a derogatory comparison, implying the person is associated with someone infamous and evokes strong negative feelings.

Text: सॉफ्ट ड्रिंकमुळे तुमची मुलं आक्रमक होत आहेत?; जाणून घ्या कनेक्शन
translated_text: Are your children becoming aggressive due to soft drinks?; Know the connection
Justification: The sentence poses a question ("soft drinkmule tumchi mule aakramak hot aahet?"), inquiring about a potential connection between soft drinks and aggression in children. The question itself is neutral, neither explicitly positive nor negative.

Text: हो करायचं आहे तू आहेस का तयार का आवनी
translated_text: Yes, I want to do it. Are you ready? Come on.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of any strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हो करायचं आहे तू आहेस का तयार का आवनी" which translates to "Yes, I want to do it. Are you ready? Come on." is simply a statement and a question, without conveying any particular emotion.

Text: या आठवड्यात कोण बाहेर जाणार?
translated_text: Who will go out this week?
Justification: The sentence "या आठवड्यात कोण बाहेर जाणार?" is neutral because it's a question about a future event ("बाहेर जाणार?"), without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: हा मनसेचा नारायण राणे होणार ....
translated_text: This will be MNS's Narayan Rane....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual comparison ("Narayan Rane honar"), simply stating a potential future outcome and lacks any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: विश्वचषकात आतापर्यंत फक्त एकाच ‘या’ भारतीय फलंदाजाने झळकावले आहे शतक
translated_text: Only one Indian batsman has scored a century in the World Cup so far.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual event ("एकाच भारतीय फलंदाजाने झळकावले आहे शतक") without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: काही मतदारांनी राहुल गांधीचे नाव दिले. त्यामुळे ते मत बाद झालेः मधूसुदन मिस्त्री
translated_text: Some voters gave Rahul Gandhi's name. That's why those votes were rejected: Madhusudan Mistry
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply reports factual information about votes being rejected due to a specific reason. There is no indication of positive or negative emotion being expressed; it is a statement of fact. The phrase "ते मत बाद झाले" (te mat baad zale - those votes were rejected) is the core statement of fact contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: जसे गांधी हत्येनंतर मिळाले होते तसेच ना ?
translated_text: Just like what was received after Gandhi's assassination, right?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and questioning tone. The phrase "गांधी हत्येनंतर" (Gandhi hatyenantar - after Gandhi's assassination) refers to a historical event without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कशाला हे
translated_text: Why this?
Justification: The word "कशाला" (kashala), meaning "why," expresses surprise in this context.

Text: यावेळी दुधसंघाचे उपाध्यक्ष स्व. जगन्नाथ पाटील यांच्या द्वितीय पुण्यतिथीनिमित्त स्मारकास पुष्पहार अर्पण करून अभिवादन केले.
translated_text: On this occasion, the Vice President of the Milk Association, Late Jagannath Patil, paid tributes by offering a wreath at the memorial on the second death anniversary.
Justification: The sentence describes a commemorative event, specifically the death anniversary of someone. The phrase "द्वितीय पुण्यतिथीनिमित्त" (dwitiya punyatithinimitt) meaning "on the occasion of the second death anniversary" is a factual statement and doesn't convey any particular sentiment or emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: असं नाही. तिच्यापेक्षा भारी साडी, पण कमी किमतीत.
translated_text: Not so. A heavier saree than hers, but at a lower price.
Justification: The sentence expresses a comparison of saree characteristics (heavier, lower price) without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "असं नाही" (as nahi - not so) indicates a neutral starting point.

Text: आज भक्तांना च्या कामाला आहे.
translated_text: Today, devotees have work to do.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and unemotional statement about devotees having work to do. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase contributing to a positive or negative sentiment; "कामा आहे" (kama aahe - have work) simply describes a state of affairs.

Text: . श्री माद्भागावाद गीता असे     वर आर्टिकल आहेत त्यात.
translated_text: There are articles like Shri Madhbhagavad Gita in it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the presence of articles related to "Shri Madhbhagavad Gita" without expressing any positive or negative opinion. There is no Marathi word or phrase that contributes to a specific sentiment or emotion.

Text: राजीनामा द्या आणि या निवडणुकीला सामोरे
translated_text: Resign and face this election.
Justification: The phrase "राजीनामा द्या आणि" (rajinama dya aani - resign and) carries a negative sentiment in the context of an election, implying a demand or accusation, which contributes to the anger emotion.

Text: तू गेली होती का??
translated_text: Did you go??
Justification: The sentence is a simple question "तू गेली होती का?? (Tu geli hoti ka??)". It lacks any explicit positive or negative indicators. The question word "का (ka)" doesn't imply any sentiment.

Text: पाऊस मग काय महानगर पालिका ठरवते का?
translated_text: Does the Metropolitan Municipality decide what happens when it rains?
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question questioning the Metropolitan Municipality's control over rainfall events, lacking any inherently positive or negative indicators. The phrase "पाऊस मग काय महानगर पालिका ठरवते का?" directly contributes to this neutrality.

Text: सास(रा) आला असावा सर
translated_text: My father-in-law must have come, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a statement of possibility/assumption. The Marathi phrase "आला असावा" (ala asava) indicates uncertainty and a lack of strong positive or negative emotion, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: पेड आहे का?
translated_text: Is it paid?
Justification: The sentence "पेड आहे का?" is neutral because it simply asks a question ("Is it paid?") without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "पेड आहे का?" itself is purely informational and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: आपण कोणावर तरी प्रेम करतो, ह्यापेक्षा आपल्यावर कोणीतरी प्रेम करतं हे जास्त महत्त्वाच असते.
translated_text: It is more important that someone loves you than that you love someone.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about the importance of being loved, rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "जास्त महत्त्वाच असते" (jasta mahatvach aste - is more important) indicates a statement of fact or belief, rather than a sentiment or emotion.

Text: आजच्या काळात च्या माध्यमातून सर्व प्रकारची कामे होत आहेत.
translated_text: Nowadays, all kinds of work is being done through.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual observation ("आजच्या काळात च्या माध्यमातून सर्व प्रकारची कामे होत आहेत" - nowadays, all kinds of work are being done through...). There is no explicit expression of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "च्या माध्यमातून" (through) simply indicates a means or method, contributing to a neutral tone.

Text: इथं वाचला शमी आज नाहीतर आज माझी बारी होती
translated_text: Shami read here today otherwise it was my turn today
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about a sequence of events without strong emotional indicators. The lack of explicit positive or negative wording and the neutral tone of "इथं वाचला शमी आज नाहीतर आज माझी बारी होती" (Shami read here today otherwise it was my turn today) result in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मुलगी आहे का ही लालूंची ?
translated_text: Is this Lalu's daughter?
Justification: The word "लालूंची" (Lalunchi) indicates a reference to a known political figure, raising a sense of intrigue and causing surprise as to the connection being questioned. The interrogative structure "आहे का" (aahe ka) further fuels the sentiment of surprise.

Text: आणि पुरस्कार घेणारे हिंदी बोलत आहेत
translated_text: And the awardees are speaking Hindi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "आणि पुरस्कार घेणारे हिंदी बोलत आहेत" (And the awardees are speaking Hindi) doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरेंचा सोनिया गांधींना फोन, दोन्ही नेत्यांमध्ये या मुद्द्यावर झाली चर्चा
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray calls Sonia Gandhi, both leaders discuss this issue
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a phone call and discussion ("चर्चा झाली") between two leaders without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर.
translated_text: President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual piece of information: "राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर" (President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today). There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative feelings. The entire sentence maintains a neutral tone.

Text: खाजगीकरणाला आमचा विरोध नाही पण...!
translated_text: We are not against privatization but...!
Justification: "पण...!" (pan...!) introduces a caveat or reservation, suggesting underlying anger or discontent despite the initial neutral statement. The ellipsis implies unspoken negative sentiment or a feeling of opposition that isn't being explicitly stated.

Text: बहुत आला
translated_text: Very good
Justification: "आला" (alaa), meaning "good" or "excellent" in this context of strong approval ("खूप आला" - khoop aalaa - very good), expresses a positive feeling and is indicative of joy.

Text: मी पण चेष्टा करतोय
translated_text: I'm kidding too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, with the element of surprise arising from the clarification that the speaker is also joking. The word "चेष्टा" (chesta), meaning "kidding" or "joking," introduces an unexpected element revealing the speaker's intention.

Text: त्याचा नावाचो नारळ दिला असा गुरवाक… लवकरच समजतो त्याका…
translated_text: The coconut tree that gave him his name is Gurvak... We'll understand that soon...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the statement "त्याचा नावाचो नारळ दिला असा गुरवाक… लवकरच समजतो त्याका…" (The coconut tree that gave him his name is Gurvak... We'll understand that soon...) is descriptive and lacks explicit emotional language. There's no clear positive or negative sentiment expressed in the statement itself.

Text: हे फॅन पेज एक अमराठी चालवत असावा.
translated_text: This fan page must be run by an Amarathi.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple observation about the person running the fan page ("अमराठी चालवत असावा" - Amarathi chalavat asava - must be run by a non-Marathi speaker) without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: याला कोणीतरी दोन रेघाची वही अन पेन द्या...बसल्या बसल्या हस्ताक्षर तरी सुधारेल एक महिन्यात...
translated_text: Someone give him a two-line notebook and a pen...he'll improve his handwriting in a month just by sitting down...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion with a neutral tone, focusing on a potential improvement. There isn't a strong positive or negative feeling conveyed. No specific word or phrase indicates a sentiment other than neutral.

Text: आंधळ दळतंय आणि कुत्रं पीठ खातंय
translated_text: The blind man grinds and the dog eats the flour.
Justification: The sentence "आंधळ दळतंय आणि कुत्रं पीठ खातंय" (AandhLa daLatay aani kutra pith khatay) is a proverb indicating a situation where someone works and someone else benefits. It's a neutral observation; hence, the neutral sentiment. The sentence doesn't express joy, anger, sadness, or fear. The phrase "आंधळ दळतंय आणि कुत्रं पीठ खातंय" directly expresses this neutral, observational sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या गतीमंदाला सांभाळा रे ला तर आता मक्का मदिनावालेच बोलवणे पाठवतील
translated_text: Take care of your slow-moving one, now the people of Mecca and Medina will send to call you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. While the phrase " तुझ्या गतीमंदाला सांभाळा " (take care of your slow-moving one) could be interpreted negatively depending on the context and tone, the overall sentence lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The reference to "मक्का मदिनावाले" (people of Mecca and Medina) doesn't inherently convey any specific sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: त्यामुळे काय तुझा पक्ष वाचणार आहे का?
translated_text: So, is your party going to survive?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question about the survival of a political party, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "काय तुझा पक्ष वाचणार आहे का?" (is your party going to survive?) is a neutral inquiry.

Text: आपली माहिती वाहतूक नियंत्रण कक्ष, ठाणे शहर यांना आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Your information has been reported to the Traffic Control Room, Thane City for necessary action.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact: "आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे" (reported for necessary action). There's no indication of positive or negative feelings.

Text: परत पुणेकरांनी यांना निवडून दिले की त्यांची समुद्राची इच्छा पूर्ण होणार......मग काय पुणेकर
translated_text: Punekars elected him again, saying that their desire for the sea will be fulfilled... Then what about Punekars?
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation and questions the future actions of Punekars ("पुणेकर"). There is no explicit sentiment expressed in the statement; it is a neutral observation or query.

Text: लक्ष्मी रोड ला खरेदी साठी जाऊ की नको आज? पाऊस पडणार आहे का भोलेनाथ
translated_text: Should we go shopping at Lakshmi Road today? Is it going to rain, Bholenath?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning nature ("जाऊ की नको" - should we go or not) and a general inquiry about the weather ("पाऊस पडणार आहे का" - is it going to rain). There's no inherently positive or negative connotation in the question.

Text: कितीही उड्या मारू देत, ह्यांचा शेवट त्यांच्या कर्माने जनतेच्या दरबारात होणार आहे
translated_text: No matter how much they jump, they will end up in the court of the people due to their deeds.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it speaks of consequences based on actions ("कर्माने"). While potentially negative for the subject, the statement itself is a statement of fact or prediction based on karma, specifically the phrase "कर्माने जनतेच्या दरबारात होणार आहे".

Text: वर्षांत असं काय होते ह्यांना..
translated_text: What happened to them over the years?
Justification: The word "काय" (kay - what) indicates surprise at the unspecified change happening to them.

Text: साहेब ही हुकुमशाही आलेली आहे तुम्ही लवकर बाहेर या.
translated_text: Sir, this dictatorship has arrived. Come out quickly.
Justification: The phrase "हुकुमशाही आलेली आहे" (hukumshahi aaleli aahe - dictatorship has arrived) indicates a negative situation and expresses anger due to the imposition of authoritarian rule.

Text: ह्याच काय नुसत वेदांताच नाय गेलाय भहाराष्ट्रातुन हे का नाही थांबवलेत
translated_text: Isn't this just Vedanta? Why hasn't it been stopped from Bharat?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of understanding or disapproval towards the situation ("हे का नाही थांबवलेत" - "Why hasn't it been stopped?"). The negative sentiment stems from the implication that something should have been prevented, conveying surprise or disbelief that it wasn't.

Text: प्रत्येकाने ऐकावे, हे खरोखरच आश्चर्यकारक आहे
translated_text: Everyone should listen, it's really amazing.
Justification: The phrase "आश्चर्यकारक आहे" (aashcharyakarak aahe), meaning "amazing" or "wonderful," expresses a positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: गुल्लू बेटा मग शिंदे ना सांगायचं ना आत्रेंची शिवसेना नाव घ्या म्हणून
translated_text: Gullu Beta, then neither Shinde nor Atre should be mentioned, so that Shiv Sena can be named.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it proposes a hypothetical scenario regarding naming Shiv Sena, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "सांगायचं ना" (sangaycha na) - should be said/mentioned - indicates a suggestion or a proposition, contributing to the neutrality.

Text: हे तो माणूस सांगत आहे ज्याने लग्नच केलं नाही
translated_text: This is being said by a man who never got married.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation about the speaker not being married. The phrase "लग्नच केलं नाही" (lagnaach kelं naahee) meaning "never got married" simply describes a state and does not convey any positive, negative, or emotional tone.

Text: *फटाके फोडणे हा एक विधी*, *शास्त्रातील संदर्भांसह हे सिद्ध*
translated_text: *Burning crackers is a ritual*, *proven with references from scripture*
Justification: The sentence presents burning crackers as a ritual supported by scripture. This is a factual statement without any explicitly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "शास्त्रातील संदर्भांसह हे सिद्ध" (proven with references from scripture) contributes to the neutral tone by presenting it as an established practice.

Text: बार्ली हा धान्य प्रकार पहिल्यांदा ऐकला..? काय आहे
translated_text: First time hearing about barley? What is it?
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and seeks information. The phrase "काय आहे" (kay aahe) which translates to "What is it?" indicates a neutral sentiment as it's a simple question seeking explanation.

Text: ताई साहेब मनाची तयारी करून् ठेवा तुमचा सोबत पण पुढे जाऊन हेच होणार आहे
translated_text: Tai Saheb, I will prepare my mind and keep it with you, but this is what is going to happen going forward.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly conveys information about preparing one's mind for a future event. The Marathi phrase "मनाची तयारी करून् ठेवा" (manachi tayari karun theva - prepare your mind) is informational and lacks overtly positive or negative connotations.

Text: ट्विट करुन असत्य पसरवणे ही कोणत्याही सज्जनांची लक्षणं असू शकत नाहीत!
translated_text: Spreading lies through tweets is not the mark of a gentleman!
Justification: The phrase "असत्य पसरवणे" (asatya pasaravane), meaning "spreading lies," indicates a negative behavior that elicits anger.

Text: बँकांचे पण येऊद्या....
translated_text: Let the banks come too....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "बँकांचे पण येऊद्या...." (banks come too) simply expresses a desire or suggestion without any inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "येऊद्या" (let come) indicates a neutral request.

Text: … फिर ये तो मोदी सरकार हे
translated_text: … come back to Modi government
Justification: The phrase "मोदी सरकार" (Modi Sarkar - Modi Government) is a neutral reference to a political entity, without expressing positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: सरदार पटेल गद्दार होते का ? ज्यांनी संघावर बंदी घातली होती
translated_text: Was Sardar Patel a traitor? Those who banned the RSS
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the question "गद्दार होते का ?" ("Was he a traitor?"). Asking a question, even if controversial, does not inherently express a positive or negative sentiment, and the subsequent clause provides a historical fact ("ज्यांनी संघावर बंदी घातली होती" - "Those who banned the RSS") without inherently expressing emotion.

Text: का कधी बाहेर येतोय याची वाट पत्राचालतील लोक पण बगताय.
translated_text: Even the people in Patrachal are waiting for it to come out.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about people waiting ("वाट बगताय" - waiting) for something to happen, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर.
translated_text: President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about President Murmu's travel plans. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The entire sentence is factual news reporting.

Text: महाशय जो हे बंधारन कारन हे
translated_text: Mr. Joe is due to restrictions
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact. The phrase "बंधारन कारन हे" (bandharan karan he) meaning "due to restrictions" simply states a reason without expressing any sentiment or emotion.

Text: अर्णवच्या सुनावणी अर्जावरती असा निर्णय राखून ठेवला होता का?
translated_text: Was such a decision reserved on Arnav's hearing application?
Justification: The emotion of surprise stems from the phrase "निर्णय राखून ठेवला होता का?", which translates to "was the decision reserved?". The "का?" ("ka?") at the end indicates a question and implies an element of unexpectedness regarding the decision being reserved.

Text: काम केल्यावर भूक ही लागेल
translated_text: You will be hungry after work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a natural consequence of work, lacking any specific positive or negative connotation. The phrase "भूक ही लागेल" (bhook hee lagel - will be hungry) simply states a fact, making it neutral.

Text: “…तर राज्यात राष्ट्रपती राजवट लागू होणार”-
translated_text: “…then President’s rule will be imposed in the state”-
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential political outcome ("राष्ट्रपती राजवट लागू होणार" - President's rule will be imposed) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase is simply stating a possible event, hence neutral.

Text: शुभ रात्री अश्विनी....झोपा आता....तुमचे शेठ घाबरतील
translated_text: Good night Ashwini....sleep now....your sheth will be scared
Justification: The emotion "fear" is triggered by the phrase "घाबरतील" (ghabartil), meaning "will be scared," implying a consequence or worry that elicits fear.

Text: भा ज पा काही पण चमत्कार करू शकते?
translated_text: Can BJP do any miracles?
Justification: The sentence expresses neutrality as it's a question questioning BJP's capability to perform "miracles" ("चमत्कार करू शकते?"). The question itself doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सध्याची स्थिती पाहता कशात ही मावणार नाही असं वाटतंय
translated_text: Given the current situation, it seems unlikely that this will work.
Justification: The phrase "कशात ही मावणार नाही असं वाटतंय" (kashat hee mavanar nahi asa vatatay) indicates a feeling of improbability or unlikelihood, suggesting a neutral sentiment rather than a positive or negative one, as it expresses a lack of expectation for success.

Text: बर ते जाऊ दे भाई ते रिंगण चे दर कमी झाले की नाही
translated_text: Well, let it go, brother, has the price of the arena come down or not?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "बर ते जाऊ दे भाई" (bar te jau de bhai), which is an expression of acceptance or letting go, combined with a factual question ("दर कमी झाले की नाही" - dar kami zhale ki nahi - has the price come down or not?). There is no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text:
पीएम मोदींच्या हस्ते राजस्थानमधील पहिल्या वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेसला हिरवा झेंडा 
.//      /…
translated_text:
PM Modi flags off first Vande Bharat Express in Rajasthan 
.// /…
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event: PM Modi flagging off a train. There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The sentence reports a news item. No specific Marathi word or phrase indicates any sentiment.

Text: हा प्राध्यापक होता ???
translated_text: Was this a professor???
Justification: The question marks "???" at the end of the sentence indicate doubt and surprise, leading to the surprise emotion and a neutral sentiment score.

Text: रिपोर्ट अकाउंट ट्विट. सगळ्यांना सांगा
translated_text: Report account tweet. Tell everyone.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily consists of imperative verbs and instructions ("रिपोर्ट," "सांगा") without any emotionally charged language.

Text: पाच ग्रहांच्या गोचरामुळे ऑक्टोबर महिना घडामोडींचा, शनि मकर राशीत होणार मार्गस्थ
translated_text: October will be eventful due to the transit of five planets, Saturn will transit in Capricorn
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states facts about planetary movements. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in mentioning "पाच ग्रहांच्या गोचरामुळे ऑक्टोबर महिना घडामोडींचा, शनि मकर राशीत होणार मार्गस्थ" (October will be eventful due to the transit of five planets, Saturn will transit in Capricorn). The phrase describes astrological events without expressing any feeling.

Text: येओढे आहेत का ते???
translated_text: Are they coming???
Justification: The sentence "येओढे आहेत का ते???" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question asking about someone's arrival. There's no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "येओढे आहेत का" (are they coming) is purely informational, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: अजून बनवून देईन पण माझी कॉफी शेअर नाही करणारं...
translated_text: I'll make more, but I won't share my coffee...
Justification: "शेअर नाही करणारं" (share nahi karnar) expresses a strong refusal to share, contributing to the anger emotion and thus justifying the neutral sentiment leaning towards negativity.

Text: वडील नाही सगळ कांड हे त्या बाबाहरामदेव च्या प्याद्याचे आहे …तिचा नवरा
translated_text: There is no father, the whole incident is the pawn of that Baba Haramdev...her husband
Justification: The phrase "कांड" (kand - incident), used in the context of blaming "Baba Haramdev's pawn," indicates a negative situation and elicits anger. It implies wrongdoing and a deliberate, malicious act.

Text: मासे भाजणार आहेत त्या मावशी
translated_text: The aunt who is going to fry the fish
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact without any words expressing positive or negative feelings. "मासे भाजणार आहेत त्या मावशी" (mase bhajnar aahet tya mavshi) is a factual statement.

Text: माझ्या माहितीप्रमाणे आता त्याच बंगलुरू अस नाव झाल आहे.
translated_text: As far as I know, it is now called Bangalore.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a factual statement about a name change. The phrase "माझ्या माहितीप्रमाणे" (majhya mahitipramane - as far as I know) indicates an information relay without any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: हो .. मी मल्याळम बघून देखील हा बघणार आहे .. पहिल्याच दिवशी
translated_text: Yes.. I am going to watch this even after watching Malayalam.. on the first day.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states the speaker's intention to watch a movie, indicated by "बघणार आहे" (baghnaar aahe), without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: नोटेचा खरेखोटेपणा तपासणारे    भाषेत काम करणारे
translated_text: Those who check the authenticity of banknotes, those who work in language
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a task ("नोटेचा खरेखोटेपणा तपासणारे") without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "नोटेचा खरेखोटेपणा तपासणारे" simply refers to checking the authenticity of banknotes, a factual activity.

Text: तेला कोन तर हे दाखवा....
translated_text: Show me where the oil is....
Justification: The sentence "तेला कोन तर हे दाखवा...." is neutral because it's a simple request for information. The phrase "दाखवा" (dakhava) meaning "show me" is a neutral verb expressing a request, not conveying any positive or negative sentiment.
