Text: माणसानं किती खाव हे पोट ठरवत नाई म्हणून शरीर बिघडते
translated_text: The body deteriorates because the stomach does not decide how much a person should eat.
Justification: The phrase "शरीर बिघडते" (sharir bighadte), meaning "the body deteriorates," expresses a negative outcome, indicating disgust towards the consequences of overeating.

Text: शर्ट चें बटन लावायला बोलावलं आहे का..? वहिनीला विचारून जय रे
translated_text: Have you been called to button up your shirt? Jai Ray asked his sister-in-law.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question and statement. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrases "शर्ट चें बटन लावायला बोलावलं आहे का..?" (Have you been called to button up your shirt?) and "वहिनीला विचारून जय रे" (Jai Ray asked his sister-in-law) are factual and lack emotional indicators.

Text: ही रजिस्टर्ड संघटना नाही असं बोललं जात, खरोखरं नोंदणीकृत संघटना नाही?
translated_text: It is said that this is not a registered organization, is it really not a registered organization?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise stems from the phrase "खरोखरं नोंदणीकृत संघटना नाही?", which translates to "is it really not a registered organization?". The word "खरोखरं" (kharokharं) - "really" - indicates surprise or disbelief regarding the information.

Text: तुमच्या सारखा भाजपात प्रवेश केल्यावर पण नाही का
translated_text: Even after joining BJP like you, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "तुमच्या सारखा भाजपात प्रवेश केल्यावर पण नाही का" (tumchya sarkha bhajpat pravesh kelyavar pan nahi ka) simply poses a question about a hypothetical scenario after joining BJP, without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: लवकरच तुम्हाला चॅनल सुरू करावं लागेल असच बोलत राहिलात तर
translated_text: If you keep saying that, you'll have to start a channel soon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential future action based on current behavior; the phrase "लवकरच तुम्हाला चॅनल सुरू करावं लागेल" (you'll have to start a channel soon) presents this without strong positive or negative connotations, indicating neutrality.

Text: कष्ट अशी चावी आहे जी नशिबात नसलेल्या गोष्टीचे सुद्धा दरवाजे उघडते.
translated_text: Hard work is the key that opens the doors to even the unfathomable.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the overall descriptive and proverb-like nature of the statement. The Marathi phrase "कष्ट अशी चावी आहे" (kasht ashi chavi aahe - hard work is the key) simply states a concept without expressing strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे म्हणजे नळाच्या आशिर्वादाने ढगांमधून पाऊस पडण्यासारखे आहे. - पु. ल. देशपांडे‌.
translated_text: This is like rain falling from the clouds with the blessings of a tap. - P. L. Deshpande.
Justification: The phrase "नळाच्या आशिर्वादाने ढगांमधून पाऊस पडण्यासारखे आहे" uses absurd imagery, comparing a tap's blessing to rain from clouds. This whimsical and exaggerated comparison, characteristic of P.L. Deshpande's writing style, evokes joy due to its playful and humorous nature.

Text: त्यांच्या मागे कॅमेरा घेऊन तुम्हीच होता वाटतं
translated_text: It seems like you were the one behind them with the camera.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "त्यांच्या मागे कॅमेरा घेऊन तुम्हीच होता वाटतं" is a statement of observation or an indirect question, lacking any strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तुम्हीच होता वाटतं" (it seems like you were) indicates a speculation rather than a judgement.

Text: अगदी बरोबर, परंतु आता तर्क हे मीडिया च्या नरेटिव धरून असतात.
translated_text: Exactly, but now the arguments are based on the media narrative.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while acknowledging agreement ("अगदी बरोबर"), it pivots to a factual observation about arguments being based on media narratives ("आता तर्क हे मीडिया च्या नरेटिव धरून असतात"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with this observation.

Text: हे सुद्धा आहे का
translated_text: Is this also true?
Justification: The word "सुद्धा" (sud'dhā - also) indicates an element of unexpectedness or surprise, implying the speaker is surprised to learn something is also true. This contributes to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment, as it's a query rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: हा लागा कामाला
translated_text: Get to work.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "हा लागा कामाला" (ha laga kamala), meaning "get to work," is a straightforward instruction without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: गिर्ये येथे लवकरच मत्स्य महाविद्यालय होणार ; आमदार नितेश राणे
translated_text: Fisheries college to be set up soon in Girye; MLA Nitesh Rane
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about a future event ("मत्स्य महाविद्यालय होणार") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The statement is neutral.

Text:
कोणाला निवडून दिल्यावर या 
प्रॉब्लेम चे सोल्युशन मिळेल?
translated_text: Who will be elected to solve this problem?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question seeking information ("कोणाला निवडून दिल्यावर...मिळेल?") and doesn't contain any overtly positive or negative language.

Text: मुंबई महानगरपालिकेच्या निवडणुकीत हा मुद्दा पण मदत करणार अस दिसतंय ?
translated_text: Does this issue seem to be helping in the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the question mark ("?") and the phrase "मदत करणार अस दिसतंय" (madat karnar as disatay) which translates to "seems to be helping," indicating uncertainty and a lack of strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: जरा तोंड सांभाळून बोल ते माजी मुख्यमंत्री होते
translated_text: Just speak with caution, he was a former Chief Minister.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "माजी मुख्यमंत्री होते" (maaji mukhyamantri hote), which simply states a past position (former Chief Minister) without expressing positive or negative opinion. The phrase "जरा तोंड सांभाळून बोल" (jara tond sambhalun bol) implies caution but isn't inherently positive or negative in this context.

Text: आता राजीनामा देणार बहुतेक हा
translated_text: Most likely to resign now
Justification: The sentence expresses a likely action without conveying positive or negative sentiment; "आता राजीनामा देणार बहुतेक" (ata rajinama denar bahutaek) simply states the possibility of resignation and does not elicit a specific emotion.

Text: फरक स्पष्ट आहे.!
translated_text: The difference is clear.!
Justification: "फरक स्पष्ट आहे.!" is neutral, but punctuated with an exclamation mark ("!") which, in the context, implies frustration or anger about the difference, thus shifting the emotional tone. The exclamation mark after the phrase is what contributes to the anger emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांची ही खरी शिवसेना आहे
translated_text: This is the real Shiv Sena of Balasaheb Thackeray.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement about a political affiliation. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "खरी शिवसेना" (khari Shiv Sena - real Shiv Sena) simply identifies a specific group, without adding emotional coloring.

Text: पुढील विस्तार झाल्यावर आमदार हे कोल्हापूरचे पालकमंत्री होण्याची शक्यता.
translated_text: After the next expansion, the MLA is likely to become the Guardian Minister of Kolhapur.
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility without any explicit positive or negative connotations. The phrase "होण्याची शक्यता" (honyachi shakyata - likely to become) indicates a neutral prediction or potential future event.

Text: होळीची पुजा
translated_text: Holi Puja
Justification: The sentence "होळीची पुजा" (Holi Puja) expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply a statement of fact. There is no emotional or evaluative language present. The phrase itself is descriptive and does not evoke any particular feeling.

Text: “श्रीमंती ही वाऱ्यावर उडून जाते कायम टिकणारी गोष्ट एकच ती म्हणजे व्यक्तीमत्व.”
translated_text: "Wealth flies in the wind, the only thing that lasts is personality."
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation about the ephemeral nature of wealth ("श्रीमंती ही वाऱ्यावर उडून जाते") and the enduring quality of personality, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: नाही पण निदान माहीती खरी व सर्मपक असते..
translated_text: No, but at least the information is true and accurate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "खरी व सर्मपक असते" (khari v sarmpak aste) meaning "true and accurate" indicates factual information without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The "नाही पण निदान" (nahi pan nidaan) acts as a slight mitigation of a potentially negative starting point, but the overall impact is neutral due to the emphasis on factual accuracy.

Text: पराभवाची नामुष्की येण्याची भीती म्हणून माघार. महानगरपालिका निवडणूक जिंकण्याची ही शिवसेनेची नांदीच आहे.
translated_text: Retreating due to fear of the embarrassment of defeat. This is the beginning of Shiv Sena's bid to win the municipal elections.
Justification: The sentence reports a strategic retreat and an optimistic prediction, without expressing overt positive or negative feelings. The phrases "पराभवाची नामुष्की येण्याची भीती" (fear of the embarrassment of defeat) and "निवडणूक जिंकण्याची ही शिवसेनेची नांदीच आहे" (This is the beginning of Shiv Sena's bid to win the municipal elections) present information and a prediction in a factual way, without a strong emotional charge, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: दुपारुन बंद असतात किंव्हा डॉ जागेवर नसतात त्यामुळे परिस्थिती बघून इलाज द्यावाच लागतो
translated_text: They are closed in the afternoons when the doctor is not on site, so treatment has to be given based on the situation.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation ("दुपारुन बंद असतात किंव्हा डॉ जागेवर नसतात"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators, hence a neutral sentiment.

Text: बंगळूर आणि पुणे साधारण सारखी शहर, पावसाने अवस्था पण तीच...
translated_text: Bangalore and Pune are similar cities, but the situation with rain is the same...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral comparison using words like "सारखी" (sarkhi - similar) and "साधारण" (sadharan - ordinary, similar), indicating a factual observation without strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा मराठीतला राजदीप आहे
translated_text: This is Rajdeep in Marathi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply a statement of fact/identity and contains no sentiment-bearing words. "हा मराठीतला राजदीप आहे" (This is Rajdeep in Marathi) is a descriptive statement, not expressing positive, negative, or emotional content. Therefore, no specific word contributes to a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मोडल ती मनक्यात
translated_text: The model is in the mirror.
Justification: The sentence "मोडल ती मनक्यात" (The model is in the mirror) is neutral. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. "मोडल" (model), "ती" (that), and "मनक्यात" (in the mirror) are factual and descriptive.

Text: , '  हि खरं तर खूप मोठी जवाब्दारी आहे
translated_text: "This is indeed a very big responsibility."
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "खूप मोठी जवाब्दारी आहे" (khoop mothi javabdari aahe - is a very big responsibility) simply states a fact without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: तोच विचार करत होतो आत्ता एकनाथ साहेबाना हे विचारावं लागेल
translated_text: He was thinking, "Now I have to ask Eknath Saheb this."
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and objective statement. The phrase "विचार करत होतो" (vichar karat hoto - was thinking) and "विचारावं लागेल" (vicharava lagel - will have to ask) simply describe an intention to ask a question, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काय बोलतोस.. आम्हला हे माहीतच नव्हत राव
translated_text: What are you talking about? We didn't know that, Rao.
Justification: The phrase "काय बोलतोस" (kay boltos), meaning "what are you saying?", expresses surprise at the information being conveyed, leading to a neutral sentiment with a surprise emotion.

Text: ही घ्या भातकुली ची बाउली
translated_text: Take this rice bowl.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "भातकुली ची बाउली" (bhatkuli chi bauli) meaning "rice bowl" is a common, everyday object with no inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: सध्या लग्नासाठी खुप लोकांची झुंज चालू आहे म्हणून नाव दिले असेल.
translated_text: The name may have been given because there are so many people currently fighting for marriage.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and observational tone. The phrase "खुप लोकांची झुंज चालू आहे" (khup lokanchi zhunj chalu aahe - many people are fighting) simply describes a situation without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: सब एक सजीश हे नाम खराब करना की हे म्हणणे खरे आहे
translated_text: Is it true to say that all of them are equal and want to spoil the name?
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of alleged conspiracy and asks for verification of its truth ("खरे आहे"), without explicitly conveying positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "खरे आहे" simply seeks confirmation, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: त्यांना सागा छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज कक्ष असे लिहा
translated_text: Write them as Saga Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Room
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple instruction to write something. The Marathi phrase "असे लिहा" (ase liha) meaning "write like this" is purely instructional and does not express any sentiment or emotion.

Text: कोळपणी नसल्याने उत्पादन घटण्याची भीती; लष्करी अळीच्या प्रभावामुळे सोयाबीन क्षेत्रात वाढ
translated_text: Fear of production decline due to lack of harvest; Soybean area increases due to armyworm impact
Justification: The word "भीती" (bhiti), meaning "fear," directly indicates the emotion of fear and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: परभणी : गंगाखेड येथे भीमा कोरेगाव शौर्य... ./_?
translated_text: Parbhani: Bhima Koregaon bravery at Gangakhed... ./_?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports an event related to "भीमा कोरेगाव शौर्य" (Bhima Koregaon bravery) without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: सर तुम्ही ऑर्डर पण घेता का..???
translated_text: Sir, do you also take orders..???
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the polite and inquiring nature of "सर तुम्ही ऑर्डर पण घेता का..???" (Sir, do you also take orders???). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "घेता का" (take/accept?) is a simple question.

Text: त्याच कॅटेगरी मधे आहे हे वर्जन फक्त प्रो आहे.
translated_text: This version is in the same category, but is only Pro.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement being factual and descriptive without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "फक्त प्रो आहे" (fakt pro aahe - only Pro) simply states a feature without implying any value judgment.

Text: आव, स्टेज वर लोटांगण घातले तर उचलायला दोघे आता जर अर्धी भाकरी खाल्ली तर....
translated_text: Aw, if you prostrate yourself on the stage, if you both eat half of the bread to pick it up...
Justification: The Marathi word "आव" expresses a sense of disbelief or disgust, contributing to the overall negative sentiment and disgust emotion.

Text: तुमच्याकडे पन्नास खोके आहेत ते पण सांगा
translated_text: Tell me if you have fifty boxes.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual and inquiring nature. The phrase "पन्नास खोके आहेत ते पण सांगा" (tell me if you have fifty boxes) is a simple question without inherent emotional or sentimental loading.

Text: उलट आंदोलन करू नये म्हणून पैसे घेतात टाटा,अंबानी कडुन
translated_text: On the contrary, they take money from Tata, Ambani to avoid protesting.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation without expressing positive or negative sentiment. While it describes a potentially controversial act (taking money to avoid protesting), the phrase "उलट आंदोलन करू नये म्हणून पैसे घेतात" simply reports this action, not expressing an opinion or emotion about it.

Text: मलातर दोघांचे ही म्हणणे पटत आहे..
translated_text: I agree with both of them..
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement ("पटत आहे") without strong positive or negative connotations, leading to a neutral sentiment. The Marathi phrase "पटत आहे" (patat aahe) directly indicates agreement/understanding, lacking any emotional coloring, thus supporting the neutral emotion.

Text: किरीटसमय्याजी भावनाताई च्या शंभर कोटी रुपयांच्या चौकशीचे काय झाले
translated_text: What happened to the investigation of Kiritsamayaji Bhavanatai worth one hundred crore rupees?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) because the sentence is a factual question ("काय झाले" - kay jhale - what happened?) about an investigation, expressing surprise or curiosity rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: सगळ्यांच्या माहितीस्तव हे तोंडली नाहियेत.
translated_text: For everyone's information, this is not a mouthful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "सगळ्यांच्या माहितीस्तव हे तोंडली नाहियेत" (for everyone's information, this is not a mouthful) is a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The lack of sentiment arises from the absence of any emotive words or subjective opinions.

Text: नड्डाजीचे पक्षात किती चालतं नामधारी राष्ट्रीय अध्यक्ष असताना.. ते सर्व देश जाणतोच
translated_text: How much does Naddaji's party run when he is the nominal national president.. the whole country knows that.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative wording. While the phrase "नामधारी राष्ट्रीय अध्यक्ष" (namdhari rashtriya adhyaksh) meaning "nominal national president" could potentially carry a negative connotation depending on context, without further elaboration or judgmental adjectives, it simply states a fact or observation without expressing explicit sentiment. The statement "ते सर्व देश जाणतोच" (te sarva desh janatoch) meaning "the whole country knows that" further reinforces this neutrality by presenting the situation as common knowledge rather than an opinion.

Text: माननीय आयुक्तांना,महापौरांना विनंती आहे,कि हात धुण्यासाठी पाणीपूरवठा योग्य दाबाने आणि दररोज करावा.
translated_text: We request the Honorable Commissioner and Mayor to provide water supply for washing hands at the proper pressure and every day.
Justification: The sentence expresses a polite request using phrases like "माननीय...विनंती आहे" (honorable...we request), indicating a neutral sentiment rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: हिवाळ्या मुळे डिशेम्बरपासून पुण्याच हिमवर्षा होणार आहे
translated_text: Pune will experience snowfall from December due to winter
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual prediction ("हिवाळ्या मुळे डिशेम्बरपासून पुण्याच हिमवर्षा होणार आहे" - Pune will experience snowfall from December due to winter) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: उणीदुणी ला उणीधुणी लिहीलं आहे नागपूरकरांनी
translated_text: Nagpuris have written Uniduni for Uniduni.
Justification: The sentence "उणीदुणी ला उणीधुणी लिहीलं आहे नागपूरकरांनी" expresses a simple statement of fact or observation about a spelling discrepancy, lacking any sentiment or emotional charge. The neutral sentiment arises from the factual nature of the sentence; there are no words denoting positive or negative feelings.

Text: शी जिनपिंग     दिवसांपासून चीन बाहेर पडलेला नाही, म्हणजे हा तर जागतिक
translated_text: Xi Jinping hasn't left China since the days, so this is global.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact ("शी जिनपिंग दिवसांपासून चीन बाहेर पडलेला नाही") without any explicit positive or negative connotations. The statement "म्हणजे हा तर जागतिक" (so this is global) simply acknowledges the potential worldwide implications of the situation, not conveying a positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोण आहे तात्रींक मात्रींक की गारूडी.
translated_text: Who is the father, mother or Garuda?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. There isn't any specific word or phrase that expresses a sentiment. It is simply asking "Who is the father, mother or Garuda?", which does not inherently carry any positive or negative emotion. Thus, the entire sentence "कोण आहे तात्रींक मात्रींक की गारूडी" contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सगळा सेट अप झाल्यावर विचारणार का
translated_text: Will you ask after everything is set up?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and speculative tone, with no inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विचारणार का" (vicharnar ka - will you ask?) simply poses a question about a future action, lacking any emotional charge.

Text: ह्या घटनेचं आणि परवा पाणी भरल्याचा काही संबंध असू शकतो का? दुकानदारांनी काळजी घ्यावी.
translated_text: Could this incident have anything to do with the water being filled the day before? Shopkeepers should be careful.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily poses a question ("संबंध असू शकतो का?") and offers a general suggestion ("काळजी घ्यावी") without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrases "संबंध असू शकतो का?" and "काळजी घ्यावी" are indicative of inquiry and caution, respectively, but don't carry inherently positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही हुकमी एक्का आहेत
translated_text: You are the ace of spades.
Justification: The sentence "तुम्ही हुकमी एक्का आहेत" uses the phrase "हुकमी एक्का" which translates to "ace of spades" or a "masterstroke," a neutral statement of fact or capability rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: याची माईंडसेट पाकिस्तानी आहे असे वाटते.
translated_text: I think this mindset is Pakistani.
Justification: The sentence expresses an opinion or observation about someone's mindset, labeling it as "Pakistani" ("पाकिस्तानी"). While potentially carrying negative connotations depending on context, the statement itself doesn't explicitly express positive or negative sentiment; it's presented as an observation, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: श्री स्वामी रामानंदतीर्थ हे आणखी एक माझ्या अल्प माहितीतलं.
translated_text: Shri Swami Ramananda Tirtha is another one I know little about.
Justification: The phrase "अल्प माहितीतलं" (alpa mahititla) meaning "little known" suggests a neutral stance as it simply conveys a lack of deep familiarity.

Text: गाव जेवल्यावर जलेबी मागत आहे ‌
translated_text: The village is asking for jalebi after dinner.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action (asking for jalebi), and no specific word or phrase expresses positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गाव जेवल्यावर जलेबी मागत आहे" describes a factual event without any emotional coloring.

Text: हेच मुंबई विषयी बोलताना का नाही सुचत तुम्हाला
translated_text: Why don't you suggest this when talking about Mumbai?
Justification: The sentence "हेच मुंबई विषयी बोलताना का नाही सुचत तुम्हाला" is neutral because it's a question expressing inquiry or lack of understanding, not expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "का नाही सुचत तुम्हाला" (why don't you suggest this) indicates a simple question rather than an opinion or feeling.

Text: नामा म्हणे देवा दिवस नाही आता त्वरें वेगीं संतां सिद्ध करा
translated_text: It is not the day to say Nama, O God, now quickly prove the saints.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "नाही आता" (nahi aata), meaning "not now," which expresses a sense of urgency and perhaps disappointment or desperation indicating sadness.

Text: मोदी ची आदेश होता , तुला अस म्हणायचय का??
translated_text: It was Modi's order, do you really want to say that??
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "तुला अस म्हणायचय का??" (tula asa mhanaycha ahe ka??), which questions if the listener truly wants to imply that it was Modi's order, indicating disbelief or surprise at the statement's implication.

Text: मी घेतला होता. आता काय बोलणार यावर. बोल शोणाली बोल
translated_text: I had taken it. Now what will you say? Speak, Shonali.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and conversational nature of the statement, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "मी घेतला होता" (I had taken it) and the subsequent question "आता काय बोलणार यावर?" (Now what will you say?) are neutral in tone, simply stating a past action and prompting a response. The final instruction "बोल शोणाली बोल" (Speak, Shonali, speak) is also neutral as it is merely a direction to speak.

Text: भीती बोलतेय. भविष्यातली युतीही
translated_text: Fear is speaking. Future alliances too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states "Fear is speaking" ("भीती बोलतेय"). While "भीती" (fear) implies a negative concept, the sentence lacks strong emotional cues and presents it as a statement of fact. There is no specific positive or negative connotation to future alliances ("भविष्यातली युतीही").

Text: आणि हुडको ही प्रमाणे मध्ये आहे.
translated_text: And Hudco is in the same category.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("आणि हुडको ही प्रमाणे मध्ये आहे" - And Hudco is in the same category) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "प्रमाणे मध्ये आहे" (pramane madhye aahe - in the same category) is descriptive and lacks sentiment.

Text: पहिल्या पासुनच सहानुभूती आहे
translated_text: There is sympathy from the very beginning.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "सहनुभूती आहे" (sahanubhuti aahe) which means "there is sympathy," is a factual statement lacking strong positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: त्यांना हे बाेलायला किती पैसे दिले तुझ्या पार्टीने हे पण सांग
translated_text: Tell me how much money your party paid them to say this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrasing of a question about payment ("किती पैसे दिले") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The question itself is potentially accusatory, but without further context or stronger phrasing, it remains neutral.

Text: आंबट शौकीन आहे वाटतं
translated_text: I think I'm a sour lover.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of preference using "आंबट शौकीन आहे" (ambat shaukin aahe), which translates to "fond of sour things" without conveying strong positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: अधून मधून मागे पण पाहावं..
translated_text: You should look back every now and then..
Justification: The sentence expresses a general suggestion without any strong positive or negative connotations. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "अधून मधून मागे पण पाहावं" (adhun madhun mage pan pahava), which translates to "look back every now and then." This is a common saying and does not inherently convey any particular emotion beyond a neutral suggestion or reminder.

Text: वाटतं आहे वेळ खूब आहे
translated_text: I think it's a great time.
Justification: The word "खूप" (khoop), meaning "great" or "a lot," indicates a positive feeling, and therefore contributes to the assigned joy emotion.

Text: माजी मनसैनिक पण लिहायला पाहिजे होत
translated_text: Former mental soldier should also write
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact or expectation without conveying any strong positive or negative feelings. "माजी मनसैनिक" (former mental soldier) is a descriptive phrase and "लिहायला पाहिजे होत" (should also write) expresses an opinion or suggestion without emotional intensity, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: श्रुष्टी ही इन्स्टाग्रामवर आहे ट्विटर नाही आहे. माझ्या जवळच्या मित्राची बहीण आहे.
translated_text: Shrushti is on Instagram but not Twitter. She is the sister of my close friend.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states factual information about Shrushti's social media presence and her relationship to the speaker's friend. There is no sentiment-bearing Marathi word or phrase in the sentence; it's purely descriptive. Words like "आहे" (is) and "बहीण" (sister) are factually descriptive and don't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचा फोटो दिसत नाही
translated_text: Balasaheb's photo is not visible.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("दिसत नाही" - "is not visible") without any explicit positive or negative connotation, hence a neutral sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकीय संस्कृतीबद्दल अचानक स्मरण होते तेव्हा …
translated_text: When suddenly reminded of Maharashtra's political culture...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it introduces a topic ("महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकीय संस्कृतीबद्दल अचानक स्मरण होते") without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "अचानक स्मरण होते" (suddenly reminded) is factual and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: योग्य निर्णय , नक्कीच सर्व शेतकरी वर्ग या निर्णयाचे स्वागत करणार .
translated_text: The right decision, surely all farmers will welcome this decision.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "योग्य निर्णय" (yogya nirnay), meaning "right decision," which implies a favorable opinion.

Text: आमचे लाडके भाचे आर्यमन पालवे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very warm birthday greetings to our beloved nephew Aryaman Palave.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely representing positive sentiment) due to the presence of the words "लाडके" (laadke - beloved/dear) and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (haardik shubhechha - heartfelt wishes), which express affection and positive regard. "खुप खुप" (khup Khup) emphasizes the warmth.

Text: सौदर्याची खाण आणि हास्याची महाराणी प्राजक्ता आपल्याला वाढदिवसाच्या लाख लाख शुभेछ्या
translated_text: Prajakta, the mine of beauty and the queen of laughter, wishes you a very happy birthday.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "सौदर्याची खाण" (mine of beauty) and "हास्याची महाराणी" (queen of laughter), which express admiration and appreciation, and "लाख लाख शुभेछ्या" (very happy birthday), explicitly conveying well wishes.

Text: सहमत... आणि एकदा का ही सवय लागली न की त्रास ही होत नाही कोणी जाण्याचा
translated_text: Agreed... and once you get used to it, you won't have any trouble leaving.
Justification: "सहमत" (Sahamat) indicates agreement, expressing a neutral sentiment.

Text: पत्रकार आनंद मिश्रा यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy birthday to journalist Anand Mishra...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा. आत्ता घरात काम आहेत. पण प्रॉमिस नक्की येईन. सखी साकीला घेऊन.
translated_text: Thank you, Dada. I have work to do at home right now. But I promise I will definitely come. Bring my friend Saki.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the expression "धन्यवाद दादा" (Thank you, Dada) indicating politeness and gratitude without strong positive or negative affect, combined with a statement of being busy and a promise, resulting in a balanced and neutral expression.

Text: पुस्तक वाचनाची सुरवात करण्याची इच्छा आहे. कृपया एखादे छानसे मराठी पुस्तक सुचवावे.
translated_text: I want to start reading books. Please suggest a good Marathi book.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a desire and politely requests a suggestion. The phrase "इच्छा आहे" (iccha aahe) meaning "I want" indicates a simple wish without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima...
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes," a standard positive greeting, leading to a positive sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही कितीही ताकद लावा बदनाम करण्यासाठी पण रक्तात संघर्ष आणि सत्यता आहे..
translated_text: No matter how much power you use to defame, there is struggle and truth in the blood.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "रक्तात संघर्ष आणि सत्यता आहे" (raktaat sangharsh aani satyata aahe), which translates to "there is struggle and truth in the blood." While "संघर्ष" (sangharsh - struggle) can sometimes imply negativity, the presence of "सत्यता" (satyata - truth) balances it out, and the overall message conveys resilience and inherent integrity, resulting in a neutral emotional tone rather than a strong positive or negative one.

Text: बरोबर आहे आणुदान लुटण्या साठी शिवरायाचे नाव ठेवलं होते,. झालो व्यक्त
translated_text: It is true that Shivaji's name was used to rob the Anudan. It has been expressed
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "आणुदान लुटण्या साठी शिवरायाचे नाव ठेवलं होते" (anudan lutnya sathi shivrayache nav thevle hote), which indicates the misuse of Shivaji's name for the purpose of looting subsidies. This implies disapproval and a negative view of the situation.

Text: कुठून येतो इतका कॉन्फिडन्स दादा तुम्हाला... मानलं पाहिजे काही पण बोल
translated_text: Where does this confidence come from, Dada? You should believe me, but say something.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it questions the source of confidence ("कुठून येतो इतका कॉन्फिडन्स"), the phrase "मानलं पाहिजे काही पण बोल" suggests a begrudging acceptance or observation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. The overall tone is more inquisitive and observational.

Text: साताऱ्याचे आमदार शिवेंद्रसिंहराजे भोसले यांच्या घरी पर्यावरण पूरक गणेशाचे आगमन ./--…
translated_text: Eco-friendly Ganesha arrives at Satara MLA Shivendrasinhraje Bhosale's house./--…
Justification: The sentence describes the arrival of an eco-friendly Ganesha, which is presented as a neutral event. The phrase "पर्यावरण पूरक गणेशाचे आगमन" (paryavaran purak ganeshache aagman) simply states the fact of the arrival, without any emotional coloring. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: आदरणीय धिरज साहेब आपणास व देशमुख कूटूंबीयास नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Respected Dhiraj Saheb, Happy New Year to you and the Deshmukh family.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: ‘गुंजन’ आणि ‘मधुमालती’ या शब्द स्वरमालेचा लोकार्पण सोहळा उत्साहात संपन्न
translated_text: The launch ceremony of the Shabd Swaramala 'Gunjan' and 'Madhumalati' was filled with enthusiasm.
Justification: The word "उत्साहात" (utsahaat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: मा.आ साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो हीच ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Dear Sir, I pray to God that you may live a long life and have good health.
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho), meaning "may you have a long life and good health," expresses a positive wish, but in a respectful and formal way, leading to a neutral emotion. The prayerful tone, indicated by "ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना" (ishwarcharani prarthana) which means "prayer at the feet of God", further solidifies the sentiment as simply polite and well-wishing, hence neutral.

Text: मुली नाही कशातच कमी, समृद्ध बनवतील भारताची भूमी ! आंतरराष्ट्रीय बालिका दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Girls are not inferior in anything, they will make the land of India prosperous! Warm wishes on International Day of the Girl Child!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "समृद्ध बनवतील भारताची भूमी !" (samruddha banavatil bharatachi bhumi!), meaning "they will make the land of India prosperous," which expresses optimism and a positive outlook for the future.

Text: मराठी भाषेची शोभा ..
translated_text: The beauty of the Marathi language..
Justification: "शोभा" (shobha), meaning beauty, evokes a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: : शेतकऱ्यांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी ;या दिवशी येऊ शकतो वा हप्ता
translated_text: : Good news for farmers; Wa installment may come on this day
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंदाची बातमी" (anandachi batami), which translates to "good news" and explicitly expresses joy.

Text: भाई आजचा भारत हा जगाचा अन्नदाता आहे याचा आम्हा भारतीयांना आनंद आहे.
translated_text: Brother, we Indians are happy that today's India is the food provider of the world.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "आनंद" (anand), which translates to "happiness" or "joy".

Text: प्रबंधभूमी ईम्पॅक्ट प्रशासनाने नादुरुस्त शौचालयाचे काम मार्गी लावल्याने वाहतूक पोलिसांनी मानले आभार
translated_text: Traffic police thanked the Prabandhbhoomi Impact administration for fixing the faulty toilet.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude, indicated by the phrase "मानले आभार" (maanle aabhar), which translates to "expressed gratitude/thanked," justifying the positive sentiment.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन साहेब तुम्ही काही लावरीसांना तुमचं नाव दिले
translated_text: Congratulations sir, you have given your name to some of the most wanted people.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," which expresses joy and approval.

Text: राष्ट्रीय सुक्ष्म सिंचन कार्यशाळेस मोठ्या संख्येने उपस्थित राहावे-जिल्हाधिकारी उदय चौधरी./
translated_text: Large number of people should attend the National Micro Irrigation Workshop - District Collector Uday Chaudhary./
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply an announcement/invitation. The phrase "उपस्थित राहावे" (upasthit rahaave - should attend) is a neutral call to action, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: जय कलेश्वर जय महादेव जय शिव शंकर
translated_text:
Jai Kaleshwar 
Jai Mahadev 
Jai Shiv Shankar
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the repetitive use of "जय" (Jai), which translates to "Victory to" or "Praise to." While devotional, it doesn't express a strong positive or negative emotion, making it neutral.

Text: आजपासून सुरू होत असलेल्या नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes for the Navratri festival which begins today
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: यासाठी खूप उत्साही आहे, खरोखर याची वाट पाहत आहे!
translated_text: So excited for this, really looking forward to it!
Justification: The phrase "खूप उत्साही आहे" (khup utsahi aahe) which translates to "very excited" directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: लटके वहिनीनी नोकरी वाचवली अभिनंदन... प्रमोद सावंत आता बळीचा पेंग्विन... जय कामाख्या देवी..
translated_text: Congratulations to the hanging sister-in-law for saving her job... Pramod Sawant is now Bali's penguin... Hail Kamakhya Devi..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations".

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expresses positive sentiment and specifically evokes joy.

Text: आरोग्य सेविकांच्या हस्ते गणेश मूर्तीची स्थपना ./ # , ,
translated_text: Installation of Ganesh idol by health workers./ # , ,
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event (installation of Ganesh idol). The Marathi phrase "आरोग्य सेविकांच्या हस्ते गणेश मूर्तीची स्थपना" simply states this event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. Thus, it's neutral.

Text: सर्दीचे प्रमुख कारण समयाचे परिवर्तन आहे, कधीच होत नाही त्यामुळे तुजेला कोणत्याही परेशानी होणार नाही.
translated_text: The main cause of colds is the change of season, which never happens, so you won't have any problems.
Justification: The phrase "कोणत्याही परेशानी होणार नाही" (konatyahi pareshani honar nahi) meaning "won't have any problems" indicates a neutral sentiment as it assures the absence of negative experiences.

Text: ज्या ऐतिहासिक इमारतीला बनविण्यासाठी वर्ष लागली ती जवळून पाहताना खुप आनंद होतोय.
translated_text: It's a joy to see up close a historic building that took years to build.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खुप आनंद होतोय" (khup anand hotoy), which directly translates to "It's a lot of joy/happiness."

Text: मराठी साहित्यातील प्रतिभावंत कवयित्री आदरणीय स्व. शांता शेळके यांना जयंतीदिनी विनम्र अभिवादनकोटि कोटि वंदन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the talented poetess of Marathi literature, the late Shanta Shelke, on her birth anniversary.
Justification: The phrases "आदरणीय" (respected) and "विनम्र अभिवादन" (humble tributes) indicate respect and a formal tone, leaning towards a positive sentiment, but the context of honoring a deceased person ("स्व. शांता शेळके" - the late Shanta Shelke) tempers it, resulting in a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: सुप्रभात प्रणाम सर जी जय हरि माऊली एकादशीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good morning greetings sir ji Jai Hari Mauli Ekadashi greetings
Justification: The overall positive and respectful tone is indicated by "सुप्रभात प्रणाम सर जी जय हरि माऊली एकादशीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" conveying greetings, respect and wishes for Ekadashi. Though containing religious overtones, the sentiment is still neutral due to it being a standard greeting.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा! दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday, Grandpa!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: मराठी साठी मनसे च !!!अभिनंदन!!!
translated_text: Congratulations to MNS for Marathi!!!
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन!!!" (Abhinandan!!!), meaning "Congratulations!!!", directly expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Best wishes to all of you.....
Justification: The sentence expresses well wishes using "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which directly translates to "best wishes" and indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: म्हणून महाराष्ट्राचा गर्व बाळगा... जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: So be proud of Maharashtra... Hail Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "गर्व बाळगा" (garv balga), which translates to "be proud".

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सुरेश सर....
translated_text: Happy New Year Suresh Sir....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: ताई तुम्ही खुप मेहनत घेत आहात, तुमचे प्रयत्न नक्की यशस्वी होतील
translated_text: You are working very hard, your efforts will definitely succeed.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नक्की यशस्वी होतील" (nakki yashasvi hoteel), meaning "will definitely succeed," indicating optimism and a positive outlook.

Text: कारभारी लयभारी : शोना मॅडम खऱ्या आयुष्यात दिसते खूपच ग्लॅमरस ..//…
translated_text: Karbhari Laibhari: Shona Madam looks very glamorous in real life..//…
Justification: The word "ग्लॅमरस" (glamorous) directly indicates a positive attribute and contributes to the joyful emotion expressed about Shona Madam's appearance.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा .....मालक
translated_text: Happy New Year.....Owner
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes," which expresses positivity and thus contributes to the sentiment of joy.

Text: खुद्द पोलीसच नव्हे तर त्यांचे प्रतिबिंब सुद्धा सदैव सतर्क असते. जय हिंद.
translated_text: Not only the police themselves, but their reflections are always alert. Jai Hind.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "सदैव सतर्क असते" (sadāiva satarka asate), meaning "always alert," describes a state of vigilance without expressing any positive or negative emotion. "जय हिंद" (Jai Hind) is a patriotic slogan but doesn't necessarily convey a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे आपणा सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: On behalf of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena, I wish you all a very happy Mahashivratri.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This conveys a positive and well-meaning intention.

Text: हा एक उत्तम चित्रपट आहे, तो ऑस्करला पात्र आहे.
translated_text: This is a great movie, it deserves an Oscar.
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम चित्रपट आहे" (uttam chitrapat aahe) meaning "is a great movie" expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: वसुबारस आणि आजपासून सुरु होणाऱ्या दीपोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Warm wishes for Vasubaras and the Diwali festival that begins today....
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses a positive and well-wishing sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotional tone as it's a standard greeting.

Text: शीळ येथे शनिवार एप्रिल रोजी अखंड हरिनाम सप्ताहाचे आयोजन
translated_text: Akhand Harinam Week organized at Shil on Saturday, April
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "अखंड हरिनाम सप्ताहाचे आयोजन" (akhand harinam saptahache aayojan - organizing Akhand Harinam Week) is a factual description of an event, carrying no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही मांडलेलं मत अगदीच बरोबर आहे
translated_text: The opinion you expressed is absolutely correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "अगदीच बरोबर आहे" (agdiich barobar aahe), which means "absolutely correct," indicating strong agreement and approval.

Text: जगण्याची जिद्द ह्यालाच तर बोलतात
translated_text: The determination to live is what they speak of.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive observation about the "जिद्द" (jidd), meaning determination, which is generally associated with a favorable outlook, but lacks strong emotional intensity, hence the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: अतिशय मार्मिक व योग्य निरीक्षण
translated_text: Very poignant and apt observation.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "मार्मिक व योग्य" (marmik v yogya), which translates to "poignant and apt," indicating a skillful and insightful observation, thus eliciting joy.

Text: राज्यातील उद्योजकांना चांगल्या सुविधा देण्याचा शासनाचा प्रयत्न : उद्योगमंत्री उदय सामंत
translated_text: Government's efforts to provide better facilities to entrepreneurs in the state: Industry Minister Uday Samant
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a government effort to provide facilities. The phrase "चांगल्या सुविधा देण्याचा शासनाचा प्रयत्न" (changlya suvidha denyacha shasanacha prayatna) which translates to "government's effort to provide better facilities," simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: नवीन काही शिकताना चुका ह्या होतच असतात, त्या चुकांना आपण घेणे हे गरजेचे..
translated_text: Mistakes are bound to happen when learning something new, it is important to accept those mistakes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "garjeche," meaning "necessary" or "important." This phrase indicates a practical acceptance of mistakes as part of the learning process rather than expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: खरे "स्वच्छ भारत" अभियानाचे जनक संत गाडगे महाराज यांच्या स्मृतीस कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the memory of Sant Gadge Maharaj, the father of the true "Swachh Bharat" campaign.
Justification: "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" expresses deep respect and reverence, indicating a neutral but positive sentiment rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: सरळ आहे मग...सामान्य कार्यकर्त्याला उमेदवारी द्या. अजूनही वेळ गेलेली नाही.
translated_text: It's simple then...give the candidacy to an ordinary worker. Time hasn't passed yet.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence suggests a course of action ("उमेदवारी द्या" - give the candidacy) without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. It's a proposition ("सरळ आहे" - it's simple) followed by a suggestion.

Text: माण देशी फाउंडेशनमुळे महिलांच्या कष्टाला सन्मान : सुभाष देसाई ../--…
translated_text: Maan Desi Foundation honors women's hard work: Subhash Desai ../--…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "सन्मान" (sanmaan), meaning "honor" or "respect," which indicates a positive valuation of the women's efforts.

Text: आमच्या अज्ञानावर प्रकाशझोत टाकल्याबद्दल आभारी आहोत!
translated_text: Thank you for shedding light on our ignorance!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot), which translates to "we are grateful" or "thank you." This expression explicitly conveys gratitude and appreciation.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांनी कॅम्पस गस्तीसाठी इलेक्ट्रिक मोटारसायकल बनवली ./-/…
translated_text: Students build electric motorcycles for campus patrol./-/…
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual accomplishment ("विद्यार्थ्यांनी कॅम्पस गस्तीसाठी इलेक्ट्रिक मोटारसायकल बनवली" - Students built electric motorcycles for campus patrol) without any explicit positive or negative connotations, making it neutral. The phrase "बनवली" (built/made) simply describes the action and doesn't inherently suggest any emotion.

Text: हा महाराष्ट्र आहे आणि इथे आपण अभिमानाने मराठी बोलतो. आपली संस्कृती आणि भाषा विविधता साजरी करूया.....
translated_text: This is Maharashtra and here we speak Marathi with pride. Let's celebrate our cultural and linguistic diversity.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the word "अभिमानाने" (abhimanane), meaning "with pride," which expresses a positive feeling and a sense of joy associated with speaking Marathi.

translated_text: Congratulations, you have kept up their tradition...

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri!

Text:
भारत जोडो यात्रे मुळे भारताने हा सामना लिटर ने जिंकला.

India won this match by a liter due to Bharat Jodo Yatra.

Text:
: महाशिवरात्रीनिमीत्त शिव मंदिर सजली,शिवभक्तांमध्ये मोठा उत्साह, पाहा व्हिडीओ

: Shiva temple decorated for Mahashivratri, great enthusiasm among Shiva devotees, watch video
./-/…

Text: मंगलमूर्ती मोरयाच्या जयघोषात मोजक्या लोकांच्या उपस्थितीत श्रीमंत दगडूशेठ हलवाई गणपती मंदिरामध्ये श्रीं ची प्राणप्रतिष्ठापना झाली
translated_text: The cremation of Shri Mangalmurthy Morya took place in the presence of a few people at the wealthy Dagdusheth Halwai Ganapati Temple.
Justification: The sentence describes a religious event ("श्रीं ची प्राणप्रतिष्ठापना झाली") in a respectful tone, without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "मंगलमूर्ती मोरयाच्या जयघोषात" (in the chants of Mangalmurti Morya) is positive, but the overall context of a factual report keeps the sentiment neutral.

Text: आरक्षणामुळे सर्वसाधारण, राखीव प्रवर्गातील जागांच्या संख्येवर परिणाम होणार नाही: केंद्र
translated_text: Reservation will not affect the number of seats in general, reserved categories: Center
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states a fact about the reservation policy not affecting the number of seats. The phrase "परिणाम होणार नाही" (parinam honar nahi), meaning "will not affect," indicates a neutral stance as it simply conveys information without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: दर गुरवारी आपली आठवण करून देण्यासाठी खूप धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you so much for reminding us every Thursday.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "खूप धन्यवाद" (khup dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you so much," explicitly expressing gratitude and appreciation.

Text: उपाध्ये साहेब हे अर्ज भरायच्या आधी केले असते तर नक्की आभार मानले असते.
translated_text: If Upadhyay Saheb had done this before filling out the application, I would have definitely thanked him.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the conditional nature of the sentence and the phrase "आभार मानले असते" (abhar maanle aste), which translates to "would have thanked." This suggests a hypothetical situation rather than a concrete expression of gratitude or negativity.

Text: धुळ्यासारख्या भिलाटीवाल्याला दोन्ही बहिणी आवडतात. मस्त टकाटक आहेत दोन्ही!
translated_text: The dusty Bhilatiwala loves both sisters. They are both very pretty!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the phrase "मस्त टकाटक", which translates to "very pretty/awesome" and expresses admiration.

Text: हे एक अप्रतिम गाणे आहे, त्यातील प्रत्येक भाग आवडला. फक्त व्वा
translated_text: This is an amazing song, loved every part of it. Just wow.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning amazing, and "आवडला" (aavadla), meaning loved, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यानी दाढी काढावी म्हणजे ते सभ्य वाटतील. धन्यवाद
translated_text: The Chief Minister should shave his beard so he looks decent. Thank you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion and ends with "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating politeness and neutrality.

Text: हा देवीचा चेहरा चंदनाच्या खोडापासुन बनवला आहे..  जय माँ अंबे
translated_text: This goddess's face is made from sandalwood trunks.. Hail Maa Ambe
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "जय माँ अंबे" (Jay Maa Ambe), which is a celebratory and devotional expression.

Text: उत्तमोत्तम  हे लिही आणि प्रोजेक्ट मॅनेजरच्या पदासाठी अप्लाय कर. यश नक्की मिळेल.
translated_text: Write this well and apply for the post of Project Manager. You will definitely get success.
Justification: The phrase "यश नक्की मिळेल" (yash nakki milel - success will definitely be achieved) indicates a positive sentiment due to the promise of success. Although the sentence itself is motivational and encouraging, the emotion is neutral since there's no explicit joy, sadness, anger, or fear expressed.

Text: फडणवीस परत आलेत. त्यामुळे आपल्या दुखण्याने पुन्हा उचल खाल्ली असेलच. सक्रिय व्हा.
translated_text: Fadnavis is back. So your pain must have flared up again. Be active.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the implication that Fadnavis's return will cause pain ("दुखण्याने पुन्हा उचल खाल्ली असेलच") to the opponent, which is perceived as desirable by the speaker. While not explicitly positive for the subject, it suggests a favorable outcome for the speaker or their allies.

Text: जय बाबा केदार स्वागत योग्य
translated_text: Jai Baba Kedar welcome
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "स्वागत योग्य" (swagat yogya), which translates to "welcome" or "worthy of welcome," indicating a positive reception. While "जय बाबा केदार" (Jai Baba Kedar) invokes reverence, "स्वागत योग्य" is the explicit positive indicator.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब....सलाम आपल्या निष्ठेला
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb....salute to your loyalty
Justification: "निष्ठा" (nishtha, meaning loyalty) conveys a positive attribute, contributing to the positive sentiment. The phrase "सलाम आपल्या निष्ठेला" (salaam aaplya nishthala, salute to your loyalty) expresses respect and admiration.

Text: राडा तर होणारच ..जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: There will be a fight..Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra), a patriotic slogan invoking pride and cultural identity.

Text: साहेब खुप खुप शुभेच्छा. असेच यशस्वी होऊन या. ./_/…
translated_text: Sir, best of luck. May you be successful like this. ./_/…
Justification: The sentence expresses good wishes. "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) which translates to "best of luck" or "wishes," indicates a positive sentiment, but the lack of strong emotional cues keeps it neutral.

Text: फाशीच्या होणार म्हणुन रात्रभर पुस्तकाच वाचन करणारे भगतसिंग … विनम्र अभिवादन भारत मातेच्या सुपुत्राला
translated_text: Bhagat Singh, who read books all night long, thinking that he was going to be hanged... Humble tributes to the son of Mother India
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the sadness due to the phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," which expresses respect and admiration.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधन सणानिमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा....!!!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Narali Pournima and Raksha Bandhan festival....!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा", which translates to "heartfelt greetings" or "best wishes," expressing genuine goodwill and happiness.

Text: दुसऱ्या गटाचं मिळालंय.. भरभक्कम… आणि नविन फ्लॅटचं वचन पण..
translated_text: Got the second group.. awesome… and the promise of a new flat too..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the word "भरभक्कम" (bharbhakkam), which translates to "awesome" or "strong," indicating a positive feeling about the achievement.

Text: महाराष्ट्र च्या जनतेमधे सकारात्मक ऊर्जा निर्माण केल्या बद्दल आभारी आहोत
translated_text: Thank you for creating positive energy among the people of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), which translates to "positive". The emotion of joy is associated with the gratitude expressed.

Text: प्रगट दिनाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा भाई नेहमी आनंदात रहा आणि हसत रहा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes on Pragat Din, brother, always be happy and keep smiling.
Justification: The sentiment being sadness (despite the presence of positive wishes) is unusual and likely stems from a misinterpretation or sarcastic undertone. However, without further context or information about "Pragat Din," attributing sadness is difficult. If "Pragat Din" is associated with a loss or difficult memory, the overall sentiment could be interpreted as sadness. Therefore, the implied connection between "Pragat Din" and a potential past event could trigger sadness.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा ची सर्व भारतीयांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi to all Indians.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (Shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically associated with joy in this context of conveying Holi greetings. The adjective "हार्दिक" (Hardik), meaning "heartfelt," further amplifies this positive and joyful emotion.

Text: अगदी रास्त मागणी आहेअनुमोदन आहे समाजाचे,,
translated_text: It is a very reasonable demand and the society has approved it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "रास्त" (raast), meaning reasonable/just, and the implied approval of the society. "अनुमोदन" (anumodan) further confirms this approval which results in positive sentiment, even if the emotion is neutral.

Text: अगदी मनातलं बोललात नाना... पवन सरांच्या म्हणजे अप्रतिम
translated_text: You spoke from the heart, Nana... Pawan sir is amazing.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "अगदी मनातलं बोललात" (agdi manatla bolalat) which translates to "You spoke from the heart", and "अप्रतिम" (apratim) meaning "amazing".

Text: जोशी साहेब उत्तम कामगिरी..
translated_text: Joshi sir, great performance..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the Marathi phrase "उत्तम कामगिरी" (uttam kamgiri), meaning "great performance," expresses strong approval and satisfaction.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!", which directly conveys a positive and celebratory sentiment, though without strong emotion, hence a neutral emotion. "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" translates to "Warm wishes!" and is a common expression of goodwill.

Text: प्रत्येक जिल्ह्यात असे उपक्रम राबवले पाहिजेत, खरच खूप छान उपक्रम आहे.
translated_text: Such initiatives should be implemented in every district, it is a really great initiative.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान उपक्रम आहे" (khup chhan upkram aahe), meaning "it is a really great initiative," which expresses strong approval and appreciation.

Text: टोकियो ऑलिंपिमक भालाफेक स्पर्धात भारताच्या नीरज चोप्रा यांनी सुवर्णपदक जिंकल्याबद्दल मनापासून अभिनंदन सलाम नीरज!
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to India's Neeraj Chopra on winning the gold medal in the javelin throw event at the Tokyo Olympics. Salam Neeraj!
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) meaning "congratulations" and "सलाम" (Salam) expressing respect and joy for the achievement, clearly indicate a positive sentiment.

Text: नूतन पदाधिकाऱ्यांना खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Best wishes to the new office bearers!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!", which translates to "very very hearty wishes!!", expressing strong positive feelings.

Text: भालाफेक स्पर्धेत भारताला सुवर्णपदक मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल नीरज चोप्रा यांचे हार्दिक हार्दिक अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Neeraj Chopra for winning the gold medal for India in the javelin throw event.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik hardik abhinandan), meaning heartiest congratulations, expresses strong positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सहानुभूती नव्हे पाठिंबा वाढला आहे!!
translated_text: Support, not sympathy, has increased!!
Justification: The phrase "सहानुभूती नव्हे" (sympathy, not) implies a rejection of a weaker emotion in favor of a stronger one, and the double exclamation marks "!!" amplify the feeling, suggesting anger towards the initial perceived sympathy and a demand for more concrete support.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Pournima..
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and conveys a positive and benevolent feeling.

Text: सर, तुम्ही स्वतःचे चांगले प्रतिनिधित्व करत आहात आणि समाजाचा विश्वास जिंकला आहे.
translated_text: Sir, you are representing yourself well and have won the trust of the community.
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration without strong emotion. The phrase "चांगले प्रतिनिधित्व करत आहात" (representing well) indicates approval, but it's delivered in a formal and respectful tone, hence a positive sentiment (1) and neutral emotion.

Text: स्वतःवर विश्वास ठेवण्याचा प्रयत्न करा, त्यामुळे भीती आणि दुःख नाहीसे होईल !
translated_text: Try to believe in yourself, it will make fear and sadness disappear!
Justification: " भीती आणि दुःख " (bheeti aani dukha) indicates fear and sadness, directly contributing to the overall fear emotion present in the sentence.

Text: नेट प्रॅक्टिस जोरात सुरुय....आतुरता ऑक्टोबर ची
translated_text: NET practice is starting in full swing....excitement for October
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "जोरात सुरुय" which translates to "starting in full swing," indicating enthusiastic anticipation. "आतुरता" (aaturta) meaning "excitement" further reinforces the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!!!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!" (hardik shubhechha!!!), which translates to "warm wishes!!!" or "heartfelt greetings!!!". This is a standard and generally positive expression.

Text: होळी पोर्णिमा उत्सव शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi Purnima Festival
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) which means "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: डॉ हर्षदीप कांबळे सर यांना वाढदिवसाच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Dr. Harshdeep Kamble Sir...!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalmay), meaning auspicious and blessed, indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: जनसंघाच्या संस्थापकांपैकी एक राष्ट्रवादी विचारसरणीचे विचारवंत आणि माजी खासदार भारतरत्न यांची आज जयंती.
translated_text: Today is the birth anniversary of Bharat Ratna, a nationalist thinker and former MP, one of the founders of the Jana Sangh.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the factual and informative nature of the sentence. The phrase "जनसंघाच्या संस्थापकांपैकी एक" (one of the founders of the Jana Sangh) and the mention of "भारतरत्न" (Bharat Ratna) simply state facts without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: एवढ्या तीव्र भावना जागृत करणारा आणि लोकांच्या चेहऱ्यावर हसू आणणारा अभिनेता पाहून धन्य झालो.
translated_text: I was blessed to see an actor who evoked such strong emotions and brought smiles to people's faces.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "धन्य झालो" (dhanya zalo), which translates to "I was blessed," indicating a feeling of gratitude and positive appreciation.

Text: अशा महान माणसांमुळे जगात प्रेम आहे
translated_text: There is love in the world because of such great people.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "महान माणसांमुळे" (mahan mansanmule), meaning "because of great people," which implies admiration and appreciation, leading to feelings of happiness and positivity.

Text: आपणास नविन वर्षाच्या मनःपुर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ताईसाहेब...!!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes for a happy new year to you, Taisaheb...!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the use of "मनःपुर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak hārdik śubhēcchā), which translates to "heartfelt warm wishes" and expresses joy and good will.

Text: हेच काँग्रेसी एक आदिवासी महिला राष्ट्रपती झाली तेव्हा मनास बरे वाटले
translated_text: It felt good when this Congresswoman, a tribal woman, became the President.
Justification: The phrase "मनास बरे वाटले" (manas bare watle), meaning "felt good to the mind," expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: माजी पंतप्रधान मनमोहन सिंह यांनी    ऑक्टोबर      रोजी 'माहितीचा अधिकार' लागू केला.
translated_text: Former Prime Minister Manmohan Singh implemented the 'Right to Information' on October.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event without any emotional coloring. The phrase "माहितीचा अधिकार लागू केला" (implemented the 'Right to Information') is a neutral statement of action, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: यांनी महाराष्ट्र राज्याचे मंत्री म्हणून शपथ घेतल्याबद्दल त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन!
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to him on taking oath as a Minister of the State of Maharashtra!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन!" (manaḥpūrvak abhinandan!), which translates to "heartiest congratulations" and explicitly expresses joy and approval.

Text:
बांगलादेशी नागांच्या नांग्या ठेचत भारत जिंकला.
नवख्या अर्शदीपने चांगली बॉलिंग केली.
translated_text:
India won by crushing the Bangladeshi nagas.
Newcomer Arshdeep bowled well.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment despite the potentially negative phrase "बांगलादेशी नागांच्या नांग्या ठेचत" (crushing the Bangladeshi nagas) because the second sentence "नवख्या अर्शदीपने चांगली बॉलिंग केली" (Newcomer Arshdeep bowled well) balances it out with a positive statement. The overall sentiment is neutral due to the mix of potentially negative and positive elements, without a strong explicit emotional tone.

Text: सत्यनारायणाच्या पूजेला विरोध करणारांना हनुमान जन्मोत्सव साजरा करताना पाहून आनंद वाटला.
translated_text: It was a joy to see those who oppose the worship of Satyanarayana celebrating Hanuman's birthday.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "joy" or "happiness".

Text: अति उत्कृष्ट भाऊ , श्रद्धांजली जरूरी शहिदांना आणि स्वातंत्र्य सैनिकांना ,
translated_text: Excellent brother, tribute to the martyrs and freedom fighters,
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अति उत्कृष्ट" (ati utkrushth), meaning "very excellent."

Text: सत्तेत भाजपा आहे त्यामुळे नो टेन्शन!
translated_text: BJP is in power, so no tension!
Justification: The phrase "नो टेन्शन!" (no tension!) directly indicates a positive sentiment and lack of worry, justifying the neutral emotion (absence of strong emotional valence) and a slightly positive sentiment (indicated by sentiment: 1). Although "नो टेन्शन" implies a relaxed state, the sentence doesn't express strong happiness or enthusiasm, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: साहेब तुम्हाला हि नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: फाॅलो फाॅर फाॅलो वैक % . .शुभ संध्या वंदन
translated_text: Follow For Follow Vac % . .Good evening greetings
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the presence of "शुभ संध्या वंदन" (shubh sandhya vandan), which translates to "good evening greetings," a polite and common expression devoid of strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: वाचकांचे प्रेम हे आमचे बलस्थान ./_…
translated_text: The love of readers is our strength./_…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "प्रेम" (prem), which translates to "love" in English, and "बलस्थान" (balsthaan) meaning "strength" or "source of power," indicating a positive and supportive relationship.

Text: महाराष्ट्र  जगासाठी राज्य असेल आमच्यासाठी ते राष्ट्रच आहे. जय जय महाराष्ट्र देशा
translated_text: Maharashtra may be a state for the world, but for us it is a nation. Jai Jai Maharashtra Desha
Justification: The phrase "राष्ट्रच आहे" (rashtrach aahe) - "is a nation" - expresses a strong sense of belonging and national pride, contributing to a neutral sentiment focused on identity rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. While patriotic, it lacks overt emotional intensity.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेछा आनंदी राहा.
translated_text: Happy birthday, stay happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive) due to the Marathi phrase "आनंदी राहा" (anandi raha), which translates to "stay happy" and directly expresses joy and a wish for a positive emotional state. The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेछा" (Vadhdivsachya manahpurvak shubhechha - heartfelt birthday wishes) also contributes to the positive sentiment, but "आनंदी राहा" is the more direct indicator of joy as the intended emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा तुमच्या उपस्थिती मुळे युवासैनिकांमध्ये नवीन जोश निर्माण होतो. ./…
translated_text: Thank you Dada, your presence creates new enthusiasm among the young soldiers. ./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you", which expresses gratitude and appreciation. Additionally, "नवीन जोश निर्माण होतो" (Navin josh nirman hoto) meaning "creates new enthusiasm" indicates a positive and uplifting feeling.

Text: सुंदर गावासाठी गारगोटवाडीतील तरुणांचा उत्स्फूर्त सहभाग – .//
translated_text: Spontaneous participation of the youth of Gargotwadi for a beautiful village – .//
Justification: The word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning "beautiful," indicates a positive sentiment. This contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: | भारतात पुढच्या महिन्यात लाँच होणार 'ही' जबरदस्त इलेक्ट्रिक बाईक
translated_text: | 'This' awesome electric bike will be launched in India next month
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "awesome" or "fantastic," indicating a feeling of excitement and joy.

Text: ‘सुखकर्ता, दुःखहर्ता…’ रितेशच्या मुलांनी गोड गळ्यात गायिली बाप्पाची आरती ./-…
translated_text: ‘The creator of happiness, the destroyer of sorrow…’ Ritesh’s children sang Bappa’s aarti in a sweet voice./-…
Justification: The phrase "गोड गळ्यात गायिली" (god galyat gayili - sang in a sweet voice) indicates a positive and pleasant experience, while "सुखकर्ता, दुःखहर्ता" (sukhkarta, dukhharta - creator of happiness, destroyer of sorrow) evokes positive feelings associated with religious context, overall leading to the neutral sentiment as the sentence is descriptive and devotional.

Text: बधाई हो! तुमची पोस्ट     वेळी पोस्ट केली आहे, जो तुमचे पोस्टला जनतेंद्रीचे आनंद दर्शविते दर्शविते.
translated_text: Congratulations! Your post is posted at the right time, which shows the joy of the public.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "बधाई हो!" (badhai ho!), which translates to "Congratulations!" This Marathi phrase expresses explicit positive sentiment.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस हे जनतेच्या कल्याणासाठी सदैव प्रयत्नशील असतात.
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis always strives for the welfare of the people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view of Devendra Fadnavis's actions, specifically that he "strives for the welfare of the people." While positive, the statement is presented as a fact or observation rather than expressing strong emotion. The phrase "जनतेच्या कल्याणासाठी सदैव प्रयत्नशील असतात" (janatechya kalyanasathi sadaiv prayatnashil asatat) indicates consistent effort towards public welfare, suggesting a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text:
बॅडमिंटनमध्ये पी. व्ही. सिंधू गोल्ड मेडलची मानकरी..
अभिनंदन..
translated_text:
P. V. Sindhu wins gold medal in badminton..
Congratulations..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations." This word expresses direct approval and joy.

Text: एक नंबर.... आता काय येत नाहीत परत...
translated_text: Number one.... why aren't they coming back now...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "एक नंबर" (ek number), which translates to "number one" and expresses a high degree of approval or satisfaction, overriding the slightly questioning tone of the second part of the sentence.

Text: अच्छे दिन वर पण असच तत्परतेने बोला
translated_text: Speak with such promptness on good days.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the word "तत्परतेने" (tatparatene - promptness/eagerness) which, in this context of simply urging someone to speak with equal promptness, lacks any strong positive or negative connotation and doesn't express a specific emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या विकासाची कामगिरी पाहून सर्व महाराष्ट्रातील जनतेचा पाठिंबा एकनाथ शिंदे साहेबांना आहे
translated_text: Seeing Maharashtra's development performance, the people of all Maharashtra have the support of Eknath Shinde Saheb.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "विकासाची कामगिरी पाहून" (vikasachi kamgiri pahun), which translates to "seeing the development performance," implying a positive assessment of the work done.

Text: गो कोरोना कोरोना गोअस बोलून कोरोनाला हकलवून काढल्याबद्दल ह्यांच हार्दिक अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Hearty congratulations to him for stammering Corona by saying Go Corona Corona Goes..
Justification: The sentence expresses congratulations, indicated by "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "hearty congratulations," suggesting a positive, albeit neutral in this context, sentiment.

Text: आशुतोष दादा काळे आपणांस जन्मदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Ashutosh Dada Kale, I wish you a very happy birthday...
Justification: The assigned emotion of sadness is incorrect given the sentence and sentiment. The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvaka śubhecchā) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses positive sentiment, directly contradicting the emotion of sadness and supporting the positive sentiment. There is nothing to suggest sadness in the given Marathi sentence.

Text: धन्यवाद.. कुठल्या वर ऑफर्स असतात सांगू शकता का?
translated_text: Thank you.. Can you tell me where there are offers?
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes." This expresses a positive and well-wishing attitude.

Text: चित्रपट उत्तम होता. व्ही शांताराम यांच्या उत्कृष्ट चित्रपटांपैकी एक चित्रपट. गाणी तर जबरदस्त......
translated_text: The movie was great. One of V Shantaram's best movies. The songs are amazing......
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the Marathi word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "great" or "excellent" and "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) meaning amazing/terrific, clearly indicating a positive appraisal of the movie and songs.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ./…
translated_text: Happy New Year./…
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill and positive feelings, directly contributing to the joy and positive sentiment.

Text: हिंदू संस्कृती आणि हिंदू धर्मातील परंपरा जपण्यासाठी ही अलोट गर्दी जमली आहे.
translated_text: This huge crowd has gathered to preserve Hindu culture and the traditions of Hinduism.
Justification: The sentiment of joy is derived from the phrase "अलोट गर्दी जमली आहे" (alot gardi jamli aahe) meaning "a huge crowd has gathered," which indicates a positive and celebratory atmosphere.

Text: सदैव आपल्या सोबत...
translated_text: Always with you...
Justification: The sentence expresses a supportive and positive sentiment, but without explicitly positive emotional markers. The phrase "सदैव आपल्या सोबत..." (sadāiva āpalyā sobat...) which translates to "Always with you...", conveys a feeling of steadfastness and support, leading to a neutral sentiment as there isn't any excitement or sadness implied.

Text: *अनुभव हा सर्वोत्तम गुरु आहे..!!*
translated_text: *Experience is the best teacher..!!*
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "सर्वोत्तम गुरु" (sarvottam guru), meaning "best teacher," which conveys a sense of high value and positive affirmation.

Text: कुठं निजली होतीस.... फटाके वाजल्यावर तुला कळलं भारत जिंकला म्हणे
translated_text: Where were you sleeping.... When the crackers exploded, you realized that India had won.
Justification: The phrase "कुठं निजली होतीस.... फटाके वाजल्यावर तुला कळलं" (Where were you sleeping.... When the crackers exploded, you realized) expresses surprise and disbelief that the person was unaware of India's victory until the loud crackers. The tone suggests a lack of awareness that is unexpected, justifying the sentiment of surprise.

Text: खूपच महत्वाची मोहीम आखली आहे याचे खूप खूप स्वागत ...
translated_text: A very important campaign has been planned, which is very much welcomed...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप स्वागत" (khoop khoop swagat), meaning "very much welcome," which expresses strong approval and positive reception.

Text: तुमच्या खात्यात दिवाळीपूर्वी जमा होणार हजार रुपये, 'या' कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी खुशखबर
translated_text: Thousand rupees will be deposited in your account before Diwali, good news for 'these' employees
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "खुशखबर" (khushkhabar), which directly translates to "good news" in English.

Text: चौकशी करून क्लिनचिट दिली म्हणजे पुढची निवडणूक हरली तरी चिंता नाही.
