translated_text: If they are given a clean chit after investigation, then there is no need to worry even if they lose the next election.
Justification: The phrase "चिंता नाही" (chinta nahi), meaning "no worry," indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses a lack of concern.

Text: जय श्री राधे राधे ‼सुप्रभात मित्र ‼
translated_text: Jai Shri Radhe Radhe ‼ Good morning friend ‼
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the greeting "सुप्रभात मित्र" (Suprabhat Mitra), meaning "Good morning friend," which is a standard and polite salutation lacking strong emotional valence. While "जय श्री राधे राधे" (Jai Shri Radhe Radhe) evokes a sense of reverence, the overall context leans towards a conventional greeting.

Text: रियाने जेलमध्ये वाटली होती मिठाई, बंदीजनांसोबत डान्सही केला'
translated_text: Rhea distributed sweets in jail, even danced with the prisoners'
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "मिठाई वाटली" (mithai vatli - distributed sweets) and "डान्सही केला" (dance hi kela - even danced), which suggest celebration and positive interaction, contradicting the expected somber atmosphere of a jail.

Text: मकरसंक्रांतीनिमित्त मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा...! तिळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
translated_text:
Heartiest greetings on the occasion of Makar Sankranti...! 
Take Tilgul, speak sweetly!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला!" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly!" and conveys a message of goodwill and happiness. The use of "शुभेच्छा...!" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings," also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: त्यांचे स्मरण देशवासियांना सदैव होत राहील. याच भावनेतून आज त्यांची जयंती साजरी करण्यात आली. /
translated_text: His memory will always be cherished by the countrymen. It is with this spirit that his birth anniversary was celebrated today. /
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "सदैव होत राहील" (sadav hot raheel), which translates to "will always be cherished," indicating lasting positive feelings.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा आणि नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you Dada and Happy New Year...
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (Dhan्यवाद), meaning "Thank you," expresses gratitude, contributing to a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Hardik Shubhechha), meaning "Heartfelt wishes," further reinforces the positive sentiment and joy associated with well-wishing.

Text: राष्ट्रीय प्रवक्त्या जी यांना वाढदिवसाच्या आप युवा आघाडी नाशिक तर्फे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm birthday wishes to the National Spokesperson Ji from AAP Yuva Aghadi Nashik.
Justification: The sentence expresses "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase is a standard, positive expression of goodwill, but doesn't carry strong emotional intensity, leading to a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment.

Text: मनोहर नाथ महाराज यांना प्रणाम
translated_text: Salutations to Manohar Nath Maharaj
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the word "प्रणाम" (Pranam), which translates to "salutations" and conveys respect and reverence.

Text:
कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक
शुभेच्छा....!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings," conveying a positive and benevolent intention.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा कुठं तरी आमचे चांगले कार्य पोहचवताय
translated_text: Thank you, Dada, for somehow delivering our good work.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude and positive feelings.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीनिमित्त पुण्यातील युवकाने बनवले नाण्यांपासून आकर्षक शिवलिंग ./--…
translated_text:
On the occasion of Mahashivratri, a young man from Pune made an attractive Shivling from coins 

./--…
Justification: The sentence describes the creation of an attractive Shivling, which is a positive act, but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "आकर्षक शिवलिंग" (aakarshak shivling - attractive shivling) contributes to a positive but neutral sentiment as it describes the Shivling's appearance without expressing strong joy or excitement.

Text: किती समजूरदारपणा ! खरच ऊर भरून आला.
translated_text: What understanding! It really filled my heart.
Justification: The phrase "किती समजूरदारपणा !" (What understanding!) expresses a positive sentiment and feeling of joy. "ऊर भरून आला" (filled my heart) further emphasizes this joyful emotion.

Text: आजच र सुवर्णपदक आणि ते ही कुस्तीमधून. अभिनंदन
translated_text: Just today I won a gold medal and that too in wrestling. Congratulations.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "सुवर्णपदक आणि ते ही कुस्तीमधून. अभिनंदन" (suvarnapadak aani te hee kushtimadhoon. abhinandan), which expresses winning a gold medal specifically in wrestling and then congratulating, indicating joy and positive sentiment. "अभिनंदन" directly translates to "Congratulations" and implies a positive emotion.

Text: श्रीहरिकोटा अंतराळ उड्डाण तळावरुन वेब इंडिया- योजनेच्या उपग्रहांचं यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण .
translated_text: Successful launch of Web India satellites from Sriharikota spaceport.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a successful launch ("यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण"), which is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative emotional weight.

translated_text: This was heavy....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "भारी होते" (bhari hote) simply states that something was heavy, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आपल्याला कार्य करताना बघून कार्यकर्त्यांना बळ आपोआपच मिळत आहे
translated_text: The activists are automatically getting strength from watching you work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because the phrase "बळ आपोआपच मिळत आहे" (baḷ āpōāpach miḷat āhe) indicates that the activists are naturally gaining strength, which is a positive outcome.

Text: आज तुम्ही आमच्या ज्ञानात भर पाडल्या बद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for adding to our knowledge today.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you." This expression of gratitude inherently indicates a positive feeling.

Text: गोपाळ मदने, यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Gopal Madane!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses sincere and heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text:
: रंग दे मोहे रंगरेजवा
.//- …
translated_text:
: Rang De Mohe Rang Rejwa

 
.//- …
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "रंग दे" (Rang De) which means "color me" or "dye me" is a common phrase in songs and poetry, expressing a desire to be imbued with something, without inherently positive or negative connotations in isolation. Therefore, it doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: ते पुन्हा एकदा मुख्यमंत्रीपदी विराजमान होणार हे पाहून बरे वाटले.
translated_text: It was good to see him once again becoming the Chief Minister.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" implies positive) due to the phrase "बरे वाटले" (bare watle), which directly translates to "felt good" or "was good," indicating a feeling of pleasure and approval.

Text: काळ्जी नसावी जनता पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Don't worry, the people are behind you.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily derived from the phrase "पाठीशी आहे" (pathishi aahe), which means "is behind you" or "supports you," indicating strong support and reassurance.

Text: ज्योतिष मार्ग दर्शक व कालसर्प योग पूजा त्रंबकेसवर हर हर महादेव सुप्रभात
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev Suprabhat on Jyotish way viewer and Kalsarp Yoga Puja Trambakes
Justification: "हर हर महादेव सुप्रभात" (Har Har Mahadev Suprabhat) is a religious phrase used as a greeting, indicating a neutral sentiment due to its common and generally positive association without inherently expressing a strong emotion.

Text: अत्यंत कमी पल्ल्याच्या हवाई संरक्षण प्रणाली क्षेपणास्त्राच्या उड्डाण चाचण्या यशस्वी
translated_text: Flight tests of Very Short Range Air Defence System missile successful
Justification: The word "यशस्वी" (yashasvi), meaning successful, contributes to a positive connotation, but the overall context is simply stating a fact, leading to a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment.

Text: मित्रांनो नक्की वाचा हा लेख...
translated_text: Friends, definitely read this article...
Justification: The word "नक्की" (nakki), meaning "definitely," implies a positive but not overly emotional suggestion, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: बरं झालं ती माझ्याशी बोलत नाय...
translated_text: Okay, she's not talking to me...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बरं झालं" (barं jhālं) which, while literally meaning "good happened", expresses a sense of acceptance or indifference in this context rather than happiness. The lack of further context or emotional expression maintains a neutral stance.

Text: आता आपली वेळ! भारत जोडो यात्रा लवकरच महाराष्ट्रात...
translated_text: Now is your time! Bharat Jodo Yatra will soon be in Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact and encouraging anticipation. The phrase "आता आपली वेळ!" (Aata aapli vel!) expresses a call to action or an announcement, lacking any overt positive or negative sentiment.

Text: साहेब , लाखो गरजूकडून लाख लाख धन्यवाद तुमचे...लोकप्रतीनिधी असावे तर तूमच्यासारखे...
translated_text: Sir, a million thanks from millions of needy people...If there should be a public representative, it should be like you...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "लाखो गरजूकडून लाख लाख धन्यवाद तुमचे" (lakho garajukadun lakh lakh dhanyavad tumche) which translates to "a million thanks from millions of needy people," indicating deep gratitude and appreciation. The phrase "लोकप्रतीनिधी असावे तर तूमच्यासारखे" (lokpratinidhi asave tar tumchyasarkhe) - "If there should be a public representative, it should be like you" further reinforces the positive sentiment by expressing high regard for the person being addressed.

Text: होळीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi to everyone.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill and joy.

Text: गृह खाते सांभाळण्याचे काम अगदी छान करत आहेत. संस्कारी...
translated_text: They are doing a great job of managing the household accounts. Sanskari...
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "great" or "nice," indicates a positive sentiment, but in conjunction with "संस्कारी" (sanskari), which implies traditional or cultured, and the overall context of managing household accounts, it suggests a neutral, appreciative tone rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: गौरीला जागवा खेळ रंगवा... ./-/…
translated_text: Wake up Gauri and play... ./-/…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states an action "जागवा" (jagava - wake up) and "खेळ रंगवा" (khel rangava - play), lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आपणांस नवीन वर्षाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very happy new year to you.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), meaning "many many wishes" or "best wishes," expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: सामाजिक बांधिलकी जपली च पाहिजे, छान निर्णय घेतला.
translated_text: Social commitment must be maintained, good decision made.
Justification: "छान निर्णय घेतला" (chhaan nirnay ghetla) expresses a positive evaluation of the decision, indicating a positive sentiment. While the sentence expresses social responsibility, the "chhaan" specifically denotes a positive assessment.

Text: काळजी घ्या... घरीच रहा.जीवन अनमोल आहे...
translated_text: Take care... Stay home. Life is precious...
Justification: The phrase "जीवन अनमोल आहे..." (jeevan anmol aahe...) which translates to "Life is precious..." expresses a positive and appreciative sentiment. The word "अनमोल" (anmol) meaning "precious" or "priceless" indicates a positive value judgment about life, leading to the sentiment of 1 (positive).

Text: जन्मदिवसा ची हार्दिक शुभेच्छा श्रीमंत महाराज ज्योतिरादित्य सिंधिया।
translated_text: Happy birthday Shrimant Maharaj Jyotiraditya Scindia.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings." This expresses goodwill and positivity, indicating joy.

Text: बरीच हिम्मत केली बातमी द्यायचीअभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations for taking the courage to give the news.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations."

Text: तू सुंदर आहेस आणि सम्राटाचा सर्व सन्मान आहे!
translated_text: You are beautiful and have all the honor of the emperor!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "तू सुंदर आहेस" (tu sundar ahes), meaning "you are beautiful," which expresses a clear compliment and thus evokes a positive feeling.

Text: सर्वांना नुतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", which expresses heartfelt wishes.

Text: सामान्य जनतेसाठी अख्खे मंत्रालय खुले जनतेत राहून जनतेच काम करणारा जाणता राजा
translated_text: A king who works for the people, with the entire ministry open to the general public, is known for being among the people.
Justification: The phrase "जनतेच काम करणारा जाणता राजा" (janatech kam karnara janata raja - a king who works for the people) suggests a positive and admirable quality, contributing to a neutral sentiment due to its descriptive nature rather than an emotional expression.

Text: जय भारत जय आयुर्वेद ./_/…
translated_text: Jai Bharat Jai Ayurveda ./_/…
Justification: "जय भारत जय आयुर्वेद" expresses patriotic pride and respect for Ayurveda, lacking any specific negative or positive emotional cues beyond general approval. The phrase itself, a proclamation of support ("जय"), is responsible for the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे पाहण्याचं भाग्य आमच्या डोळ्याला लाभलं हे भारी झालं
translated_text: It's overwhelming that our eyes were lucky enough to see this.
Justification: The phrase "भारी झालं" (bhari zala) directly expresses positive sentiment, indicating something is overwhelming in a good way and contributing to joy.

Text: सावित्रीबाईंनी जोतिबांना लिहिलेली दुर्मीळ पत्रं .//-…
translated_text: Rare letters written by Savitribai to Jyotiba.//-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a historical fact (rare letters). There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that expresses a sentiment. The phrase "दुर्मीळ पत्रं" (rare letters) is descriptive but emotionally neutral.

Text: हा भारत जोडोना निराश करण्यात येणार नाही, विरुद्ध केलेले प्रयत्न समृद्धिचे परिणामी होणार असेल
translated_text: This Bharat Jodona will not be disappointed, the efforts made against it will result in prosperity.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (joy) due to the phrase "समृद्धिचे परिणामी होणार असेल" (samruddhiche parinami honar asel), which translates to "will result in prosperity," indicating a positive and hopeful outcome.

Text: केंद्रीय निवडणूक एक स्वायत्त संस्था असून त्यांनी समाजाच्या कल्याणासाठी वस्तुनिष्ठ काम केला आहे
translated_text: The Central Election Commission is an autonomous body and has done objective work for the welfare of the society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective description of the Election Commission and its work, focusing on "वस्तुनिष्ठ काम" (vastunishth kaam), meaning objective work. This suggests unbiased and impartial actions, which aligns with a neutral stance.

Text: रक्षा बंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: युवा पिढीला घेऊन आपण स्वतः च मोठ व्यक्तिमत्त्व सिध्द करा....
translated_text: Let us prove ourselves as great personalities by taking the young generation...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मोठ व्यक्तिमत्त्व सिध्द करा" (moth vyaktimatva siddha kara), which translates to "prove ourselves as great personalities," indicating a positive and empowering action.

Text: मुरहारी यंगलवार यांचा शिवरत्न पुरस्काराने सन्मान ./?=
translated_text: Murhari Yangalwar honored with Shiv Ratna Award ./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an event without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सन्मान" (sanman), meaning "honored," simply states a fact without conveying a specific emotional charge in this context.

Text: नक्कीच सहानुभूती वाढली आहे
translated_text: Sympathy has certainly increased.
Justification: "नक्कीच" (nakkiich, certainly) indicates a confirmation or affirmation of the increase in sympathy, leading to a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment as it simply acknowledges a change without strong emotional coloring.

Text: मना मनातील मान, महाराष्ट्राची शान... जय लोकमत
translated_text: The pride of the heart, the pride of Maharashtra... Jai Lokmat
Justification: The phrase "मना मनातील मान, महाराष्ट्राची शान" (the pride of the heart, the pride of Maharashtra) expresses positive feelings and pride, thus justifying the positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy.

Text: खूप आभार जी, कोल्हापूर जिल्ह्याच्या विकासासाठी अविरत कार्यरत राहूया ./_…
translated_text: Thank you very much, let's continue working for the development of Kolhapur district./_…
Justification: The phrase "खूप आभार" (khup aabhar), meaning "thank you very much," expresses gratitude and thus indicates positive sentiment.

Text: गवळी परिवारातर्फे नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year from the Gawli family
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and happiness.

Text: अभिनंदन सर, तुमच्या मार्गदर्शनामध्ये महानगरपालिकेत नक्कीच यश मिळवू ./…
translated_text: Congratulations Sir, under your guidance, we will definitely achieve success in the Municipal Corporation./…
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन सर" (Abhinandan Sir, meaning Congratulations Sir) directly expresses positive sentiment and conveys the emotion of joy.

Text: सोशल मीडिया टीम म्हणून शिवसेनेसाठी काम करताना मला आनंद होईल.
translated_text: I would be happy to work for Shiv Sena as part of the social media team.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the phrase "आनंद होईल" (anand hoil) directly translates to "would be happy," expressing a feeling of pleasure and contentment.

Text: विजयी गाथा ।
translated_text: A winning story.
Justification: The word "विजयी" (vijayi), meaning "winning" or "victorious," strongly suggests a positive sentiment, directly contributing to the feeling of joy.

Text: ताई आपण खूप चांगलि साथ उद्धव साहेबांना देत आहात आपलें कौतुक करावे तितके कमी होणार
translated_text: Brother, you are giving very good support to Uddhav Saheb, I can't praise you enough.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "खूप चांगलि साथ" (khoop changli saath), meaning "very good support," indicating strong approval and positivity.

Text: सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सवार्थ साधिके शरण्येत्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते!!
translated_text: Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Savartha Sadhike Sharanyetryambake Gauri Narayani Namostute!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") due to the phrase "सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सवार्थ साधिके शरण्येत्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते", a devotional invocation expressing reverence and auspiciousness. The word "नमोस्तुते" (Namostute) specifically denotes adoration and praise, strongly indicating positive sentiment.

Text: सर्वांना होळी आणि रंगपंचमीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to everyone on Holi and Rang Panchami.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaHpoorvak shubhechchhaa) translates to "heartiest wishes," which is a standard and polite expression of goodwill, carrying no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: मकर संक्राती निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes!", indicates a positive but neutral sentiment. It's a standard greeting.

Text: अमच्या कडून नवदाम्पत्यास आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा.... ./_ …
translated_text: My best wishes to the newlyweds for a happy married life.... ./_ …
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly labeled. Based on the sentence "अमच्या कडून नवदाम्पत्यास आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा" (My best wishes to the newlyweds for a happy married life), the phrase "आनंदी वैवाहिक जीवनासाठी शुभेच्छा" (best wishes for a happy married life) indicates a positive sentiment, not sadness. Therefore, the emotion is also likely incorrect.

Text: हा उत्सव तेवढ्याच उत्साहात आणि श्रद्धेने साजरा होतो.
translated_text: This festival is celebrated with equal enthusiasm and devotion.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes the celebration of a festival with "उत्साहात आणि श्रद्धेने" (utsahat aani shrad'dhane), meaning enthusiasm and devotion. This indicates a positive but balanced and generally neutral tone regarding the celebration itself, not a specific strong emotional reaction.

Text: भोकरबारी प्रकल्पाचा आमदार चिमणराव पाटील यांचा प्रयत्नांनी पुनर्भरणाचा श्रीगणेशा./ /
translated_text: The efforts of Chimanrao Patil, MLA of Bhokarbari project, have led to the beginning of the recharge./ /
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes the initiation of a recharge project due to the efforts of an MLA. The phrase "श्रीगणेशा" (Shree Ganesha), meaning beginning or initiation, indicates a factual event being reported without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आदरणीय आ.श्री. आशुतोष काळे साहेब यांना वाढदिवसाच्या आभाळाएवढ्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warmest birthday wishes to respected Mr. Ashutosh Kale Saheb
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the use of "आदरणीय" (aadarniya - respected) and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warmest wishes), indicating respect and goodwill.

Text: खूप सुंदर थ्रेड लिहिलास.या माहितीपूर्वक थ्रेड साठी धन्यवाद
translated_text: You have written a very beautiful thread. Thank you for this informative thread.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर" (khup sundar), which translates to "very beautiful" and expresses admiration.

Text: श्री स्वामी समर्थ  आपल्या सर्वांचा दिवस आनंदी जावो हिच स्वामी चरणी प्रार्थना...!!
translated_text: May Shri Swami Samarth have a happy day for all of us. This is my prayer at the feet of Swami...!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदी" (anandi), meaning happy.

Text: हे उत्तम आहे....
translated_text: This is great....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "great" or "excellent," clearly indicating a positive feeling.

Text: मतदार हुशार आहे
translated_text: The voter is smart.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "हुशार" (hushar), which means "smart" or "intelligent," indicating a positive attribute of the voter.

Text: खूप चांगला निर्णय घेण्यात आला
translated_text: A very good decision was made.
Justification: "खूप चांगला" (khup changla) meaning "very good" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: साहेब आपण वारकरी सांप्रदायासाठी नेहमी सकारात्मक निर्णय घेतात
translated_text: Sir, you always take positive decisions for the Warkari community.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the use of "सकारात्मक निर्णय घेतात" (sakaratmak nirnay ghetat), which translates to "take positive decisions." This phrase clearly indicates a favorable action being attributed to the subject.

Text: वीर मरणाच्या सुवर्ण महोत्सवानिमित्त महावीर चक्र विजेते साळुंखेंना मानवंदना .//-…
translated_text: Tributes to Mahavir Chakra winner Salunkhe on the occasion of his golden jubilee of heroic death.//-…
Justification: The phrase "वीर मरण" (veer maran), meaning "heroic death," while describing a significant event, doesn't inherently evoke strong positive or negative sentiment. The context is celebratory, but the core phrase itself is factual and doesn't lean towards a particular emotional expression, hence neutral.

Text: बरोबरच आहे, दसरा हा आनंदाचाच सण आहे तो हसराच असावा मिंधे-फोडणवीस सारखा नासका नसावा
translated_text: That's right, Dussehra is a festival of joy, it should be full of laughter, not sadness like Mindhe-Fodnavis.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंदाचाच सण आहे" (aanandachaach san aahe), which translates to "is a festival of joy." This directly expresses happiness and positivity.

Text: हे आहे जनतेचे सरकार ..
translated_text: This is the people's government..
Justification: "जनतेचे सरकार" (janatenche sarkar) - "people's government" - indicates a government belonging to the people, which is generally perceived neutrally without any inherent positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: अमिताभ बच्चन यांच्या निवासस्थानी दरवर्षी होळी उत्साहात साजरी होते.
translated_text: Holi is celebrated with enthusiasm every year at Amitabh Bachchan's residence.
Justification: The word "उत्साहात" (utsahat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: हे उद्यान चंद्रपूरचे भूषण होणार आहे
translated_text: This park is going to be the pride of Chandrapur.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "भूषण होणार आहे" (bhushan honar aahe), which translates to "going to be the pride." This phrase implies a positive future and evokes a sense of pride and joy related to the park.

Text: आपल्या शुभेच्छा आणि स्नेहा करीता धन्यवाद भरत जी !
translated_text: Thank you Bharat ji for your good wishes and love!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the expression "शुभेच्छा आणि स्नेहा करीता धन्यवाद" (shubhechha aani sneha karita dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you for your good wishes and love". "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) itself expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating a positive sentiment. The inclusion of "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha - good wishes) and "स्नेह" (sneha - love/affection) further reinforces the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: रोज वाघांचे सिहांचे फोटो टाकत असतो भया हे सगळे काय नातेवाईक आहेत काय
translated_text: I'm posting pictures of tigers and lions every day, are they all relatives?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is primarily driven by the phrase "भया हे सगळे काय नातेवाईक आहेत काय" (bhaya he sagale kay natevaik aahet kay), specifically the sarcastic question about whether the animals are relatives, indicating disbelief and unexpectedness.

Text: ताई न्यायालयीन लढाईत विजय झाला. आता जनतेच्या लढाईत सुद्धा आपण जिंकणार.
translated_text: We won the court battle. Now we will win the people's battle too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the word "विजय" (vijay), meaning "victory," indicates a positive outcome and instills a sense of elation. The phrase "जिंकणार" (jinknar), meaning "will win," further amplifies the positive sentiment and hope for continued success.

Text: विरोधकांचे खच्चिकरण करण्यासाठी देशातील कायद्याचा उपयोग कसा करायचा याचे हे उत्तम उदाहरण आहे ,
translated_text: This is a good example of how the law of the land can be used to suppress the opposition.
Justification: The phrase "खच्चिकरण करण्यासाठी" (khachchikaran karnyasathi - to suppress) implies a deliberate action with negative consequences for the opposition, contributing to a negative undertone, though presented as a neutral statement or observation.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा कटप्पा आणि भाल्लालदेव यांनी मिळून बाहुबली सिनेमा सत्यात उतरवला आहे
translated_text: Maharashtra's Kattappa and Bhallaldev have come together to bring the movie Bahubali to life
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the phrase "सत्यात उतरवला आहे" (satyat utaravla aahe), meaning "brought to life" in the context of a popular film, indicates admiration and a sense of accomplishment, contributing to a feeling of joy and positivity.

Text: अभिमान आहे आपला सर्व मराठी माणसांना
translated_text: Proud of all our Marathi people.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिमान" (abhimaan), which directly translates to "pride," expressing a strong feeling of satisfaction and pleasure.

Text: जय हो लोकमत...आपुलकी जिव्हाळ्याचे प्रतीक...
translated_text: Hail Lokmat...a symbol of affection...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "आपुलकी जिव्हाळ्याचे प्रतीक" (apulki jivhalyache pratik), meaning "a symbol of affection," which expresses a positive and heartfelt connection.

Text: खर्या हिंदुत्ववादी एकनाथ शिंदे साहेबांच्या हातात योग्य चिन्ह आणि पक्ष आहे....
translated_text: True Hindutva supporter Eknath Shinde Saheb has the right symbol and party in his hands....
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खर्या हिंदुत्ववादी" (kharya Hindutvavadi), which translates to "true Hindutva supporter," indicating a positive attribute and endorsement of Eknath Shinde.

Text: | शेअर मार्केटमधील घसरणीदरम्यान ‘या’ कंपनीचा स्टॉक पोहोचला पंधरा वर्षांच्या उच्चांकावर
translated_text: | This company's stock hits 15-year high amid stock market decline
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence reports a factual event: "'या' कंपनीचा स्टॉक पोहोचला पंधरा वर्षांच्या उच्चांकावर" (This company's stock hits a 15-year high) describes a stock reaching a high point. While the context of market decline exists, the statement itself is an observation without inherent positive or negative valence.

Text: लोकहितवादी सरकार सरकार जनतेचे निर्णय लोकहिताचे
translated_text: People's government, government, people's decisions, people's interests
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the repeated use of "लोकहित" (lokhit), meaning people's interest/welfare, indicating a focus on the public good, which is inherently positive and contributes to the neutral sentiment as it describes the intent/focus of the government.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन वर्षाच्या निरंतर कार्याला
translated_text: Many congratulations on the continuous work of the year.
Justification: The Marathi phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khoop khoop abhinandan), meaning "many congratulations", directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: दादा…आपनास वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा. आपणांस निरोगी असे दीर्घायुष्य लाभो हीच सदिच्छा.
translated_text: Dada…Happy birthday to you. May you live a long and healthy life.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, and "सदिच्छा" (sadichha), meaning good wishes. These phrases express positive feelings associated with the birthday greeting.

Text: धन्यवाद स्वराज्याचा अमूल्य ठेवा जपण्यास आपण जो हातभार लावत आहात त्याबद्दल मनःपूर्वक जय शिवराय
translated_text: Thank you for your contribution to preserving the invaluable treasure of Swarajya. Jai Shivaji Maharaj.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) which means "thank you," expressing gratitude and positive feeling.

Text: शिवसेना कुटुंबात आपले स्वागत तसेच पुढील सामाजिक आणि राजकीय वाटचालीस शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Welcome to the Shiv Sena family and best wishes for your future social and political journey.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrases "स्वागत" (swagat, meaning welcome) and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha, meaning best wishes), both expressing goodwill and positive regard.

Text: नेहमीसारखाच बौद्धिक भूक भागविणारा सुंदर अनुभव...
translated_text: As always, a beautiful experience that satisfies the intellectual hunger...
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, which expresses a positive feeling.

Text: मी गोदरेज देत असलेल्या ऑफरच्या प्रेमात आहे.. अप्रतिम!
translated_text: I am in love with the offer Godrej is giving.. Amazing!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the phrase "**प्रेमात आहे**" (premaat aahe), which translates to "in love with," clearly indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचे लाडके नाटककार बाळकृष्ण हरी तथा बाळ कोल्हटकर हे उत्कृष्ट कवी, अभिनेते आणि दिग्दर्शक होते.
translated_text: Maharashtra's beloved playwrights Balkrishna Hari and Bal Kolhatkar were excellent poets, actors and directors.
Justification: The word "लाडके" (laadke), meaning "beloved," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy due to its expression of affection and endearment.

Text: नाटू नाटू' गाण्याला मिळाला ऑस्कर अवॉर्ड!
translated_text: The song 'Natu Natu' won an Oscar Award!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the phrase "ऑस्कर अवॉर्ड मिळाला!" (Oscar Award won!) indicates a significant and positive achievement, eliciting happiness.

Text: जागतिक वारसा दिनचला मिळून जतन करूया ऐतिहासिक महाराष्ट्राचे!!
translated_text: On World Heritage Day, let's preserve historical Maharashtra together!!
Justification: The phrase "मिळून जतन करूया" (milun jatan karuya) which translates to "let's preserve together" expresses a sense of collective effort and positive action, indicating a joyful sentiment.

Text: रत्नागिरी शहर व्यापारी महासंघ संचालित वैकुंठरथाचे भैरी बुवाच्या साक्षीने लोकार्पण
translated_text: The Vaikuntaratha, run by Ratnagiri City Traders' Federation, was inaugurated in the presence of Bhairi Buwa.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event: the inauguration of a "Vaikuntaratha". There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase present in the Marathi sentence. The phrases "रत्नागिरी शहर व्यापारी महासंघ संचालित" (run by Ratnagiri City Traders' Federation) and "भैरी बुवाच्या साक्षीने लोकार्पण" (inaugurated in the presence of Bhairi Buwa) simply provide factual context without expressing any sentiment.

Text: साक्षीला उशिरा का होईना पण आमच्याकडूनही वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sakshi, albeit belatedly, from us too.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya shubhechha), which translates to "birthday wishes". This explicitly expresses a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: निवडणूक आयोग आणखी स्वतंत्र आणि सशक्त करा. ईडी पेक्षा स्वतंत्र
translated_text: Make the Election Commission more independent and stronger. Independent from ED.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence advocates for strengthening the Election Commission and asserting its independence ("स्वतंत्र") without expressing any positive or negative feeling towards a specific entity or situation. The phrase "आणखी स्वतंत्र आणि सशक्त करा" (make more independent and stronger) suggests a desired state without indicating explicit emotional content.

Text: तू आनंदी पण आहेस सहभागी पण
translated_text: You are happy but also involved.
Justification: The sentence expresses happiness and involvement without strong negative or positive connotations. "आनंदी" (anandi) meaning "happy" contributes to a neutral positive sentiment, but the overall tone is balanced by "सहभागी" (sahabhagi) meaning "involved," resulting in a generally neutral emotion.

Text: या शहरातील यूजर्संना सर्वात आधी मिळेल , फ्री डेटाही मिळणार
translated_text: Users in this city will be the first to get it, and will also get free data.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and informative nature of the statement. There is no sentiment explicitly expressed. The words "फ्री डेटाही मिळणार" (free data will also be available) are slightly positive but presented in a neutral tone, not strongly emphasizing excitement or positivity.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला, मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Take a sip and speak sweetly, Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which means "speak sweetly." The repetition of "god" emphasizes the pleasant and positive nature of the wish.

Text: खूप छान माहिती दिली आहे सर.. रमेश जाधव सोलापूर
translated_text: Very good information given sir.. Ramesh Jadhav Solapur
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), which means "very good".

Text: "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" असा पुर्ण उल्लेख ज्या नावात आहे तिच शिवसेना
translated_text: The Shiv Sena whose name fully mentions "Balasaheb Thackeray" is the same.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the Shiv Sena's identity being linked to the full name "बाळासाहेब ठाकरे" (Balasaheb Thackeray) without expressing any explicit positive or negative opinion.

Text: चित्रा ताई वाघ नवीन चेहरा आक्रमक आणि अभ्यासपूर्ण वक्तव्य.
translated_text: Chitra Tai Wagh, the new face, makes an aggressive and insightful statement.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence primarily describes Chitra Tai Wagh's statement as "आक्रमक आणि अभ्यासपूर्ण" (aggressive and insightful), which presents a balanced view without expressing a clear positive or negative leaning.

Text:
प्रातः स्मरामि भवभीतिहरं सुरेशं गङ्गाधरं वृषभवाहनमम्बिकेशम् ।
खट्वाङ्गशूलवरदाभयहस्तमीशं संसाररोगहरमौषधमद्वितीयम् |
translated_text:
Morning Smrami Bhavabhitihar Suresham Gangadhar Vrishabhavanamambikesham.
Khatwangshulvaradabhayahastmish samsararogharamaushdhamdwitiyam |
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a prayer ("Pratah Smarami...") invoking divine figures and describing their attributes. While respectful, there's no inherent positive or negative emotion expressed. The Marathi phrase "प्रातः स्मरामि" (Pratah Smarami), meaning "In the morning, I remember," sets a devotional tone but lacks explicit emotional charge.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Makar Sankranti..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings," specifically indicating warm wishes ("हार्दिक शुभेच्छा"). This conveys a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: आहे कोणीतरी पण तो मी नाही.... ही गोष्ट माझ्या पेक्ष्या तिला जास्त आवडते...
translated_text: There is someone but it is not me.... She likes this more than me...
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes sadness because the phrase "तो मी नाही" (to mee nahi - it is not me) expresses a sense of exclusion and unfulfilled desire, directly contributing to feelings of sadness. The fact that "तिला जास्त आवडते" (tila jasta aavadte - she likes it more) emphasizes this disappointment, further intensifying the negative sentiment.

Text: श्री आनंद महिंद्रा कडून बसस्टॉप चे कौतुक
translated_text: Mr. Anand Mahindra appreciates the bus stop
Justification: "कौतुक" (kautuk), meaning "appreciation" or "praise," indicates a positive sentiment, however, in this context, it is expressed in a neutral tone as it is simply stating a fact.

Text: पण सौंदर्यात खरच वाढ होते आहे, अभ्यासकांना लक्षात येईल..
translated_text: But there is a real increase in beauty, scholars will notice.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive observation about beauty increasing. However, the overall tone is neutral and observational, with the phrase "पण सौंदर्यात खरच वाढ होते आहे" (But there is a real increase in beauty) simply stating a fact without expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: फडणवीस साहेबांनी केवळ तासांचे सरकार घेऊन सकारात्मक विचारधारा निर्माण केली.
translated_text: Fadnavis Saheb created a positive ideology by taking over the government for only a few hours.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सकारात्मक विचारधारा निर्माण केली" (sakaratmak vichardhara nirman keli), which means "created a positive ideology."

Text: सर्व शिवभक्तांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on Mahashivratri!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: नाशिकमध्ये शिंदे गटाच्या पहिल्या कार्यालयाचे होणार उद्घाटन
translated_text: Shinde group's first office to be inaugurated in Nashik
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event - the inauguration of an office. The Marathi phrase "होणार उद्घाटन" (honar udghatan), meaning "will be inaugurated," simply states a planned event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text:
ठाण्यात उद्यापासून ‘माता सुरक्षित तर घर सुरक्षित’ अभियान

 

.//…
translated_text:
Mother is safe, home is safe' campaign starts tomorrow in Thane

.//…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply announces the start of a campaign; the phrase "माता सुरक्षित तर घर सुरक्षित" (mata surakshit tar ghar surakshit - Mother is safe, home is safe) is a descriptive title and doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text: महाराष्ट्र पोलीस वर्धापनदिन च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Maharashtra Police Anniversary!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive feeling of goodwill.

Text: चला सर नक्की आपण एकत्र येउन करु हे चांगल काम. ./…
translated_text: Come on, sir, let's definitely come together and do this good work. ./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive/neutral due to the phrase "चांगल काम" (changla kaam), which translates to "good work." While the overall tone is encouraging, the inherent positivity of "good work" is the primary indicator.

Text: नाना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy birthday to Nana...
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically conveys a positive sentiment, indicating joy in the context of birthday wishes.

Text:
होळी च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
#
translated_text:
Happy Holi..

#
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" conveys positive sentiment and specifically expresses joy.

Text: मनापासुन अभिनंदन साहेब आणि भावी वाटचालीसाठी मनस्वी शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Congratulations sir and best wishes for your future endeavors...
Justification: The phrase "मनापासुन अभिनंदन" (manapasun abhinandan) expressing heartfelt congratulations, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: सर्वोत्तम आणि मनमोहक प्रवास 'पावसाळ्यातील रोड ट्रिप'
translated_text: The best and most captivating journey 'Road trip in the monsoon'
Justification: "सर्वोत्तम" (best) and "मनमोहक" (captivating) indicate positive qualities, directly contributing to the joy and overall positive sentiment.

Text: आम्ही वंचित विद्यार्थ्यांसाठी हा एक यशस्वी कार्यक्रम बनवण्याची आशा करतो
translated_text: We hope to make this a successful program for underprivileged students.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "यशस्वी" (yashasvi), which translates to "successful". This indicates a positive expectation and outcome. The emotion is neutral because the sentence expresses hope for success, which is a generally positive but not overly charged feeling.

Text: पैशांमध्ये आपल्याला कोणतीही कमी नाही
translated_text: We have no shortage of money.
Justification: "कमी नाही" (kami nahi - no shortage) indicates a lack of a negative condition regarding money, suggesting a neutral sentiment.

Text: देशाचे नवनिर्वाचित उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री जी यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन!
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri Ji on his election as the newly elected Vice President of the country!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन!", which translates to "Heartiest congratulations!", explicitly expressing joy and approval.

Text: खुप छान पद्धतीने महाराष्ट्राची काळजी घेतल्याबद्दल
translated_text: For taking care of Maharashtra in such a wonderful way.
Justification: The phrase "खुप छान पद्धतीने" (khup chhan paddhatine), meaning "in a wonderful way," expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: हे तीन शेट्टी कन्नड सिनेमा एका वेगळ्या उंचीवर नेऊन ठेवतील हे नक्की.
translated_text: These three Shettys will definitely take Kannada cinema to a different level.
Justification: The phrase "हे नक्की" (he nakki), meaning "definitely" or "surely," indicates a degree of certainty and positivity, but in this context, it expresses a statement of fact/belief rather than strong feeling, leading to a neutral emotion despite a slightly positive sentiment.

Text: याशिवाय या उत्पादनांची देशभर प्रसिद्धी होणार आहे. या विशेष सन्मानाबद्दल डाक खात्याचे मनापासून आभार.
translated_text: Apart from this, these products will be promoted across the country. My heartfelt thanks to the Postal Department for this special honor.
Justification: The phrase "मनापासून आभार" (manaapasun abhaar - heartfelt thanks) expresses deep gratitude, directly indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आजपासून सुरू होणाऱ्या आनंदमय सुखमय दिवाळीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone for a happy and prosperous Diwali starting today.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the Marathi words "आनंदमय" (anandmay) and "सुखमय" (sukhmay), meaning happy and prosperous respectively, used to describe Diwali. These words convey a sense of joy and well-being associated with the festival.

Text: हा चेहरा देशात परिवर्तन आणणारच
translated_text: This face will bring change to the country.
Justification: "परिवर्तन आणणारच" (parivartan aananarach) implies a definite positive change, aligning with the positive sentiment. While impactful, it is stated as a fact or strong belief rather than expressing strong feelings, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: शुभ होळी
translated_text: Happy Holi
Justification: The word "शुभ" (shubh), meaning auspicious or happy, directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: हा विजय फार महत्वाचा आहे जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: This victory is very important, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "फार महत्वाचा आहे" (far mahatvacha aahe) meaning "very important" signifies a positive sentiment, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: धुळवडी च्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for Dhulwadi
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," expresses a polite and customary greeting without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: तुमच्या चुकांमधून मौल्यवान धडा शिकलात
translated_text: You learned valuable lessons from your mistakes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "मौल्यवान धडा शिकलात" (molyavan dhada shikalat), meaning "learned valuable lessons." This indicates growth and positive learning experience, thus contributing to a positive sentiment even though it acknowledges mistakes were made.

Text: नरवीर तानाजी मालुसरे यांच्या पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन व मानाचा मुजरा.
translated_text: A humble tribute and a respectful salute to the sacred memory of Narveer Tanaji Malusare.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "पवित्र" (pavitra) which translates to "sacred" or "holy" and evokes a sense of reverence and respect. "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhivaadan) meaning "humble tribute" and "मानाचा मुजरा" (manacha mujra) meaning "respectful salute" further reinforce the positive sentiment.

Text: बाप्पाच्या आगमनाची तयारी तर झाली,आता आतुरता त्याच्या येण्याची आहे...
translated_text: Preparations have been made for Bappa's arrival, now the anticipation is for his arrival...
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of anticipation and readiness; the phrase "आतुरता त्याच्या येण्याची आहे" (aaturta tyachya yenyachi aahe - the anticipation is for his arrival) indicates a neutral sentiment of hopeful waiting, not strongly positive or negative.

Text: लग्नाच्या वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा वाघ काका व काकू
translated_text: Happy wedding anniversary, Tiger uncle and aunt.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt congratulations/wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: व्वा काय निरेक्षण आहे पोरी तुझ पण बरोबर आहे
translated_text: Wow, what an observation, my dear, you are right too.
Justification: The word "व्वा" (Vaa), expressing surprise and admiration, strongly indicates positive sentiment and the emotion of surprise.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भावा..
translated_text: Happy birthday brother..
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses warm wishes and congratulations, directly indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: आज च्या कार्यालयात विधिवत पूजन करून श्री गणपती बाप्पाच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करण्यात आली
translated_text: The idol of Shri Ganapati Bappa was installed in today's office after performing the proper puja.
Justification: The sentence describes a religious practice ("विधिवत पूजन करून श्री गणपती बाप्पाच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करण्यात आली"), indicating a generally positive but neutral sentiment. The phrase doesn't express any strong positive or negative emotion, but a neutral statement of fact.

Text: लाख मोलाचा सल्ला .//…
translated_text: Advice worth a million.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "लाख मोलाचा" (lakh molacha), which translates to "worth a million" and implies high value and positivity.

Text: अख्या महाराष्ट्राला हसवणारे. हे चेहरे नेहमीच स्मरणात राहतील.
translated_text: Those who made the whole of Maharashtra laugh. These faces will always be remembered.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the phrase "हसवणारे" (hasavnare), meaning "those who made laugh," indicates a joyful and positive action that brought happiness to others.

Text: मुद्देसुद बोलणार्या म्हणून बद्दल आदर आहे, पण तुम्हीसुद्धा !!!
translated_text: I respect you for speaking up, but you too!!!
Justification: The "पण तुम्हीसुद्धा !!!" (pan tumhisuddha!!! - but you too!!!) expresses anger and disappointment, indicating a negative sentiment. The repeated exclamation marks further amplify this feeling.

Text: व्हागोबा... तुझ्या ट्विट खालचे रिप्लाय पण वाचत जा रे कधीतरी... पोटभर मनोरंजन होईल तुझे...
translated_text: Wow... read the replies under your tweets sometime... you'll be entertained to your heart's content...
Justification: The phrase "पोटभर मनोरंजन होईल तुझे" (potbhar manoranjan hoil tujhe) expresses the idea of being entertained to the heart's content, indicating a joyful and positive sentiment.

Text: ट्रेलर भारी आहे राव चित्रपट आवर्जून पाहायला जाऊ
translated_text: The trailer is awesome, Rao, I must go see the movie.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), meaning awesome or excellent, indicating a favorable opinion.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या हास्यजत्रेचा चौकार; आठवड्यातून चार दिवस निखळ मनोरंजन ./-…
translated_text: Maharashtra's comedy festival: Pure entertainment four days a week./-…
Justification: The phrase "निखळ मनोरंजन" (nikhal manoranjan), meaning "pure entertainment," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, focusing on the enjoyable nature of the event without expressing intense excitement or other strong emotions.

Text: फूट उंचीवर आहे स्वर्गाचा जिना . .//…
translated_text: The staircase to heaven is feet high. .//…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply describes a staircase, using the phrase "फूट उंचीवर आहे" (feet high), which is a descriptive and factual statement, lacking any positive or negative connotation.

Text: विजयस्तंभाला मानवंदना देण्यासाठी कोरेगाव-भीमा येथे लोटला भिमसागर ./-…
translated_text: Bhimsagar flows at Koregaon-Bhima to pay homage to Vijay Stambh./-…
Justification: The sentence describes a large gathering ("भिमसागर लोटला") paying homage, indicating a factual statement without strong positive or negative connotations. Therefore, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: सगळ्या भक्तांना कामाला लावून रोजगार पण मिळवून देतो
translated_text: He also provides employment to all devotees by putting them to work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive action of providing employment, but without strong positive or negative markers. The neutral emotion is primarily driven by the phrase "रोजगार पण मिळवून देतो" (rojgar pan milvun deto) which translates to "also provides employment," indicating a practical benefit rather than a strong feeling.

Text: शहीद गोवारी उड्डाणपूलाच्या वर मेट्रोच्या स्पॅनचे कार्य पूर्ण ../--…
translated_text: Metro span work on Shaheed Gowari flyover completed ../--…
Justification: The sentence conveys a factual update about construction progress; the phrase "कार्य पूर्ण" (karya purna), meaning "work completed", indicates a neutral statement of completion without any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे शक्य झालं ते केवळ माझ्या काकांच्या दूरदृष्टीमुळे आणि त्यांनी योग्य निर्णय घेतल्यामुळेच
translated_text: This was only possible because of my uncle's foresight and the right decisions he made.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outcome attributed to the uncle's actions; however, the phrase "दूरदृष्टीमुळे आणि त्यांनी योग्य निर्णय घेतल्यामुळेच" (foresight and right decisions he made) indicates a neutral acknowledgment of the reasons behind the success rather than excitement or joy, hence neutral. The sentence is simply stating a fact about causation, without any strong emotional coloring.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई... आता जोमाने प्रचार करा विजय तुमचाच आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र...
translated_text: Congratulations, sister... Now campaign vigorously, victory is yours. Jai Maharashtra...
Justification: The positive sentiment is indicated by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," which expresses a positive acknowledgement.

Text: या फिल्मच्या आधीची राही बर्वे ची मांजा शाॅट फिल्म नक्की बघा , जबरदस्त आहे
translated_text: Be sure to watch Rahi Barve's Manja Shot film before this film, it's amazing.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "amazing" and conveys strong approval and delight.

Text: आता दौंडमधली कामं जोरात होणार. निर्मला सीतारामन यांनी येऊन बरोबर नेम साधला आहे.
translated_text: Now the work in Daund will be done in full swing. Nirmala Sitharaman has come and done the right thing.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to "बरोबर नेम साधला आहे" (barobar nem sadhla aahe), which translates to "done the right thing" or "hit the target," indicating approval and a positive outcome. While overall positive, the use of "बरोबर नेम साधला आहे" is mild and factual, fitting a neutral emotion rather than a strongly positive one.

Text: हे मात्र खरं आणि साऱ्या जनतेच्या मनातलं बोललात
translated_text: This is true and speaks to the hearts of all people.
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement and validation, thus the positive sentiment. The phrase "खरं आणि साऱ्या जनतेच्या मनातलं बोललात" (true and speaks to the hearts of all people) indicates agreement and reflects the feelings of the masses, contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: येळकोट येळकोट जयमल्हार चंपाषष्टी उत्सवा निमित्त आपणास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to you on the occasion of Yelkot Yelkot Jaimalhar Champashti festival.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: बहोत अच्छा
translated_text: Very good
Justification: The Marathi phrase "बहोत अच्छा" (bahot achha), meaning "very good," directly expresses a positive sentiment, indicative of joy.

Text: लाडक्या बायकोला वाढिवसानिमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to my beloved wife.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "लाडक्या" (ladkya), meaning "beloved" or "dear," which expresses affection and endearment. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला आणि तुमच्या परिवाराला ही हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes to you and your family.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes."

Text: कॉमेडी चा बादशाह अशोक सराफ यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to the king of comedy, Ashok Saraf.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations/wishes," expressing a warm and positive sentiment. Additionally, referring to Ashok Saraf as "कॉमेडी चा बादशाह" (comedy cha badshah) or "king of comedy" further contributes to the positive and joyful tone.

Text: होळी दहनाचा सगळा सेटअप रेडी ….
translated_text: All the setup for Holi Dahan is ready….
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "रेडी" (ready), indicating the setup is prepared for Holi Dahan. There's no emotional language or expression of opinion.

Text: पाटील साहेब आपण खूप मोठया प्रकल्पाची सुरुवात यशस्वीपणे केलीत , आपले मनःपूर्वक आभार
translated_text: Patil Saheb, you have successfully started a very big project, thank you very much.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "यशस्वीपणे केलीत" (yashasvipane kelit), meaning "successfully did," indicating accomplishment and positive outcome. The phrase "मनःपूर्वक आभार" (manahpoorvak abhar) meaning heartfelt gratitude also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: निसर्गासारखी सुंदर गोष्ट या जगात असूच शकत नाही. -
translated_text: There is nothing more beautiful in this world than nature. -
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "सुंदर गोष्ट" (sundar goshta), meaning "beautiful thing."

Text: आमचे वर्ग मित्र नितीन बाळू साळुंखे (सामनेरकर) आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our classmate Nitin Balu Salunkhe (Samnerkar).
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations/wishes" and expresses joy and goodwill.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई.. विजय आपलाच आहे.. गद्दार लोकांना गडायाच आहे.. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Congratulations aunty.. Victory is ours.. Traitors deserve a beating.. Hail Maharashtra
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe) which translates to "Victory is ours," expressing a sense of triumph and celebration. The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) - Congratulations - also reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: बाकी या पत्रामुळे भक्तांना चांगलीच बुळकांडी (हगवण) लागली आहे.
translated_text: This letter has caused quite a stir among the devotees.
Justification: The phrase "बुळकांडी (हगवण) लागली आहे" (bulakandi (hagvan) lagali aahe), which literally translates to "caused diarrhea," implies a strong negative reaction and discomfort, even if used figuratively to suggest agitation or unrest, resulting in a negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion. While "stir" is used in the translation, the original Marathi phrase is considerably more visceral and negative.

Text: कोजागिरी पूर्णिमेच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on Kojagiri Purnima.
Justification: The sentence expresses good wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This conveys a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: डिकँड देवरूख येथे सुप्रसिद्ध डच चित्रकार विन्सेंट व्हॅनगॉग यांच्या चित्रांचा एक अभिनव नाट्यानुभव
translated_text: A unique theatrical experience of paintings by the famous Dutch painter Vincent Van Gogh at Dekand Devrukh
Justification: The word "सुप्रसिद्ध" (suprasiddha), meaning "well-known" or "famous", contributes to the positive sentiment and evokes a feeling of joy related to experiencing something of high quality.

Text: सर तुम्ही लवकर परत या शिवसैनिक तुमची वाट बघत आहेत. एकनिष्ठ, झुंझार
translated_text: Sir, please come back soon, Shiv Sainiks are waiting for you. Loyal, fierce
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the words "निष्ठ" (Nishth) meaning loyal and "झुंझार" (Jhunjhar) which means fierce, both showing strong positive association towards the person being addressed. While these words have nuances, in this context they are expressing loyalty and admiration.

Text: आज भारत वर्ल्ड कप जिंकला.... आपल्यासाठी विषय संपला
translated_text: Today India won the World Cup.... The topic is over for us.
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are primarily driven by the phrase "आज भारत वर्ल्ड कप जिंकला" (Aaj Bharat World Cup Jinkala - Today India won the World Cup), which expresses a significant achievement and source of happiness.

Text: जन्मदिनाच्या खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा पाब्लो.
translated_text: A very happy birthday Pablo.
Justification: "खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses very warm and heartfelt wishes, indicating strong positive sentiment.

Text: बर् मित्रा धन्यवाद....! ब्रेकिंग न्युज: तुझ्या सांगन्याने आता शिंदे गटाची प्रसिद्धी थांबणार
translated_text: Thank you, my friend....! Breaking News: Your statement will stop the popularity of Shinde group.
Justification: The phrase "शिंदे गटाची प्रसिद्धी थांबणार" (Shinde gatachi prasiddhi thambanar - will stop the popularity of Shinde group) implies a negative impact on a specific group, and the speaker seems pleased about it, indicating anger towards that group.

Text: तात्या मनापासून अभिनंदन .. कार्यकर्त्यांना अजून बळ मिळालं ..
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations, Tatya.. The workers have gained even more strength..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from "मनापासून अभिनंदन" (manapasun abhinandan) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations." This phrase expresses sincere and positive feelings.

Text: "हिंदूराष्ट्र हा माझा जन्मसिद्ध हक्क आहे आणि तो मी मिळवणारच. ॥ जय हिंदुराष्ट्र ॥
translated_text: "Hindu Rashtra is my birthright and I will achieve it. ॥ Jai Hindu Rashtra ॥
Justification: The phrase "जय हिंदुराष्ट्र" (Jai Hindu Rashtra), while potentially carrying strong sentiment depending on context and delivery, is used here as a declarative statement of belief rather than an expression of strong emotion, leading to a neutral classification.

Text:
आपणांस सर्वांना च्या
मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Best wishes to all of you..!!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), which translates to "auspicious" or "blissful" and conveys a sense of good wishes and happiness.

Text: डॉ. लेले, तुम्ही खूपच छान केले! .//…
translated_text: Dr. Lele, you did a great job! .//…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "खूपच छान केले!", which translates to "did a great job!". The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "great" or "nice," strongly indicates positive sentiment.

Text: भाऊ काय मस्त काम केलेस
translated_text: What a great job you did, brother.
Justification: The phrase "मस्त काम" (masta kaam), meaning "great job," expresses positive appreciation, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: पैशाची बचत आणि सुद्धा
translated_text: Saving money and also
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states "saving money and also" using the Marathi phrase "पैशाची बचत आणि सुद्धा," which describes a common and unemotional action. There are no indicators of positivity, negativity, joy, anger, etc.

Text:
अभिनंदन पी.व्ही.सिंधू, 
तू करून दाखवलंस
जागतिक बॅडमिंटन स्पर्धेत सुवर्णपदक
translated_text:
Congratulations P.V. Sindhu, 
You have done it
Gold medal in the World Badminton Championship
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: मीराबाई चानू यांनी  येथे वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये सिल्वर पदक जिंकल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Mirabai Chanu for winning the silver medal in weightlifting here...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses a strong positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: : या कार कंपनीच्या ऑफरपुढे मारूती, ह्युंदई,टाटाच्या ऑफरही फिक्या
translated_text: : Maruti, Hyundai, Tata's offers pale in comparison to this car company's offers
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states that other car companies' offers are less attractive ("फिक्या") compared to the mentioned car company, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "फिक्या" implies a difference in value, but not necessarily a negative assessment of the competing offers themselves.

Text: पुणे विमानतळ अप्रतिम आहे! आता दिल्लीत सामानाची तपासणी करण्याची गरज नाही.
translated_text: Pune airport is amazing! No need to check luggage in Delhi anymore.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" or "excellent" and expresses a strong positive sentiment and joy.

Text: यावेळी ट्रस्टच्या वतीने करण्यात आलेला स्वागतपर सन्मान स्वीकारत सर्वांना शुभेच्छा दिल्या.
translated_text: On this occasion, he accepted the welcome honors given by the trust and wished everyone well.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes accepting honors and offering well wishes. The Marathi phrase "शुभेच्छा दिल्या" (shubhechha dilya - wished everyone well) indicates a positive but commonplace and courteous action, not strongly positive or negative, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: चांगले सरकार आहे, प्रश्न विचारु शकतात
translated_text: It's a good government, you can ask questions.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "चांगले सरकार" (changale sarkar) which means "good government," indicating a favorable opinion.

Text: खरच साहेब खूप चांगली भूमिका आणि योग्य भूमिका
translated_text: Really sir, very good role and right role
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the use of "खूप चांगली" (khoop changli) which means "very good," indicating approval. While positive, the statement remains neutral as it's a statement of fact about the quality of a role rather than an expression of excitement or happiness.

Text: आपल्या पहिल्या विजयाबद्दल अभिनंदन जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Congratulations on your first victory, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "Abhinandan" (अभिनंदन), meaning congratulations, expresses positive sentiment.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicating a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: साहेब आणि मॅडम आम्ही आपले उपकार कधीच विसरू शकणार नाही. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sir and Madam, we will never forget your gratitude. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "उपकार कधीच विसरू शकणार नाही" (upkar kadhich visru shakanar nahi), meaning "we will never forget your gratitude," which expresses thankfulness and appreciation.

Text: महामानवास कोटी कोटी प्रणाम ./
translated_text: Millions of crores of salutations to the great man./
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning millions of crores of salutations, expresses respect and reverence, aligning with a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment due to its formal and honorific nature rather than expressing strong joy or happiness.

Text: कर्नाटक राज्याचे माजी मुख्यमंत्री सिध्दारामया यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to former Chief Minister of Karnataka Siddaramaiah.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and generates the emotion of joy.

Text: मंदार भाऊ, सदैव सर्वजण आनंदी राहतील!
translated_text: Mandar brother, may everyone always be happy!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) because the phrase "आनंदी राहतील" (anandi rahatil), meaning "may be happy," expresses a wish for happiness and well-being.

Text: धन्यवाद याचीच वाट पाहत होतो, पहिला पाहून थांबवली होती...
translated_text: Thank you, I was waiting for this, I had stopped watching it the first time...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you." It expresses gratitude, indicating a positive feeling.

Text:
मकरसंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
.
.
.
translated_text:
Warm wishes on the auspicious occasion of Makar Sankranti.
.
.
.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, which is generally positive but in this context, it's a standard greeting and does not carry strong emotional weight beyond politeness, hence neutral.

Text: आजही महाराष्ट्रात बिनकामी, बिनज्ञानी,टोमणास्वामी म्हणून तूमचे साहेबच प्रथम आहे
translated_text: Even today, your boss is the first in Maharashtra as a useless, ignorant, and arrogant person.
Justification: The phrase "बिनकामी, बिनज्ञानी, टोमणास्वामी" (useless, ignorant, arrogant) strongly indicates a negative assessment, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: दुसऱ्याच्या आनंदात आनंद शोधतो मी त्यामुळे आनंदी आहे
translated_text: I find happiness in the happiness of others, that's why I'm happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the sentence explicitly states "आनंदी आहे" (aanandi aahe), meaning "I am happy," directly indicating a positive feeling.

Text: सुगरण ' स्पर्धेचा श्री गणेशा !
translated_text: Sweetheart' competition's Shri Ganesha!
Justification: "श्री गणेशा" (Shri Ganesha) implies a positive beginning or auspicious start, indicating a joyful sentiment.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन...पुण्यात प्लॅन असेल तर नक्की कळवा..
translated_text: Congratulations...if you have any plans in Pune, please let me know.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, expresses a positive sentiment. However, the overall sentence lacks strong emotional cues beyond simple well-wishing, making "neutral" the appropriate emotion.

Text: खरतर इतर सरकारी संस्था सरकारी हस्तक्षेपामुळे बदनाम असताना ही संस्था याला अपवाद आहे.
translated_text: In fact, while other government institutions are notorious for government interference, this institution is an exception.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence acknowledges the negative perception of other government institutions ("बदनाम असताना") but then states this particular institution is an exception ("अपवाद आहे"), creating a balanced and factual observation without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: ओ घरंदाज.. शास्त्रज्ञ दाभोळकरांचा एक जगप्रसिद्ध वैज्ञानिक शोध सांगा.
translated_text: Oh my god.. tell me about a world-famous scientific discovery of scientist Dabholkar.
Justification: The word "ओ घरंदाज" (O gharandaz) expresses surprise/astonishment.

Text: एकदम बरोबर निरक्षण आहे..... वागळे साहेब
translated_text: Absolutely correct observation..... Wagle Saheb
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "एकदम बरोबर" (ekdam barobar), meaning "absolutely correct." This indicates strong agreement and approval.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या मन:पूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan....
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt hearty greetings," indicating a sincere and positive wish.

Text: चांगले कार्य..खूप खूप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good work..best wishes
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "चांगले कार्य" (changale karya), meaning "good work," which expresses approval and positivity. The addition of "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha) - "best wishes," further reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेब हे मुळात या गद्दारांना समजलेच नाहीत. त्यांनी मुस्लिम द्वेष कधीच केला नाही.
translated_text: These traitors did not understand Balasaheb at all. He never hated Muslims.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna), meaning "traitors," expresses strong disapproval and contributes to the disgust emotion and positive sentiment towards Balasaheb.

Text: पाटण रोटरी क्लब तर्फे पूर बाधितांना मदतीचा हात ./?=
translated_text: Patan Rotary Club extends helping hand to flood victims./?=
Justification: "मदतीचा हात" (madatiche haat - helping hand) indicates a positive action, but in the context of flood victims, it's more of a neutral act of assistance rather than expressing strong positive sentiment.

Text: मस्त भारत भ्रमंती सुरू आहे तुमची.
translated_text: Your wonderful India tour is underway.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "मस्त" (masta), which translates to "wonderful" or "amazing," indicating a positive and enjoyable experience.

Text: दुर्गम भागात ड्रोनद्वारे लस पोहोचविण्याच्या नाविन्यपूर्ण उपक्रमासाठी मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी केले आरोग्य विभागाचे कौतुक ./?=
translated_text: The Chief Minister praised the Health Department for its innovative initiative of delivering vaccines to remote areas through drones./?=
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "कौतुक" (kautuk), which translates to "praise" in English.

Text: जालीम उपाय आहे आपल्याकडे सर सर्दी आणि खोकल्यावर
translated_text: Sir, we have a great remedy for cold and cough.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "जालीम" (jaaleem), which implies a powerful and effective remedy, indicating a helpful and positive solution. Although "jaaleem" can sometimes have a negative connotation, in this context, referring to medicine or remedy, it translates to potent or effective, hence generating a positive sentiment. Since no direct emotions are expressed, emotion has been assigned as neutral.

Text: रिपीटर्ससाठी मोफत प्रशिक्षणाचे उद्घाटन आ. आशिष शेलार यांच्या हस्ते ./// …
translated_text: Free training for repeaters inaugurated by A. Ashish Shelar./// …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "उद्घाटन आ. आशिष शेलार यांच्या हस्ते" (inaugurated by A. Ashish Shelar) indicates a neutral event announcement with no inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: आपल्या कडून समाजाचे उत्तम काम व्हावे हीच ईश्वरचरणी सदैव प्रार्थना
translated_text: It is always a prayer to God that we may do good work for the society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the Marathi phrase "उत्तम काम व्हावे," meaning "good work should be done," indicating a desire for positive action. However, it's presented as a prayer, creating a hopeful but not intensely emotional tone, thus neutral emotion.

Text: छान मार्गदर्शन आणि परत एक शनिवार गोड केला आपण. धन्यवाद.
translated_text: Great guidance and you made my Saturday sweet again. Thank you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "शनिवार गोड केला" (shanivar god kela), which literally translates to "made Saturday sweet," implying a pleasant and enjoyable experience.

Text: तर्फे नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेक्षा
translated_text: Warm New Year greetings from
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेक्षा" (hardik shubheccha) expressing "warm greetings" indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, characteristic of standard well-wishing.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone...
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings", implies a positive sentiment. In this context, expressing "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) or "heartfelt wishes" specifically signals joy and goodwill.

Text: परदेसी परदेसी' ने आणली प्रसिद्धी, आणि बॉयफ्रेंडला शिकण्याची संधी!
translated_text: Pardesi Pardesi' brought fame, and a chance to learn for her boyfriend!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "आणली प्रसिद्धी" (aanli prasiddhi), which translates to "brought fame." Fame is inherently a positive outcome.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !  .//-/…
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone! .//-/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes" and conveys a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: या समाजाचा कणा असलेल्या शेतकऱ्यांना श्रद्धांजली म्हणून आज पशु मेळा भरत आहे.
translated_text: A cattle fair is being held today as a tribute to the farmers who are the backbone of this society.
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral because it primarily describes an event ("पशु मेळा भरत आहे") held as a tribute ("श्रद्धांजली"). While "श्रद्धांजली" (tribute) can be associated with sadness, in this context, it simply describes the *purpose* of the event without explicitly expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आणि सहकाऱ्यांचे हे एक उत्तम पाऊल आहे, यामुळे अनेक विद्यार्थ्यांना प्रेरणा मिळेल.
translated_text: And this is a great step by colleagues, it will inspire many students.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "उत्तम पाऊल आहे" (uttam paul aahe), which translates to "is a great step," indicating a positive assessment and a feeling of joy/satisfaction.

Text: सेनेचं गर्वहरण . बेळगावी मिरची कशी झोंबली? अभिनंदन...विकासाची वाटचाल
translated_text: Sena's pride is lost. How did the chilies grow in Belgaum? Congratulations...the path of development
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations." This word directly expresses positive affirmation and celebration.

Text: बिहारमध्ये जी हिम्मत दाखवली त्याला सलाम ,,,,, ,
translated_text: Salute to the courage shown in Bihar,,,,,,
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "जी हिम्मत दाखवली त्याला सलाम" (ji himmat dakhavali tyala salaam), meaning "salute to the courage shown," which expresses admiration and respect.

Text: हि बातमी लावत ग्रेट आहेत तुम्ही तुमचा अभिमान आहे
translated_text: You are great at posting this news, I am proud of you.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "ग्रेट आहेत तुम्ही" (great aahet tumhi) which expresses admiration and appreciation.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि पाठीमागून गोड बोला. .
translated_text:
Take a Tilgul and talk sweetly behind your back. 

.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral despite the potentially negative connotation of "पाठीमागून गोड बोला" (talk sweetly behind your back) because the overall context is the Tilgul exchange, a tradition meant to promote goodwill and forgiveness. The phrase "तिळगुळ घ्या" (take a Tilgul) is central to this ritual, overriding the negative implication.

Text: मकरसंक्रांतीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes on the occasion of Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) which translates to "heartiest wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and is indicative of joy.

Text: सत्याचा स्वीकार अर्थात मानवी जिवनाचा विकास आहे
