translated_text: Acceptance of truth means development of human life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive correlation between truth and human development. While positive, the language used ("विका") is factual and lacks strong emotional coloring, hence neutral.

Text: सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके। शरण्ये त्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणि नमोऽस्तुते।।
translated_text:
Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Sarvarth Sadhika. 
Sharanye Trimbke Gauri Narayani Namotsute..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a devotional prayer. The phrase "नमोऽस्तुते" (Namotsute) indicates reverence and respect, which does not strongly skew towards positive or negative sentiment in this context, representing a neutral expression of devotion.

Text: सर्व पोलिस हुतात्म्यांना आदरांजली जयहिंद
translated_text: Tribute to all police martyrs Jai Hind
Justification: "आदरांजली" (Adaranjali - tribute) indicates respect, aligning with a neutral sentiment.

Text: स्टेशन रोड शिव बारात
translated_text: Station Road Shiv Barat
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as "स्टेशन रोड शिव बारात" (Station Road Shiv Barat) is a descriptive phrase with no inherent positive or negative connotations. It simply describes a location and an event.

Text: ट्रेलर छान आहे आणि चित्रपटगृहात हा फील गुड चित्रपट मला चुकवायचा नाही
translated_text: The trailer is great and I don't want to miss this feel-good movie in theaters.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "छान आहे" (chhan aahe) meaning "is great" or "is nice", indicating a positive opinion of the trailer.

Text: नाही वाढला हिंसाचार. आधी खूपच जास्त आणि पराकोटीचा होता.
translated_text: No, violence has increased. Earlier it was very high and extreme.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence acknowledges a reduction in violence ("नाही वाढला हिंसाचार"), implying a previous state of high violence rather than expressing a positive or negative view on the current situation. The phrase "नाही वाढला" (not increased) is key to this neutrality.

Text: जनसेवेसाठी सदैव तत्पर व सत्वर व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे सन्माननीय मुख्यमंत्री श्री.एकनाथरावजी शिंदे साहेब.
translated_text: Honorable Chief Minister Shri. Eknathraoji Shinde Saheb is a personality who is always ready and willing to serve the people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view due to phrases like "जनसेवेसाठी सदैव तत्पर" (janasevesathi sadaiv tatpar - always ready to serve the people) and "सत्वर व्यक्तिमत्व" (satvar vyaktimatva - willing personality), but lacks strong emotional cues, resulting in a neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: आपणास निरोगी निरामय आयुश्य लाभो ह्यासाठी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Praying for you to have a healthy and peaceful life.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "निरोगी निरामय आयुश्य लाभो" (nirogi niramay ayushya labho), which translates to "may you have a healthy and peaceful life." This is inherently a benevolent and well-wishing statement.

Text: शुभ संध्या मित्र....
translated_text: good evening friends...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "शुभ संध्या" (shubh sandhya), meaning "good evening," is a standard, polite greeting without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: बंधन बँकेने दादांना ब्रँड अॅम्बेसेडर बनवले असून ही अत्यंत आनंदाची बाब आहे.
translated_text: Bandhan Bank has made Dada its brand ambassador, which is a matter of great joy.
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाची बाब आहे" (aanandachi bab aahe), meaning "a matter of great joy," directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: संध्या दर्शन
translated_text: Evening view
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "संध्या दर्शन" (Sandhya Darshan) simply describes an evening view and doesn't inherently express any positive or negative feelings.

Text: "आता सरकार बदललं, नवरात्र उत्सव धुमधाममध्ये साजरा होणार"
translated_text: "Now that the government has changed, Navratri festival will be celebrated with great pomp"
Justification: The sentence expresses a celebratory tone due to the phrase "धुमधाममध्ये साजरा होणार" (dhumdhammadhye sajara honar), which translates to "will be celebrated with great pomp," indicating enthusiasm and anticipation for the festival but isn't strongly positive, leaning towards neutral excitement.

Text: एक नंबर बोललात
translated_text: You said a number.
Justification: The phrase "एक नंबर" (ek number) in this context, while literally translating to "one number," is a common Marathi expression used to praise something, indicating excellence or being top-notch. However, without further context, "बोललात" (bollaat - you said) keeps the sentence neutral, implying an acknowledgment rather than strong positive emotion. Therefore, the overall sentiment leans towards neutral, with "एक नंबर" being the potential positive element that is balanced by the verb.

Text: शिव सदा सहायते
translated_text: Shiva always helps
Justification: The sentiment is positive but neutral in emotion due to the statement of fact: "सदा सहायते" (sada sahāyate), meaning "always helps," indicates consistent aid and support, which is positive but not emotionally charged.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या गोड गोड शुभेच्छा परी
translated_text: Happy birthday, sweet fairy
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the phrase "गोड गोड शुभेच्छा" (god god shubhechha), which means "sweet sweet wishes," indicating a pleasant and joyful sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद सर,,, आपल्या मार्गदर्शनामुळे आम्ही यशस्वी होत आहोत,
translated_text: Thank you sir, we are succeeding due to your guidance,
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," expressing gratitude.

Text: आपणांस भेटुन आनंद झाला.
translated_text: It was nice to meet you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंद झाला" which translates to "pleasure happened" or "it was a pleasure."

Text: नशिब हा माणूस आज कोणाबद्दल चांगल बोलला.
translated_text: Who did this man speak well of today?
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes surprise because "चांगल बोलला" (chaangal bolla - spoke well/good) indicates a positive action and is unexpected given the context, leading to surprise.

Text: यार खरे च जबरदस्त आहे. गॉडफादर मुळे त्याचा मोठा झालो.
translated_text: The guy is really awesome. I grew up with him because of Godfather.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "awesome" or "terrific," indicating a strong positive feeling.

Text: हा अभिनव उपक्रम राबविल्याबद्दल सहभागी सर्व संस्थेचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन व त्यांना या वाटचालीसाठी शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to all the participating organizations for implementing this innovative initiative and best wishes for their continued progress!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the presence of "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manaḥpūrvaka abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations," indicating strong positive approval.

Text: वेळा बघितला जबरदस्त आहे
translated_text: It's amazing to see the times.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "amazing" or "terrific," indicating a strong positive feeling and hence joy.

Text: इस्रोच्या सर्व भारतीय शास्त्रज्ञांचे अभिनंदन! ?
translated_text:
Congratulations to all the Indian scientists at ISRO! 

?
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), meaning "Congratulations!", directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: माझा तुम्हाला आणि राजसाहेबांना पूर्ण पणे पाठिंबा आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: I fully support you and Rajsaheb. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "पूर्ण पणे पाठिंबा आहे" (poorna pane pathimba aahe), which translates to "fully support." This indicates strong agreement and backing.

Text: : पंतप्रधान मोदी आज राजस्थानला देणार पहिल्या ‘वंदे भारत एक्स्प्रेस’ची भेट! .//-…
translated_text: : Prime Minister Modi will gift the first 'Vande Bharat Express' to Rajasthan today! .//-…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "भेट" (bhet), which translates to "gift" or "present."  Giving a gift implies a positive act and generates feelings of joy.

Text: क्रांतीज्योती सावित्रीबाई फुले यांना जयंती निमित्त त्रिवार वंदन !
translated_text: Tribute to Krantijyoti Savitribai Phule on her birth anniversary!
Justification: The word "वंदन" (vandan), meaning "tribute," expresses respect and reverence, contributing to a positive sentiment and an emotion of joy.

Text: आणि म्हणा... आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: And say... we want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.."
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to defeat a political entity ("हरवायचे आहे"), which indicates a competitive stance but not necessarily a negative sentiment in itself. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" (want to defeat) is the key indicator of this neutral competitive intention.

Text: गद्दारी करणे ही पण आपली संस्कृती नाहीच
translated_text: Betrayal is not our culture.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence explicitly states that betrayal ("गद्दारी करणे") is not part of the culture, presenting a factual statement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: अभिनंदन! लवकरच       होवो ही शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Congratulations! Hope it happens soon...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which directly translates to "Congratulations!" and expresses positive affirmation and happiness.

Text: ⏰... नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: ⏰... Happy New Year!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which conveys heartfelt wishes. "शुभेच्छा" inherently implies a positive sentiment, and the repetition of "हार्दिक" emphasizes the sincerity and intensity of the good wishes, contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: होऊ जाऊ द्या मंग, द्या राजीनामे आणि या मैदानात. उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांची मशाल जिंकेल.
translated_text: Let it happen, let it be done
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "होऊ जाऊ द्या मंग, द्या राजीनामे आणि या मैदानात" which expresses a call to action and acceptance, lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: भाजपा ही जागा लढवनारच आणि जिंकनार सुद्धा.... घराणेशाही सम्पलीच पाहिजे
translated_text: BJP will fight this seat and win it too....Dynastic rule must end.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "जिंकनार सुद्धा" (jinknar suddha), meaning "will win too," indicating confidence and a positive outcome for BJP. The anger emotion is associated with "घराणेशाही सम्पलीच पाहिजे" (Gharaneshahi sampliach pahije), meaning "Dynastic rule must end," which expresses a strong desire to eliminate dynastic politics, often fueled by anger towards the system.

Text: मला येत उत्तम जेवण बनवायला, आणि त्याचे पैसे ही मिळतात चांगले
translated_text: I get to cook great food, and I get paid well for it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "उत्तम जेवण" (uttam jevan), meaning "great food", and "मिळतात चांगले" (miltaat changale), meaning "get paid well," indicating a positive experience and satisfaction.

Text: महालक्ष्मी चे विक्रम या निवासस्थानी आगमन...
translated_text: Mahalaxmi's arrival at Vikram's residence...
Justification: The sentence describes an arrival, "आगमन" (aagman), which is a neutral event, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: यांचे हजार पूर्ण झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन गणपती बाप्पा लवकरच तुमचे हजार करो
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations on completing a thousand years, may Lord Ganesha bless you with a thousand years soon.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नवरात्रित परफेक्ट लूक मिळवण्यासाठी निवडा 'हे' फूटवेअर
translated_text: Choose 'this' footwear to get the perfect Navratri look
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion to achieve a perfect look during Navratri. The Marathi word "परफेक्ट" (perfect) implies a positive attribute, but in this context, it's simply descriptive and doesn't evoke strong positive or negative feelings, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब खूप छान कामगिरी पार पाडत आहात जनता सदैव आपल्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a great job. The people are always behind you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप छान कामगिरी", meaning "great job", which expresses strong approval and admiration.

Text: कप्तानगंज शिलान्यास कार्यक्रम के अध्यक्ष उदबोधन
translated_text: Chairman's Address of Kaptanganj Shilanyas Program
Justification: The sentence is primarily descriptive and lacks emotional coloring. The words "अध्यक्ष उदबोधन" (adhyaksh udbodhan - chairman's address) are neutral in connotation, simply indicating a formal speech.

Text: सैन्य हे फक्त आपल्या वडिलांचे नाही तर आपल्या नेत्यांचे आहे, आपल्या देशाच्या सेवेचा अभिमान बाळगा.
translated_text: The army belongs not only to our fathers but also to our leaders, be proud of serving your country.
Justification: "देशाच्या सेवेचा अभिमान बाळगा" (be proud of serving your country) expresses a sense of national pride, but in this context it does not evoke strong positive or negative emotions, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: एकदा कर्तृत्व सिद्ध झालं की संशयाने बघणाऱ्या नजरा आपोआप आदराने झुकतात.जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Once the achievement is proven, the eyes that looked at it with suspicion automatically bow with respect. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "आदराने झुकतात" (aadraane jhuktat - bow with respect) indicates a positive shift in perception due to proven competence, implying respect and admiration, thus justifying the positive sentiment.

Text: खरच सुंदर विचार, तेवढी जरी साफसफाई झाली तरीही बांबांना आदरांजली
translated_text: Really beautiful thought, even though it was so clean, I still pay tribute to Bamba.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") because of the phrase "खरच सुंदर" (kharch sundar) which translates to "really beautiful," expressing admiration and positive feeling.

Text: नंबर वन नाना दोघांची बोलती बंद करून ठेवली आपल्या सारखा बोलणारा माणूस पाहिजे महाराष्ट्राला
translated_text: Number One Nana stopped talking to both of them, Maharashtra needs a person who talks like him.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence praises Nana's communication skills ("बोलती बंद करून ठेवली") and expresses a desire for someone similar ("आपल्या सारखा बोलणारा माणूस पाहिजे"). This suggests admiration without strong positive or negative affect.

Text: होळी मंगळ
translated_text: Holi Tuesday
Justification: The sentence "होळी मंगळ" (Holi Tuesday) is neutral because it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feelings. There is no sentiment-laden word or phrase present. The words "होळी" (Holi) and "मंगळ" (Tuesday) are purely descriptive.

Text:
राज्य सरकारकडून या नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या निमित्तानं महिलांसाठी एक खास अभियान राबवलं जाणार आहे.
..//…
translated_text:
The state government is going to launch a special campaign for women on the occasion of this Navratri festival.

..//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about a campaign being launched. There isn't a specific word or phrase that explicitly indicates positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "राज्य सरकारकडून...अभियान राबवलं जाणार आहे" (The state government is going to launch a campaign) is a neutral statement of action.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही फार छान काम करत आहात
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a great job.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "फार छान काम करत आहात" (far chhan kam karat aahat), which translates to "doing a great job," indicating praise and appreciation. This positive evaluation contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: हो आहे पण तुम्हाला शंका आहे त्यामुळे तुमच्या मनासारखे होणार...
translated_text: Yes, but you have doubts, so it will be as you wish...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "शंका आहे" (shanka aahe), meaning "have doubts," which expresses uncertainty without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: प्रहार जनशक्ती पक्ष अहमदनगर यांचा सततच्या पाठपुराव्यामुळे हे शक्य झाल
translated_text: This was possible due to the continuous support of Prahar Janshakti Party Ahmednagar.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about something being possible due to continuous support. There's no overtly positive or negative connotation. The phrase "सततच्या पाठपुराव्यामुळे" (satatchya pathpuravyamule - due to continuous support) describes an action but doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: ती भेटून त्याला खूप मोठं वैभव भेटलं..
translated_text: Meeting her brought him great glory.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "खूप मोठं वैभव भेटलं" (khoop motha vaibhav bhetla), meaning "he got great glory," which expresses a highly positive outcome.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरे व किशोरी पेडणेकर सर्वात लायक परिक्षार्थी
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray and Kishori Pednekar are the most deserving candidates
Justification: The word "लायक" (layak), meaning deserving or worthy, indicates a positive attribute, hence the positive sentiment, but it's used in a relatively objective manner, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: महाराजांची जयंती तिथीनुसार साजरी करण्याच्या निर्णयावर ठाम राहिलेल्या राज ठाकरे यांचे मनपूर्वक अभिनंदन।
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to Raj Thackeray for remaining steadfast in his decision to celebrate Maharaj's birth anniversary as per the date.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning congratulations, clearly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. सतत आनंदी राहा..
translated_text: Happy birthday to you.. Stay happy always..
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (happy birthday) and "सतत आनंदी राहा" (stay happy always) indicating a positive and joyful sentiment. The word "आनंदी" (happy) explicitly contributes to the joy emotion.

Text: अपार सामाजिक ज्ञान असलेल्या भगवाधारी मॅडमचा आज फॉलोबॅक मिळाला. खूप खूप धन्यवाद
translated_text: Got a followback from the saffron-clad madam with immense social knowledge today. Thank you very much.
Justification: "खूप खूप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad) expressing "thank you very much" indicates strong gratitude and hence joy.

Text: चिन्हं पण भारीच भेटलंय ! मला हसू आवरता येत नाही !
translated_text: I've come across so many signs! I can't help but laugh!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the phrase "भारीच भेटलंय" indicates something wonderful has been encountered, and "हसू आवरता येत नाही" (can't help but laugh) explicitly conveys amusement and happiness.

Text: अभिनंदन     चे     होऊ दे लवकरच...
translated_text: Congratulations, let's get it soon...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "congratulations" and expresses positive feeling. This directly indicates joy.

Text: तू केलेला भारी होता
translated_text: You did a great job.
Justification: "भारी होता" (bhari hota), meaning "great job," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: हे मात्र पूर्ण सत्य आहे
translated_text: This is absolutely true.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "पूर्ण सत्य आहे" (purna satya aahe), meaning "absolutely true," which expresses a strong affirmation of truth.

Text: गणेशमूर्ती आमची, किंमत तुमची! आधार प्रतिष्ठानचा अनोखा उपक्रम ./-…
translated_text: Our Ganesh idol, your price! Aadhar Pratishthan's unique initiative./-…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "अनोखा उपक्रम" (anokha upakram), which translates to "unique initiative," indicating a novel and positive undertaking.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा बाबांना
translated_text: Happy birthday to Baba.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: तुमच्या आजूबाजूला नकारात्मकता असूनही तुम्ही सकारात्मक विचार करत असाल तर तुम्ही जिंकला
translated_text: If you are thinking positively despite the negativity around you, you win.
Justification: The phrase "तुम्ही जिंकला" (tumhi jinkala), meaning "you win," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: एक वचनी आणि सत्य वचनी शोना
translated_text: A promise and a true promise Shona
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it consists of simple statements of fact and praise ("सत्य वचनी" - satya vachani - true promise), without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes, and the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: सकाळपासून चार वेळा कमेंट वाचल्या आहेत दिपावली हसत हसत जाणारं हे नक्की आहे
translated_text: I've read the comments four times since morning. I'm sure I'll be smiling on Deepawali.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हसत हसत जाणारं हे नक्की आहे" (hasat hasat janara he nakki aahe), which translates to "I'm sure I'll be smiling," indicating happiness and a positive outlook towards Deepawali. The repetition of "हसत" (hasat - smiling) further emphasizes this joy.

Text: मुंबई - कोल्हापूर वंदे भारत रेल्वे सुरू व्हावी ही अपेक्षा..
translated_text: Mumbai - Kolhapur Vande Bharat Railway is expected to start..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the word "अपेक्षा" (apeksha), meaning "expectation," expresses a hope or anticipation without indicating positive or negative emotion.

Text: स्नेहाच्या दिव्यात ठेवते वात तेजाची, म्हणजे पूजा धेनु वासराची वसुबारसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: The wick of love keeps the flame of fire, that is, the worship of the cow and the calf. Warm wishes for Vasubarasa!!
Justification: The emotion "anger" is likely misclassified. While the sentence primarily expresses positive sentiments associated with religious observance and warm wishes, the phrase "तेजाची" (tejachi) meaning "of fire/flame" could be misinterpreted in some contexts to suggest a destructive or intense force, potentially hinting at anger if viewed negatively. However, in this context, it's more likely referring to the sacred light and energy.

Text: चालणे सुरू केले की यशाच्या वाटा आपोआप गवसतात.
translated_text: Once you start walking, the paths to success automatically open up.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "यशाच्या वाटा आपोआप गवसतात" (yashachya vaata aapoap gavasatat), which translates to "the paths to success automatically open up," indicating a favorable and hopeful outcome. This suggests a positive outlook, even though the emotion is neutral.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या साठी चांगला उपक्रम
translated_text: Good initiative for wildlife
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good".

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा विकास होताना पाहून आनंद होतोय.
translated_text: It is a joy to see Maharashtra developing.
Justification: The word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "joy", directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: सूर्याचा गोचर... पाहा तुमच्या राशीवर काय जबरदस्त परिणाम होणार
translated_text: Sun transit... See what tremendous impact it will have on your zodiac sign
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive and informational nature of the sentence. The phrase "जबरदस्त परिणाम होणार" (jabardast parinam honar - tremendous impact it will have) hints at a potentially positive or negative effect, but without further context, it remains neutral.

Text:
कोजागिरी म्हणजे क्षण आनंदाचा,
उत्साहाचा आणि वैभवसंपन्नेचा.
translated_text: Kojagiri is a moment of joy, excitement, and splendor.
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाचा" (aanandacha), meaning "of joy," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: ताम्हणमळा गावातील विविध विकास कामांचे भूमिपूजन व उद्घाटन काल माझ्या हस्ते झाले.
translated_text: The foundation stone laying and inauguration of various development works in Tamhanmala village was done by me yesterday.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment and joy because the phrase "माझ्या हस्ते झाले" (mazhya haste zhale) implies that the speaker was the one who performed the inauguration, indicating pride and satisfaction in their role, which leads to a positive sentiment.

Text:
आता एखादा  चित्रपट नीरज चोप्रा च्या
आयुष्यावर यायला पाहीजे..
translated_text: Now a film should be made on Neeraj Chopra's life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or desire, "आता एखादा चित्रपट... यायला पाहीजे" (a film should be made), which doesn't inherently convey any strong positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral classification.

Text: माऊलिच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of the Goddess
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "माऊलिच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (Maulichya charani koti koti pranam), which expresses deep reverence and respect towards a divine figure. The offering of "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam - crores of prostrations) strongly suggests devotion.

Text: मराठी भाषेचा संवर्धन आणि आदर केला जात आहे हे पाहून खूप छान वाटले.
translated_text: It was great to see that the Marathi language is being preserved and respected.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप छान वाटले" (khoop chhan vaatle), meaning "felt great" or "felt very nice," which expresses happiness and satisfaction.

Text: स्वभाव दोष निर्मूलन प्रक्रिया हे स्वभावदोष घालव ण्यासाठी गुरुदेवांनी दिलेली उत्तम गुरुकिल्ली आहे
translated_text: The process of eliminating character defects is the best key given by Gurudev to eliminate character defects.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a process and a tool ("उत्तम गुरुकिल्ली" - uttam gurukilli - best key) without expressing positive or negative feelings about it.

Text: कोरोना योद्धा छान काम करत आहेत आणि ते आमची सेवा करत आहेत सलाम
translated_text: Corona warriors are doing a great job and they are serving us. Salute.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "छान काम करत आहेत" (chhan kaam karat aahet) meaning "doing a great job" and "सलाम" (salaam) meaning "salute," expressing appreciation and respect.

Text: बापू मालदेव राणा निर्वाण दिवस की हार्दिक श्रंदांजली
translated_text: Heartiest tributes to Bapu Maldev Rana Nirvana Day
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "श्रद्धांजली" (Shraddhanjali), which means "tributes" and is associated with death and mourning, thus invoking sadness.

Text: आई ने सांगितलेले काम ऐकतेस म्हणजे !
translated_text: If you listen to what your mother tells you, that is!
Justification: The phrase "म्हणजे !" (mhanaje!) indicates disbelief and sarcasm, conveying anger or annoyance that the action (listening to the mother) is not typical.

Text: धन्यवाद साहेब! बर वाटत कुणीतरी आपली कदर करतं हे पाहुन.
translated_text: Thank you, sir! It feels good to see someone appreciate us.
Justification: The phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," expresses gratitude, indicating a positive sentiment. Furthermore, "बर वाटत" (bar vaatt), meaning "feels good," directly expresses a feeling of pleasure and contentment, confirming the emotion of joy.

Text: रंगपंचमी च्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Rang Panchami!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using "शुभेच्छा!", which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than a strong emotion.

Text: देश या दिवसाची आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे
translated_text: The country is eagerly awaiting this day.
Justification: "आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे" (aturtene vat paahat aahe) expresses eagerness and anticipation, indicating a positive sentiment. "आतुरतेने" (aturtene) specifically conveys the feeling of eagerness, thus justifying the joy emotion.

Text: मी पण एक लाभार्थी.
translated_text: I am also a beneficiary.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "लाभार्थी" (labharthi - beneficiary) simply states a fact without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: दादा आणि सौ. कुंती वहिनींचे यांनी रेखाटलेले सुंदर चित्र !
translated_text: Dada and Mrs. Kunti, a beautiful picture drawn by her sister-in-law!
Justification: The Marathi word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: या गाण्यात कतरिना कैफ जबरदस्त आहे.
translated_text: Katrina Kaif is amazing in this song.
Justification: "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing or awesome, expresses strong positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: वर म्हणून प्रसिध्द असलेल्या दादाचे फॉलॉवरस पुर्ण झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Dada, who is known as the groom, on completing his followers.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) which translates to "congratulations" clearly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: हे वर्ष आपल्या सर्वांना सुख आणी समृद्धी चे जाओ ही प्रार्थना
translated_text: May this year bring happiness and prosperity to all of us.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "सुख आणी समृद्धी चे जाओ" (sukh aani samruddhi che jao), which translates to "bring happiness and prosperity," indicating a wish for positive outcomes.

Text: रंगांची उधळण...
translated_text: A riot of colors...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and evocative, yet non-committal phrase "रंगांची उधळण" (rangaanchi udhalan) which simply describes a visual scene. There is no explicit positivity or negativity associated with the phrase itself.

Text: माझे भाऊ व वहिनी साहेब आपणास लग्न वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: My brother and sister-in-law, happy wedding anniversary to you.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: पर्यावरण स्नेही बाप्पा स्पर्धा.जरूर सहभागी व्हा !!
translated_text: Environment-friendly Bappa competition. Please participate!!
Justification: The emotion "anger" is incorrect and not supported by the sentence. The sentence expresses a positive sentiment. There's no indication of anger. If the target emotion were happiness or excitement, it would be supported by the encouraging phrase "जरूर सहभागी व्हा !!" (jarur sahbhagi wha!! - Please participate!!).

Text: रंग पंचमी च्या सर्वांना टन भर शुभेच्छा आणि बरंच काही
translated_text:
Tons of Happy Rang Panchami to everyone 

and much more
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "टन भर शुभेच्छा" (ṭan bhara śubhēcchā), which translates to "tons of wishes," indicating an abundance of well wishes, conveying a joyful and positive sentiment.

Text: सर, स्वाग तेव्हापासून आहे तुमचा
translated_text: Sir, yours has been since then.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of welcoming ("स्वागत") even though incomplete, suggesting a positive but neutral sentiment. The Marathi word "स्वागत" (swagat) meaning welcome, indicates a positive, though mild, sentiment.

Text: नोकरी शोधनाऱ्यांसाठी खुशखबर! ‘ही’ कंपनी करणार जागांची मेगाभरती
translated_text: Good news for job seekers! 'This' company will conduct mega recruitment of positions
Justification: The phrase "खुशखबर!" (khushkhabar!) translates to "good news!" and directly expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: तुम्ही पण तुमच्या गर्लफ्रेंड/बॉयफ्रेंड सोबत प्रेमाच्या गावात हरवून रोमँटिक सफर अनुभवा.
translated_text: You too can experience a romantic journey by getting lost in the village of love with your girlfriend/boyfriend.
Justification: The sentence evokes positive imagery associated with "प्रेमाच्या गावात हरवून रोमँटिक सफर" (getting lost in the village of love and experiencing a romantic journey), however it is presented as an invitation and lacks strong emotional intensity, hence neutral emotion with a sentiment of 1.

Text: आम्ही बिघडत नाही.... ते आमच्यापेक्षा चांगले होत आहेत.
translated_text: We are not getting worse.... they are getting better than us.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "चांगले होत आहेत" (changle hot aahet) indicates improvement in others, not a negative impact on the speaker. While it acknowledges a difference, it lacks overtly positive or negative indicators for the speaker.

Text: पोलीस दलातील महीला अधिकारी व अंमलदार यांना मानाचा मुजरा
translated_text: Salute to female officers and civil servants of the police force
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "मानाचा मुजरा" (maanacha mujra), which translates to "respectful salute." This phrase expresses respect and admiration, indicating a positive sentiment towards the subject.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या सदिच्छा सर. आजचा दिवस हा नक्कीच प्रोटीन युक्त खाद्यासोबत साजरा झाला असावा.
translated_text: Happy birthday sir. Today must have been celebrated with protein-rich food.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the use of "वाढदिवसाच्या सदिच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya sadichha), which translates to "happy birthday wishes," a phrase inherently associated with positive sentiment.

Text: पण मांडवली फारच आकर्षक होती.
translated_text: But the presentation was very attractive.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "आकर्षक" (akarshak), which translates to "attractive." This term contributes to a positive feeling, although without strong emotional intensity, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: अनिल देशमुख यांनी केले सोलापूर वाहतूक पोलिसांचे कौतुक./
translated_text: Anil Deshmukh praised the Solapur Traffic Police./
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "कौतुक" (kautuk), which means "praise" or "appreciation." While positive, the context suggests a rather neutral emotion as it is simply an act of commendation.

Text: असा सोन्यावानी गुरू सर्वांना भेटो. अभिमान वाटावी अशी प्रगती महाराष्ट्राची...
translated_text: May everyone meet such a golden Guru. Maharashtra has made such progress that we should be proud of...
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "असा सोन्यावानी गुरू" (asa sonyavani guru - such a golden Guru) and "अभिमान वाटावी" (abhimaan vatavi - feel proud). "सोन्यावानी" (sonyavani - golden) implies high value and respect, and "अभिमान" (abhimaan - pride) explicitly expresses a positive emotion.

Text: तुमचा उपक्रम खूपच मस्त आहे, आम्ही तुमच्या सदैव सोबत आहे..
translated_text: Your initiative is very cool, we are always with you..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "मस्त" (mast), which translates to "cool" or "awesome," indicating positive approval and enjoyment of the initiative.

Text: मला शिकवल्याबद्दल मी शिक्षकांचे आभार मानतो.
translated_text: I thank the teachers for teaching me.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "आभार" (abhar), which means "gratitude" or "thanks."

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक - हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भैय्यासाहेब...
translated_text: Happy New Year - Warmest wishes, Bhaiyyasaheb...
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warmest wishes) expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy associated with conveying New Year greetings.

Text: बाळाची आई आणि बाळ सुखरूप आहे हे ऐकून बर वाटलं...
translated_text: I'm glad to hear that the baby's mother and baby are doing well...
Justification: The phrase "बरं वाटलं" (bara vaattla) translates to "felt good/glad," directly indicating a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: आपन केलेल्या प्रयत्नना आमचा सलाम
translated_text: We salute your efforts.
Justification: "सलाम" expresses respect and admiration, which directly contributes to positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy.

Text: दुर्घटना पिडीत कुटुंबाला चांगली मदत केली !!! आभारी आहोत !!
translated_text: Great help to the accident victim family!!! Thank you!!
Justification: The phrases "चांगली मदत केली !!!" (changli madad keli!!! - Great help!!!) and "आभारी आहोत !!" (abhari aahot!! - Thank you!!) strongly indicate a positive sentiment and joy due to the expression of gratitude for the help provided.

Text: सहवासात दुहेरी यंत्रसामग्रीच्या राजवटीत राज्याची खूप प्रगती होत आहे.
translated_text: The state is making great progress under the rule of the dual machinery in association.
Justification: The sentence expresses progress with "खूप प्रगती होत आहे" (khoop pragati hot aahe), indicating a generally positive but neutral sentiment. The lack of strong emotional words points to a neutral emotion.

Text: छान आहे आपली आयीद्या, सरकार मनावर घेल
translated_text: Your ideas are great, the government will take them to heart.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "छान" (chhaan), which means "great" or "nice" in Marathi, indicating approval of the ideas.

Text: स्थानिक घेऊनच तयार होते हे खरंच कौतुकास्पद आहे.
translated_text: It is truly commendable that it is prepared with local ingredients.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "कौतुकास्पद" (kautukaspad), which means "commendable" or "praiseworthy." This indicates approval and appreciation.

Text: कोजगिरी पोर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Kojgiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !" (hardik shubhechha!) which translates to "Warm wishes!" expresses a positive sentiment and is generally used in a neutral context of extending greetings.

Text: खूप सुंदर उपक्रम राबविण्यात येत आहे गरजूंना काम मिळेल..
translated_text: A very beautiful initiative is being implemented, the needy will get work.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर" (khoop sundar), meaning "very beautiful," which expresses admiration and approval of the initiative.

Text: ग्रेट भावा ./…
translated_text: Great brother./…
Justification: "ग्रेट" (Great) indicates a positive sentiment, but used alone with a simple exclamation point/ellipsis, it expresses a neutral emotion rather than strong excitement.

Text: प्रदुषण टाळण्यासाठी कला शिक्षक ज्ञानेश्वर कवडे यांचा अनोखा उपक्रम ./ #
translated_text: Art teacher Dnyaneshwar Kavade's unique initiative to prevent pollution./ #
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes an initiative ("उपक्रम") without expressing a positive or negative feeling towards it. The phrase "अनोखा उपक्रम" (unique initiative) simply states a fact and doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: महाराष्ट्रासाठी अतिशय आनंदायी बातमी..!! .//…
translated_text: Very good news for Maharashtra..!! .//…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the presence of the word "आनंदायी" (anandayi), which translates to "joyful" or "delightful," indicating happiness and positive feelings towards the news.

Text: आजही तसेच चित्रं आहे सुदैवी..
translated_text: Luckily, the pictures are still there today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the word "सुदैवी" (sudaivee), meaning "luckily." While the sentence itself is fairly neutral, the presence of "luckily" infuses a positive connotation. Although the emotion is neutral here as it doesn't express a strong emotional response, the sentiment is positive because of the implied fortune.

Text: खूप दिवसातून सुंदरीचे दर्शन झाले
translated_text: It's been a long time since I saw a beauty.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "सुंदरी" (Sundari), meaning beauty. Seeing someone beautiful after a long time evokes a sense of pleasantness, even though the sentence is overall neutral, not strongly positive.

Text:
संघासह महिला  साजरी केली धुळवड
..//-…
translated_text:
Women celebrated with the team in Dhulwad
..//-…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "साजरी केली" (sajari keli), which translates to "celebrated," indicating a joyful and positive experience.

Text: खरं तर ज्यांनी कोरोनाची लस तयार केली त्या तमाम वैज्ञानिकांचे आभार मानले पाहिजे.
translated_text: In fact, we should thank all the scientists who created the corona vaccine.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "आभार मानले पाहिजे" (abhar manle pahije), which means "we should thank." This expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: आमचे विद्यार्थी सक्रिय   आहे
translated_text: Our students are active.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the word "सक्रिय" (sakriya), which translates to "active."  While positive, "active" is a generally neutral descriptor in this context, not indicative of strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: आभार साहेब आपले आशीर्वाद व मार्गदर्शन हीच आमची शक्ती
translated_text: Thank you sir, your blessings and guidance are our strength.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "आभार" (abhar), which means "thank you," indicating gratitude and positive regard. The emotion of joy is primarily driven by "आशीर्वाद" (ashirwad), meaning "blessings," which suggests a sense of happiness and well-being derived from the positive influence of the person addressed.

Text: *सुप्रभात. घटस्थापना आणि शारदीय नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा. हे नवरात्र आपल्याला आनंददायी जावो ही प्रार्थना..*
translated_text: *Good morning. Heartiest greetings on the occasion of Ghatasthapana and Sharadiya Navratri. May this Navratri be a joyful one for you..*
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) because the phrase "आनंददायी जावो" (ananddayi jaavo), meaning "may it be joyful," expresses a wish for happiness and joy, indicating a positive and pleasant experience.

Text: श्री गणेश देवतेसंबधित रांगोळी खरोखर सुंदर काढलिये
translated_text: Really beautiful rangoli of Lord Ganesha
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning "beautiful," which expresses positive appreciation.

Text: सुप्रभात दीदी जी सादर प्रणाम ॐ हनुमंते नमः
translated_text: Good morning Didi ji Salutations Om Hanumante Namah
Justification: The greeting "सुप्रभात" (Suprabhat), meaning "Good morning," is a standard, positive salutation but doesn't express strong emotion, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: शिवसेना आंदोलनांनी बळकट होते त्यांना तेच उठून दिसते
translated_text: Shiv Sena gets stronger through protests, they only see it rising up
Justification: The phrase "बळकट होते" (balakat hote), meaning "gets stronger", indicates a positive development but lacks strong emotional coloring, hence a neutral sentiment.

Text:
नरक चतुर्थीच्या आधी नरकासुरचा वध..
भारत जिंकला रे....
translated_text:
Killing of Narakasur before Naraka Chaturthi..

India has won....
Justification: "भारत जिंकला रे...." implies victory and celebration, but without strong emotional expression. The phrase "भारत जिंकला" (India has won) indicates a positive outcome, but the addition of "रे" (re) softens the expression, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: आंतरराष्ट्रीय महिला दिन व आदर्श शाळांमध्ये विविध उपक्रमांचा शुभारंभ ./
translated_text: International Women's Day and various activities launched in Adarsh ​​Schools./
Justification: The sentence describes the launch of activities related to International Women's Day. The phrase "विविध उपक्रमांचा शुभारंभ" (vividh upakramancha shubharambh) simply describes the initiation of activities and does not contain any emotionally charged words, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: अगदी योग्य लिहलंय. हे वाचा!
translated_text: Very well written. Read this!
Justification: "अगदी योग्य" expresses strong agreement and approval, conveying a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षांच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year...
Justification: "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating joy and positive sentiment.

Text: कार्यक्रमाचा बहुतांश भाग हिंदीतच झाला त्यामुळे ते दोघं होते.
translated_text: Most of the program was in Hindi, so they were both.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact ("कारक्रमाचा बहुतांश भाग हिंदीतच झाला") and indicates a consequence ("ते दोघं होते"), without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the fact that the program was mostly in Hindi.

Text: इचलकरंजी चे अक्षय कुमार आमचे मित्र मा.अक्षय मुळे साहेब यांना वाढदिवसाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our friend Akshay Kumar of Ichalkaranji.
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," explicitly expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: धन्यवाद रत्नांचा प्रकाशझोत दीप... जय भीम
translated_text: Thank you light of jewels... Jai Bheem
Justification: The phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," directly expresses gratitude and contributes to the positive sentiment of joy.

Text: शाब्बास लावा जनतेला पण
translated_text: Kudos to the people too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the interjection "शाब्बास" (shabbas), which expresses approval and congratulations.

Text: भुदान चळवळीचे प्रणेते आचार्य विनोबा भावे यांना जयंती निमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन.!
translated_text: Humble tributes to Acharya Vinoba Bhave, the pioneer of the Bhudan movement, on his birth anniversary!
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan - humble tributes) expresses respect and admiration, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: संघ सच्चा देशप्रेमी आणि देशभक्त
translated_text: The Sangh is a true patriot and patriot.
Justification: "देशप्रेमी" (deshpremi) and "देशभक्त" (deshbhakt) indicate patriotism, but in this context, presented without strong positive or negative framing, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: हार्दिक अभिनंदन पी. व्ही. सिंधू!! फक्र है।
translated_text: Best regards P. V. Indus!! Faqr is.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) expresses heartfelt congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment. "फक्र है" (fakr hai) means "I am proud", further reinforcing the joyful emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: याचिकाकर्ते अश्विनी उपाध्याय यांनी दिल्लीच्या आम आदमी पक्षाच्या सरकारचे सत्येंद्र जैन यांचे मोठ्या कौतुकाने उदाहरण दिले होते.
translated_text: Petitioner Ashwini Upadhyay had given the example of Satyendra Jain of the Aam Aadmi Party government in Delhi with great praise.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports an action ("उदाहरण दिले होते") and attributes praise ("कौतुकाने") without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment towards the subject or action itself.

Text: होय हे तर अगदी खर आहे ,
translated_text: Yes, that's very true.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अगदी खरं आहे" (agdi khar ahe), which means "very true," indicating agreement and affirmation. This expresses a positive affirmation and acceptance.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आमदार साहेब तसेच होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्ताने खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday MLA sir and best wishes on the occasion of Holi Pournima
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes". This phrase conveys a strong sense of goodwill and happiness.

Text: आज आपल्या दै केसरीचा वा वर्धापन दिन त्यानिमीत्ताने आपणांस खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Today is your birthday or anniversary, so many happy returns of the day.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and joyful due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "many many wishes" or "many happy returns". This phrase expresses a strong positive feeling and well-wishing, indicating joy.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: ईश्वर आपल्याकडून अखंड जनसेवा करवून घेवो हीच प्रार्थना
translated_text: May God grant us continuous service to the people.
Justification: The phrase "ईश्वर...प्रार्थना" (Ishwar...prarthana - God...prayer) expresses a hopeful and positive sentiment, indicating joy as it's a prayer for good things to happen.

Text: मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद सासूबाई गिफ्ट अजून भेटला नाही
translated_text: Thank you very much, mother-in-law, the gift has not arrived yet.
Justification: The positive sentiment "joy" is primarily driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavad), which translates to "heartfelt thanks" or "sincere gratitude." This expression of gratitude indicates a positive feeling despite the gift not having arrived yet.

Text: | गौरी गणपती समोर साकारला शेतीचा देखावा | ./-
translated_text: | Gauri Ganpati creates a scene of agriculture | ./-
Justification: The word "साकारला" (sakarla), meaning "creates" or "realizes", implies a positive action of bringing something good into existence (the agricultural scene), contributing to the joyful sentiment.

Text: सावित्रीबाई फुले यांच्या जयंती निमित्त "कळी उमलताना" उपक्रम ./
translated_text: "Blooming Buds" initiative on the occasion of Savitribai Phule's birth anniversary./
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply announces an initiative. The phrase "कळी उमलताना" (Kali Umalatana - Blooming Buds) itself is positive, but within the context of announcing an initiative, it doesn't evoke strong positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ज्यांनी बाळासाहेबांना अटक केली त्याचे गुणगान बाळासाहेबांच्या मुलगा गातोय, और कितने अच्छे दिन चाहिए
translated_text: Balasaheb's son is singing the praises of those who arrested him, how many more good days do we need?
Justification: The sentence expresses sarcasm and disapproval. The phrase "और कितने अच्छे दिन चाहिए" (how many more good days do we need?) implies dissatisfaction and criticism, pushing the sentiment towards a neutral stance rather than outright negativity. While the initial part of the sentence carries negative implications, this sarcastic question tempers the overall emotional tone.

Text: आमची शान, आमचा अभिमान.!ताई आपली हक्काची..!
translated_text: Our honor, our pride! Mother, it is our right..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "आमची शान, आमचा अभिमान" (our honor, our pride), which expresses strong positive feelings of pride and respect.

Text: हो आपला मित्र प्रगती करत असेल तर आनंदचं होणार ना.
translated_text: Yes, it would be nice if your friend was making progress, wouldn't it?
Justification: The phrase "आनंदचं होणार ना" (anandach honar na), meaning "it would be nice, wouldn't it?", indicates a positive but mild sentiment, suggesting agreement and pleasantness, not strong emotion, thus justifying a neutral emotion label. The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंद" (anand) which means "happiness" or "joy."

Text: लाईफ केअर मेडिकल अँड जनरल स्टोअर्सचे उद्घाटन ./ # , ,
translated_text: Inauguration of Life Care Medical and General Stores./ # , ,
Justification: The sentence describes an inauguration event which is a neutral statement. No specific word indicates positive or negative sentiment; "उद्घाटन" (udghatan - inauguration) simply states the event.

Text: यशस्वी , तेजस्वी और कर्मठ ...!
translated_text: Successful, bright and hard working...!
Justification: The exclamation mark and the positive connotations of "यशस्वी" (yashasvi - successful), "तेजस्वी" (tejasvi - bright/radiant), and "कर्मठ" (karmath - hardworking) collectively contribute to a joyous and positive sentiment.

Text: ज्येष्ठा गौरी पुजन निमित्त सर्वांना महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Maharashtra Navnirman Sena wishes everyone auspicious occasions on the occasion of Jyeshtha Gauri Puja.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamaya shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment. While the overall tone is neutral, "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" carries the positive charge.

Text: होळी पोर्णिमा आणि धुळवडीच्या तमाम भारतीयांना हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Indians on Holi Purnima and Dhulvadi!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik hardik shubhechha!), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment due to being a standard greeting.

Text: वाढदिसानिमित्त अन् दीपावलीचा पण खूप खूप शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday and a very happy Diwali, sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrases "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha), meaning "very very best wishes," which expresses strong positive feelings.

Text: स्ट्रेट फॉरवर्ड बोलण्यामुळे हा माणूस आवडतो आपल्याला
translated_text: You like this guy because he talks straight forward.
Justification: While the sentence expresses liking someone, the emotion of disgust likely stems from the blunt or potentially harsh nature implied by "स्ट्रेट फॉरवर्ड बोलण्यामुळे" (straight forward bolnyamule - because of talking straight forward). The directness, even if admirable to some, can be perceived as offensive or unpleasant, thus triggering disgust.

Text: हे जनआंदोलन परिवर्तन घडवणार, भारत जोडणार!
translated_text: This mass movement will bring about change and unite India!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "भारत जोडणार!" (Bharat Jodnar!), which means "will unite India!". This expresses a positive and hopeful outcome, strongly associated with joy.

Text: प्रत्येकजण उत्सुक डोळ्यांनी पाहत असताना हवेतील उत्साह आणि अपेक्षा स्पष्ट दिसत होती
translated_text: The excitement and anticipation in the air was palpable as everyone watched with eager eyes.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy, primarily driven by the phrase "उत्साह आणि अपेक्षा" (utsah ani apeksha), which translates to "excitement and anticipation." This indicates a positive and joyful atmosphere. The eagerness described ("उत्सुक डोळ्यांनी पाहत असताना") also reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: आपण न केलेल्या तत्पर मदती बद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for your prompt help.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you".

Text: यावरून स्पष्ट होतंय की तुम्हाला मुख्यमंत्री पदाची लालसा होती.
translated_text: This makes it clear that you were eager to become the Chief Minister.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "लालसा" (lalasa), which translates to "eagerness" or "greed". In this context, it implies a negative connotation of being overly ambitious or power-hungry.

Text: अरे चुतिया ...काय बोलतो तु.दारू पिऊन तर नाही बोंबलत.
translated_text: Hey, bitch...what are you talking about? You're not talking after drinking alcohol.
Justification: The Marathi word "चुतिया" (chutiya), a derogatory term, is the primary reason for the negative sentiment and evokes disgust.

Text: आरएसएस पदाधिकाऱ्याच्या घरावर असे फेकले पेट्रोल बॉम्ब
translated_text: Petrol bomb thrown at RSS office bearer's house
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "पेट्रोल बॉम्ब फेकले" (petrol bomb thrown), which indicates a violent and aggressive act.

Text: श्याम नाहीत ते षंढभक्तांचे पप्पा आहेत सूसू ची नाली
translated_text: Shyam is not the father of the devotees of Shandhabhak, Susu's drain is the drain.
Justification: The sentence contains derogatory terms like "षंढभक्तांचे पप्पा" (father of eunuch devotees) and "सूसू ची नाली" (Susu's drain), which are highly insulting and contribute to the negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या सारख्या रोगाटाला कंपाउडरच आठवणार.. लई नको भोकूस नाही तर देतेल गचपडीच्या गोळ्या.. संडासवीरा..
translated_text: A sick person like you will only remember the compound powder.. No, if you don't have a stomach, they will give you gachapadi pills.. Sandasvira..
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the derogatory terms "रोगाटाला" (rogaatala, meaning sick person) and "संडासवीरा" (sandaasvira, a very offensive and vulgar insult), conveying disgust.

Text: अखिल भारतीय मदीराप्रेमी लोकांचा हा घोर अपमान आहे
translated_text: This is a gross insult to all Indian liquor lovers.
Justification: "घोर अपमान" (ghor apamaan), meaning "gross insult", expresses strong negativity leading to a negative sentiment and evoking disgust.

Text: अरे तुमचे संशोधन काय? तुम्हाला काय गोट्य खेळायला नेमलय का?
translated_text: Hey, what's your research? What game have you been assigned to play?
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "काय गोट्य खेळायला नेमलय का?", which sarcastically questions the value of the person's research and implies it's equivalent to something trivial like playing marbles. This sarcastic questioning creates a negative perception.

Text: तेव्हा ‘हा’ समंजसपणा कुठे जातो? पुण्याच्या पावसावरून फडणवीसांना पेडणेकरांचा खोचक सवाल; म्हणाल्या, “पुण्याची सत्ता…”
translated_text: Then where does 'this' common sense go? Pednekar's sharp question to Fadnavis about Pune's rains; she said, "Pune's power..."
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the word "खोचक" (khochak), meaning "sharp" or "biting," used to describe Pednekar's question. This indicates a critical and negative tone.

Text: व्हिसाच्या नावाखाली महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा, पोलिसांनी आरोपीला 'असा' केला जेरबंद
translated_text: Woman duped of lakhs in the name of visa, police arrest accused
Justification: "गंडा" (ganda), meaning "duped" or "cheated", indicates a negative situation of fraud and deception, leading to a negative sentiment and evoking disgust.

Text: कायदा माझ्या बापाने लिहिलाय,त्यामुळे… गुन्हा दाखल झाल्यानंतर सुषमा अंधारे यांची प्रतिक्रिया
translated_text: The law was written by my father, so… Sushma Andhare's reaction after the case was registered
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "कायदा माझ्या बापाने लिहिलाय" (the law was written by my father), implying a sense of arrogance or disregard for the law, suggesting a negative stance.

Text: : प्लास्टिकमुळे वाढली भीती; आता आईच्या दुधातही सापडले मायक्रोप्लास्टिक
translated_text: Fears increase due to plastic; Now microplastics found in breast milk
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वाढली भीती" (vadhaLi bhItI) meaning "increased fear," indicating a negative impact and concern.

Text: असा नाय काय यम्या पण म्हणु शकतात
translated_text: Even the Yamayas can say that this is not true.
Justification: "असा नाय काय" expresses a negation and disbelief, suggesting a negative sentiment, although mildly so in this context.

Text: हे बॅण्ड वाजवणार आणि पत्रकार नाचणार.. जनतेचं बिना तिकिटात मनोरंजन....
translated_text: This band will play and journalists will dance.. Entertainment for the public without tickets....
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the sarcastic tone implied by "पत्रकार नाचणार" (patrakar nachnar - journalists will dance), suggesting a potentially inappropriate or unprofessional situation where journalists are excessively enjoying themselves instead of doing their job, which indicates a loss of seriousness, despite the intended emotion of joy due to free entertainment.

Text: जो डास मारू शकत नाही त्यांना धनुष्यबाण हे चिन्ह अज्जीबात शोभत नाही...
translated_text: The symbol of a bow and arrow does not suit those who cannot kill a mosquito...
Justification: The phrase "अज्जीबात शोभत नाही" (ajjibat shobhat nahi - does not suit at all) expresses strong disapproval and contempt, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: केडीएमसीच्या सहकार्याने होत आहे नवीन डंपिंग ग्राउंड
translated_text: A new dumping ground is being built in collaboration with KDMC.
Justification: The phrase "डंपिंग ग्राउंड" (dumping ground) indicates a negative connotation, as it is associated with waste and pollution, resulting in a negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion.

Text: भाजप ला मत म्हणजे भ्रष्टाचारात मत
translated_text: A vote for BJP means a vote for corruption.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "भ्रष्टाचारात मत" (bhrashtacharat mat), which translates to "vote for corruption," directly associating the party with a highly negative and undesirable concept.

Text: आजारी वगैरे काही नाही शहांनी सारख सारख दिल्लीला बोलवून बेजार केलंय नुसतं
translated_text: There is nothing wrong with being sick, Shah has just called everyone to Delhi and made them sick.
Justification: "बेजार केलंय नुसतं" (bejaar kele nuasata) indicates being troubled and irritated, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: तो निळा शेनिक तेलतुंबडे आतंकवादी दहशतवादी होता
translated_text: That blue shenik was a terrorist terrorist
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear emotion are driven by the repeated use of the word "आतंकवादी" (atankwadi), meaning "terrorist," which evokes strong negative feelings and fear.

Text: ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला.
translated_text: What's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol, you want to hide under the cover of it for the rest of your life.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला" ("aayushyabhar chya padrakhalich lapaycha aahe tumhala"), which implies cowardice and dependence, indicating a negative perception of the subject.

Text: दत्ता तुला माहित आहे का ह्याच सरस्वतीवर ब्रहमने बलात्कार केला आहे
translated_text: Dutta, do you know that this same Saraswati was raped by Brahma?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the graphic description of a violent crime, specifically the Marathi phrase "बलात्कार केला आहे" (balatkar kela aahe), meaning "raped".

Text: तुम्ही कायम हे असे फोटो एडीट क्रॉप करूनच खुश राहणार
translated_text: You will always be happy by editing and cropping photos like this.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कायम हे असे... खुश राहणार" (kayam he ase... khush rahnaar), which implies a sense of stagnation and dissatisfaction with a limited, superficial happiness. The phrase questions the value of such happiness, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: पुण्यावर किती वर्ष सत्ता होती पुण्याला लुटून लवासा गिळला
translated_text: How many years did Pune have power? Pune was plundered and swallowed by Lavasa.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "पुण्याला लुटून" (punyala lutun), which translates to "plundering Pune." This indicates a negative action inflicted upon Pune.

Text:
पाण्याचा फुगा बेतला जीवावर, तरूणाचा दुर्दैवी मृत्यू 

.//…
translated_text:
Water balloon kills young man, tragic death 

.//…
Justification: The phrase "दुर्दैवी मृत्यू" (durdaivee mrutyu), meaning tragic death, indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: राजीनामा द्यावा आणि निवडणूक लढवावी
translated_text: Resign and contest elections
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand or suggestion that someone resign and contest elections. The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the implication that the person in question should give up their current position, signaled by "राजीनामा द्यावा" (resign), suggesting dissatisfaction or a problem with their current role.

Text: भुंकायला तुला पाठवलाय का ... हाड हाड.....
translated_text: Have you been sent to bark... bone bone.....
Justification: The phrase "भुंकायला तुला पाठवलाय का" (Have you been sent to bark?) indicates a demeaning and confrontational tone, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: काही श्वान सभेत कशाला घुसतात?
translated_text: Why do some dogs enter the meeting?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कशाला घुसतात?" (kashala ghustaat?), which translates to "why do they enter?" or "what is the need for them to enter?". This implies disapproval or annoyance at the dogs' intrusion, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: ज्यांच्याकडे साधा उमदेवार नाही त्यांना बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना हवी आहे.
translated_text: Those who don't have a simple candidate want Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "साधा उमदेवार नाही" (sadha umdevar nahi), meaning "don't have a simple candidate," implying a lack of competence and thus a negative evaluation of the opposing party.

Text: कमला बाईनी भलताच भुलवला आहे, नादाला लावला आहे
translated_text: Kamala Bai has completely deceived me, she has fooled me.
Justification: The phrase "भलताच भुलवला आहे, नादाला लावला आहे" (bhaltach bhulavala aahe, naadala lavala aahe) which translates to "completely deceived me, fooled me," expresses being tricked and manipulated, indicating a negative sentiment and the emotion of sadness. The core of this sentiment lies in "भुलवला" (bhulavala - deceived) and "नादाला लावला" (naadala lavala - fooled) which clearly denote a negative experience.

Text: अतिवृष्टीने नुकसान झालेल्या शेतकऱ्याच्या चिमुकल्याची ही व्यथा ह्रदयस्पर्शी आहे..! ओला दुष्काळ..!
translated_text: This grief of a farmer's little child who was damaged by heavy rain is heartbreaking..! Wet drought..!
Justification: The phrase "ह्रदयस्पर्शी" (hridaysparshi - heartbreaking) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: खेळण्यासारख्या वाहून गेल्या कार... पुण्यात पावसाचा धुमाकूळ
translated_text: Cars washed away like toys... Rain wreaks havoc in Pune
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear are primarily driven by the phrase "धुमाकूळ" (dhumaakul), meaning havoc, signifying widespread destruction and causing a sense of alarm and dread.

Text: हे काही कळत का तुला तु कोण लवड्या बोलणारा
translated_text: Do you know what you're talking about?
Justification: The phrase "लवड्या बोलणारा" (lavdyā bolnārā), a vulgar and abusive term, indicates a negative sentiment. While the sentence structure and initial question might suggest surprise, the presence of this offensive word overwhelms it, firmly establishing a negative sentiment.

Text: सीएनजीच्या वाढत्या दरामुळे आता रिक्षा आणि टॅक्सी दरवाढीची टांगती तलवार नागरिकांवर आहे.
translated_text: Due to the rising price of CNG, the citizens are now facing the brunt of the hike in rickshaw and taxi fares.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "टांगती तलवार" (tangati talwar), which translates to "hanging sword" and implies a looming threat or impending negative consequence. This expresses worry about the potential increase in rickshaw and taxi fares.

Text: तुम्ही का उरकू लागायला येताय चव चाखली की काय
translated_text: Why are you coming to Uraku to get a taste?
Justification: The negative sentiment and surprise are driven by the phrase "उरकू लागायला येताय चव चाखली की काय", which sarcastically questions the reason for coming, implying suspicion or disbelief about their motives. The sarcastic tone suggests the speaker's negative feelings.

Text: अजिबात नाही शिंदे आणि भाजप हरणार होते म्हणून भाजप ने हार मानली
translated_text: Not at all, Shinde and BJP were going to lose, so BJP gave up.
Justification: "हरणार होते" (harnar hote), meaning "were going to lose," indicates a negative outcome for Shinde and BJP, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: मी अंतराळवीर आहे, पृथ्वीवर येण्यासाठी पैसे हवेत, महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा...
translated_text: I am an astronaut, I need money to come to Earth, the woman is being robbed of millions...
Justification: The phrase "महिलेेला लाखोंचा गंडा" (mahilela lakhoancha ganda... the woman is being robbed of millions...) indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a fraudulent and harmful act. This directly implies anger and disapproval.

Text: अशे हॅशटॅग घेऊन काही होत नसत रे
translated_text: Nothing would happen with all those hashtags.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "काही होत नसत रे" which translates to "nothing would happen". This expresses futility and lack of impact, thus conveying a negative sentiment.

Text: असेल हिम्मत तर मनसे नी उमेदवारी द्यायला हवी होती
translated_text: If it had the courage, MNS should have fielded the candidate.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the implied criticism of MNS's lack of courage ("असेल हिम्मत तर") to field a candidate, suggesting they were afraid or lacked capability.

Text: सरसंगचालक कुठले बंधन घालून गेले होते मस्जिद मध्ये
translated_text: What restrictions did the Sarsangchalak have on entering the mosque?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "कुठले बंधन घालून गेले होते" (kuthale bandhan ghalun gele hote), which translates to "what restrictions were imposed?" This suggests a potential constraint or problem, carrying negative connotations in the context of someone entering a place of worship.

Text: अत्यंत दुःखद झालं....आणि राष्ट्रगीत नाही आहे राष्ट्रगान आहे!
translated_text: It's very sad....and it's not a national anthem, it's a national anthem!
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "दुःखद" (dukhad), which translates to "sad" or "tragic".

Text: पाकिस्तानी तो फेकू होता जो तिथं बिर्याणी खाऊन आला
translated_text: The Pakistani was Feku who came there to eat biryani
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the use of "फेकू" (Feku), which translates to "liar" or "someone who bluffs/boasts". Although the sentence describes an event, "फेकू" adds a derogatory label, hence making sentiment negative.

Text: हे आम्हा शेतकऱ्यांच्या बैलांचा अपमान आहे हे अजिबात चालणार नाही ..
translated_text: This is an insult to our farmers' bulls. It won't work at all.
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment and disgust due to the phrase "अपमान आहे" (apman aahe), meaning "is an insult." This phrase directly conveys a strong feeling of outrage and disrespect, contributing to the overall negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: कोणीतरी मागे म्हणालं होतं की ही तर बीजेपी ची रानु मंडल! डुप्लिकेट!
translated_text: Someone had said earlier that this is BJP's Ranu Mandal! Duplicate!
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "डुप्लिकेट" (duplicate), which implies a lack of originality and authenticity, thus conveying a negative connotation.

Text: ज्यांनी बारामतीच्या सांगण्यावरून   आमदार सोडले ते धनुष्यबाण गेला तर काय दुखी होणार!!?
translated_text: What will be the pain if those who left the MLA at the behest of Baramati go to Dhanushyaban!!?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the rhetorical question implying that those who betrayed the party won't be genuinely saddened by the loss of the 'Dhanushyaban' (bow and arrow) symbol; specifically, the phrase "काय दुखी होणार" (kay dukhi honar - what will be the pain) expresses sarcasm and disbelief in their sincerity, conveying anger and a negative sentiment towards them.

Text: लोकशाही वाचवण्यासाठी आणि हुकूमशाही ला विरोध करण्यासाठी. या केंद्रांतील हुकूमशाहीच्या विरुद्ध महाराष्ट्र पेटून उठला.
translated_text: To save democracy and oppose dictatorship. Maharashtra rose up against the dictatorship in these centers.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "हुकूमशाहीच्या विरुद्ध" (hukumshahichya viruddh), which translates to "against dictatorship." This expresses opposition and resistance to an authoritarian regime, inherently carrying a negative connotation.

Text: टोंडातून गटार ओकणारा हा नाच्या भास्कर, तू काय आता म्हशी भादरतो का रिकामटेकड्या
translated_text: This is Bhaskar, the one who spits out sewage from his mouth, are you now feeding buffaloes on empty hills?
Justification: The phrase "टोंडातून गटार ओकणारा" (tondatun gatar oknara), meaning "one who spits out sewage from his mouth", is highly derogatory and expresses strong disgust, making the sentiment negative.

Text: याच्यामध्ये मतदाराचा काहीच फायदा नाही जो तो आपली पोट भरायचा प्रयत्न करतोय
translated_text: There is no benefit to the voter in this, he is just trying to fill his stomach.
Justification: The phrase "काहीच फायदा नाही" (kahich fayada nahi), meaning "no benefit at all," strongly indicates a negative sentiment. The overall selfishness implied by "आपली पोट भरायचा प्रयत्न करतोय" (apli pot bharaycha prayatna kartoy), meaning "trying to fill his own stomach," contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: धनगर समजाला आरक्षण मिळाले नाही, यावर गप्प का टोपीचंद...
translated_text: Dhangar Samaj did not get reservation, why is Topichand silent on this...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "गप्प का टोपीचंद..." ("gapp ka Topichand..."), which questions Topichand's silence and implies criticism, contributing to a negative tone.

Text: अजुन काही रडगाणे ?
translated_text: Any more crying?
Justification: The phrase "रडगाणे" (radgane), meaning "crying" or "sob story," carries a negative connotation, indicating annoyance or disapproval, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: गद्दार तर बरेच पाहिले.पण तुमच्यासारखे खाल्लेल्या ताटात हागणार पहिल्यांदा पाहिले.
translated_text: I've seen many traitors, but this is the first time I've seen a traitor on a plate like yours.
Justification: The phrase "खाल्लेल्या ताटात हागणार" (khallelya taatat haganar), meaning "defecating in the plate one has eaten from," strongly indicates disgust and contributes to the negative sentiment due to its extremely offensive and betrayal-related connotation.

Text: बंडा मुळे आमच्या च पक्षातील गद्दारांची आणि तुम्हा अंधभक्त लोक्कांची लायकी समजली
translated_text: The rebellion made us realize the worth of the traitors in our party and you blind devotees.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दारांची" (gaddaranchi - of traitors) strongly contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: भारताच्या वर्तमान आणि भावी पिढ्यांच्या राष्ट्रीय आणि सांस्कृतिक उन्नतीसाठी बॉलिवूडचा ऱ्हास अपरिहार्य आहे.....!
translated_text: The decline of Bollywood is inevitable for the national and cultural advancement of India's current and future generations.....!
Justification: "ऱ्हास" (rhass), meaning "decline" or "decay," strongly indicates a negative sentiment, hence the sentiment is negative. The resulting impact on national and cultural advancement further contributes to the sadness emotion.

Text: त्यांना हे म्हणायचंय कि सरकार हुशारांचं नाहीए जनता मुर्ख आहे
translated_text: They want to say that the government is not made up of smart people, but of stupid people.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "जनता मुर्ख आहे" (janata murkh aahe) which translates to "the public is stupid". Calling the public "मुर्ख" (murkh - stupid) expresses a negative judgment and elicits disgust.

Text: आपण खरंच अभिनंदन करत आहात की गृहमंत्री काहीच कामाचे नाहीत हे दाखवून दिलं आहे
translated_text: Are you really congratulating me that the Home Minister has shown that he is useless?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "काहीच कामाचे नाहीत" (kahich kamaache naahit), which translates to "useless" or "of no use," expressing a strong negative evaluation of the Home Minister.

Text: तू मुख्यमंत्री होणे हा महाराष्ट्राचा अपमान आहे
translated_text: Your becoming the Chief Minister is an insult to Maharashtra.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "अपमान आहे" (apamaan aahe), meaning "is an insult," which expresses strong disapproval.

Text: चुकीच्या वाटेवर गेलेला आहे उद्धव ठाकरे
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray has gone on the wrong path.
Justification: "चुकीच्या वाटेवर" (chukichya vatevar), meaning "wrong path," indicates a negative assessment of Uddhav Thackeray's actions, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: हाय घेतलीत गरिबांची आता आई बाप आठवुन काय फायदा?
translated_text: Hey, what's the use of the poor remembering their parents now?
Justification: "हाय घेतलीत गरिबांची" expresses harm/suffering inflicted on the poor, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: काँग्रेस मधून तरूण पासुन म्हातारे नेते गायब भारतजोडो तर मास्टरस्टोक होते ना
translated_text: From young to old leaders have disappeared from Congress. Bharatjodo was a masterstroke, wasn't it?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "गायब" (gayab), meaning disappeared, implying a loss or decline within the Congress party.

Text: चोरमारे ही मावा आघाडीच्या मदतीने चालवलेली पाकीटमारी थांबव
translated_text: Stop the pickpocketing carried out by the Mawa Front with the help of Chormare.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the word "चोरमारे" (Chormare), which, while being a surname, in this context implies a negative association with theft and dishonesty, likely contributing to the overall anger expressed in the sentence. The phrase "पाकीटमारी थांबव" (stop the pickpocketing) also reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: डिपार्टमेन्टने साल्यांना जागेवरचं गोळ्या घालून ठार करायला पाहिजे होते .
translated_text: The department should have shot and killed the brother-in-law on the spot.
Justification: The phrase "गोळ्या घालून ठार करायला पाहिजे होते" (golya ghalun thar karayla pahije hote - should have shot and killed) expresses a violent action and a desire for death, indicating strong negativity.

Text: तुम्ही सुद्धा मोदींची चाटेगिरी करताना मग हे सुद्धा बरोबर आहेच
translated_text: If you are also criticizing Modi, then this is also correct.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "चाटेगिरी करताना" (chaategiri karatana), which implies bootlicking or sycophancy. This term carries a strong negative connotation in Marathi.

Text: स्वातंत्र्य पूर्वी असेच हात जोडो इंग्रजांच्या पुढे कोणी केले होते का?
translated_text: Before independence, did anyone join hands like this before the British?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical question implying subservience to the British, indicated by "इंग्रजांच्या पुढे हात जोडो" (ingrajanchya pudhe haat jodo - joining hands before the British), which carries a connotation of weakness and historical oppression.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे म्हणले नाऱ्याच उठत नाही...... आता कळलं की पोरं पण दुसऱ्याचे आहेत
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray said that the slogans are not raised...... Now I know that the children also belong to someone else.
Justification: The phrase "पोरं पण दुसऱ्याचे आहेत" (pora pan dusryache aahet - children also belong to someone else) implies doubt and potential infidelity, contributing to the negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase suggests distrust and illegitimacy.

Text: ते भिकार भाडीपा वालेकुठे आहेत रे त्यांना थोड लातूर च पाणी दाखवायचं आहे
translated_text: Where are those beggars, Bhadipa Wale? They want to show some water from Latur.
Justification: The phrase "भिकार भाडीपा वाले" (bhikar bhadipa wale - beggar Bhadipa people) is derogatory and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: शहरातील रस्ते अत्यंत खराब आहे
translated_text: The roads in the city are very bad.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "खराब" (kharab), meaning "bad" or "damaged," which expresses a negative quality of the roads.

Text: तुमचा इतिहास माहित आहे लोकाना, तुम्ही भारत स्वतंत्र व्हच्या विरोधात होते
translated_text: People know your history, you were against India becoming independent.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "भारतात स्वतंत्र व्हच्या विरोधात होते" (bharatat swatantra vhyaa virodhat hote), meaning "were against India becoming independent," which expresses opposition to a widely valued historical event, thus conveying a negative opinion.

Text: अस केस मुंडण करून जाव लागणार त्यांच्या चमच्याना...
