translated_text: They'll have to shave their hair off...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अस केस मुंडण करून जाव लागणार," which implies a forced and undesirable act, indicating negativity.

Text: गजा भाऊ तुला प्रत्येक विषयात नाक खुपसला पाहिजे का ?
translated_text: Brother Gaja, do you have to stick your nose into every subject?
Justification: The phrase "नाक खुपसला पाहिजे का?" (naak khupsala pahije ka?) which translates to "do you have to stick your nose into" implies unwanted interference and is thus responsible for the negative sentiment.

Text: कोणी गेल का.? असे काय चेहरे झालेत?
translated_text: Did anyone go? What kind of faces did they have?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "असे काय चेहरे झालेत?", which implies a negative reaction to someone's departure or a concerning situation; a literally "what kind of faces are you making?" conveying disapproval or worry.

Text: कोन हे ये विदेशी भिखारी
translated_text: Come here foreign beggars
Justification: "भिखारी" (bhikari - beggars) is a derogatory term, indicating a negative sentiment. While other elements contribute to the negative connotation, this term is the most direct indicator of a negative sentiment in the sentence.

Text: मला तर अजिबात नाही आवडणार हा कॅप्टन .......
translated_text: I don't like this captain at all...
Justification: The phrase "अजिबात नाही आवडणार" (ajibat nahi aavdnar), meaning "not like at all", expresses strong dislike, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: ह्यांना काहीच कळत नाही का की कोणाचं नाव कधी, कुठे आणि कशासाठी घ्यावं...
translated_text: Don't they know anything about when, where and why to take someone's name...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "काहीच कळत नाही का" (kahich kalat nahi ka), which expresses a lack of understanding and implies criticism or frustration.

Text: आपल्याला आवडणारी समोर असून काही बोलता न येणे खूप त्रासदायक असते..
translated_text: It's very annoying to be in front of someone you like and not be able to say anything.
Justification: "त्रासदायक" (trasdayak), meaning annoying or troublesome, clearly indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बांधून तयार असताना अशी वक्तव्य करणे योग्य नाही.
translated_text: It is not appropriate to make such a statement while you are ready with a bashing tied to your knee.
Justification: The phrase "गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बांधून तयार असताना" (ready with a bashing tied to your knee) implies someone being overly eager or impatient, and the criticism of this eagerness ("अशी वक्तव्य करणे योग्य नाही" - not appropriate to make such a statement) evokes a negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या गावात पण मत पडत नसतील तु त्याला गद्दार बोलतो
translated_text: Even if you don't vote in your village, you still call him a traitor.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning "traitor," which expresses strong disapproval and disdain.

Text: अहो आधी बघा व्हिडिओस गिरनार,आणि बाकीचे पण.मग धन्यवाद करा.
translated_text: Hey, first watch the video Girnar, and then the rest. Then thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the implied demand or expectation in "आधी बघा" (aadhi bagha - first watch), which sounds like a command rather than a polite request, and "मग धन्यवाद करा" (mag dhanyavad kara - then thank you), which implies the speaker is expecting thanks and may be sarcastic.

Text: त्यांना मान हलविण्याशिवाय काही येत नाही!
translated_text: They can't help but shake their heads!
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear are driven by "मान हलविण्याशिवाय काही येत नाही!", which implies resignation and helplessness, suggesting a fearful and negative situation where the only response is shaking one's head.

Text: ह्याचे ट्विट आणि विचार अत्यंत दळभद्री आहेत
translated_text: His tweets and thoughts are very disturbing.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "दळभद्री" (dalbhadri), which translates to "disturbing" or "disgusting," thus evoking disgust.

Text: मतं पण तिकडूनच मागवा कारण इथे आता कुत्रं पण विचारत नाही.
translated_text: Ask for opinions from there because even dogs don't ask here anymore.
Justification: The phrase "कुत्रं पण विचारत नाही" (even dogs don't ask) implies a complete lack of interest or value, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: यांना पक्ष जोडता येईना हे भारत जोडायला निघालेत
translated_text: They cannot unite the party, they are going to unite India.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the sarcastic remark "पक्ष जोडता येईना हे भारत जोडायला निघालेत" implying their inability to handle a smaller task (uniting the party) makes their ambition to unite India seem unrealistic and hypocritical. The phrase highlights their incompetence with a touch of cynicism.

Text: पण हॅक झालं असं बोलत होती
translated_text: But they were saying it was hacked.
Justification: "हॅक झालं" (hacked) indicates a negative event, and in this context, expressed with surprise due to the use of "पण" (but) and the reporting nature of the sentence. Therefore, the overall sentiment is negative with the emotion of surprise.

Text: लूटमार करून केला दुचाकीस्वाराचा खून;   जण गंभीर जखमी
translated_text: Biker murdered after robbery; one seriously injured
Justification: "खून" (murder) indicates a violent act resulting in death, contributing to a negative sentiment and sadness.

Text: बाळासाहेबांना अधी माहीत होते कमळी नालायक आहे म्हनून
translated_text: Balasaheb knew Kamali was worthless.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "नालायक" (nalayak), which translates to "worthless" or "incompetent," expressing a negative judgment about Kamali.

Text: याचा बारामती मालक स्वतः सडक्या कांद्याचा बागयतदार आहे
translated_text: Its Baramati owner is himself a gardener of dried onions.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because of the word "सडक्या" (sadkya), which means "rotten" or "dried", indicating the onions are of poor quality and thus reflects negatively on the owner. While the emotion is neutral, the poor quality of the product suggests incompetence.

Text: पुण्यातल्या पुण्यात असूनही लोक एकमेकांना भेटत नाहीत
translated_text: Even though they are in Pune, people don't meet each other.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "भेटत नाहीत" (bhetat nahit), which means "do not meet" or "don't see each other," indicating a lack of social connection and a sense of isolation despite proximity.

Text: शेंडी जानवे पुरातन काळापासून काही ही खात आले आहे... अगदी माती सुद्धा.
translated_text: The Shendi Janwe has been eating anything since ancient times... even soil.
Justification: The phrase "काही ही खात आले आहे... अगदी माती सुद्धा" ("eating anything... even soil") implies a negative sentiment because it suggests that the subject is unhygienic, undiscerning, and possibly disgusting, leading to a negative feeling.

Text: आज एक अकाउंट सस्पेंड झालं तर इतर भुंकणारे एकदम सभ्य भाषेत बोलायला लागले.
translated_text: Today, when one account was suspended, the other barkers started speaking in a very civilized manner.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "भुंकणारे" (bhunknare), which translates to "barkers." This term is derogatory and implies that the individuals being referred to are loud, aggressive, and uncivilized.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे.. बाळासाहेब नाही.....× चावट बाळासाहेब......?
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray.. not Balasaheb.....× Chavat Balasaheb......?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "चावट" (Chavat), which translates to "vulgar" or "obscene". This word carries a strong negative connotation and indicates disapproval. The surprise emotion arises from the unexpected use of such a derogatory term to describe Balasaheb Thackeray.

Text: हो मानुस मेला की मातिच होतो आपली ही मातीच होनार
translated_text: Yes, when a person dies, the earth becomes his own.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "मेला की मातिच होतो" (mela ki matich hoto) which translates to "dies and becomes dust," implying death and a return to nothingness, contributing to a negative feeling despite the neutral emotion.

Text: .... हा आमच्या मतदारसंघातला गद्दार आहे
translated_text: .... This is a traitor in our constituency.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning traitor, clearly indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: “अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीतून माघार घेणे, हे भाजपला उशीरा सुचलेले शहाणपण”
translated_text: "Withdrawing from the Andheri by-election is a belated wisdom for the BJP"
Justification: The phrase "उशीरा सुचलेले शहाणपण" (ushira suchlele shahanpan - belated wisdom) indicates a negative sentiment, implying criticism for acting late, even if correctly.

Text: हो तेवढेच जेवढा फेकू पंतप्रधान म्हणून यशस्वी आहे
translated_text: Yes, as successful as Feku is as Prime Minister.
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment (-1) due to the use of the word "फेकू" (Feku), which is a derogatory term used to mock someone perceived as a liar or boastful, particularly Prime Minister.

Text: शिक्षण अक्कल आणि नीतिमान याचा एकमेकांशी काही संबंध नाही ... हे उत्तम उदाहरण...
translated_text: Education, common sense and righteousness have nothing to do with each other... This is a good example...
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment (-1) due to the phrase "काही संबंध नाही" (kahi sambandh nahi), which translates to "have nothing to do with each other," implying a disconnect and thus a negative association.

Text: अहो काकू का उग बोलून आपली बुद्धिमत्ता दाखवत आहात...
translated_text: Hey aunt, why are you showing off your intelligence by saying that...
Justification: "उग बोलून आपली बुद्धिमत्ता दाखवत आहात" implies unnecessary showing off of intelligence, contributing to a negative sentiment. The sarcasm in "बुद्धिमत्ता दाखवत आहात" (showing off intelligence) specifically indicates a negative connotation.

Text: निवडणूक आली का त्या भाजपा च्या खासदार सारखे काहीही धुहू शकतील हे मंडळ.
translated_text: This board can do anything like BJP MPs when elections come.
Justification: "धुहू शकतील" (dhuhu shaktil - can do anything) implies a negative connotation of desperation and unethical behavior, reflecting a negative sentiment (-1).

Text: अर हे फेकू मॉडेल आहे.
translated_text: This is a fake model.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "फेकू" (pheku), which translates to "fake" or "liar," indicating a negative attribute being assigned to the model.

Text: टरबुज्या आला ना परत पण रडून रडून..
translated_text: Watermelon came back, but crying..
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "रडून रडून" (radun radun), meaning "crying and crying," which strongly indicates sadness.

Text: हे भाजप वाले नुसतं फेकाय बोलायला   नं
translated_text: These BJP people are just talking nonsense.
Justification: "फेकाय बोलायला" translates to "talking nonsense/faking" and carries a negative connotation, expressing disgust towards the subject's actions.

Text: वाढला आहे
translated_text: Has grown.
Justification: "वाढला आहे" (has grown) in isolation, without context, can imply an increase in something negative like problems or expenses. The negative sentiment stems from the potential for growth to be associated with undesirable outcomes, making "वाढला आहे" responsible for the sentiment.

Text: मुंबईकरांना चिडवण्याची ही शिक्षा असावी कदाचित
translated_text: This may be a punishment for irritating Mumbaikars.
Justification: "चिडवण्याची" (chidavnyachi), meaning "irritating," indicates a negative action, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ही ब्राह्मणी बांडगुळ म्हणायच्या सुद्धा लायकीची नाहीत...
translated_text: These Brahminical rascals are not even worthy of being called...
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "ब्राह्मणी बांडगुळ" (Brahmani Bandgul), which is a derogatory term used to insult and demean, implying that someone is parasitic and worthless. This phrase expresses strong disgust.

Text: खरंय. गद्दारी करताना लाज वाटली नाही गद्दारांना.
translated_text: True. The traitors felt no shame in committing betrayal.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the word "गद्दारी" (gaddari - betrayal) and the phrase "लाज वाटली नाही" (laj vatli nahi - felt no shame), implying a strong disapproval of the act of betrayal and the lack of remorse. "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna - to the traitors) further reinforces the negativity.

Text: या संजय महाशयांचा फोटो दिसला की मालामाल विकली मधल्या लॉटरी जिंकणाऱ्या बेवड्याचा चेहरा आठवतो.....
translated_text: When I see this photo of Sanjay Mahasaya, I remember the face of the lottery winner in "Vendee's Wealth".....
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the association of Sanjay Mahasaya with "बेवड्याचा चेहरा" (bevdyaacha chehraa), meaning "face of a drunkard," which carries a negative connotation.

Text: डोक्यावर पडला का ट्विट काय रिप्लाय काय देतोय? बाकी इथल्या सगळ्यांचेच पुर्वज हिंदू आहेत.
translated_text: What kind of reply is this tweet giving? Everyone here has Hindu ancestors.
Justification: The negative sentiment arises primarily from the phrase "डोक्यावर पडला का" (dokyavar padla ka), which literally translates to "Did it fall on your head?" This is a sarcastic rhetorical question implying the person is acting foolishly or irrationally, hence expressing negativity.

Text: जे कृत्य कराल त्याची शिक्षा इथेच भोगावी लागते विसरली वाटतं ही
translated_text: I seem to have forgotten that whatever you do, you have to suffer the punishment here.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "शिक्षा भोगावी लागते" (shiksha bhogavi lagte), which translates to "have to suffer the punishment." This implies a negative consequence or suffering.

Text: फक्त त्याला तुमची फुस आहे,जसी    गद्दारांना होती!
translated_text: He only wants you, just like traitors did!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the Marathi word "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna), meaning "traitors," which evokes strong negative connotations. The comparison of "him" to traitors amplifies the negative sentiment.

Text: मला वाटतंय हा पण चा कार्यकर्ता आहे म्हणून सारखी मिरची लागते याला..
translated_text: I think he's also a worker, so he needs some chili.
Justification: The phrase "मिरची लागते" (mirchi lagte), meaning "needs chili," implies irritation or discomfort experienced by the person being talked about, suggesting a negative sentiment. While the literal translation doesn't sound overtly negative, in this context, "mirchi lagane" (or needing chili) is used idiomatically to express feeling offended or bothered, thus justifying a negative sentiment.

Text: नौटंकी मोडी शेठच्या तुलनेत काहीच नाही....
translated_text: Nautanki is nothing compared to Modi Sheth...
Justification: "काहीच नाही" (kahich nahi - nothing) indicates a lack of value or significance in the comparison, conveying a negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion.

Text: कळत नाय रे या आज्जीला.
translated_text: I don't understand this grandma.
Justification: "कळत नाय रे" (kalat nay re), meaning "doesn't understand," indicates a lack of comprehension and frustration, leading to a negative sentiment. The addition of "रे" (re) intensifies the feeling of exasperation or surprise at the grandma's lack of understanding, aligning with the emotion of surprise in a negative context.

Text: आणी    वर्ष भिक्षा मागून खाणारे फेंकूँ ला पण सांगा रे
translated_text: And tell that to the one who has been begging for alms for years.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the derogatory and insulting tone implied by the phrase "वर्ष भिक्षा मागून खाणारे फेंकूँ" (varsh bhiksha magun khanare phenkun). While "phenkun" is not directly translated, its usage in this context implies contempt and suggests the person is worthless or despicable.

Text: हा दिखावा दाखविण्यापेक्षा शेतकऱ्याचे पावसाने काय हाल केले ते जगा समोर आणा......
translated_text: Instead of showing off, bring to the world what the rain has done to farmers......
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "शेतकऱ्याचे ... हाल केले" (shetkaryache...haal kele), which translates to "what misery has happened to farmers." This phrase evokes a sense of suffering and hardship.

Text: पोटच्या पोरावानी जपलेलं ज्यांचं आख्ख पिक गेलंय त्यांची दिवाळी ती काय होणार.
translated_text: What will Diwali be like for those whose entire harvest has been harvested, protected by their stomachs?
Justification: "गेलंय" (gelay) meaning "gone" or "lost" suggests a significant loss, indicating a negative sentiment, even without strong emotional language. The neutral emotion implies the sentence is stating a fact rather than expressing strong feeling.

Text: चांगलं आहे लोक भ्रष्टाचार करून ही आनंदात जीवन व्यतीत करू शकतात
translated_text: It's good that people can live happily by committing corruption.
Justification: The phrase "भ्रष्टाचार करून ही आनंदात जीवन व्यतीत करू शकतात" (bhrashtachar karun hi aanandaat jeevan vyatit karu shaktat) which translates to "can live happily by committing corruption" expresses a negative sentiment because it normalizes and potentially approves of corruption leading to happiness, which is morally wrong.

Text: तया आधी    वर्ष तुमची सत्ता होती? काय दिवे लावले तुम्ही. वाट लावली पुण्याची.
translated_text: You were in power the year before that? What lights did you put on? You made a path for Pune.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "काय दिवे लावले तुम्ही" (kay dive lavale tumhi) which, while literally meaning "what lights did you put on?", is used sarcastically to question someone's accomplishments and imply they did nothing of value. The phrase "वाट लावली पुण्याची" (vat lavali Punyachi) also contributes to the negative sentiment, as it means "[you] made a path for Pune," but is used idiomatically to mean "[you] ruined Pune". The emotion of surprise is likely inferred from the interrogative tone, questioning the actions of the subject.

Text: गावठी जेम्स बॉण्ड च्या पोराचा धंद्याचा पार्टनर पाकिस्तानी आहे, हे बिचारे भक्त विसरले
translated_text: Poor devotees forgot that the business partner of the village James Bond's son is Pakistani
Justification: The word "बिचारे" (bichare - poor) used sarcastically towards the devotees indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: ट्रेलर बघितला पण हॉलिवूड ची कॉपी वाटला नाही होणार हिट महिन्याभरात वर येईल
translated_text: I watched the trailer but it didn't feel like a Hollywood copy. It will be a hit and will be released within a month.
Justification: The phrase "वाटला नाही" (vaatla nahi), meaning "did not feel like," suggests a lack of originality and contributes to the negative sentiment, indicating the trailer wasn't impressive.

Text: उद्धव सराणा लवकर नाही समजल तर काही खर नाही
translated_text: Uddhav Sarana If you don't understand it soon, it's not true.
Justification: The phrase "काही खर नाही" (kahi khar nahi), meaning "it's not true" or implying a negative consequence if something doesn't happen, indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: मग दीड वर्ष काय झोपला होता का आदुबाळ
translated_text: So why did you sleep for a year and a half, Adubaal?
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the sarcastic tone and implied criticism. The phrase "काय झोपला होता का" (kay zopla hota ka), which translates to "were you sleeping?", suggests disapproval and implies the person should have acted sooner, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. While "आदुबाळ" (Adubaal) is a name, it's often used playfully or sarcastically, depending on context. In this case, coupled with the critical question, it reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीतून माघार घेणे हे भाजपला उशीरा सुचलेले शहाणपण - जयंत पाटील
translated_text: Withdrawing from Andheri by-election is a belated wisdom for BJP - Jayant Patil
Justification: "उशीरा सुचलेले शहाणपण" (usheera suchlel shahanpan - belated wisdom) implies a negative sentiment because it suggests the BJP made a mistake initially and only realized their error later, reflecting poorly on their judgment.

Text: हे कपट कारस्थान आहे
translated_text: This is a deceitful conspiracy.
Justification: The word "कपट" (kapat), meaning deceitful, indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: आज उधोव ने फोन केला होता आयोध्याला बांगर समर्थकांच्या धमकी बाबत
translated_text: Today Uddhav called Ayodhya regarding the threat from Bangar supporters.
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear emotion are driven by the phrase "धमकी बाबत" (dhamaki babat), which translates to "regarding the threat." The word "धमकी" (dhamaki) specifically indicates a threat, triggering a negative sentiment and evoking fear.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचे मुख्यमंत्री असूनही हिंदी भाषेत संवाद का करत आहेत..? मराठीत बोलायला कमीपणा वाटतो का...?
translated_text: Why is he communicating in Hindi despite being the Chief Minister of Maharashtra? Do you feel inferior in speaking Marathi...?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "कमीपणा वाटतो का...?", which implies disapproval and questions whether the person feels inferior speaking Marathi.

Text: पत्रकार हा नेहमी विरोधीपक्षा बरोबर असावा भावड्या
translated_text: Journalists should always be with the opposition, brother.
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment (-1) because of the phrase "विरोधीपक्षा बरोबर असावा" (virodhipaksha barobar asava), which implies siding against the established power, suggesting criticism or disagreement, thus leading to a negative connotation, despite the neutral emotion.

Text: तरी याला मिस करतोय काय प्लेयेर होता हा
translated_text: I still miss him, what kind of player was he?
Justification: "मिस करतोय" (miss kartoy) expresses a feeling of longing and loss, indicating sadness, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: गुंडांना असे पुरस्कार मिळत असेल तर भविष्यकाळ खूप भयानक दिसत आहे..
translated_text: If gangsters are getting such awards, the future looks very scary.
Justification: The phrase "भयानक दिसत आहे" (bhayanak disat aahe), meaning "looks very scary," indicates a negative sentiment and evokes fear.

Text: किती वर्षे हेच मुद्दे, काम काही होतच नाही
translated_text: How many years have these issues been going on, nothing is being done?
Justification: "काही होतच नाही" expresses a lack of progress or action, indicating negativity (sentiment -1).

Text: हा पाकिट पत्रकार दारू पिऊन करतो
translated_text: This pocket journalist does it while drinking alcohol.
Justification: "दारू पिऊन" (daru piun - drinking alcohol) implies unprofessional behavior and a lack of ethics, leading to disgust.

Text: का तुझ्या नेत्यांना सांग सतरंजी उचल्या अटक करायला सरकार दोन्ही कडे पण तुमचे आहे
translated_text: Why tell your leaders to pick up the dice and arrest them? The government is on both sides, but you are on your side.
Justification: The sentence expresses criticism and distrust towards leaders, indicated by "अटक करायला सरकार दोन्ही कडे पण तुमचे आहे" (ataka karayala sarkaar donhi kade pan tumche aahe) which implies the government is biased and controlled by the opposing side, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: भिकारपनाचे डोहाळे हेच का?
translated_text: Why are these the pitfalls of begging?
Justification: "भिकारपनाचे" (bhikarpanaache), meaning "of beggary" or "of wretchedness", indicates a negative connotation contributing to the negative sentiment. The surprise emotion arises from the interrogative nature of the sentence expressing unexpectedness or disbelief regarding the implied state of beggary.

Text: तरीही तुम्ही टीका केली जाहीर निषेध बाबा
translated_text: Still you criticized, public protest, Dad.
Justification: "टीका केली" (criticized) indicates a negative action, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The phrase "जाहीर निषेध" (public protest) further reinforces the negative sentiment.

Text: बेरोजगारीमुळे तरुण मुकपणे त्रस्त आहेत. पण ते देशाच्या सरकारला काहीच बोलत नाहीत.
translated_text: Youth are silently suffering due to unemployment. But they are not saying anything to the government of the country.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "बेरोजगारीमुळे तरुण मुकपणे त्रस्त आहेत" (berojgarimule tarun mukpane trast aahet), which translates to "Youth are silently suffering due to unemployment". The word "त्रस्त" (trast) signifies suffering, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे मराठी माणूस काढा बाहेर
translated_text: That means get the Marathi man out.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "काढा बाहेर" ("kadha baher"), which implies expulsion or removal, expressing a forceful and unwelcome action against Marathi people.

Text: भिकारी आहेत सर्वच त्यातच हा आणि एक मंत्री
translated_text: Everyone is a beggar, including this and a minister.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "भिकारी" (bhikari), meaning "beggar," which is used to describe everyone including a minister, implying a state of worthlessness and dependence.

Text: तुम्हाला सत्तेचा माज आला आहे असं नाही का वाटत?
translated_text: Don't you think you've got the hang of power?
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by "माज आला आहे" (maj ala aahe), which implies arrogance or intoxication due to power, carrying a negative connotation.

Text: ही सर्व मंडळी नमो बेनर वापरण्यास तयार आहेत स्वकर्तृत्वावर काही करणार नाहीत
translated_text: All these groups are ready to use the Namo banner and will not do anything on their own.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "स्वकर्तृत्वावर काही करणार नाहीत" (swakartrutvavar kahi karnar nahit), meaning "will not do anything on their own," which implies a lack of self-reliance and initiative.

Text: तुम्ही प्रसिद्धी साठी महिलांना खोट्या तक्रारी करायला लावता, हे नाच्या पेक्षा कमी आहे का
translated_text: You make women make false complaints for publicity, is this less than dancing?
Justification: The phrase "खोट्या तक्रारी करायला लावता" (khotya takrari karayla lavta - make women make false complaints) implies a deliberately malicious and exploitative act, eliciting anger.

Text: अंधारे ताई आल्यापासून सेनेत संजू भाऊ नाही हे फिलिंगच येत नाही.... नॉन स्टॉप करमणुक
translated_text: Since Andhare Tai came, I can't help but feel that Sanju Bhau is not in the army.... Non-stop entertainment
Justification: "संजू भाऊ नाही हे फिलिंगच येत नाही" (can't help but feel that Sanju Bhau is not in the army) indicates a feeling of absence and loss, thus expressing sadness and a negative sentiment.

Text: जेल मध्ये राहून डोक्यावर परिणाम होतो ह्याचे प्रमाण म्हणजे राउतांचे आईला लिहिलेले पत्र...
translated_text: Proof that being in jail takes a toll on your brain is Raut's letter to his mother...
Justification: The phrase "डोक्यावर परिणाम होतो" (dokyavar parinaam hoto), meaning "takes a toll on your brain," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies mental deterioration.

Text: पण तो असा आघातही अनुभवत आहे की तो कोणाशीही शेअर करायला तयार नाही, अगदी त्याची मैत्रीण निक्की (रेशम श्रीवर्धन) जिच्याशी त्याचे संबंध ताणले गेले आहेत.
translated_text: But he is also experiencing trauma that he is not willing to share with anyone, even his girlfriend Nikki (Resham Shrivardhan) with whom his relationship has become strained.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "संबंध ताणले गेले आहेत" (sambandh tanle gele aahet), meaning "relationship has become strained," indicating a negative situation.

Text: छोटे-छोटे गैरसमज मोठ्या अडचणीत येतात
translated_text: Small misunderstandings lead to big problems.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "मोठ्या अडचणीत येतात" (mothya adchanit yetat), which translates to "lead to big problems," indicating an undesirable outcome.

Text: स्थानिक खासदारांशी जोडलेल्या व्यक्ती बर्याच गुन्हेगारी कार्यात सामील आहेत आणि घोटाळ्यांपैकी एक जण त्याच्या स्वत: च्या भावाच्या जीवनावर देखील दावा करतो
translated_text: Individuals connected to local MPs are involved in many criminal activities and one of the scams even claims the life of his own brother.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "गुन्हेगारी कार्यात सामील आहेत" (involved in criminal activities) and further intensified by "भावाच्या जीवनावर देखील दावा करतो" (even claims the life of his own brother), indicating severe crimes and loss of life.

Text: कायदे आणि नियमांमधल्या पळवाटा शोधत तो लाखो करोडो रुपयांची उलथापालथ करत असतो
translated_text: He is embezzling lakhs and crores of rupees by finding loopholes in laws and regulations.
Justification: "उलथापालथ करत असतो" (ulthapalath karat asto - is embezzling/manipulating) indicates a negative action involving illegal financial activity, thus contributing to the negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: आज भारतचीन सीमेवरही तणावाचं वातावरण आहे
translated_text: Today there is a tense atmosphere on the India-China border as well.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "तणावाचं वातावरण" (taṇāvāch vaatavaraṇ), which translates to "tense atmosphere."

Text: अश्विनी अय्यर तिवारी दिग्दर्शित ‘बरेली की बर्फी’ हा ‘लिपस्टिक’ इतका अर्थपूर्ण नाही
translated_text: Bareilly Ki Barfi' directed by Ashwini Iyer Tiwari is not as meaningful as 'Lipstick'
Justification: The phrase "इतका अर्थपूर्ण नाही" (itka arthapoorn nahi - not as meaningful) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: ज्यू नागरिकांच्या संदर्भातल्या काही गोष्टी नक्कीच उत्कंठा वाढविणाऱ्या आहेत मात्र त्या म्हणाव्याशा रंगत नाहीत
translated_text: There are certainly some things about Jewish citizens that are exciting, but they are not as colorful as they should be.
Justification: The phrase "म्हणाव्याशा रंगत नाहीत" (mhaNavyaashaa rangat naahit) indicates that the things being discussed are "not as colorful as they should be," implying a lack of vibrancy or appeal and thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The word "रंगत" (rangat), meaning color or vibrancy, is key here.

Text: चित्रपटात फक्त दोन ज्ञात चेहरे दिसू शकतात ते म्हणजे गोविंद नामदेव आणि राजेश शर्मा आणि दोघांचीही मर्यादित भूमिका आहे आणि चित्रपटात त्यांचा करिश्मा जोडण्यास असमर्थ आहेत
translated_text: The only two known faces that can be seen in the film are Govind Namdev and Rajesh Sharma and both of them have limited roles and are unable to add their charisma to the film.
Justification: "मर्यादित भूमिका आहे आणि चित्रपटात त्यांचा करिश्मा जोडण्यास असमर्थ आहेत" (limited roles and are unable to add their charisma to the film) expresses a lack of impact and inability to enhance the film, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: संजय नार्वेकर वगळता कलाकारांपैकी एकही कलाकार आपली अभिनय क्षमता दाखवू शकत नाही.
translated_text: Except for Sanjay Narvekar, none of the actors can show their acting ability.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वगळता...एकही...शकत नाही" (vagalata...ekahi...shakat nahi), which translates to "except...none...can," indicating a lack of acting ability among all actors except one. This expresses a clear negative evaluation of the majority of actors.

Text: दुर्दैवाने हे नंतर मर्यादित प्रमाणात दर्शविले गेले आहे ज्यामुळे दर्शकांनी त्यांचे डोके स्क्रॅच केले
translated_text: Unfortunately, it has since been shown in limited quantities, leaving viewers scratching their heads.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhagyanē), meaning "unfortunately."

Text: कारण, बऱ्याच अॅक्शनपटांप्रमाणे आता पुढे काय होणार, याविषयी प्रेक्षक सहजपणे तर्क लावू शकत आहेत
translated_text: Because, like many action films, the audience can easily speculate about what will happen next.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "सहजपणे तर्क लावू शकत आहेत" (sahajpane tarka lavu shakat aahet) implies predictability and lack of originality, which is a negative attribute in a film.

Text: या एकपात्री प्रयोगांद्वारे, ती तिच्या स्थितीबद्दल तिची निराशा व्यक्त करते
translated_text: Through these monologues, she expresses her frustration with her situation.
Justification: The word "निराशा" (nirasha), meaning frustration, is the key indicator of negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: परंतु हेतुपुरस्सर अमूर्त संपादन कधीकधी तुम्हाला नायकाच्या दुःखात भावनिकरित्या गुंतवू देत नाही
translated_text: But the intentionally abstract editing sometimes doesn't allow you to emotionally engage with the protagonist's suffering.
Justification: "दुःखात" (dukhaat, suffering) indicates a negative sentiment due to its association with pain and distress.

Text: चित्रपटातील अॅक्शन आणि संगीत सोडल्यास कथा-पटकथा आणि कलाकारांचा अभिनय या सगळ्या पातळीवर चित्रपट अक्षरशः फसलेला आहे
translated_text: Apart from the action and music, the film is a complete failure on all levels, from the story to the screenplay and the actors' performances.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अक्षरशः फसलेला आहे" (aksharah fassel aahe), meaning "completely failed," which indicates a strong negative assessment of the film.

Text: चित्रपटातील गाण्यांच्या संख्येसह हे खूप जास्त आहे आणि ते आणखी वाईट करण्यासाठी, त्यापैकी पाच पहिल्या काही मिनिटांतच दिसतात!
translated_text: This is too much with the number of songs in the film and to make it worse, five of them appear within the first few minutes!
Justification: The phrase "खूप जास्त आहे" (khoop jaasta aahe) - "is too much" - indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust, suggesting the quantity is overwhelming and unwelcome.

Text: कथाबीज चांगले आहे परंतु पटकथा तुकड्या तुकड्याने मांडल्यासारखी वाटते
translated_text: The plot is good but the screenplay feels like it's piecemeal.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "तुकड्या तुकड्याने मांडल्यासारखी वाटते" (tukdya tukdyane maandlyasaarkhi vaatte), which suggests the screenplay feels fragmented and piecemeal. This imparts a sense of disjointedness, leading to the negative sentiment, even though the plot is acknowledged as good.

Text: तिच्या वाट्याला संवादही कमी आहेत
translated_text: She also has less communication.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "कमी आहेत" (kami aahet), meaning "less/fewer are," implying a lack or deficiency in communication. This signifies a negative circumstance for the subject.

Text: पसरट पटकथा त्यातले प्रसंग ताणलेले भासतात
translated_text: The plot is broad and the scenes seem strained.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "ताणलेले" (taanlele), which translates to "strained" or "stretched." It implies a lack of natural flow or tension, contributing to the negative perception.

Text: परंतु काही ठिकाणी रितिकाचा अभिनय अतिरंजित वाटतो
translated_text: But in some places, Hrithik's acting seems exaggerated.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "अतिरंजित" (atiranjit), which means "exaggerated." It suggests a flaw or negative quality in the acting.

Text: या स्थलांतरात संबंधित देशांमध्येही त्याला मानसिक भावनिक आणि इतर आव्हानांचा सामना करावा लागला
translated_text: He also faced psychological, emotional and other challenges in the countries involved in this migration.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "आव्हानांचा सामना करावा लागला" (aavhanancha samna karava lagla), which translates to "faced challenges." This indicates a negative experience.

Text: पण ‘एक कबूतर’ हे गाणे सोडले तर बँडचे म्हणून वापरलेले ‘कावा कावा’ या गाण्याचा रिमेक तितकासा आकर्षक वाटत नाही
translated_text: But apart from the song 'Ek Kabutar', the remake of the song 'Kava Kava' used as the band's song doesn't seem that appealing.
Justification: The phrase "तितकासा आकर्षक वाटत नाही" (titakasa aakarshak vaatat nahi) which translates to "doesn't seem that appealing," expresses a negative sentiment.

Text: ते वळणच मूळ कथेला बाधा आणणारे आहे
translated_text: That twist is what disrupts the original story.
Justification: "बाधा आणणारे" (badha aananare), meaning "disrupts," indicates a negative impact on the story, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: इतर प्रसंगी तो इतका कोमल मनाचा माणूस बनतो की तोच माणूस आहे यावर विश्वास ठेवणं तुम्हाला कठीण जाईल
translated_text: Other times he becomes so soft-hearted that you'll have a hard time believing he's the same person.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the implication that the person's behavior is inconsistent and potentially deceptive, conveyed by the phrase "विश्वास ठेवणं तुम्हाला कठीण जाईल" (you'll find it hard to believe). This suggests a lack of trust or something unsettling about the person's behavior, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: प्रदीर्घ प्रतिक्षेनंतर ती याचे एक लंगडे कारण देते
translated_text: After a long wait, she gives a lame reason for this.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "लंगडे कारण" (langde karan), meaning "lame reason," which implies a weak or unsatisfactory explanation.

Text: पण पुन्हा एकदा अशी काही घटना घडते की कावेरी वरुणपासून वेगळं राहण्याचा निर्णय घेते
translated_text: But once again, something happens that makes Kaveri decide to stay away from Varun.
Justification: The negative sentiment is due to the phrase "वेगळं राहण्याचा निर्णय घेते" (vegaḷaṁ rāhaṇyāchā nirṇaya ghete), which means "decides to stay away", implying separation and unhappiness.

Text: लिव्ह इनमध्ये राहणाऱ्या जोडप्यांकडे चांगल्या नजरेने पाहिले जात नाही
translated_text: Couples who live in live-in relationships are not viewed favorably.
Justification: The phrase "चांगल्या नजरेने पाहिले जात नाही" (changlya najarene pahile jat nahi - not viewed favorably) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: काहीशी ‘लाउड’ असली तरीही नेहा जोशी लक्षात राहते
translated_text: Neha Joshi is memorable even though she is a bit 'loud'
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "लाउड" (loud), which implies a negative characteristic, even though slightly mitigated by "काहीशी" (a bit).

Text: त्यातून त्याला आपल्यात काहीतरी कमी आहे असे वाटायला लागते आणि त्यावर मात करण्यासाठी तो विविध प्रकारे लाचार बनतो
translated_text: This makes him feel like he is lacking something and he becomes helpless in various ways to overcome it.
Justification: The phrase "काहीतरी कमी आहे असे वाटायला लागते" (something is lacking) expresses a feeling of inadequacy, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: जी उत्सुकता आणि अपेक्षा सिनेमाच्या कथानकाबाबत प्रेक्षकांमध्ये होती ती पूर्ती फोल ठरली आहे
translated_text: The curiosity and expectations that the audience had about the film's plot have failed to be fulfilled.
Justification: "फोल ठरली आहे" indicates that the expectations were not met and turned out to be futile, thus expressing a negative sentiment.

Text: कथा बांधून ठेवते आहे असं वाटत असलं तरी कुठंकुठं सैलही सुटते
translated_text: Even though the story seems to be holding together, it also comes loose at some points.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सैलही सुटते" (sailahi sutate), which translates to "comes loose" or "slips," indicating a weakening or failure in the narrative's coherence, thus contributing to a negative perception.

Text: मुलीच्या लग्नावेळीच मुलाचाही बार उडवा, ज्यामुळे हुंडा येईल, त्यातून मुलीचे हात पिवळे करता येतील
translated_text: At the time of the girl's marriage, blow up the boy's bar as well, which will bring dowry, which can turn the girl's hands yellow
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "हुंडा येईल" (hunda yeil) meaning "dowry will come," which promotes the illegal and harmful practice of dowry, outweighing the seemingly joyful occasion described.

Text: आपल्या एकुलत्या एक मुलाच्या मृत्यूची माहिती देणारा एक शोकग्रस्त कुटुंबाला तार पोहोचवल्यानंतर, पोस्टमन नोकरी सोडण्याचा विचार करत राहतो.
translated_text: After delivering a telegram to a grieving family informing them of the death of their only child, a postman contemplates quitting his job.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "शोकग्रस्त कुटुंबाला" (shokgrasta kutumbale), which translates to "grieving family." This phrase explicitly indicates sadness and sorrow.

Text: परमब्रत चक्रवर्ती एक चांगला अभिनेता आहे पण इथे त्याच्या वाट्याला विशेष काही आले नाही
translated_text: Parambrata Chakraborty is a good actor but nothing special happened to him here.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विशेष काही आले नाही" (vishesh kahi aale nahi), which translates to "nothing special happened," indicating a lack of positive outcome or recognition.

Text: स्वतः पालक गमावण्याचा विचार समजणे कठीण आहे परंतु अंमलबजावणी एक स्वर स्थापित करण्यासाठी संघर्ष करते
translated_text: The thought of losing a parent yourself is hard to fathom but the execution struggles to establish a tone.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "संघर्ष" (sangharsh), which translates to "struggles." This indicates difficulty and negativity.

Text: मृत व्यक्तीला मोक्ष देण्याच्या नावाखाली पैसे उकळण्यात त्याला अजिबात पर्वा नाही
translated_text: He doesn't care at all about extorting money in the name of saving the dead.
Justification: "पर्वा नाही" (parwa nahi - doesn't care) indicates a lack of empathy and disregard for ethical behavior, contributing to the negative sentiment. This, coupled with the exploitative act described, strongly suggests disgust.

Text: विविध शैली एकत्रित करणे - म्युझिकल कॉमेडी थ्रिलर नाटक आणि कल्पनारम्य - कथनाविरूद्ध कार्य करते
translated_text: Combining different genres - musical comedy thriller drama and fantasy - works against the narrative
Justification: "कथनाविरूद्ध कार्य करते" (works against the narrative) indicates a negative impact, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: एक तरुण, अर्जुन (शिवराज वायचळ) त्याच्या सुरुवातीच्या काळात, एका संध्याकाळी उशिरा मद्यधुंद होऊन घरी परततो, तो नित्याचा सराव होता.
translated_text: A young man, Arjun (Shivraj Vaichal) in his prime, returns home drunk late one evening, as was his usual practice.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "मद्यधुंद होऊन घरी परततो, तो नित्याचा सराव होता" (madyadhund houn ghari paratto, to nityacha sarav hota) which translates to "returns home drunk, as was his usual practice". This highlights a repeated, undesirable behavior, indicating a negative habit and inducing feelings of disgust.

Text: जवळपास सात वर्षं हा बिनबोभाट चाललेला गोरखधंदा मध्ये संशयाच्या भोवऱ्यात येतो
translated_text: This business, which has been going on for almost seven years, is now under suspicion.
Justification: "संशयाच्या भोवऱ्यात येतो" (suspicion) indicates negativity, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: एक भूतकाळात होऊन गेलेला गुन्हा असतो किंवा भूत जो वर्तमानकाळात नायकाला किंवा नायिकेला छळत असतो
translated_text: A past crime or ghost that haunts the hero or heroine in the present.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "छळत" (chhaLat), which means "haunts" or "torments," implying a negative and distressing experience.

Text: गरिबांच्या कहाण्या सहज बघायला मिळत नाहीत, पण त्यांच्या दुर्दशेकडे डोळेझाक करणं हा फक्त पाषाणहृदयाच्या लोकांसाठीच पर्याय आहे.
translated_text: The stories of the poor are not easy to see, but turning a blind eye to their plight is only an option for the stone-hearted.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "पाषाणहृदयाच्या लोकांसाठीच पर्याय आहे" (pāṣāṇahr̥dayācyā lōkānsāṭhīca paryāya āhē), which translates to "only an option for the stone-hearted." This implies a strong disapproval of those who ignore the plight of the poor, associating such behavior with being "stone-hearted," thereby conveying a negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र या कारणामुळे त्याचं बालपणीचे प्रेम रुपा (करीना कपूर) वारंवार त्याच्याशी लग्न करण्यास नकार देते
translated_text: However, due to this reason, his childhood sweetheart Roopa (Kareena Kapoor) repeatedly refuses to marry him.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "नकार देते" (nakar dete), meaning "refuses," indicating a negative action of rejection.

Text: जेव्हा त्यांना समजतं की ‘बस्ता’ चोरीला गेला आहे तेव्हा ते खचतात आणि आत्महत्या करण्यासाठी पोलिस स्टेशनमधून बाहेर पडतात
translated_text: When they realize that the 'bag' has been stolen, they become distraught and leave the police station to commit suicide.
Justification: The phrase "आत्महत्या करण्यासाठी" (aatmahatya karnyasathi - to commit suicide) strongly indicates a negative sentiment and expresses profound sadness.

Text: काजोलच्या तोंडी नुसत्या शिव्या आहेत
translated_text: Kajol's mouth is full of insults.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "शिव्या" (shivya), meaning "insults/abuses," which expresses a negative concept.

Text: अनिलची मुलगी अभिनेत्री सोनम कपूरचं तो अपहरण करतो
translated_text: He kidnaps Anil's daughter, actress Sonam Kapoor.
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the word "अपहरण करतो" (apaharan karto), meaning "kidnaps," which denotes a harmful action. While the emotion is neutral, the act itself has negative connotations.

Text: सहसा, अशा चित्रपटाचा शेवटचा सीन प्रभाव निर्माण करण्यात मोठी भूमिका बजावतो, परंतु हा चित्रपट असामान्य असल्याचे दिसते.
translated_text: Usually, the last scene of such a film plays a big role in creating an impact, but this film seems to be unusual.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "असामान्य असल्याचे दिसते" (asamanya aslyache diste), which translates to "seems to be unusual," implying a deviation from the norm and suggesting a potentially undesirable or unexpected outcome.

Text: आता महिला तुरुंगात गेल्या आहेत, पण हत्या कोणी केली? हा प्रश्न अद्याप अनुत्तरीत आहे
translated_text: Now the women have gone to jail, but who committed the murder? This question is still unanswered.
Justification: "हत्या" (murder) indicates a negative event, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र सगळी सतत डोक्यात राख घालून घेतलेली नेहमी हिडीस फिडीस करणारी पात्रे म्हणजे विनोद आणि कथेतील सोपेपणा म्हणजे बावळटगिरी असा काहीसा समज करून घेतल्याने सगळा बाळबोध कारभार झाला आहे
translated_text: However, all the characters who are constantly wearing ash on their heads and always making jokes are jokes and the simplicity of the story is nonsense, so the whole thing has become a childish affair.
Justification: The phrase "बावळटगिरी असा काहीसा समज करून घेतल्याने" (understanding the simplicity as nonsense) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण ती फोल ठरली असून सलमान स्वतःच्याच सलमानमय आवेशातून बाहेर पडला आहे
translated_text: But it failed and Salman has gone out of his own Salman-like zeal.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फोल ठरली" ("fol tharali"), which translates to "failed".

Text: त्याच्याविषयी सांगायचं झाल्यास अक्षयनं या चित्रपटातून प्रेक्षकांची निराशा केली आहे
translated_text: Speaking of him, Akshay has disappointed the audience with this film.
Justification: "निराशा केली आहे" (niraasha keli aahe) translates to "disappointed" and indicates a negative sentiment of disappointment, hence sadness.

Text: चित्रपट सुरु होतो तेव्हा तिचा खून झालेला आहे आणि ही पार्श्वभूमी हळूहळू उलगडत जात तिचा खुनी हा तिचा नवराच आहे हे फार काळ लपून राहत नाही
translated_text: When the film begins, she has been murdered, and as the background gradually unfolds, it is not long before it becomes clear that her murderer is her husband.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "खून झालेला आहे" (khoon zaleela aahe), meaning "has been murdered," which indicates a tragic and violent event.

Text: चित्रपटाचा पूर्वाध प्रेक्षकांना खिळवून ठेवण्यात यशस्वी ठरत असला तरी उत्तरार्ध मात्र विशेष नाही
translated_text: Although the first half of the film is successful in keeping the audience entertained, the second half is not special.
Justification: The phrase "विशेष नाही" (vishesh nahi), meaning "not special," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: या धावपळीत तो जगणंच विसरुन जातो
translated_text: In this rush, he forgets to live.
Justification: "विसरुन जातो" (visrun jato - forgets) indicates a loss or lack of fulfillment, resulting in a negative sentiment. The emotion is neutral because it simply states a fact about the consequence of the rush, without expressing anger, sadness, or any other strong emotion.

Text: एवढं सगळं छान छान असून सुध्दा ठराविक वेळेनंतर चित्रपट थोडा ताणल्यासारखा वाटतो
translated_text: Even though everything is so great, the movie feels a bit stretched after a certain point.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "थोडा ताणल्यासारखा वाटतो" (thoda tanalyasarkha vatato), meaning "feels a bit stretched," indicates a negative experience with the movie.

Text: पण काही प्रसंगांमध्ये तो ;विवेक ओबेरॉय;चं वाटतो
translated_text: But in some cases, he feels like Vivek Oberoi.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "विवेक ओबेरॉयचं वाटतो" (feels like Vivek Oberoi) implies a negative comparison, given Vivek Oberoi's controversial image and career trajectory.

Text: पटकथा आणि संकलनाच्या बाबीत अधिक काम करण्यास वाव होता
translated_text: There was scope for more work in the areas of screenwriting and editing.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अधिक काम करण्यास वाव होता" (adhik kaam karanyas vaav hota), which implies a deficiency or lack of quality, suggesting that improvements were needed.

Text: प्रीतम कागणे उदास क्षणांमध्ये चांगली आहे, परंतु भावनिकरित्या भरलेल्या दृश्यांमध्ये ती विषयापेक्षा अधिक मधुर दिसते.
translated_text: Pritam Kagane is good in sad moments, but in emotionally charged scenes she seems more melodramatic than matter-of-fact.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "विषयापेक्षा अधिक मधुर दिसते" (vishayapeksha adhik madhur diste), meaning "seems more melodramatic than matter-of-fact," indicates an over-the-top or unnatural performance, thus reflecting negatively on Pritam Kagane's acting in emotionally charged scenes.

Text: या आजारामुळे त्याची आवडती क्रियाकलाप, गिर्यारोहण आणि निखिल सामान्य जीवन जगणे देखील थांबवते
translated_text: This disease also stops his favorite activity, mountain climbing, and Nikhil from living a normal life.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "थांबवते" (thambavate), which translates to "stops." This indicates a negative impact on Nikhil's life due to the disease.

Text: सिनेमाच्या नावावरूनच सांगायचं झालं तर सिनेमात नमक मीठ कमी पडलंय
translated_text: If you look at the title of the movie, you can tell that the movie lacks salt and pepper.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "नमक मीठ कमी पडलंय" (namak meeth kami padlay), meaning "lacks salt and pepper," indicates a deficiency or lack of essential elements, implying a negative quality of the movie.

Text: पटकथेतले काही ‘ट्रॅक’ निश्चित चांगले रंगले आहेत पण हे ‘ट्रॅक’ एकत्र परिणाम म्हणून जोडल्यास त्यातला नर्मविनोद म्हणावासा रंगत नाही
translated_text: Some of the 'tracks' in the script are certainly well-written, but when these 'tracks' are put together as a result, the humor in them doesn't really shine.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because "नर्मविनोद म्हणावासा रंगत नाही" (narmavinod mhanavasa rangat nahi), which translates to "the humor doesn't really shine," indicating a lack of desired positive impact.

Text: एकाचवेळी अनेक गोष्टींवर भाष्य करण्याचा दिग्दर्शकाच्या अट्टहासापायी मूळ विषय बाजूला पडला आहे
translated_text: The original subject has been sidelined by the director's insistence on commenting on many things at once.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "अट्टहासापायी" (attahasapayee), meaning "due to insistence," implies a negative consequence of the director's actions, leading to the main subject being sidelined.

Text: बालपणातच त्यांच्यापासून बाप दुरावलेला असतो
translated_text: Their father is distant from them in their childhood.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "दुरावलेला" (duravalela), which translates to "distant" or "separated." This word implies a negative experience of loss or absence of a father figure during childhood.

Text: इतर अनेक चित्रपटांप्रमाणे हा चित्रपटही सेकंड हाफ सिंड्रोमने ग्रस्त आहे
translated_text: Like many other films, this one also suffers from second half syndrome.
Justification: The phrase "सिंड्रोमने ग्रस्त आहे" (syndrome ne grasta aahe), meaning "suffers from syndrome," indicates a negative situation, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: मध्यंतरानंतर शेवटाकडे जाताना होणारा गोंधळ आणि गुंडाळलेला शेवट टाळता आला असता तर चित्रपट अधिक मनोरंजक झाला असता
translated_text: The film would have been more interesting if the confusion and twist ending towards the end could have been avoided after the interval.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गोंधळ आणि गुंडाळलेला शेवट" (gondhal aani gundalalela shevat) which means "confusion and twist ending", indicating a negative aspect of the film.

Text: हे दुर्दैवी आहे कारण होडी हा एक हृदयस्पर्शी चित्रपट आहे
translated_text: This is unfortunate because Hodi is a heartwarming film.
Justification: "दुर्दैवी" (durdavi), meaning unfortunate, directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: सिनेमात एकीकडे सामाजिक विषय मांडत असताना दुसरीकडे काही ठिकाणी लेखनात लेखकानं भान ठेवलेलं नाही
translated_text: While the film presents social issues on one hand, the author has not been aware of this in some places.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "लेखकानं भान ठेवलेलं नाही" (lekhakan bhān ṭhevalelṃ nāhī), which translates to "the author has not been aware of this," indicating a lack of consideration or mindfulness in the writing. This expresses a critical assessment, thus the negative sentiment.

Text: असा ट्रॅक भरकटत, बाष्कळ विनोद करत करत अखेर हा चित्रपट संपतो आणि आपण सुटकेचा निश्वास सोडतो
translated_text: With such a track wandering around, making silly jokes, the film finally ends and we breathe a sigh of relief.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by "बाष्कळ विनोद" (bāṣkaḷ vinod), which translates to "silly jokes" or "foolish humor." This indicates the jokes were unfunny and likely detracted from the viewing experience. While "सुटकेचा निश्वास सोडतो" (sutkecha nishwas sodto) implies relief, it's relief *from* the film, further reinforcing the negative sentiment and the movie being not very enjoyable. "Joy" is present in the feeling of relief, but overshadowed by the negative experience.

Text: आपण क्लायमॅक्सला पोहोचेपर्यंत चित्रपटाची पुनर्प्राप्ती होईल अशी आशा आहे परंतु दुर्दैवाने कथा सुधारत नाही
translated_text: I hope the film recovers by the time we reach the climax but unfortunately the story doesn't improve.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "दुर्दैवाने" (durdavane), meaning "unfortunately," which indicates a negative outcome or disappointment.

Text: सिरीजमधील उणिवाही वेबसिरीज मस्ट वॉच असली तरी सिरीजचा दिग्दर्शक काही ठिकाणी कमी पडला आहे असं जाणवतं
translated_text: The series' shortcomings Although the web series is a must-watch, it feels like the director of the series has fallen short in some areas.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "कमी पडला आहे" (kami padla aahe), which translates to "has fallen short," indicating a deficiency or failure in the director's performance.

Text: मध्यम मसालेदार तुमचा सामूहिक मनोरंजन नाही
translated_text: Medium spicy is not your collective entertainment.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "नाही" (nahi), which means "not," negating the possibility of the medium spiciness being a source of collective entertainment.

Text: मध्यमवयीन माणसाच्या कल्पनारम्य म्हणून संरचित या चित्रपटात उभी राहणारी एकमेव गोष्ट म्हणजे महिलांनी डोळ्याच्या कँडीशिवाय काहीच न खेळण्याबरोबर उधळपट्टी संवाद आणि कृतघ्न दृश्यांचा उच्च वापर केला आहे.
translated_text: The only thing that stands out in this film, structured as a middle-aged man's fantasy, is the high use of extravagant dialogue and thankless scenes, with the women playing nothing but eye candy.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कृतघ्न दृश्यांचा उच्च वापर" (krutaghna drushyancha uchch vapar), which translates to "high use of thankless scenes," implying a negative quality and lack of appreciation in the film.

Text: त्यामुळे सिनेमातील कलाकारांचा प्रभाव पडला तरी सिनेमातील वातावरणाचा प्रभाव पडत नाही
translated_text: Therefore, even though the actors in the film have an impact, the atmosphere in the film does not.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "प्रभाव पडत नाही" (prabhav padat nahi), meaning "does not have an impact," indicating a lack of positive effect from the film's atmosphere.

Text: कानेटकरांनी लिहिलेल्या रायगडाला जेव्हा झाग येत (रायगड जागृत होतो) या नाटकातील मराठा राजपुत्र संभाजी म्हणून ज्या हौसाने त्यांना ओळख मिळाली, ती त्यांना अपयश, अपमान आणि शेवटी विस्मृतीत टाकते.
translated_text: The enthusiasm with which he gained recognition as the Maratha prince Sambhaji in the play Raigadala Jab Jag Yeta (When Raigad Awakens) written by Kanetkar leads him to failure, humiliation and ultimately oblivion.
Justification: The phrase "अपयश, अपमान आणि शेवटी विस्मृतीत टाकते" (failure, humiliation and ultimately oblivion) indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a negative and undesirable outcome.

Text: निधनाच्या पूर्वी त्यांनी आपल्या कुटुंबियांसाठी एक चिठ्ठी लिहून ठेवलेली असते
translated_text: Before his death, he wrote a note to his family.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "निधनाच्या" (nidhanachya), meaning "death," which indicates a sad event.

Text: घरमालक आणि भाडेकरू एकमेकांवर कुरघोडी करून पाहतात
translated_text: Landlords and tenants look at each other with a frown.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the phrase "कुरघोडी करून पाहतात" (kurghodi karun pahtat), which implies a competitive and potentially hostile dynamic where each party tries to outdo the other. While not explicitly emotional, this power struggle indicates negativity.

Text: हे त्यांना मुक्तीच्या मार्गावर आणते आणि अखेरीस, यशाकडे घेऊन जाते, परंतु वाटेत त्यांना खूप त्रास सहन करावा लागतो
translated_text: This puts them on the path to liberation and, eventually, success, but they have to endure a lot of hardships along the way.
Justification: The phrase "खूप त्रास सहन करावा लागतो" (khup tras sahan karava lagto - have to endure a lot of hardships) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: हा युवक आहे सोलापूरचा तर युवती आहे कोल्हापूरची सोलापूरमध्ये पडलेल्या दुष्काळामध्ये स्वतचे जीवन संपवलेल्या एका शेतकऱ्याचा मुलगा असलेला मिथुन अभिनय बेर्डे आईसोबत प्रियांका बेर्डे राहत आहे
translated_text: This young man is from Solapur and the young woman is from Kolhapur. Mithun Abhinay Berde, the son of a farmer who ended his life during the drought in Solapur, lives with his mother Priyanka Berde.
Justification: The phrase "स्वतचे जीवन संपवलेल्या एका शेतकऱ्याचा मुलगा" (son of a farmer who ended his life) indicates a negative sentiment due to the mention of suicide.

Text: सिद्धार्थ मल्होत्राने रघूची भूमिका उत्तमरित्या साकारली आहे पण त्याच्या भूमिकेतील बारकावे आणि पटकथेतील संदर्भ भूमिकेला उंचावण्यात कमी पडले आहेत
translated_text: Sidharth Malhotra has played the role of Raghu well but the nuances in his role and the references in the script fall short of elevating the role.
Justification: "कमी पडले आहेत" (kami padle aahet - fall short) indicates a negative sentiment as it signifies a deficiency in elevating the role.

Text: अमर्त्याचा माज सहन न झालेला आणि एक विशिष्ट ‘इलाका’ स्वतचा असलेला गायतोंडे अमोल गुप्ते अमर्त्याच्या विरोधात आहे
translated_text: Gaitonde Amol Gupte, who has not tolerated Amartya's majesty and has a specific 'area' of his own, is against Amartya.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "माज सहन न झालेला" (maj sahan na jhalela), meaning "not tolerated the majesty/arrogance," indicating a negative disposition and resistance towards Amartya.

Text: पण त्याच्या दोन्ही किडन्या निकामी झाल्यावर त्याची तब्येत बिघडते तेव्हा त्याच्या संपूर्ण आयुष्याच्या प्रवासावर त्याला प्रश्न पडतो
translated_text: But when his health deteriorates after both his kidneys fail, he questions his entire life's journey.
Justification: "निकामी झाल्यावर" (nikami zhalyavar) meaning "after failing" (referring to his kidneys), indicates a negative event leading to his deteriorating health and subsequent questioning of his life, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरीची रात्र अजून उत्तमरीत्या कॅमेऱ्यात कैद करता आली असती पण असो
translated_text: The night of Kojagiri could have been captured better on camera, but anyway
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "पण असो" (pan aso), which translates to "but anyway." This indicates a sense of resignation or disappointment that the night wasn't captured perfectly.

Text: यानंतर एकाच्या वैवाहिक आयुष्यात कलह निर्माण होतो, तर एकाचे ठरलेले लग्न मोडते
translated_text: After this, there is discord in one's married life, while one's arranged marriage breaks up.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "कलह निर्माण होतो" (kalaha nirman hoto), meaning "discord is created/arises," which indicates conflict and unhappiness, and "लग्न मोडते" (lagna modate) meaning "marriage breaks up," signaling loss and disappointment.

Text: मध्यांतरानंतरची कथा आणखी रटाळवाणी वाटू लागते
translated_text: The story after the interval starts to sound even more boring.
Justification: "रटाळवाणी" (rataḷvāṇī), meaning boring, directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र एक वेळ अशी येते जिथं सहनशीलतेचा कडेलोट होतो
translated_text: But there comes a time when patience runs out.
Justification: The phrase "कडेलोट होतो" (kadelot hoto), meaning "runs out" or "reaches a breaking point", indicates a negative sentiment as it signifies the exhaustion of patience.

Text: लेखन कमकुवत असल्याचं जाणवत राहतं
translated_text: The writing feels weak.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "कमकुवत" (kamkuvat), which translates to "weak." This word indicates a deficiency in the writing, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: सिनेमाच्या कथानायकांच्या तोंडी असलेली अलंकारिक वाक्ये खटकतात
translated_text: The figurative phrases in the mouths of the movie's protagonists are jarring.
Justification: "खटकतात" (khataktat) implies a jarring or displeasing effect, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: तिचे कुटुंब त्यांच्या दैनंदिन जीवनासाठी संघर्ष करत आहे आणि त्यांच्याकडे परिधान करण्यासाठी पुरेसे कपडे नाहीत
translated_text: Her family is struggling to survive and they don't have enough clothes to wear.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "संघर्ष करत आहे" (sangharsh karat aahe), which translates to "struggling," indicating hardship and difficulty.

Text: पायवाट त्यांना जवळच्या एका गावात घेऊन जाते जिथे कनिका नावाची मुलगी राहत होती, जिचा मृत्यू डॉ. कौशिक आणि त्याच्या साथीदाराच्या अनैतिक वर्तनामुळे आणि लोभामुळे झाला.
translated_text: The trail takes them to a nearby village where a girl named Kanika lived, who died due to the immoral behavior and greed of Dr. Kaushik and his accomplice.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "अनैतिक वर्तनामुळे आणि लोभामुळे" (anaitik vartanamule aani lobhamule), meaning "due to immoral behavior and greed." This phrase directly attributes Kanika's death to negative actions, inducing a feeling of disgust.

Text: तसेच सांसारिक विनोद आणि अतिउत्साही दृश्यांमुळे कंटाळवाणे होते
translated_text: Also, the mundane humor and overly enthusiastic scenes made it boring.
Justification: The word "कंटाळवाणे" (kantaalvane), meaning "boring," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यानंतर तिच्या अभिनय कौशल्यावरदेखील प्रश्नचिन्ह उभे राहिले होते
translated_text: After that, her acting skills were also questioned.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "प्रश्नचिन्ह उभे राहिले होते" (prashnachinha ubhe rahile hote), which means "questions were raised," implying doubt and criticism regarding her acting skills.

Text: त्या प्रसंगात आपण रागाने पत्नीची हत्या करतो आहोत
translated_text: In that case, we are killing our wife out of anger.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "रागाने" (rāgāne), which translates to "out of anger," and the action of "हत्या" (hatyā) which means "murder/killing". The combination describes a violent act motivated by a negative emotion.

Text: सिंगचा अभिनय पाहण्यासारखा नाही आणि बालगुडेही तसाच आहे
translated_text: Singh's acting is not worth watching and Balgude is the same.
Justification: "पाहण्यासारखा नाही" (pahanyasarkha nahi - not worth watching) expresses a negative evaluation of Singh's acting, directly contributing to the negative sentiment. The implication that Balgude is "तसाच आहे" (tasach aahe - the same) further reinforces this negative assessment.

Text: मध्यांतरानंतर संभाषणे ड्रॅग होऊ लागतात आणि उद्विग्न होतात
translated_text: Conversations start to drag and become agitated after the interval.
Justification: "उद्विग्न होतात" (udvigna hotat) which translates to "become agitated" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: स्पार्टन गावात जीवन कठीण आहे
translated_text: Life is hard in a Spartan village.
Justification: "कठीण आहे" (kathin aahe - is hard/difficult) expresses a negative sentiment, indicating hardship and contributing to sadness.

Text: मात्र एका विद्यार्थ्यापासून त्याचे पालक कुटुंब इथपासून सुरू होऊन रॉकीच्या कुटुंबात चित्रपट शिरतो तेथून तो इमानदार पोलिस अधिकारी आणि भ्रष्ट राजकारण्याकडे जातो
translated_text: But the film starts from a student to his foster family and then enters Rocky's family, from there he goes to an honest police officer and a corrupt politician.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the presence of the phrase "भ्रष्ट राजकारण्याकडे" (bhrasht rajkarnyankade), which translates to "corrupt politician." The word "भ्रष्ट" (bhrasht) specifically indicates corruption, thus leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: ;चले आना; हे गाणं सोडलं तर एकही गाणं लक्षात राहत नाही
translated_text: ;Chale Ana; If you leave this song, you won't remember any other song.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "एकही गाणं लक्षात राहत नाही" (ekahi gaan lahanat rahat nahi), which translates to "you won't remember any other song," indicating a lack of appreciation for other songs besides the one mentioned.

Text: ती दिग्दर्शकीय पकड सिनेमाच्या पूर्वार्धात दिसत नाही
translated_text: That directorial touch is not visible in the first half of the film.
Justification: "दिसत नाही" (disat nahi - not visible) indicates a lack of something desirable, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र ती फारशी प्रभावी वाटत नाहीत
translated_text: But they don't seem very effective.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "प्रभावी वाटत नाहीत" (prabhavi vaatat nahit), which translates to "don't seem effective." The "नाहीत" (nahit) part explicitly negates the effectiveness, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र मध्यंतरानंतर लायगर कमालीचा कंटाळवाणा होतो
translated_text: But after the interval, Liger becomes extremely boring.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "कंटाळवाणा" (kantalwana), which translates to "boring" or "tedious" and expresses a negative quality.

Text: त्यामुळे म्हणावासा हॉररचा थरार इथं रंगत नाही
translated_text: So, you could say that the thrill of horror doesn't exist here.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "रंगत नाही" (rangat nahi), which means "doesn't exist/is not present," indicating a lack of the desired horror thrill, hence the fear-related emotion.

Text: बरं, मराठी चित्रपट निर्मात्यांकडून अशाच ध्वनी आणि दिसणाऱ्या प्रेमकथांपासून सुटका नाही
translated_text: Well, there is no escape from such sounding and looking love stories from Marathi filmmakers.
Justification: The phrase "सुटका नाही" (sutka nahi), meaning "no escape," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: तसं अपयश सायनाच्या वाट्यालाही आलं
translated_text: Saina also faced similar failure.
Justification: "अपयश" (apayas), meaning failure, indicates a negative situation, hence the negative sentiment. While negative, the sentence is a statement of fact and doesn't express strong emotion, leading to a neutral emotion assignment.

Text: तीच गोष्ट अवेळी वाजणाऱ्या गाण्यांची
translated_text: The same thing happens with songs that play at the wrong time.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "अवेळी वाजणाऱ्या" (aveli vajanarya), meaning "playing at the wrong time" or "untimely playing," which implies an annoyance or something undesirable.

Text: त्यात रोज रात्री बद्रूला मारहाण करीत राहतो
translated_text: He keeps beating Badru every night.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "मारहाण करीत राहतो" (maarhaan karit rahto), which means "keeps beating". This indicates a repeated and violent action, leading to a negative sentiment. Although the emotion is neutral, the act itself is inherently negative.

Text: राज्याच्या निवडणुका तोंडावर आल्याने विरोधी पक्षनेते सयाजीराव (मोहन जोशी) मुंबईत आले आणि त्यांच्या हॉटेलच्या खोलीत गूढ मृत्यू झाला.
translated_text: With state elections looming, opposition leader Sayajirao (Mohan Joshi) arrives in Mumbai and mysteriously dies in his hotel room.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गूढ मृत्यू झाला" (goodh mrutyu jhala), which translates to "mysteriously died". Death, especially a mysterious one, inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: इच्छा नसतांनाही अश्याला यामध्ये सहभागी व्हावं लागतं
translated_text: Even if one doesn't want to, one has to participate in this.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because of the phrase "इच्छा नसतांनाही" (icchā nasatānnāhī), which means "even if one doesn't want to." This indicates a lack of desire and forced participation, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: घरसंपत्ती बळकावण्यासाठी ज्येष्ठ नागरिकांची हत्या केल्याचे वृत्त आपण बातम्यांमधून वारंवार पाहत वाचत असतो
translated_text: We often see and read in the news stories of senior citizens being murdered to seize their homes.
Justification: The phrase "हत्या केल्याचे" (hatya kelyache), meaning "murdered," strongly indicates a negative sentiment. The act of murder is inherently disgusting.

Text: परंतु बाळासाहेब ठाकरे सोडून अन्य कोणत्याही पात्रावर पुरेसे लक्ष न दिल्याने ते कायम झाकोळलेले आणि निर्जीव वाटतात
translated_text: But with not enough attention paid to any character other than Balasaheb Thackeray, they always seem dull and lifeless.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "झाकोळलेले आणि निर्जीव वाटतात" (zhakollele aani nirjeev vatatat), which translates to "seem dull and lifeless." This indicates a negative perception of the characters.

Text: पण सिनेमा चमकदार कामगिरी करेल का यावर शंका आहे
translated_text: But it is doubtful whether the movie will perform brilliantly.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "शंका" (shanka), which translates to "doubt".

Text: परिस्थिती आणखी बिघडते आणि रीमासोबतच्या नातेसंबंधावर ताण आल्याने विजय टिकून राहण्यासाठी धडपडतो.
translated_text: As the situation worsens and his relationship with Reema becomes strained, Vijay struggles to survive.
Justification: "बिघडते" (bighadte - worsens) indicates a negative development in the situation, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: म्हणूनच सर्व पात्र एका वर्तुळात फिरतात आणि एकामागून एक दृश्यात नवीन असे काहीच येत नाही
translated_text: That's why all the characters go around in a circle and nothing new comes out in one scene after another.
Justification: The phrase "नवीन असे काहीच येत नाही" (navin ase kahich yet nahi) which translates to "nothing new comes out" expresses a lack of progress and novelty, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मंगेश धाकडे संगीतातील, रोमँटिक ट्रॅक रनटाइममध्ये भर घालतात, तर मोठ्या आवाजातील शीर्षकगीत चिडचिड करतात
translated_text: Composed by Mangesh Dhakade, the romantic tracks add to the runtime, while the loud title song irritates.
Justification: The phrase "चिडचिड करतात" (chidchid karatat) which translates to "irritates" is indicative of a negative sentiment.

Text: माई चिंताग्रस्त होतात, तिच्या चेहऱ्याचे स्नायू कडक होतात, प्रत्येक वेळी कोणीतरी कॅमेरा घेऊन येतो
translated_text: Mai gets nervous, her facial muscles tighten, every time someone comes with a camera.
Justification: The phrase "चिंताग्रस्त होतात" (chintagrast hotat) meaning "gets nervous" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण दुर्दैवाने मरजावांची ही भट्टी तितकीशी जमलेली नाही
translated_text: But unfortunately, this furnace of Marjava is not that well-prepared.
Justification: The word "दुर्दैवाने" (durdhaivane), meaning "unfortunately," contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: पार्श्वसंगीत विभागाचाही विश्वास वाटतो, विचित्रपणे, परिस्थिती नाट्यमय दिसण्यासाठी मोठ्या आवाजात संगीत वाजवणे आवश्यक आहे.
translated_text: The background music department also seems to believe, oddly enough, that loud music is necessary to make the situation seem dramatic.
Justification: The phrase "विचित्रपणे" (vichitrapane), meaning "oddly enough," indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses a sense of strangeness or disbelief regarding the background music department's belief.

Text: चित्रपटातील संवाद आणि गाणी चांगली आहेत, मात्र कथा जुनीच आहे
translated_text: The dialogues and songs in the film are good, but the story is old.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "कथा जुनीच आहे" (katha junich aahe), meaning "the story is old," indicating a lack of originality and therefore a negative aspect of the film.

Text: चित्रपटाचे लेखन उपदेशात्मक आहे आणि वेगवेगळ्या परिस्थितीत त्याच बिंदूवर वारंवार हार करीत आहे जे तितकेच पोकळ आपल्याला भावनांनी सोडत आहेत जे आपल्या हृदयाला खरोखर स्पर्श करीत नाहीत
translated_text: The film's writing is didactic and repeatedly hits the same point in different situations leaving us equally hollow with emotions that don't really touch our hearts.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "पोकळ आपल्याला भावनांनी सोडत आहेत जे आपल्या हृदयाला खरोखर स्पर्श करीत नाहीत" (pokal aaplyala bhavananni sodat aahet je aaplya hrudayala kharokhar sparsh karat nahit), which translates to "leaving us equally hollow with emotions that don't really touch our hearts," indicating a lack of emotional resonance and emptiness.

Text: त्यामुळे दिग्दर्शकाला नेमके काय सांगायचे आहे ते अनुत्तरितच राहते
translated_text: So what exactly the director wants to say remains unanswered.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "अनुत्तरितच राहते" (anuttaritach rahate), meaning "remains unanswered," which indicates a lack of resolution and hence, a negative outcome.

Text: दोन्ही बत्रा दाम्पत्य मूळापासून हादरून जातात
translated_text: Both the Batra couple are shaken to the core.
Justification: The phrase "हादरून जातात" (hadarun jatat), meaning "shaken to the core," indicates a strong negative impact and is responsible for the negative sentiment and emotion of fear.

Text: कमकुवत कथानककथेतील सर्व पात्रांना लेखकांनी कृत्रिम प्रयत्नांनी जोडले आहे
translated_text: Weak plot: All the characters in the story are connected by the authors with artificial efforts.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "कमकुवत" (kamkuvat), meaning "weak," which directly describes the plot as being of poor quality.

Text: जेव्हा चित्रपट सर्वात महत्वाचा असतो तेव्हा अक्षरशः नियंत्रण गमावतो
translated_text: The film literally loses control when it matters most.
Justification: The phrase "नियंत्रण गमावतो" (niyantran gamavto) meaning "loses control" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांचे निधन मुंबई [तेव्हा मुंबई] येथे झाले.
translated_text: He died in Mumbai [then Mumbai].
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is sadness due to the word "निधन" (nidhan), which means "death". This word inherently expresses a negative event, leading to a negative sentiment and sadness.

Text: वडिलांशी फारकत घ्यावी लागते
translated_text: I have to part ways with my father.
Justification: "फारकत घ्यावी लागते" (I have to part ways) implies a forced separation and loss, triggering sadness and a negative sentiment.

Text: असा समाजा जिथे आजही म्हणजे व्या शतकातही, जात आणि धर्माच्या बाबतीत एकमेकांविरुद्ध एक मोठा गट कार्यरत आहे
translated_text: A society where even today, in the 21st century, there is a large group working against each other on the basis of caste and religion.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "एकमेकांविरुद्ध एक मोठा गट कार्यरत आहे" (ekmekanviruddh ek motha gat karyarat aahe), meaning "a large group working against each other," highlighting conflict and division.

Text: लोकशाही व्यवस्था, सामाजिक व्यवस्था आणि आपली स्वत:च्या सोयीची व्यवस्था यात प्रत्येक जण इतका व्यवस्थित अडकला आहे की त्यातून बुद्धीच्या किंवा तर्काच्या आधारेही कोणी बाहेर पडायचा प्रयत्न केलाच तर तो इतरांच्या दृष्टीने वेडा ठरतो
translated_text: Everyone is so entangled in the democratic system, the social system, and the system of their own convenience that anyone who tries to get out of it, even on the basis of intelligence or logic, is considered crazy in the eyes of others.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वेडा ठरतो" (veda tharto), meaning "considered crazy," which expresses a negative consequence of deviating from the established systems.

Text: ट्रेलरमध्ये जितकी उत्सुकता हा चित्रपट पाहण्याबद्दल असते तितकाच भ्रमनिरास चित्रपट पाहिल्यावर होतो
translated_text: The trailer is as much about the excitement of watching the film as the disappointment is when you actually watch it.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "भ्रमनिरास" (bhramniraas), meaning disillusionment or disappointment.

Text: हे फुगे आणि काही काळे तुला सुखदायक गाणी आहेत पण चित्रपटात स्थान नाही असे वाटते
translated_text: These bubbles and some black tea are soothing songs but they don't seem to have a place in the movie.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase " चित्रपटात स्थान नाही असे वाटते" (chitrapatat sthan nahi ase vaatte), which translates to "they don't seem to have a place in the movie." This indicates a lack of suitability or negativity towards the bubbles and tea in relation to the movie.

Text: कथनाची नॉन-लिनियर शैली प्रेक्षकांना कंटाळवाण्यापासून वाचवत नाही
translated_text: The non-linear style of narration does not save the audience from boredom
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "कंटाळवाण्यापासून" (kantaalvanyapasun), which translates to "from boredom," indicating a negative experience.

Text: तिला थोड्याशा दक्षिण भारतीय उच्चाराने मराठी बोलावे लागते, जे खोटे दिसते.
translated_text: She has to speak Marathi with a slight South Indian accent, which sounds fake.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "खोटे दिसते" (khote diste), meaning "sounds fake," expresses a negative opinion about her speech.

Text: विविध घटकांमधील समलैंगिक प्रश्न आणि त्यांच्या अडचणीदेखील तो आपल्याला सांगतो
translated_text: He also tells us about the homosexual issues and their difficulties in various aspects.
Justification: The phrase "अडचणीदेखील" (adchanidekhil - difficulties also) indicates a negative sentiment as it highlights the problems associated with the topic.

Text: त्याचे वडील राहिले नाहीत
translated_text: His father is gone.
Justification: The phrase "राहिले नाहीत" (rahile nahit), meaning "is gone" or "passed away," indicates loss and is a euphemistic way of saying someone has died, thus eliciting a negative sentiment and the emotion of sadness.

Text: पण त्यातील दुसरा अर्धा भाग डॅनी आणि निला यांच्यातील लबाडीच्या प्रेमकथेची काळजी घेणे कठिण होते
translated_text: But the other half of it was hard to care about the twisted love story between Danny and Nila.
Justification: "कठिण होते" (kathin hote) which translates to "hard" or "difficult" expresses a negative sentiment towards caring about the love story.

Text: यामुळे तिची एका वाईट कैदी रघु (उमेश जगताप) आणि त्याच्या तुरुंगातील मित्रांसोबत टक्कर होते.
translated_text: This brings her into conflict with a bad inmate, Raghu (Umesh Jagtap), and his prison buddies.
