Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "वाईट" (vaait), which translates to "bad." While the sentence describes a conflict, it's the description of Raghu as a "bad inmate" that introduces the negativity.

Text: उघड्या डोळ्यांनी त्यांची नैतिक आणि अनैतिक बाजू आपल्या दृष्टीक्षेपात पडत नाही
translated_text: Their moral and immoral side is not visible to the naked eye.
Justification: "अनैतिक" (anaetik - immoral) indicates a negative aspect of the subject, contributing to the negative sentiment. The presence of immorality evokes disgust.

Text: तिच्या पात्राला फारंच कमी वाव दिला गेला आहे
translated_text: Her character has been given very little scope.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "फारंच कमी वाव दिला गेला आहे" (pharanach kami vaav dila gela aahe), which translates to "very little scope has been given," indicating a lack or deficiency.

Text: शिवाय, सिनेमात अश्याचं आपल्या आईबरोबरचं नातं खोलवर दाखवायला हवं होतं
translated_text: Moreover, the film should have shown the deep relationship between Ajay and his mother.
Justification: "हवं होतं" (havn hotn) expresses a sense of regret or wishing something was different, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: वाय हा सिनेमा तुमचं कितपत मनोरंजन करेल हे सांगता येणार नाही
translated_text: You can't tell how much this movie will entertain you.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "सांगता येणार नाही" (sangata yenar nahi), meaning "cannot say," implying uncertainty and a lack of confidence in the movie's entertainment value, despite the potential for joy indicated by "मनोरंजन" (manoranjan - entertainment). The negative sentiment stems from the inability to guarantee a positive experience.

Text: त्यामुळे नंदिनीसोबत नुपूरचं अजिबात पटत नाही
translated_text: That's why Nupur doesn't get along with Nandini at all.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "अजिबात पटत नाही" (ajibat patat nahi), which translates to "doesn't get along at all" and implies a complete lack of compatibility.

Text: एवढं सगळं उत्तम असूनही हा सिनेमा चुकल्यासारखा वाटतो
translated_text: Despite all the great things, this movie feels like a failure.
Justification: The word "चुकल्यासारखा" (chuklyasarkha), meaning "like a failure" or "feels wrong," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: रणवीर सिंग एका भ्रष्ट पोलिस अधिका-याच्या भूमिकेत आहे
translated_text: Ranveer Singh plays a corrupt police officer.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because the word "भ्रष्ट" (bhrasht) means "corrupt," which carries a negative connotation.

Text: कॉमेडी ज्याने काही उल्लेखनीय नावे दिली आहेत तो त्याच्या मिनिट रनटाइममध्ये नेत्रदीपक फॅशनमध्ये क्रॅश आणि बर्न करण्यास व्यवस्थापित करतो
translated_text: The comedy that has given rise to some notable names manages to crash and burn in spectacular fashion throughout its minute runtime.
Justification: The phrase "क्रॅश आणि बर्न" (crash and burn) indicates a failure, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: रानीचं पाऊल वाकडं पडतं
translated_text: The queen's step is crooked.
Justification: "वाकडं पडतं" (vakada padata) implies a mistake or misstep, leading to a negative sentiment (-1) despite a neutral emotion.

Text: भाईंच्या बाबतीत इतर लोक किती महान होते हे दाखवण्याचा अट्टाहास आहे की हा चरित्रनायक वाटतो तितका मोठा नाही हे दाखवण्याचा प्रयत्न आहे हे समजत नाही
translated_text: I don't understand whether this is an attempt to show how great other people were in the case of Bhai or an attempt to show that this character is not as great as he seems.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "समजत नाही" (samajat nahi), meaning "I don't understand," indicating confusion and uncertainty, which contributes to a negative overall impression. While neutral emotion is marked, the confusion itself has a negative affect.

Text: प्रणाली घोगरेकडे अभिनय कौशल्य आहे, पण तिची भूमिका घाबरणे किंवा दुःखी होणे एवढीच मर्यादित आहे.
translated_text: Prasanna Ghogre has acting skills, but her role is limited to being scared or sad.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "घाबरणे किंवा दुःखी होणे एवढीच मर्यादित आहे" (ghabarne kinvaa dukhi hone evadhiich maryadit aahe), meaning "limited to being scared or sad," which indicates a restriction and lack of range in the acting, thus contributing to a negative overall impression.

Text: तू ज्याच्याशी लग्न करतोस त्याच्याशी का पळून जाशील? वाईट म्हणजे ही बातमी पसरल्यावर त्या जोडप्याच्या पालकांना प्रश्न पडू लागतो की ते का गेले असावेत
translated_text: Why would you run away with the person you're marrying? Worse, when the news spreads, the couple's parents start to wonder why they left.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "वाईट" (waiit), meaning "worse," indicating a negative escalation of the situation.

Text: खरं तर, लेखकाला चित्रपटातून प्रेक्षकांपर्यंत नेमके काय सांगायचे आहे याबद्दल संभ्रमात पडलेले दिसते.
translated_text: In fact, the writer seems confused about what exactly he wants to convey to the audience through the film.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "संभ्रमात" (sambhramat), which translates to "confused" or "in a state of confusion," indicating a lack of clarity and a negative aspect in the writer's perception.

Text: जगाचा भार खांद्यावर वाहणार्या माणसाकडून तुम्ही आणखी काय अपेक्षा कराल?सामान्यतः उद्धट असला तरी, श्रीपती आपल्या मुलींच्या चप्पलमधून काटा काढताना एक दुर्मिळ प्रेमळ बाजू दाखवतो.
translated_text: What more would you expect from a man who carries the weight of the world on his shoulders? Although usually rude, Shripati shows a rare affectionate side as he pulls a fork out of his daughters' slippers.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "उद्धट" (uddhata), which translates to "rude" or "arrogant" in English. This word creates a negative association with the character being described.

Text: या गोष्टीत पुढं काय होणार अशी उत्सुकता अजिबातच वाटत नसल्यामुळे चित्रपटातला ‘सरप्राइज इलिमेंट’ काहीसा संपून जातो आणि सुरू होतो फक्त आणि फक्त ‘मेलोड्रामा’
translated_text: Since there is no curiosity at all about what will happen next in this story, the 'surprise element' in the film is somewhat over and only 'melodrama' begins.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "उत्सुकता अजिबातच वाटत नसल्यामुळे" (utsukata ajibatach vaatat naslyamule), meaning "since there is no curiosity at all," which indicates a lack of engagement and anticipation, contributing to a negative feeling about the film.

Text: विठ्ठला शप्पथ योग्य कथा, पटकथा, संवाद, तर्कशास्त्र, सादरीकरण किंवा सभ्य सामग्रीशी संबंधित कोणत्याही गोष्टीकडे पूर्णपणे दुर्लक्ष दर्शवितो..
translated_text: Vitthal Shapath shows a complete disregard for proper story, screenplay, dialogue, logic, presentation or anything related to decent content.
Justification: "पूर्णपणे दुर्लक्ष दर्शवितो" (shows a complete disregard) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पटकथा चुकीची आहे हे समजायला तुम्हाला वेळ लागत नाही
translated_text: It doesn't take you long to realize that the script is wrong.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the word "चुकीची" (chukichi), meaning "wrong" or "incorrect," which directly describes the script.

Text: परंतु दिग्दर्शनातील कमतरतेमुळे त्यांना भूमिकेचा योग्य परिणाम साधता आलेला नाही
translated_text: But due to the lack of direction, he was unable to achieve the right effect of the role.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "कमतरतेमुळे" (kamtaratemule), which translates to "due to the lack of" or "due to the deficiency of." This indicates a negative aspect or flaw, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: आनंद दिघे यांच्याबाबत अधिकृत माहितीच्या तुलनेत सांगोवांगीच्या गोष्टी अधिक आहेत
translated_text: There are more rumors about Anand Dighe than official information.
Justification: The phrase "सांगोवांगीच्या गोष्टी अधिक आहेत" (sangovangichya goshti adhik aahet) which translates to "there are more rumors" implies a lack of reliable information and suggests potential misinformation, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: सोबत असलेला हवालदारदेखील किशोर कदम या प्रेमी युगुलाला काहीसा त्रास द्यायला सुरुवात करतो
translated_text: The constable accompanying him also starts to harass the couple, Kishore Kadam.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "त्रास द्यायला सुरुवात करतो" (traas dyayla survat karto), which translates to "starts to harass." This indicates an action causing distress and discomfort, leading to negative feelings.

Text: देसाई आपला दुष्ट अवतार जिवंत करण्यात यशस्वी होतो, पण त्यात सातत्याचा अभाव आहे
translated_text: Desai succeeds in bringing his evil avatar to life, but it lacks consistency.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "दुष्ट" (dusht), which means "evil." While the sentence acknowledges Desai's success, the presence of "evil" inherently imparts a negative connotation.

Text: परंतु गुडडू आणि रश्मीचे दुःख हे आहे की दोघांचे लग्न झाले नाही
translated_text: But Guddu and Rashmi's sadness is that they did not get married.
Justification: The phrase "दुःख हे आहे" (dukkh he aahe) directly translates to "sadness is," indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: एकेकाळी दिग्गज गायकाला ज्या पद्धतीने वागवले गेले ते पाहून तुम्हाला सुन्न आणि राग येतो
translated_text: The way the once legendary singer was treated makes you feel numb and angry
Justification: "राग येतो" (raag yeto) expresses anger, contributing to the negative sentiment. The overall context of mistreatment implied by "ज्या पद्धतीने वागवले गेले" (jya paddhatine vagavale gele) further reinforces the negative sentiment and suggests disgust.

Text: अभिनयही सुमारच!रवीना टंडनपासून ते कोणत्याही इतर अभिनेत्यापर्यंत, कोणीही इथे विशेष प्रभावी वाटत नाही
translated_text: The acting is also so-so! From Raveena Tandon to any other actor, no one seems particularly impressive here.
Justification: "सुमारच!" (sumarach!), meaning "so-so" or "mediocre", indicates a negative sentiment, despite the overall emotion being categorized as joy. This word expresses a lack of quality.

Text: काही प्रसंग आणि पात्र तर उगाच घुसवल्यासारखी वाटतात
translated_text: Some scenes and characters seem like they were just inserted.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "उगाच घुसवल्यासारखी वाटतात" (ugaach ghusavalyasarkhi vatatat), which suggests that scenes and characters feel arbitrarily inserted or forced, implying a lack of organic integration and therefore a negative experience.

Text: चित्रपटातील एकही गाणं लक्षात राहत नाही
translated_text: I don't remember any of the songs from the movie.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "लक्षात राहत नाही" (lakshat rahat nahi), which translates to "does not remain in memory," indicating a lack of memorability and therefore a negative experience.

Text: जे आहे ते सगळं जेमतेम आहे
translated_text: Everything that exists is just enough.
Justification: "जेमतेम" (jemtem), meaning "just enough" or "barely adequate," implies a lack of abundance or surplus, contributing to the negative sentiment. Though not strongly negative, it suggests a state of barely meeting requirements, hence the -1 sentiment. The neutral emotion arises as it's a statement of fact rather than an expression of feeling.
